reviews.text: Well this movie is something special and a real classic for fans of He-Man. Though, as even the comics were not as successful as the makers wanted them to be, it is surprising, that the movie was not worse than it is. It is not awful but also not great. I actually also see it as a curiosity that is worth watching BECAUSE of its bad acting, bad special effects and meagre storyline. For fans
reviews.author: siggi963

reviews.text: This is objectively awful. This came from an era, when creators of this type of content treated children as idiots, and it shines through in this dreck. It's difficult to see why they chose to remake this in 2026. He-Man? Man-at-Arms? A skeleton named Skeletor? They've must've spent at least 10 minutes working on the names and storyline.
reviews.author: jmg999

summary: When the evil Skeletor finds a mysterious power called the Cosmic Key, he becomes nearly invincible, seizing Castle Grayskull and the surrounding city. The Sorceress is now Skeletor's prisoner and he begins to drain her life-force as he waits for the moon of Eternia to align with the Great Eye of the Universe which will bestow god-like power upon him. However, courageous warrior He-Man locates the locksmith inventor Gwildor, who created the Key and has another version of it. During a battle, one of the Keys is transported to Earth, where it is found by teenagers Julie and Kevin. Now, both He-Man and Skeletor's forces arrive on Earth searching for the potent weapon.

title: Shooter

reviews.text: big fan of marky mark he really comes through in this it's a great movie i def recommend it. bought the bluray the other day.
reviews.author: chronic

reviews.text: A movie that knows exactly what it is: a high-velocity revenge fantasy where the good guy is always three steps ahead and the bad guys are always one monologue too late.
reviews.author: SAIDMTS

reviews.text: One of the best Mark Wahlberg movies for sure! Great story, great action, old fashion style when the bad guys get it. No woke bs, no stupid propaganda, lots of fun.
reviews.author: ragnarLothbrok

reviews.text: Definitely one of the better action movies I've watched in a while, although I would consider it as much "political thriller" as "action". Great movie about political cover-ups and ultimate payback. IMO, I felt like all the players - big and little - pulled off their roles very well. Definitely worth re-watching.
reviews.author: $hubes

reviews.text: Being in my collection, definitely had to watch again for the millionth time and the shot just keeps on getting better, the explosions get louder, the action never gets old and the cast fit perfectly. It’s definitely one of my favourites from (Mark Wahlberg) or let’s say my best from him.

reviews.text: Solid movie. I happen to have read the Bob Lee Swagger book series and I had to put that to one side to enjoy this movie for what it is. It is a good action movie and I had hoped they'd make a series that evolved closer to the books. 7/10
reviews.author: PorterUk

summary: A top Marine sniper, Bob Lee Swagger, leaves the military after a mission goes horribly awry and disappears, living in seclusion. He is coaxed back into service after a high-profile government official convinces him to help thwart a plot to kill the President of the United States. Ultimately double-crossed and framed for the attempt, Swagger becomes the target of a nationwide manhunt. He goes on the run to track the real killer and find out who exactly set him up, and why, eventually seeking revenge against some of the most powerful and corrupt leaders in the free world.

title: The Idea of You

reviews.text: Very far-fetched problems and drama, unfortunately. But the movie showed that the most of people are scum whose opinions are not worth paying attention to.
reviews.author: ragnarLothbrok

reviews.text: lol selling fantasies to single moms who can barely land a date. WOKE somewhat dropped the ball here -- they should've opted for a black single mother to make it more realistic. ROFL

reviews.text: 6.5 stars rounded. Anne Hathaway is clearly the stronger performer and the one carrying the show. The male lead was getting better, but I still don't think his performance was strong enough.

reviews.text: Cute, Lovely, Mesmerising. A movie made with lots of love and has a heart that shows the duality of society. A great movie, amazing movie, you'll feel good, you can cry, you'll laugh. A lot of emotions.

As they begin a whirlwind romance, it isn't long before Hayes' superstar status poses unavoidable challenges to their relationship, and Solène soon discovers that life in the glare of his spotlight might be more than she bargained for.

reviews.text: [this movie] is violent, brutal, and heartbreaking. It is also expertly portrayed, incredibly acted, and masterfully directed. One of the best crime dramas ever made.

summary: In the poverty-stricken favelas of Rio de Janeiro in the 1970s, two young men choose different paths. Rocket is a budding photographer who documents the increasing drug-related violence of his neighborhood, while José “Zé” Pequeno is an ambitious drug dealer diving into a dangerous life of crime.

title: The Post

reviews.text: Entertaining docudrama about an event that changed America. Back when news actually mattered and newsmen actually had integrity. The cast does a bang up job.
reviews.author: jekyl6669

reviews.text: IF I had seen this in my late teens, I may have been so inspired to become a reporter!! Such a fantastic movie with a fabulous message!

reviews.text: The movie is very interesting and clearly very curated in the cast and scenography. It tells an important piece of American history and is an ode to press freedom. However, I found it rather slow in development and a bit too lost in too many conversations. Lacks a bit of action/movement.
reviews.author: martina.physics

reviews.text: I did not expect this film to be as good as it was. For a while I thought that Hanks may have been miscast as it felt like he brought a little too much levity to a very serious story. The core issue in the film is as important today as it was then.
reviews.author: AdamMorgan

reviews.text: Spielberg hasn’t made many good films the past 30 years. A waste of talent really. Wanted to give this a second chance. But no, it’s a pretty dreary affair. And i don’t like Hanks or Streep. Or Spacey for that matter. Just boring.
reviews.author: Jimmy_Two_Times-deleted-1783320634

summary: A cover-up that spanned four U.S. Presidents pushed the country's first female newspaper publisher and a hard-driving editor to join an unprecedented battle between journalist and government. Inspired by true events.

reviews.text: [this movie] receives C, as in cliché. It's a low grade effort with much of its average work copied and lacking in originality. It passes, but with little class.

reviews.text: This is a great movie. The quality of animation is amazing, and they captured the [this movie] feel perfectly. Lots of fun little scenes, backgrounds, and homages to the original movie.

reviews.author: SparklinDiamond

summary: A look at the relationship between Mike and Sulley during their days at Monsters University — when they weren't necessarily the best of friends.

title: Cars 3

reviews.text: Tries to pull things back into an emotional, grounded arc but ends up feeling kind of unnecessary. It’s competently made, but there’s no real magic or weight behind it. You said it best: it’s just unessential.
reviews.author: jacogiu

reviews.text: Surprisingly good for a franchise that has been worn out for a long time. The themes of aging and adapting to new generations and ones lot in life is pretty poignant. It's easily the best of the series to me.
reviews.author: jekyl6669

reviews.text: I'll make it easy for you... [this movie] A LOT better than [this movie] 2, but it can't hold a candle to the original. It's not really worth seeking out unless you're a hardcore fan of the franchise, but if you can catch it on TV or borrow it, I don't think you'll have a bad time watching it.
reviews.author: beardedonewatches

reviews.text: I am so glad that Pixar abandoned the story of [this movie] 2. This movie picks up where the first movie leaves off and it was such a good decision! This is equally as good as the original [this movie] and amazingly greater than the failure of [this movie] 2
reviews.author: clayrdyer@gmail.com

reviews.text: Pixar's underdog series returns, and possibly the best in the series yet. Taking a cue from Toy Story 3 with its themes of ageing and growing up, this is a simple yet engaging story that rounds off the trilogy* perfectly. *I am assuming this is the last [this movie] movie. While I enjoyed the film, the series doesn't have anywhere elsewhere to go.
reviews.author: Lee Brown Barrow

reviews.text: A worthy follow up to the original film, miles better than [this movie] 2. They wisely focus the action back on Lightnin' McQueen and keep Mater to a bare minimum. It's not going to change lives, but a solid animated feature nonetheless. Even when Pixar is coasting they still deliver a very pretty looking film, albeit a little shallow. One thing bugs me though, why in a world of anthropomorphic vehicles, with no signs of humans, do they have door handles...?
reviews.author: furious_iz

summary: Blindsided by a new generation of blazing-fast racers, the legendary Lightning McQueen is suddenly pushed out of the sport he loves. To get back in the game, he will need the help of an eager young race technician with her own plan to win, inspiration from the late Fabulous Hudson Hornet, and a few unexpected turns.

title: The Emperor's New Groove

reviews.text: It's the first time I've seen her and I really do not understand why I had not seen her before. It's just great, and quite funny. I loved it.
reviews.author: Bg_Jeison

reviews.text: A captivating film, with a simple but extremely fun plot, highlighted by the remarkable dubbing. Each joke is funnier than the last, contributing to a joyful and pleasurable cinematic experience.
reviews.author: Belenus

reviews.text: This is in my top five "comfort food" movies list. It's almost impossible for me to watch this and not have a bad day get at least a little bit better.
reviews.author: FaintingInCoils

reviews.text: Quite possibly the most comedic Disney animation. Yzma and Kronk are such a comical duo, definitely watch this movie if you need a good giggle. Very underrated too!

reviews.text: Beautiful animation, one of the latest types of hand-drawn animations that convey a better feeling. This animation was produced 25 years ago and I watched it for the first time. I think I should watch it a few more times later.
reviews.author: reza1i

reviews.text: I saw this online but after rewatching this Kuzco is totally Disney animation's Deadpool. David Spade and John Goodman have great chemistry. Kronk is hilarious. The short runtime makes everything move fast. One of the more underrated Disney animation movies.

summary: When the self‑absorbed Emperor Kuzco is accidentally transformed into a llama, he must rely on a humble villager to survive the jungle and reclaim his throne.

reviews.text: It's a good movie until the home invasion part. Overall, _[this movie]_ is the same formula as _Home [this movie]_, but set in New York.

reviews.text: Just as good as the first. I actually like this one better then the first. It would be terrifying to be [this movie] in a hugh city. Especially as a young kid. This movie is a lot funnier then the first one too.
reviews.author: Andre Gonzales

reviews.text: _[this movie]_ may not offer much that's drastically different from the original classic, but it remains a good addition to the Christmas movie lineup. It keeps the same winning formula that made the first film a hit, with a heartwarming story and some humor.
reviews.author: VantageReel

reviews.text: I'm ashamed to admit it, but I like this sequel better than the first one! New York is an amazing city in America. Even more amazing at Christmas!
reviews.author: Peter89Spencer

reviews.text: Absolutely loved this film. There's no better way of getting into the Christmas spirit than watching Kevin McCallister beat up two buglers with his inventive traps. Seriously though, the comedy is pure genius, and the story is heartwarming. What more could you want at this festive time of year?
reviews.author: Mad Matty

reviews.text: Another classic just like the first one. It does not quite reach the same level maybe just do the fact that it's not the original. Again the main characters are spot on, the jokes and traps are again just those classic. I feel like a lot happens in a short amount of time - could be a lot longer with some more action.
reviews.author: Wazz10a

summary: Instead of flying to Florida with his folks, Kevin ends up alone in New York, where he gets a hotel room with his dad's credit card—despite problems from a clerk and meddling bellboy. But when Kevin runs into his old nemeses, the Wet Bandits, he's determined to foil their plans to rob a toy store on Christmas Eve.

title: Neon Genesis Evangelion: The End of Evangelion

reviews.text: The best film I've ever watched. It is flawless (apart from some of the goofy english dub sound effects) and every scene is simply perfect. 9.9/10.

reviews.text: It’s night time and now that I’ve finished this I want to go watch something else, but I can’t get it out of my head, it feels like watching anything upbeat right now would just be wrong
reviews.author: IwatchalotofTV

reviews.text: If you were to look up "mindfuck" in the dictionary, the dictionary woud bitchslap you into a coma then proceed to surgically insert The End of [this movie] DVD straight into your brain.

reviews.text: People aren't lying when they call this film a mindfuck! Also as someone who has experienced multiple high points of depression and suicidal thoughts the movies core principals struck me hard. Honestly didn't know what to do after watching this.

summary: SEELE orders an all-out attack on NERV, aiming to destroy the Evas before Gendo can advance his own plans for the Human Instrumentality Project. Shinji is pushed to the limits of his sanity as he is forced to decide the fate of humanity.

reviews.text: A reasonable film, with some funny moments, but which follows a typical zombie film formula, exploring the fight for survival with a touch of comedy.

reviews.text: Attempts at sentimentality don't work, but when the film gets down to fighting the zombies these scouts live up to their motto by being prepared. Feels like an 80's movie and if released then may have been a classic. As it is, in a time saturated by zombies on film and tv, it has less impact than it could have.
reviews.author: Lee Brown Barrow

summary: Three scouts and lifelong friends join forces with one badass cocktail waitress to become the world’s most unlikely team of heroes. When their peaceful town is ravaged by a zombie invasion, they’ll fight for the badge of a lifetime and put their scouting skills to the test to save mankind from the undead.

title: The Last Samurai

reviews.text: A cinematographic masterpiece. Beautiful, haunting music all throughout that keeps you on a perpetual emotional high. The storyline is a bit dramatized, but delivers on all the big moments.
reviews.author: maverick0213

reviews.text: Many things didn't make sense. Why keep him alive at the beginning. Why be nice to him while he tried to kill them as much as he could until the last moment?
reviews.author: Atlantis14

reviews.text: Fantastic move ! you just cannot compare this to any other movie, If you just go with the flow you can feel it there ! this is an action movie but still left me feeling peaceful !!
reviews.author: __ActionKaMan

reviews.text: An excellent movie with great cinematography and brilliant performances by Cuise and Watanabe. Did they need a white man to show them the way? No, but most viewers need it, so just enjoy a great epic movie.
reviews.author: siggi963

reviews.text: "[this movie]" earns a commendable 9 for its poignant storytelling, striking cinematography, and Tom Cruise's compelling performance. The film successfully navigates themes of honor, cultural clash, and personal redemption against a visually stunning backdrop of feudal Japan.
reviews.author: Dimekilled

reviews.text: Yeah, this may just be "Dances with Wolves" and "A Man Called Horse" with [this movie] instead of American Indians, but it retreads those stories so well that I don't care.
reviews.author: Digital_Phreaker

summary: Nathan Algren is an American hired to instruct the Japanese army in the ways of modern warfare, which finds him learning to respect the samurai and the honorable principles that rule them. Pressed to destroy the samurai's way of life in the name of modernization and open trade, Algren decides to become an ultimate warrior himself and to fight for their right to exist.

title: The Next 365 Days

reviews.text: Still plays out like a long music video with sex scenes. I feel like there was a bit more dialogue in this one compared to the second movie, but not much. I can't believe they ended it like that... where is it going to go now!
reviews.author: fromkarine

reviews.text: If you accept this film for what it is... a soft-core porn... then you won't feel let down. If you are expecting a cinematic masterpiece with impeccable writing and expansive character depth, then you really only have yourself to blame for your disillusionment. Let's just call a spade a spade. Lower your expectations to a reasonable level and just accept this movie for what it is.
reviews.author: vespeyre

reviews.text: If I were in the mood to watch adult content, Netflix would definitely not be my first choice. The movie I stumbled upon was a total disaster, making me extremely uncomfortable, especially when children unexpectedly walked into the room. It was a messy experience that I strongly advise against. "365 [this movie]" seems to be all about sex and trying to engage the audience solely on that basis. The sequel follows the same pattern, and both films are filled with excessive plot holes, acting issues, and seem to lack a meaningful storyline. It feels like they are veering towards the wrong direction, almost resembling pornography rather than a film with substance.
reviews.author: tmdb51616167

reviews.text: In a word... boring? These '365 [this movie]' film are many a thing, but boring they are usually not - at least in the traditional sense. '[this movie]' kinda is, especially the last 30-40 minutes. Across the whole run time, I think there's less sex than usual - that's not to say there isn't sex, there's plenty, but it seemed slightly less constant. The only pluses, albeit very minor ones, I have are basically the same as before: it uses decent music and has some solid shots spattered in there. They remain pointless in their existence and very much overstay their welcome, yet I kinda couldn't not watch them. What are the odds on more sequels?
reviews.author: r96sk

reviews.text: The closing of a trilogy that nobody asked for and that on top of that has the audacity to [SPOILER] end with an open ending. After three films putting up with this toxicity, not even giving me a clear resolution feels like a slap in the face. [/SPOILER] They spend the whole movie going in circles about the same thing, with the indecisive protagonist and more musical filler. The only thing that gave me a bit of hope was Nacho, who seemed like the only halfway sensible person in this universe, [SPOILER] but the film insists on maintaining that toxic push and pull until the very last second.
reviews.author: Aratea

reviews.text: Still bad. Also drags out too long, which wouldn't be a problem if the actors and the writing would be good but they aren't. [spoiler] And once again, it ends with a cliffhanger, so they can drag this out forever, and milk this cow with infinite installments. At least, now Laura's life is seemingly not at stake, or, well, not in the sense that it previously was. [/spoiler] This time, Laura has to choose between the rich muscular man who kidnapped, groped, intimidated etc her, and the rich muscular man who sort of kidnapped her. What a time to be alive!
reviews.author: sophiaso

summary: Robert Neville is a scientist who was unable to stop the spread of the terrible virus that was incurable and man-made. Immune, Neville is now the last human survivor in what is left of New York City and perhaps the world. For three years, Neville has faithfully sent out daily radio messages, desperate to find any other survivors who might be out there. But he is not alone.

title: Penguins of Madagascar

reviews.text: DreamWorks spin-off that finds the right register for its protagonists — absurdist spy-comedy mechanics work better here than in the main franchise. Not profile-relevant, watched contextually.

reviews.text: This movie sucked. Even my 5 year old niece wouldn't stay to watch it for family movie night. She was also angry that their aren't any main female characters. All we know of is the hippo from [this movie] and the new owl named Eva. Simply not enough balance between the genders... and this movie is boring!!
reviews.author: lunatee

reviews.text: Given that the prime _[this movie]_ series is an average-at-best taste of mainstream family fare, you'd be forgiven for writing this one off. Side character spinoffs are almost always a sign of last gasps, of attempts to wring the last drips of juice from a brand that's already reached the end of the line. So it's with no shortage of surprise that I report this _Penguins_ movie is, actually, a bright, entertaining standalone. On the run from an aggressive team of sinister octopi, and competing with an arrogant squad of big-budget secret agents, the titular black-and-white quartet clumsily uncovers and defeats a vile (if completely nonsensical) master plan.
reviews.author: drqshadow

reviews.text: The [this movie] are probably my favorite collection of modern animation's current crop of characters. Yeah, there's Spongebob and Minions, but for me, this crack squadron of penguins are the most enjoyable. Skipper is voiced absolutely perfectly and leads his special forces penguins expertly, which is so ridiculous that the concept itself makes me laugh. This latest movie seems like a last ditch effort to squeeze a few dollars out of the fearless foursome. It's an entertaining enough adventure and the addition of The North Wind, led by Benedict Cumberbatch, is inspired. But this movie is just a little too cute and the villain, Dr. Octavius, is bland.
reviews.author: Whitsbrain

summary: Skipper, Kowalski, Rico and Private join forces with undercover organization The North Wind to stop the villainous Dr. Octavius Brine from destroying the world as we know it.

title: Hotel Transylvania

reviews.text: Hilarious film. Don't heed the low ratings. Too many gooseheads trying to find deeper meaning in a comedy. Take it for what it is and enjoy it.
reviews.author: D.seL

reviews.text: Not overly keen on this film (the sequel was marginally better.) I felt it was lacking something and I'm not quite sure what. It's definitely not memorable.

reviews.text: ★★★☆☆ (3/5) Bright, fast, and packed with cartoon energy. The animation style is exaggerated in a fun way. It’s more goofy than emotional, but it works as a light family comedy. Not amazing, just solid and entertaining.

One special weekend, Dracula has invited all his best friends to celebrate his beloved daughter Mavis's 118th birthday. For Dracula catering to all of these legendary monsters is no problem but the party really starts when one ordinary guy stumbles into the hotel and changes everything!

reviews.text: The Gangster, the Cop , the [this movie] (2019) Review [this movie] is fast paced, cracking thriller definitely packing a punch. reviews.author: ritz657

reviews.text: Interesting concept, where the bad good cop is forced to team up with the good bad thug against Evil, purposely depersonalized and devoid of backstory. The stars are the actors, Ma Dong Seok is especially epic in the finale. But flirting with Western audiences has made the “Koreanness” too simple. This is only a B-movie action movie, memorable more for the way it was filmed than for the plot

summary: After barely surviving a brutal attack by a sadistic serial killer, crime boss Jang Dong-su is left humiliated. Determined to catch the killer known as K, he forms an uneasy alliance with Jung Tae-seok, a relentless and incorruptible detective who often disrupts his illegal business. However, while Jang Dong-su wants K dead, Jung Tae-suk is determined to bring him to justice. With a deal in place—whoever finds K first will decide his fate—the hunt begins, blurring the lines between crime and law.

reviews.text: I only recently discovered director Bong Joon-ho and I am absolutely loving his work. This film was really interesting as it served as both a character study (the cops) and a crime drama/thriller. To see the various parts of the story unfold was truly entertaining. I can't wait to see this rest of this director's work. follow me at or facebook IHateBadMovies

reviews.text: Don't dismiss it as just a "cash-grab game adaptation." [this [this movie]] is a fun, clever, and genuinely humorous film that overcomes its predictable plot with a great cast, strong jokes, and a fantastic, game-accurate finale. It's a surprisingly enjoyable time at the movies.

reviews.text: **I had no expectations and was still disappointed.** Not sure what I was expecting from a [this movie] based on a game that consists solely of slingshotting birds at pigs. Unfortunately, the humor was more annoying complaints than clever quips, but it had its moments.

reviews.text: Son really enjoys Angry Birds, but isn't much of a [this movie] watcher. This actually got him more than the Mario [this movie]. Good voice acting, some jokes that adults will get. Animation looks great. Recommended.
reviews.author: strivinglife

reviews.text: Watched this on the plane to Disney World when I was bored, never intended to ever watch but was pleasantly surprised. Quite a fun tale. I couldn't figure out how they could link in the game to the film, but it actually worked pretty well.

reviews.text: Hate to admit it but I liked it. or maybe I'm just too depressed that I find anything remotely funny to be funny. Also, that mime reminded me of Janice's Oh My God. Def not a kid's cartoon, and use way too many corny jokes and unnecessary slow mo's..
reviews.author: mg_grey

reviews.text: Great voice cast and much better than I expected. Thought this might have been better coming out say 6 six years ago or something, but it kinda makes me want to play the game again. Funny stuff. It does suffer from the usual subpar kids animation cliches like adult puns, slow mo falling, nut shots and 30 year old pop songs with dances, but still fun.

summary: An island populated entirely by happy, flightless birds or almost entirely. In this paradise, Red, a bird with a temper problem, speedy Chuck, and the volatile Bomb have always been outsiders. But when the island is visited by mysterious green piggies, it’s up to these unlikely outcasts to figure out what the pigs are up to.

reviews.text: It is well made but ultimately lifeless: D’Artagnan and [this movie] bond immediately and fight for a queen and a king who hardly deserve it.

reviews.text: Like a fun road trip, it's epic and long and moves along at such a good pace that you truly enjoy the ride. [this movie] won't set any records for originality but everything else -- the cast, the directing, the scale -- work to make this grandiose effort prime entertainment.

reviews.text: An excellent adaptation of the Alexandre Dumas story that is, as far as I know, closer to the original story than the previous movies. Its still works and when you watch it in French, it is also more authentic to my mind. Great entertainment.

summary: D'Artagnan, a spirited young Gascon, is left for dead after trying to save a noblewoman from being kidnapped. Once in Paris, he tries by all means to find his attackers, unaware that his quest will lead him to the very heart of a war where the future of France is at stake. Aided by King's Musketeers Athos, Porthos and Aramis, he faces the machinations of villainous Cardinal Richelieu and Milady de Winter, while falling in love with Constance, the Queen's confidante.

title: Shrek Forever After

reviews.text: This fourth movie buys the franchise a bit back [this movie] the weak third part. Not quite as strong as the first two but way better than the third. Good entertainment.
reviews.author: siggi963

reviews.text: A big improvement over the 3rd film. Though there is nothing original about the plot. With Shrek learning to appreciate the life he has. It’s a Wonderful Life, but with Shrek.
reviews.author: Jim222001

reviews.text: So many beautiful moments and Rimpelstiltskin is an amazing villain. Really wonder what Shrek 5 will be about! I guess we should see Artie again and I think it would be cool to see Prince Charming again in a small role.
reviews.author: WalkingKev

reviews.text: A darker “what if” conclusion that forgets the fun. It’s trying to wrap things up in a big thematic way, but the result is kind of joyless. The alternate universe idea is cool on paper, but it’s executed in a way that just feels… drained. Unmemorable plot, humor that’s a shadow of its former self, and a general sense of creative burnout. A lukewarm finale that doesn’t hit like it should. You really feel the absence of the original magic.
reviews.author: jacogiu

reviews.text: This movie is great because while still having a connection to the rest of the Shrek series, it can be watched as a stand alone movie. This was one of my favorite movies as a kid. The other day, I rewatched it and it still holds up, at least for me. I had a lot of fun rewatching it, I ALMOST felt like a kid again! I don't care if people don't think too highly of it, but I think it's great
reviews.author: jarvis-14882094

reviews.text: That one movie people got hyped for only to be divisive on release. Did personally found this to be better than Shrek the Third if it isn’t for nostalgic bias. It’s an average Shrek film and wish they really explain more of the other ogres and stuff. Pied Piper guy is perhaps one of my favorite characters from Shrek franchise thanks to this film.
reviews.author: Rin J Tohsaka

summary: A midlife-crisis burdened Shrek, longing for the days when he felt like a real ogre, makes a pact with magic deal-maker Rumpelstiltskin. But when he's duped and sent to a twisted version of Far Far Away—where Rumpelstiltskin is king, ogres are hunted, and he and Fiona have never met—he sets out to restore his world and reclaim his true love.

title: A Clockwork Orange

reviews.text: Eggiwegs, lomticks of toast, lovely steaky-wakes and especially moloko plus get you in the mood for some ultra-violence and sexual deviancy. I wanna watch this while high.

reviews.text: A very specific film that can evoke conflicting emotions. However, it is still relevant. We are still surrounded by a cruel world in which we ourselves are often just a puppet.

reviews.author: JoeyvanAwesome

reviews.text: So disturbing yet interesting throughout the movie.Especially the character of Alex was portrayed brilliantly on the screen.And his narration was a great one as well.It tasted all together otherworldly.

reviews.text: Boring, been done before, poorly-written. Couldn't make it through the first 30 minutes. If Kubrick is such a perfectionist he could've done the basic job of making a decently-directed movie that's not self-flagellating and actually has something meaningful to say. All I got was torture porn and the writing / world-building equivalent of a five-year-old's crayon drawing of a house.
reviews.author: samwightt

summary: In a near-future Britain, young Alexander DeLarge and his pals get their kicks beating and raping anyone they please. When not destroying the lives of others, Alex swoons to the music of Beethoven. The state, eager to crack down on juvenile crime, gives an incarcerated Alex the option to undergo an invasive procedure that'll rob him of all personal agency. In a time when conscience is a commodity, can Alex change his tune?

title: Pan's Labyrinth

reviews.text: A very stylized movie that is beautiful visually. About a little girl with a horrible stepfather. Fantasy and horror in one film and it is beautiful to watch.

summary: In post–civil war Spain, 10-year-old Ofelia moves with her pregnant mother to live under the control of her cruel stepfather. Drawn into a mysterious labyrinth, she meets a faun who reveals that she may be a lost princess from an underground kingdom. To return to her true father, she must complete a series of surreal and perilous tasks that blur the line between reality and fantasy.

reviews.text: Even that the script could be much better, I love so much the action and destruction scenes in this film, it makes me thrill, so it's a thumbs up!

summary: Dr. Adrian Helmsley, part of a worldwide geophysical team investigating the effect on the earth of radiation from unprecedented solar storms, learns that the earth's core is heating up. He warns U.S. President Thomas Wilson that the crust of the earth is becoming unstable and that without proper preparations for saving a fraction of the world's population, the entire race is doomed. Meanwhile, writer Jackson Curtis stumbles on the same information. While the world's leaders race to build "arks" to escape the impending cataclysm, Curtis struggles to find a way to save his family. Meanwhile, volcanic eruptions and earthquakes of unprecedented strength wreak havoc around the world.

summary: Thrust into an all-new adventure, a down-on-his-luck Capt. Jack Sparrow feels the winds of ill-fortune blowing even more strongly when deadly ghost sailors led by his old nemesis, the evil Capt. Salazar, escape from the Devil's Triangle. Jack's only hope of survival lies in seeking out the legendary Trident of Poseidon, but to find it, he must forge an uneasy alliance with a brilliant and beautiful astronomer and a headstrong young man in the British navy.

Welcomed as the last hope the town has been waiting for, Rango is forced to play his new role to the hilt and uncover the truth behind a looming water crisis—before his act catches up with him.

reviews.author: nathpatasado_e725e5

reviews.text: A Jackie's Chan movie. Expect a mix between action and comedy, add Chris's Carter character, and you'll have a movie that you'll always laugh at no matter how many times you have seen it before. The whole three parts of it are worth watching.
reviews.author: Ibraheem...

reviews.text: A classic action-comedy film that has stood the test of time. But let's be real, Chris Tucker is the real star of the show here. His over-the-top performance as Detective James Carter is simply unforgettable, and he steals every scene he's in. His chemistry with Jackie Chan's character is also a highlight, making for some truly hilarious and entertaining moments.
reviews.author: VantageReel

reviews.text: The story and action are generic, predictable and didn't age very well but what makes this enjoyable is the comedy and the character dynamics, Jackie Chan and Chris Tucker are a perfect duo. Chris Tucker especially shines as the cocky and eccentric Detective Carter. The only downside is Jackie Chan's character barely gets any dialogue and backstory. Some good choreography, very entertaining, good pacing and I enjoyed the third act. Hilarious from start to finish.
reviews.author: Acoucalancha

summary: When Hong Kong Inspector Lee is summoned to Los Angeles to investigate a kidnapping, the FBI doesn't want any outside help and assigns cocky LAPD Detective James Carter to distract Lee from the case. Not content to watch the action from the sidelines, Lee and Carter form an unlikely partnership and investigate the case themselves.

title: The Bad Guys

reviews.text: Solid family flick. It's got some good laughs, some good action and a good story with a great message. Plus the great cast, doing these colorful characters is loads of fun.

summary: In the not-too-distant future, the aging gene has been switched off. To avoid overpopulation, time has become the currency and the way people pay for luxuries and necessities. The rich can live forever, while the rest struggle to negotiate for their immortality. A poor young man who suddenly comes into a fortune of time finds himself on the run from a corrupt police force known as the "time keepers".

title: Gone with the Wind

reviews.text: i was very surprised by the quality of the production. Other than that, this movie can be very hilarious and somehow still relevant to today's 'game', we humans really didn't change much
reviews.author: IzakJordan

reviews.text: It might be well made for the time, but it’s just one big uninteresting soap opera. It has some okay moments, but how on earth is this so popular? I’ve spent almost four hours wanting to punch the main character in the face. What a shallow, selfish and annoying woman. I mean, she even hits a horse to death. This has so many issues...
reviews.author: JoeyvanAwesome

reviews.text: This is a classic movie and it's one that everyone should see at least once. Now having said that, I must also admit that this is a hard movie to watch. This movie is heavy on the drama and while that is part of what it so popular, the drama can get old after a while (remember, the movie is almost 4 hours long!) There are amazing parts and it does a great job catching the ups and downs of life and the roles are very well played, but after the first two hours things can start to drag a bit.
reviews.author: mbody

reviews.text: This has been on my watchlist since I started to get serious about watching movies but with an almost 4 hour runtime I've never found time to watch it. So I made sure I found enough time to watch this and I'm glad I did but man, did it feel super long. This movie is very well made and it is has some really impressive scenes for being made in 1939. The drama is kind of interesting if you are in to romance and Scarlett is an interesting character to follow. I enjoyed more of the war stuff then the romance. Overall I think this movie is iconic and well made movie.
reviews.author: nmahoney416

reviews.text: _**four hours**_ of drama is more than too much, and a lot of this movie is extremely dated (i.e. racist and revisionist). Also, some scnes meant to be funny ended up just being funny, like the [spoiler]stairs scene.[/spoiler]
reviews.author: Brad Bungleborn

reviews.text: Look. I say it like it is: I like this movie. It's kitschy. It's epic. It's romantic. It's sad. It's a drama. It looks beautiful. It shows US history (extremely biased though). Leigh and Gable are great. Scarlett and most other characters are reasonably complex. Like Scarlett they are often likeable with a darker side. It's a classic. (Tbh I didn't even know that such vibrant color film existed in 1939). I like the story. I like the (fake?) southern accents. By modern standards it's much too long, though. Had to watch this over the course of three days (Hint: there's also an entr'acte that naturally splits this movie in two parts).
reviews.author: alexlimberg

summary: The spoiled daughter of a Georgia plantation owner conducts a tumultuous romance with a cynical profiteer during the American Civil War and Reconstruction Era.

Starts rough with some obnoxious relationship drama, but gets surprisingly entertaining later on with well-executed action, and I even caught myself laughing at times. reviews.text: ★★★★☆ (4/5) Bigger and more intense than the first. The stakes feel higher, and the arena is way more creative this time around. The world-building expands in a really interesting way, and the tension builds perfectly toward the end. Strong sequel. Solid four.

reviews.text: The best part of [this movie] saga. The world is expanding and new interesting characters are introduced. Francis Lawrence did a great job in continuing the story and making it even more appealing. This part was definitely the one that got me really hooked on the franchise.

The film captures your attention from start to finish with unexpected and unpredictable situations, delivering plenty of laughs along the way.

The movie has moments of forcing style down your neck but I didn't mind it. In time it's become unique.

With her graduation quickly approaching, Bella is confronted with the most important decision of her life.

His life takes a nightmarish turn and he soon finds himself on a painful and harrowing journey of self-discovery.

Still a lot of fun, though.

reviews.text: Majestic. When I searched for the most beautiful movies, this constantly topped the lists, I had to watch it. I am thrilled by this epic tale. I have loved the entire film frame by frame. I could take a screenshot at any moment and it would be a wallpaper for sure. Cinema is a visual medium. Movies like these keep highlighting this intrinsic fact about films and I am thoroughly grateful for their existence. The visuals are a unique trait of this medium and they must be given paramount importance when making a film. Those are the elements which make a story into a movie. Many times those are the ones which break or make a film.
reviews.author: Sólstafir

reviews.text: During China's ancient "Warring States" period, a solemn warrior appears at one royal palace bearing gifts: the collected weapons of three notorious assassins, whose prior attempt on the king's life did not succeed. Now paranoid due to the attack, the monarch sits alone in his throne room, not even his advisors allowed within a hundred paces, but allows this steady-eyed visitor to draw near as he tells his story. What follows is an act in three parts - two hypotheticals and a truth - that describe identical topics through biased eyes. We see fact stretched into fiction, though the telling is so sweeping, vivid and resonant that we often overlook the context clues.
reviews.author: drqshadow

reviews.text: [this movie]: Zhang Yimou's Cinematic Poem of Movement and Meaning In "[this movie]", Zhang Yimou transcends the martial arts genre, transforming physical combat into a language of profound philosophical discourse. What begins as a seemingly simple narrative about an assassin becomes a breathtaking meditation on individual sacrifice and national unity. Drawing from Kurosawa's multi-perspective storytelling in "Rashomon", Zhang creates something entirely his own. Each retelling of the story is not just a different perspective, but a different visual poem - choreographed fights that are less about violence and more about inner emotional landscapes. The film's fight sequences are revolutionary. They aren't mere action, but abstract ballets where movement, color, and spatial relationships communicate complex philosophical conflicts.
reviews.author: badelf

Plagued by a dreaded stutter and considered unfit to be king, Bertie engages the help of an unorthodox speech therapist named Lionel Logue. Through a set of unexpected techniques, and as a result of an unlikely friendship, Bertie is able to find his voice and boldly lead the country into war.

reviews.text: Like a high school history lesson: flat, old fashioned, classical and easy to sleep through. Odysseus arrives back home on Ithaca after the Trojan War and no one cares, least of all himself. Ralph Fiennes goes full frontal, if that's something you're into. Apart from that, there wasn't much else worth watching here.
reviews.author: Saint Pauly

reviews.text: It conveys the sense of bringing more humanity to the characters, of trying to show the story in a more realistic way by removing the elements related to the gods. But it fails to convey the torment and emotional scars of the characters, even though they are supported by two great actors who are fully committed. There is too much laxity, which is not conveyed as a way of internalizing the story and making it more intimate, but as an inability to reflect human pain. This is best achieved by Rachel Portman's austere and beautiful soundtrack.
reviews.author: miguelreina

reviews.text: [this movie] is the cinematic equivalent of a fast-food meal: it satisfies a basic craving but is ultimately forgettable and lacks the nutritional value (or narrative depth) of a proper feast.

The jokes feel flat, the plot is half-hearted, and it plays things too safe. The magic is dimming here, and you can feel it. It’s still got moments, but they’re few and far between.

reviews.text: Interesting from the very start. Haunting to see how things worked in east Germany before the wall fell. The way it’s shot is very… vanilla, but the acting and the story make up for that. It even made up for the fact that I hate the German language. That’s saying something. 😉
reviews.author: JoeyvanAwesome

reviews.text: 20 years later, still one of the great movies of the century. An amazing realistic take on the last days of the failing East German state at a time when the lessons from its deserved demise are being forgotten and propaganda is trying to repaint it as greatness. Interesting script, great performances and direction, deep and multi-layered message. A must watch.
reviews.author: userloser

reviews.text: Good guys facing tragic circumstances in an interesting period of history. Because you view the main characters lives from the perspective of the morally confused Stasi Officer investigating them, you receive more information than the characters have about their hopeless situation. This makes it all the more tragic to see the suffering they endure. Absolutely love this film. The only film so far to make my dad and I cry.
reviews.author: portman123

reviews.text: This film blends in a tragic love story with the story of a man who is completely dedicated to his job and country. As the story goes along the man (a respected member of the ever-present government) starts to doubt himself and his duty when a superior crosses the line. I know, that's an awful description and that's ok. It's a movie that is tough to describe without saying too much. All that said..... I adore this film. The moral dilemma of the member of the Stasi was brewing for much of the movie and finally came to a head near the end.
reviews.author: AdamMorgan

summary: In 1984 East Berlin, dedicated Stasi officer Gerd Wiesler begins spying on a famous playwright and his actress-lover Christa-Maria. Wiesler becomes unexpectedly sympathetic to the couple, and faces conflicting loyalties when his superior takes a liking to Christa-Maria.

title: Cold Storage

reviews.author: $hubes

reviews.text: I’ve honestly forgotten most of the intricate details of The Human Centipede — and even more so with its sequels — but to me, that’s the mark of a great gore film. The specifics may fade, but the feeling stays burned in memory. When I saw this title pop up again today, I had to revisit it. I may not recall every scene, but I’ll never forget that this is one of those iconic shock-and-awe experiences that defines the genre.
reviews.author: durack

reviews.text: To be honest, this came off more horror-comedy than intended, I think. The acting is bad and the plot is.. something. I appreciated that the surgery was done by a doctor so it was pretty clean - the actual horror was being part of the centipede and it was interesting to see it play out (and disgusting). Only saw it once and won’t even watch the other two from the synopsis, but I think this is pretty creative and doesn’t let down. Tom Six has got to be a fucking freak though.

reviews.text: It wasn’t as good as the other hotels so won’t be staying another night but it wasn’t bad, it was alright and did have some good moments and lots of comedy and i think it should end there.
reviews.author: CinemanicBonkers

reviews.text: ★★☆☆☆ (2/5) Feels like the series running out of ideas. The body-swap concept is okay, but it never becomes as funny or clever as it could’ve been. Loses some charm compared to the earlier entries, and it just feels smaller overall. Watchable, but definitely the weakest of the bunch.
reviews.author: fulltimewatcher

summary: When Van Helsing's mysterious invention, the "Monsterfication Ray," goes haywire, Drac and his monster pals are all transformed into humans, and Johnny becomes a monster. In their new mismatched bodies, Drac and Johnny must team up and race across the globe to find a cure before it's too late, and before they drive each other crazy.

title: Infernal Affairs

reviews.text: An incredible crime-thriller, with an intense, perfectly-paced, well-thought out plot that's thoroughly gripping due to the incredible character dynamic between the two leads, each giving excellent performances.
reviews.author: ismamzaman

reviews.text: very good plot and ideas. The pacing is pretty good with building atmosphere and constantly evolving the plot. Unfortunatly overall it did not age well. Some scenes feel out of touch, cut down or inserted later on. Can't compare it to the adaptation yet.
reviews.author: gloeckle

reviews.text: It's definitely better than the remake (which is The Departed, in case you didn't know... ;) ). And that means something because I consider The Departed a very good movie, too!
reviews.author: res1999

reviews.text: I liked it yeah… it’s really good and definitely worth a watch. The departed is on of my few 10s… so I would just recommend if you haven’t watch any… to watch The Departed first then this one… Scorsese tells the story amazingly
reviews.author: CCIEdd

reviews.text: A seriously refreshing police thriller that cranks up the tension to the max. There's no overblown gunplay or buddy cop crap here, this baby is tight as a drum and will have your nails down to the quick. Superb performances, a tight script and tense direction make this a winner in every department. Pick it up if you can, it's fantastic.
reviews.author: AlexanderZ

reviews.text: Amazing, great acting, great storyline, and of course I was one of those that seen the Departed first, and I still love the film, but this is equally as good and better in other areas, however the departed also is better in other areas. Its a win win situation the chance to watch either, and unlike the departed there is a 2 follow up movies to enjoy.
reviews.author: yujib

summary: Chan Wing Yan, a young police officer, has been sent undercover as a mole in the local mafia. Lau Kin Ming, a young mafia member, infiltrates the police force. Years later, their older counterparts, Chen Wing Yan and Inspector Lau Kin Ming, respectively, race against time to expose the mole within their midst.

title: Do Not Enter

reviews.text: this movie should have been so good- the story line just was no there. Acting and camera work are amazing but there is no real substance in the movie. It's like they wanted to cover all their horror movie bases
reviews.author: demarisp

reviews.text: Cinematography, editing, acting, special effects, production design, all of it good. Its just too bad the script is at times embarrassingly juvenile; with cringeworthy dialog and wafer thin characters who act without rhyme or reason. A bad movie wrapped in a pretty package. Not recommended for those of average wit or above.
reviews.author: GregLikesMovies

reviews.text: It was a decent production. Don't have too high expectations, because it has a very classic plot. University students go to a haunted, spirited mansion and experience things, etc. It's not really a unique story, but the suspense was good. The acting was good. The film somehow kept me watching. I think you shouldn't have high expectations, but I'd say give it a chance. Enjoy the movie.
reviews.author: Enes_

reviews.text: Was an ok thriller. Some of the acting was good. A few jump scares. The creatures were a little too cgi for me I did like the “key” character, Cora . She was cute. Diane and Rick were a little too much for me. I also fee the antagonist did not get what they deserved. They were dispatched a little too quickly. It was watchable to pass the time. Enjoy.
reviews.author: nytmare

reviews.text: This is the kind of movie that makes you wonder whether anyone involved had actually seen a good horror film before. The acting is awful, the plot is painfully predictable, and the story is such a confused pile of junk that it never seems to know whether it wants to be about a haunted mansion, a monster, satanic rituals, or just a bunch of brain-dead idiots humiliating themselves for social media views. It tries to be horror, it tries to be suspense, and it fails miserably at both. Nothing is scary, nothing is tense, and the mediocre CGI just adds one more layer of embarrassment.
reviews.author: pkway

reviews.text: This is not Ghost Ship I think this movie wanted to be Ghost Ship, or at least as good as Ghost Ship. It didn't reach there. The characters were engaging enough and the direction solid, but the look of the movie wasn't grand, and the monster just looked floaty and unrealistic, given how it was rendered into the scenes. It just wasn't believable, had no agenda, and no reason. It was just a "scary thing" skulking about.
reviews.author: Sierbahnn

summary: A group of young explorers investigates an old abandoned hotel, only to encounter a strange supernatural being and a competing group looking for a legendary hidden treasure.

title: Superbad

reviews.text: Oh well, it wasn't that bad, just watch a chill movie and not think too much. However, it took quite a long time for this genre of movie.
reviews.author: GoPrayer

reviews.text: IMHO the cops weren't funny and there was too much of them, and fatboy's constant yelling at the top of his lungs got a little old after awhile, but there were some genuine laughs in here.
reviews.author: ScottElblein

reviews.text: If you've seen one teen angst coming of age movie, you've seen them all. "[this movie]" doesn't offer anything new to the genre, but it's kind of fun to see some early career performances from current talented comedic actors.
reviews.author: chazTV

reviews.text: Good, funny, dated. If you can deal with a bit of cringe and some dated humour it's a good movie. I wouldn't consider it a "top movie" but it is _very_ funny if you just want something silly to watch casually.
reviews.author: Kali

reviews.text: This film is generally good. It's not a groundbreaking film but it does exactly what I was expecting. It's good to see the younger days of some very good comedic actors. Perfect film for background entertainment once you've seen it before.
reviews.author: joeshuff

reviews.text: This is a comedy classic. This cast is filled with legends and is an hilarious movie filled with classic liners that you probably didn’t even know was from this movie. This movie is an easy watch and definitely is a fun watch.
reviews.author: sabss_del

summary: Two co-dependent high school seniors are forced to deal with separation anxiety after their plan to stage a booze-soaked party goes awry.

title: Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade

reviews.text: It feels very much a retread of _Raiders_. But, that was a great movie, so it's not exactly as if that's a bad plan. _Final rating:★★★½ - I really liked it. Would strongly recommend you give it your time._
reviews.author: Gimly

reviews.text: To me, easily the best movie in the franchise with an excellent story, great action and before all brilliant performances and a fabulous chemistry between Ford and Connery. A classic cinematic cinema history.
reviews.author: siggi963

reviews.text: Paco Cinema Image and sound 4.5 / 5. Still just as well and with the help daddy Jones is better, for many the 4th does not exist
reviews.author: juliosoft

reviews.text: "You know, sharing in your adventures is quite the experience." "That's not all we shared. It's disgraceful. You're old enough to be her fath-- grandfather." "Well, I'm as human as the next man." "I **was** the next man."
reviews.author: Digital_Phreaker

reviews.text: The best action and adventure next to Raiders of the Lost Ark. Harrison Ford and Sean Connery have great chemistry. River Phoenix makes a great young Indiana Jones a well.
reviews.author: Jim222001

reviews.text: As with "The Raiders of the Lost Arc" there is nothing wrong with "The Last [this movie]". I just don't get why a lot of people think this is an outstanding and hilarious movie! For me it is just a mediocre action flick.
reviews.author: DRNKMNKY

summary: In 1938, an art collector appeals to eminent archaeologist Dr. Indiana Jones to embark on a search for the Holy Grail. Indy learns that a medieval historian has vanished while searching for it, and the missing man is his own father, Dr. Henry Jones Sr.. He sets out to rescue his father by following clues in the old man's notebook, which his father had mailed to him before he went missing. Indy arrives in Venice, where he enlists the help of a beautiful academic, Dr. Elsa Schneider, along with Marcus Brody and Sallah. Together they must stop the Nazis from recovering the power of eternal life and taking over the world!

title: Scary Movie 2

reviews.text: I'm not one for raunchy comedy, but this was an enjoyable watch with friends. Unsure as to what I would have thought had I watched it alone.
reviews.author: zenophyx

reviews.text: This was more gruesome than anything. Didn't really like it as much and wasn't as funny, just sickening. Still love that they made a sequel. All the parodys in the world. Bring parody movies back.
reviews.author: zxki

reviews.text: Seems to me like they just wanted to cram in as many jokes as possible, pacing and plot be damned. A couple of amusing moments here but a big step back from the first [this movie].
reviews.author: hoder1

reviews.text: While this [this movie] is pretty bad and doesn’t have the same feel as the first film it’s still has got a load of funny moments and still entertaining to watch even though it’s completely stupid 😅 The parrot is definitely the highlight of the film .
reviews.author: shaneleexcx1234

reviews.text: The second installment of the Scary [this movie] Franchise is not that funny as the first one, although we can find some really good moments here. For a 1h 22m [this movie] is still pretty enjoyable... But sometimes it feels like nothing much is happening. Now I'm ready for SM3!
reviews.author: Peuxr

reviews.text: 8.5/10 Still pulling out the goods and still had me laughing from start to finish. I forgot how much I'd watched this one back in the day way more than I ever did number one. I will say though number one has aged so much better than 2 has which is surprising to me but it's true.
reviews.author: Davy Endgame X

summary: A group of students visit a mansion called "Hell House," and murderous high jinks ensue.

title: The Count of Monte Cristo

reviews.text: Once in a while, a movie just transports you to a different world. This was one of those experiences. Epic score. Epic story. Loved it.
reviews.author: drjshetty

reviews.text: A bit long but worth a watch , visually captivating credit to director and technicians . A fine adaptation the least i will say .
reviews.author: xayaral

reviews.text: I'd heard good things but I don't usually go for long movies. It was gripping from beginning to end and beautifully made. Loved the cast.
reviews.author: Traktorama

reviews.text: An epic story that actually feels epic in scope, forgot that these could be made without resorting to CGI and a green screen for every scene.
reviews.author: Chinalover33

reviews.text: What an absolutely stunning movie. I was absorbed from the first minute (and my attention span usually struggles with foreign sound track movies). The cinematography is as fantastic as the acting. A highly recommended movie.
reviews.author: Hitsville

reviews.text: Thrilling from A to Z. [this movie] (2024) doesn't reinvent the wheel, but seeing evil get their just deserts never gets old, especially when it's so beautifully orchestrated. Thoroughly enjoyed, a movie I will be sure to revisit.
reviews.author: Staidanom

summary: Edmond Dantès becomes the target of a sinister plot and is arrested on his wedding day for a crime he did not commit. After 14 years in the island prison of Château d’If, he manages a daring escape. Now rich beyond his dreams, he assumes the identity of the Count of Monte-Cristo and exacts his revenge on the three men who betrayed him.

title: Madagascar: Escape 2 Africa

reviews.text: I love this movie a lot younger, and it still holds up really well today for a sequel. I think I've watched this more than the original movie, and I just love the setting the characters are in. I think this is my personal favorite movie from the trilogy.
reviews.author: pxcci

reviews.text: Personally I think this is better than the first film. Very entertaining but sometimes I just lost focus, there were times when I just lost interest in what was going on. Plus I was really happy to see Mort again, lil' cutie. 7/10 31/03/2019
reviews.author: joeshuff

reviews.text: A solid continuation of the story with a bit more heart and world-building. It doesn’t feel repetitive or lazy, which is impressive for a sequel. The characters get more development, and while the plot isn’t groundbreaking, the pacing and humor keep it afloat. Still very much in the comfort zone, but it works.
reviews.author: jacogiu

reviews.text: Not quite as good as the first. It has basically the typical sequel issue - more of the same without adding much. That doesn't mean it's bad, though. Still very funny. The penguins in King Julien still get more laughs then the others.
reviews.author: FinFan

reviews.text: I almost died laughing in the part where Alex the lion, Marty the zebra and Melman the giraffe were screaming their heads off when the plane was plummeting towards the ground, and Gloria the hippo slept through the whole damn thing! I love "[this movie]!" It's fun, it's the best movie I've ever watched in my life.
reviews.author: juliepitt1981

reviews.text: The penguins were the best thing about the first [this movie] movie and they are once again the stars of this sequel. While the main characters Alex the Lion, Marty the Zebra, Melman the Giraffe, and Gloria the Hippo go searching for themselves, the Penguins are all business. They salvage and rebuild the plane that they crashed in Africa and have hired a crew of monkeys to work for them. The Penguins' special forces personas and their rapid-fire dialogue and joke delivery make them the funniest thing in Black & White since The Three Stooges. They totally outshine the other characters, especially the main character Alex, who's unfunny and conceited in an uninteresting way.
reviews.author: Whitsbrain

summary: Alex, Marty, and other zoo animals find a way to escape from Madagascar when the penguins reassemble a wrecked airplane. The precariously repaired craft stays airborne just long enough to make it to the African continent. There the New Yorkers encounter members of their own species for the first time. Africa proves to be a wild place, but Alex and company wonder if it is better than their Central Park home.

title: Ted

reviews.text: If your not used to Seth comedy, ypu will find this very vulgarities and hilarious. If you are used to it, still vulgar and funny, but not as great.
reviews.author: Parmlog

reviews.text: The realization of a childhood dream can be as funny as it is sad. It has some overly exaggerated jokes, so children should stay away, but it deals with the themes of friendship and growing up in an entertaining way. I was late to watch it, but it was enjoyable.
reviews.author: Elmart

reviews.text: Paddington goes Seth MacFarlane. An immature and insolent teddybear loves amongst us and everybody considers it normal. It is a good comedy, better than what I thought, if you like American teenage humour. If yes, it is just great fun.
reviews.author: siggi963

reviews.text: The only really good thing about this movie is Mila Kunis (and the chemistry with Mark Wahlberg)... and ok the cameos here and there. But other then that... so-so. This type of humor is not my thing.
reviews.author: RiGHT

reviews.text: >"Company's turning 20, huh? So you can bang it but you can't get it drunk." Hard not to laugh during this. Jokes are flying a million miles a minute and some don't land but so many do and by the end of the movie I actually cared about this teddy bear.
reviews.author: Narate

reviews.text: I agree that it's overhyped. It had a few minor laughs like just about any comedy, but not a "great" movie. I like Wahlberg in some movies, but he's just not a funny guy. Ever see him in an interview? He's about as exciting as a Wooden Indian.
reviews.author: ScottElblein

summary: John Bennett, a man whose childhood wish of bringing his teddy bear to life came true, now must decide between keeping the relationship with the bear or his girlfriend, Lori.

title: The Nightmare Before Christmas

reviews.text: This was my favorite movie as a kid. I had to have watched it more than 30 times and I wouldn’t mind watching it again.
reviews.author: DatBabyAintMine

reviews.text: When taylor swift wrote “he’s so tall and handsome as hell, he’s so bad but he does it so well” she was actually referring to jack skellington
reviews.author: laurenshikari

reviews.text: It's been awhile since I last saw this classic halloween film, and still creeps the shit out of me. Love the film. It never gets old. Great songs.
reviews.author: CinemanicBonkers

reviews.text: One of those perfect [this movie] presents that you didn't even know to ask for. An original story, perfect pacing, and state of the art animation... It's (almost) enough to make me forget I hate musicals.
reviews.author: Saint Pauly

reviews.text: This is my favorite childhood movie. If they came out with a sequel, I would definitely go to the theater to see it. I had to have watched this movie over 100 times as a kid.
reviews.author: DatBabyAintMine

reviews.text: I just watched it for the first time. The story is hard to follow (people who have seen it a dozen times will say "really?"). I guess it's easier to like if you grew up watching it.
reviews.author: The_Argentinian

summary: Tired of scaring humans every October 31 with the same old bag of tricks, Jack Skellington, the spindly king of Halloween Town, kidnaps Santa Claus and plans to deliver shrunken heads and other ghoulish gifts to children on Christmas morning. But as Christmas approaches, Jack's rag-doll girlfriend, Sally, tries to foil his misguided plans.

title: The Karate Kid

reviews.text: I don't know why jaden got so much hate. Its just a 12 yo kid. The movie has some action and makes jackie shine like old times.

reviews.text: It's all messed up and definitely miles south from the original. Too many plot and theme ludicrousness. Jaden Smith's acting and his character s*cks monkey balls as well.

reviews.text: super loved this movie especially the song choices for john mayer and justin bieber. love jaden smith's portrayal to this and the way he trained for the scenes. so cooooool! i just dont get it why it's called [this movie] when everything they're learning is kung fu haha
reviews.author: ciamrivera

reviews.text: Solid remake, the only thing that's not fitting is the name. Should have been named The Kung Fu Kid – it would still fit in the franchise but without making all these fragile men-children in the comment section cry. :person_facepalming_tone1:

reviews.text: I can not understand which was the purpose of this remake . A really bad choice . A movie which was 100 times worst than the original one . It was a waste of time for me . I am a huge [this movie] fan but this one was one of the worst remakes i have ever seen .
reviews.author: vasago

reviews.text: The only good thing in this movie was Jackie Chan! He was great! There were some beautiful locations, too. The rest, so bad! And no matter that it's a remake of the great movie named [this movie], naming this one [this movie] when it's about kung fu, that's just stupid.
reviews.author: AleksandraN

summary: 12-year-old Dre Parker could've been the most popular kid in Detroit, but his mother's latest career move has landed him in China. Dre immediately falls for his classmate Mei Ying but the cultural differences make such a friendship impossible. Even worse, Dre's feelings make him an enemy of the class bully, Cheng. With no friends in a strange land, Dre has nowhere to turn but maintenance man Mr. Han, who is a kung fu master. As Han teaches Dre that kung fu is not about punches and parries, but maturity and calm, Dre realizes that facing down the bullies will be the fight of his life.

title: The Devil's Advocate

reviews.text: The world is consumed by vanity, but the ball is still in the game, we have a choice, even if we play against the masterful talent of Pacino.
reviews.author: Idek

reviews.text: Nice surprise. I decided to watch because of Pacino. Not being a fan of Mr. Reeves, yours truly was pleasantly surprised at his acting chops in this vehicle.
reviews.author: marathone

reviews.text: Great movie that is long forgotten and overlooked. A thriller featuring Al Pacino playing [this movie] and Keanu Reeves as a young hotshot lawyer. Charlise Theron does a great job as the wife losing her mind. Great pace, suspense and great story.
reviews.author: gunsgirl

reviews.text: "Donald Trump could not come" "Flemish" Years without seeing it and I still like it, the desire to climb Keanu, the fall of Charlize prepared by Pacino. "Vanity, my favorite sin"
reviews.author: juliosoft

reviews.text: We know Keanu isn't the best actor but he doesn't usually annoy me. Here his performance is bad and he doesn't even come close to bringing the character alive. The story is pretty based and when you see a cliché like black people doing voodoo or whatever you know it's not going to get any better. I don't even think Pacino's acting style fits. It's already ageing bad.
reviews.author: moonkodi

reviews.text: [this movie] is a wickedly fun 10/10 ride that proves that if you’re going to dance with [this movie], you better bring your best moves—and maybe a lawyer. With Pacino’s scenery-chewing, Reeves’ crisis of conscience, and Theron’s haunting breakdown, this film reminds you that ambition is a hell of a drug, and vanity? Well, that’s just [this movie]’s cherry on top.
reviews.author: Haxe13

summary: Aspiring Florida defense lawyer Kevin Lomax accepts a job at a New York law firm. With the stakes getting higher every case, Kevin quickly learns that his boss has something far more evil planned.

title: The Butterfly Effect

reviews.text: This film gets better every time I watch it, just never goes right for (Evan Terbon) [this movie] is reality in many different ways..
reviews.author: CinemanicBonkers

reviews.text: Well, time travel is always tricky, you can bend time and stretch it but it can never run backwards, that's why these movies are filled with stupid actions and paradoxes, one can only watch and enjoy them as cinema
reviews.author: Ausojk

reviews.text: It was one of my favorites back then and I've seen it again now after many years. The charm is still there, even if the quality is certainly not perfect from today's perspective. For nostalgic reasons, however, it's still worth 4 stars on Letterboxd.
reviews.author: Lizzie2023

reviews.text: Best time travel movie ever. I absolutely was blown away by how good this was. I even watched the directors cut. I've this movie a few times and I don't like watching movies more than once. You really need to add this movie to your watch list yesterday. You won't regret it.
reviews.author: blanktheman

reviews.text: Funciona. Es oscura, retorcida y directa. Usa el viaje en el tiempo para hablar de trauma, destino y consecuencias. Tiene momentos duros y un tono más serio de lo que esperás de Ashton Kutcher. No es perfecta, pero engancha y te deja pensando.
reviews.author: GÜZSTÄV77

reviews.text: [this movie] is a bold and thought provoking film that lingers long after the credits roll. Its exploration of free will, consequences, and the fragility of life makes it a memorable entry in the sci-fi thriller genre. This film is flawed but undeniably captivating. If you're a fan of dark, cerebral storytelling, [this movie] is well worth your time.
reviews.author: Cory78

summary: A young man struggles to access sublimated childhood memories. He finds a technique that allows him to travel back into the past, to occupy his childhood body and change history. However, he soon finds that every change he makes has unexpected consequences.

title: Blended

reviews.text: Is it mind-blowing? Not at all. Is it memorable? Probably not. But it's that type of feel good movie you have to watch once in a while.
reviews.author: Mel-

reviews.text: ★★★½☆ (3.5/5) Feels like a throwback to Sandler and Barrymore’s earlier rom-coms. The family dynamic adds a nice layer to the usual romance. It’s predictable and a little long, but it has warmth and easy chemistry. Not amazing, just charming and enjoyable.
reviews.author: fulltimewatcher

reviews.text: Drew is great, Adam Sandler is exactly the same as every other one of these movies. They do have chemistry later on when the movie gets rolling. Which it doesn’t do until the vacation, maybe an hour in to the film. It’s mostly the weird characters and settings around them that make the laughs.
reviews.author: D3rrrty

reviews.text: >"You just scared a zebra stripe into my underwear!" This era of Sandler is honestly all the same. Predictable jokes, jokes that certain people would say are offensive, and Sandler getting put into bad situations yet is still charming. That being said, it's one of the weaker ones.
reviews.author: Narate

reviews.text: This is not going to make film history. It's not very original. It's not even that funny - but it does have Drew Barrymore and Adam Sandler and it does have a cr*pload of heart and I really did enjoy it, no matter weither it was original or not.
reviews.author: Nakesdotter

reviews.text: I just started watching this. I came here for the chemistry between Sanders and Barrymore. So far, it’s pulling on my heartstrings! I see a lot of comments complaining that this isn’t original. I don’t care because Sanders and Barrymore are so cute together.... okay let me go back to the movie.
reviews.author: rennydapooh78@gmail.com

summary: Recently divorced mom Lauren and widowed dad Jim let their friends push them into a blind date, which goes disastrously wrong. Unsurprisingly, neither wants to see the other ever again. However, fate intervenes when both Jim and Lauren, unbeknownst to each other, purchase one-half of the same vacation package at a South African resort for families, during spring break. They and their children are forced to share the same romantic suite and participate in a slew of family activities together.

title: Karate Kid: Legends

reviews.text: It’s fine, pretty much the definition of mediocre. I won’t remember much about this one in a few days but it’s not horrible to watch.
reviews.author: sage020

reviews.text: Entertaining movie. Brought back some good memories from back in the day. 👍 Well worth a watch. It takes a while to get up to speed.. 👍
reviews.author: Davezn

reviews.text: A bit rushed when it comes to second half and nostalgic. It was overall a good watch. I can sense that they wanted to pass the baton to next generation so they made this movie.
reviews.author: AlphaonTrakt

reviews.text: They are milking the shit out of something that should have stayed in the 80s. Cobra Kai started mid but ended very bad with so many unnecassery extra seasons
reviews.author: Specialkipforce

reviews.text: The movie was good, BUT, there were some things that I thought were not so good. The musical choices, the rush to unfold the story... other than that, I loved the character and seeing the legend Myagi again :pray_tone2: 7/10
reviews.author: jujitsu4Ever

reviews.text: I liked it would have been better with some of the Cobra Kai cast in it as well but yeah it was short and sweet. They kept the [this movie] formula kind of anyway.
reviews.author: Tek-

summary: After a family tragedy, kung fu prodigy Li Fong is uprooted from his home in Beijing and forced to move to New York City with his mother. When a new friend needs his help, Li enters a karate competition – but his skills alone aren't enough. Li's kung fu teacher Mr. Han enlists original Karate Kid Daniel LaRusso for help, and Li learns a new way to fight, merging their two styles into one for the ultimate martial arts showdown.

title: Colombiana

reviews.text: [this movie] is a decent revenge film. The action scenes were alight, not great; I have seen better. This movie was better than I thought it would be. It was worth the rental.
reviews.author: ViperDu'Vark

reviews.text: If you like the idea of Zoe Saldaña kicking arse and still looking great while doing it, well this is it. It's sexy and fun but kinda forgettable.
reviews.author: JustFrank

reviews.text: Entertaining enough and not much meandering (good thing), but there were spots of writing where it didn't make logical sense why characters act like they did, and so took a bit away from the whole movie.
reviews.author: sfuxion

reviews.text: Between chores on a Sunday afternoon, I was looking for a brainless action film and that's exactly what _[this movie]_ is. Ultimately, Zoe Saldana makes this amply watchable.
reviews.author: Saint Pauly

reviews.text: I liked the first part as Cataleya was 10 years old (IMO: that little actress did an amazing job). Right after that it gets too excessive ... like a 100 pound girl carrying a 180 pound man and such crap - not my thing. One movie I'll never watch again.
reviews.author: BenFranklin

reviews.text: Tough reviews, thought the movie was really good, constant action, portray focused & active assassin. Not many movies where you see this with a woman. If only the movie salt could of been this good. Better fight & gun scenes & they didn't need a big name like Angelina Jolie to do it, great!
reviews.author: ShaunComan

summary: After witnessing her parents’ murder as a child in Bogota, Cataleya Restrepo grows up to be a stone-cold assassin. She works for her uncle as a hitman by day, but her personal time is spent engaging in vigilante murders that she hopes will lead her to her ultimate target: the mobster responsible for her parents' death.

title: Wrong Turn 2: Dead End

reviews.text: Always fun to watch schlock from the 00's for all the fun references and tropes from my childhood. The added element of game show stereotypes and over the top gore / dialogue instantly make this a great halloween with friends movie. Some legitimately bad acting and weird pacing + the decision to shoot a lot of this movie hand cam style make some scenes really question if you're watching a porno or not and the script itself isn't Citizen Kane, but the mutant inbred freaks act their heart out having fun grunting and moaning running around in shitty masks in the forest. And that's awesome. My main gripe with this movie is that the sound mixing is pretty terrible.
reviews.author: kidmodo

When a more evolved caveman named Guy arrives on the scene, Grug is distrustful, but it soon becomes apparent that Guy is correct about the impending destruction of their world.
