It leans more into heartfelt moments than big spectacle, which gives it a warm sendoff. A pleasant and respectful conclusion to the series.
reviews.author: fulltimewatcher

reviews.text: I'd say it was a very nice end of the trilogy. The story is quite wonky but nonetheless I loved it! High Jackman cameo caught me totally off guard and made me laugh hard. The only thing that I'm quite upset about is the fact that they had an amazing actor, Rami Malek, to play Pharaoh and yet he had such a little role in the whole trilogy.
reviews.author: demo.lition

reviews.text: some funny, but also so much dumb. The nose thing, the monkey pee thing, and Ben Stiller caveman didn't land for me. Rami Malek made the best out of what he had to work with, I could watch him simply do facial expressions all day. Also it has one major female character but she suffers from Sexy Lamp syndrome. All in all I think it had the bones of a good movie, and it had it's funny moments, but it's weighed down by so much dumb.
reviews.author: Codex13

reviews.text: For the final night, the final movie and the film ended...so so. A quick recap of the other two Museums films and then I will talk about the third one: The first [this movie] film I thought was pretty good and solid family film. It's harmless and very creative of what the creators can do with the famous figures of are history. But the second movie I thought was a big mess. I remembered not laughing that much while watching the film, and is it just me or the movie was like it was pleading for me to laugh at it but I was left in silence for the all film.
reviews.author: Bradym03

reviews.text: So the final movie in the trilogy. That's what I'm hoping for. Because when the first movie came I thought it was a nice idea and then its sequel was so bad without any further innovative ideas to add up. I was not expecting the third movie, but it made its way and I give it a try only to get disappointed. Ben Stiller is a fine actor and a great director, this trilogy was just a passing cloud in his career, other I would have blamed him for accepting the offer. As we know its a multi star movie, in that I am very happy to see Robin Williams one final time.
reviews.author: Reno

reviews.text: A rather stale and unimaginative sequel, [this movie] delivers the same old, same old. When the Tablet of Akhmenrah starts to corrode the exhibits begin dying, forcing Larry to take a team to the London [this movie] in search of answers. The core cast returns, but they give rather rote performances. Also, the film doesn’t really utilize the London [this movie] very well; making it a pretty dull setting. Additionally, there’s a tonal shift from the previous films, which feels a little incongruent with the series. Yet despite all of its problems, [this movie] is an entertaining romp that has a bit of excitement to it.
reviews.author: jarvis-8243417

summary: When the magic powers of The Tablet of Ahkmenrah begin to die out, Larry Daley spans the globe, uniting favorite and new characters while embarking on an epic quest to save the magic before it is gone forever.

title: Descendants

reviews.text: While I did not enjoy the movie (the song and dance numbers were particularly terrible), I found myself fond of the characters... it's a nice concept, I agree, just not very well executed.
reviews.author: milkhoneytea

reviews.text: Love these movies! They are so well done. Great music, costumes and scenery. Definitely cheesy and meant for kids, but lots of fun and not painful for adults to view.
reviews.author: farrarari

reviews.text: I remember loving this when I watched it for the first time. As you can expect it's cringey and was a very try-hard movie but I enjoyed it and still think it's funny to watch for the nostalgia
reviews.author: lou04

reviews.text: Great originality. It's a Disney Channel movie so it makes it a little more childish. If this concept were done by Disney in a live action movie it would be a sensation! I also thought the casting was quite clever of the children.
reviews.author: FrankJacob

reviews.text: Even at the very beginning of the movie, I felt like it was trying too hard. And it just feels like it could be better. There was no "wow" factor even for a kid. Bad acting, bad lip syncing. I don't know if I'll watch the sequels. I try to understand that it's a Disney Channel movie so it's obviously a low budget film.
reviews.author: mg_grey

reviews.text: **The next generation!** This is a great concept, I don't know why Disney did not turn it into a theatrical film. As per the television standards, this film succeeds from all the aspects. The casting was good, but the focus was not distributed equally. May be they kept it for the sequels, in each to tell everyone's tale as the centre. So this is about the [this movie] of the greatest villains of Disney's fairy tales. They all got admitted to the Auradon Prep located near to their banished land. A chance to follow their own path, particularly to cut off bad influences of their parents.
reviews.author: Reno

summary: A present-day idyllic kingdom where the benevolent teenage son of King Adam and Queen Belle offers a chance of redemption for the troublemaking offspring of Disney's classic villains: Cruella De Vil (Carlos), Maleficent (Mal), the Evil Queen (Evie) and Jafar (Jay).

title: The Mechanic

reviews.text: Perfectly serviceable and entertaining (if not predictable) action movie with a little thrill to it. Statham is Statham. Can't argue with that as he's very solid for what he does. 6.75/10
reviews.author: PorterUk

reviews.text: I may have been a little too harsh on this before because of my love for the original. It's actually a pretty decent remake. Doesn't reinvent the wheel or anything, but for a time waster, it's an okay actioner.
reviews.author: jekyl6669

reviews.text: Entertaining movie, but not nearly as good as the original. Wouldn't call it the worst of the year. I mean, Have you seen "Big Mommas"? :S
reviews.author: rassmatic

reviews.text: Have to admit that JS is a bit of a guilty pleasure. He only knows how to play one role amd loves to ham it up but he knows how to kick ass for sure. One of his better films. Even the missus said she was warming to him after watching this
reviews.author: geeky_herman

reviews.text: I'm not a fan of Statham & I don't remember a movie I liked after the first Transporter but I did enjoy this one a lot, I haven't seen the original but I thought this was so good that it made me want to watch the Charles Bronson one.
reviews.author: ahmed2250

reviews.text: Watching this movie with the perfect background, at the lounge of a auto shop while some mechanics fix my car, and it’s more interesting and surprising than this movie. Nice action and I think my point of view is wrong, watching a Statham action movie and getting disappointed that its super cliche it’s like eating an hamburger and disappoint it don’t tastes like pizza. That’s what it is, take it or leave it.
reviews.author: OmerNaor

summary: Arthur Bishop is a 'mechanic' - an elite assassin with a strict code requiring professional perfection and total detachment. One of an elite group of assassins, Bishop may be the best in the business - with a unique talent for cleanly eliminating targets. When Harry McKenna, his close friend and mentor, is murdered, Harry's son comes to him with vengeance in his heart and a desire to learn Bishop's trade, signaling the birth of a deadly partnership.

title: Wish

reviews.text: The villain was set up as a villain without build up... We somehow were expected to just expect him to be bad because he was tense. Meh...
reviews.author: Astranora

reviews.text: Doesn’t really stand out in any way. Songs are meh, story is meh, characters are annoying and mostly selfish and the animation is nothing special. Expected more from a celebration of 100 years of Disney.
reviews.author: JoeyvanAwesome

reviews.text: The fact that [this movie] is inspired by Disney's 100th anniversary, which is supposed to be a celebration, is embarrassing. It does show a decline in quality in Disney if this is the best they have.
reviews.author: Bradym03

reviews.text: Disney’s weaker 90’s movies like Hunchback of Notre Dame and Pocahontas are even far better. Like the recent Disenchanted, most of the songs are pretty flat. The animation is at least great.
reviews.author: Jim222001

reviews.text: Not Disney's best, but not their worst either. Disney has been going through a bad patch lately. Even Pixar's quality has gone down a bit. Why are people expecting this to be great? Enjoy it for what it is and get on with your life.
reviews.author: thangcuoi

reviews.text: The songs were fun and well done, and I really liked Asha's voice in particular, but the story did not engage me truly. The animation style felt like a weird version of Tangled, most of the characters felt interchangeable, and the villain was way too comical. It's not a horrible film but pretty meh overall.
reviews.author: SunnyGabe

summary: Asha, a sharp-witted idealist, makes a wish so powerful that it is answered by a cosmic force – a little ball of boundless energy called Star. Together, Asha and Star confront a most formidable foe - the ruler of Rosas, King Magnifico - to save her community and prove that when the will of one courageous human connects with the magic of the stars, wondrous things can happen.

title: Bolt

reviews.text: The best animation movie I've seen in a long time. Funny, moving, entertaining! Additionally it features an original plot and a good sound-track. I would go as far as calling [this movie] one of the best Animations ever made!
reviews.author: DRNKMNKY

reviews.text: Excellent. '[this movie]' is all a joy to watch. On paper, the premise can look a bit ridiculous, don't get me wrong it is, but the film manages to not only make it entertaining but to also make it both amusing and heartwarming. The opening scenes are superbly done, when the cat (dog?) gets let out the bag, so to speak, it does take a few moments to regain its footing but quickly turns into a lot of fun. It's got a pleasing adventure, heartfelt feelings and comedy to keep it fresh. The cast are very good, too.
reviews.author: r96sk

reviews.text: Enjoyable feature about a dog who finds out that he's not really a superhero, he just plays one on TV. [this movie] the dog and Mittens the cat were likable characters, more so than the main characters of the recent "Madagascar 2" or "Kung Fu Panda". The animation was excellent and the opening chase sequence's 3D effects were visually amazing. The 3D treatment throughout the rest of the picture was hardly jaw-dropping, though. This is a nice story, a buddy road picture really. In what seems to often be the case, the funniest parts of the movie are delivered by the secondary characters.
reviews.author: Whitsbrain

reviews.text: This starts off quite entertainingly with "Penny" and her super-hero dog "[this movie]" having to thwart the evil plans of the dastardly "Dr. Calico". She's on her glorified scooter and he just on his four paws - but they are not daunted by the overwhelming forces arrayed against them as they try to get to the airport. Well, that's when we realise that this is a television show and there'll be another edition tomorrow. Or will there? "Mindy" from the network comes to tell the rather fastidious director that the demographic is a bit bored with formulaic television and so he's going to have to introduce some jeopardy or it's the can for all of them!
reviews.author: CinemaSerf

reviews.text: Disney pre-Frozen, from the era when they were trying to find their place in 3D animation. [this movie] is a dog who thinks his TV superpowers are real. And when he ends up in New York without understanding it was all fiction, he has to cross America to get back to his owner. Along the way he meets Mittens (a stray cat) and Rhino (a hamster who's a fan of the show). The premise is fun and the supporting characters have more personality than the protagonist, honestly. Rhino in his ball is the best part of the movie.
reviews.author: Aratea

reviews.text: From Walt Disney Animation comes the hilarious family comedy [this movie]. After being separated from his co-star/owner, a dog named [this movie] (who’s been tricked into believing that his television series is real) embarks upon a journey to find her; but the real world proves to be full of dangers and perilous unlike anything that he’s ever had to face before. The voice casting is especially good, and the characters are incredibly fun and entertaining. Additionally, the animation is extraordinarily vivid and colorful, creating a rich, textured look for the film. And, the comedy is especially funny, particularly the satire. [this movie] is an amazing film that proves that Walt Disney Animation still has the magic.
reviews.author: jarvis-8243417

summary: Bolt is the star of the biggest show in Hollywood. The only problem is, he thinks it's real. After he's accidentally shipped to New York City and separated from Penny, his beloved co-star and owner, Bolt must harness all his "super powers" to find a way home.

title: Warriors of the Wind

reviews.text: Rather a dark story but still somehow cute movie. Well done and it is almost impossible to believe how old this movie is—it does not feel that way. Just another magical story by Miyazaki.
reviews.author: alopix

reviews.text: The love of Miyazaki for airplanes is my fav part of his movies. The air battles and the glider flying and the [this movie] sound effects during the different maneuvers, they’re always a treat for me :’)
reviews.author: Gedeone de Paperone

reviews.text: Watched this movie in 2024, a time when global warming is a major issue and gaining more attention. Miyazaki envisioned and warned us 40 years ago about the worsening destruction of nature and the interconnectedness of humans and the Earth through a beautifully animated film.
reviews.author: Ehsan57

reviews.text: ==Theater view== Swedish cinemas plays several movies by Studio Ghibli and Hayao Miyazaki in special. This weekend was the play of Nausicaä. The theme of the movie is even more accurate than ever.
reviews.author: startail

reviews.text: It was somewhere between "a bit boring", "okay", and "pleasant to watch". An interesting thing were some similarities with Star Wars and The Lord of the Rings! 😄 I think I would be inclined to recommend it, but only to fans of anime.
reviews.author: yqtkzb

reviews.text: This is my first Miyazaki, I'm watching them all for the Blank Check podcast. This is a big blind spot for me and if they're all as good as this one I'm in for many, many treats. Beautiful film, beautiful story. I love the character of Nausicaa so much!
reviews.author: KurtMoney

summary: After a global war, the seaside kingdom known as the Valley of the Wind remains one of the last strongholds on Earth untouched by a poisonous jungle and the powerful insects that guard it. Led by the courageous Princess Nausicaä, the people of the Valley engage in an epic struggle to restore the bond between humanity and Earth.

title: Les Misérables

reviews.text: It was good right up until the final moment when...well, I can’t say...but I wish it hadn’t ended when it did. A tough watch at times but it painted a picture of a grim reality well.
reviews.author: Lee Brown Barrow

reviews.text: This film is a 6, maybe a 6.5 at best. Two years from now, you won’t even remember you watched it. The perspectives, symbolism, themes, and deeper meanings the movie tries to convey all fall flat, failing to resonate on any significant level. It feels more like an attempt to push 'woke' ideas that don’t reflect reality, rather than offering something meaningful or impactful. I understand the appeal it might have, as it’s like a simplified version of La Haine for those who aren’t seasoned movie watchers, prefer not to think too much, and would rather watch overexplained movies. If I could mention something positive, it's that this movie isn't the worst of the worst.
reviews.author: nextstep

reviews.text: When I read somewhere this movie described as the best movie about the _banlieus_ since **La Haine**, I was expecting a movie about the street and undecipherable dialogues, what I got was wildly different. While **[this movie]** is indeed a movie about the _banlieus_, it's nothing like **La Haine**, which is a good thing. We live the story through the eyes of a newly transferred policeman who comes into this environment armed with an idealistic view of the world and a certain set of morals and principles, and through the journey he takes with his two new partners we see that things are complicated and not at all black and white.
reviews.author: Redouaaane

reviews.text: The documentary-type style of filming always works great with stories like these, you almost feel like you're watching a long news report, which gives you a sense that what you're watching isn't a movie, but real events, making it almost uncomfortable to see. It's a movie that raises many questions, and never really answers them, just like there's no real answer for them in real life either. We're all part of a broken system, too far down the rabbit hole to be saved.
reviews.author: 2016moonlight

reviews.text: There was surprise when France chose to submit '[this movie]' as their entry for Best International Film at the upcoming Academy Awards rather than Céline Sciamma's beloved 'Portrait of a Lady on Fire', but the decision makes a certain degree of sense. Where 'Portrait' is a timeless instant classic that speaks to the ongoing human condition, Ladj Jay's debut film is so immediate and vital for where France, and indeed Europe, find themselves now. Just as in Victor Hugo's novel, they are on the brink of a massive cultural and political collapse, a crisis that will define their future as a multicultural and economic society.
reviews.author: SWITCH.

reviews.text: Just as Victor Hugo's novel is considered one of the most important books of all time, this movie may be one of the most important films of the of the 21st century. If you're expecting the musical - forget it - it's not. It's dirty and gritty and honest. There is no satisfying ending to the movie. The outcome of a single, individual story is not important. Published in 1862, Victor Hugo wrote in his preface: "So long as there shall exist, by reason of law and custom, a social condemnation, which, in the face of civilization, artificially creates hells on earth ... so long as ignorance and misery remain on earth, books like this cannot be useless." It's 2023.
reviews.author: badelf

summary: Stéphane has recently joined the Anti-Crime Squad in Montfermeil, in the suburbs of Paris, France, where Victor Hugo set his famed novel “Les Miserables”. Alongside his new colleagues Chris and Gwada – both experienced members of the team – he quickly discovers tensions running high between local gangs. When the trio finds themselves overrun during the course of an arrest, a drone captures the encounter, threatening to expose the reality of everyday life.

title: Charlie's Angels

reviews.text: Thanks to the soundtrack full of hits from the turn of the century, the film gains sentimental power and the 1.5 hours fly by quickly.
reviews.author: Idek

reviews.text: Have seen many people calling the movie awful. I have actually enjoyed it. It is not a serious action film, it's a comedy which is supposed to brighten your mood
reviews.author: olena358952

reviews.text: Maybe it is a little bit arrogant to judge this movie in 2026.But I still want to say glad to see women can fight rather than be beauty.
reviews.author: Zhuang44

reviews.text: It’s bad, like B grade classics, it’s good. 😂 I felt like getting lost for 90 minutes and this did the trick. Nothing to think about, nothing to delve into , just some lighthearted fun
reviews.author: SnowyBoy

reviews.text: Not the greatest fighters in this besides Lucy Liu. I really only liked the movie cause it was funny, and of course their sexy. That's pretty much it.
reviews.author: Andre Gonzales

reviews.text: The ordeals of cocaine filmmaking in LA. Didn't take me long to realise this film works at 100% efficiency when you're railing down lines of the superpower drug every twenty minutes. I feel like this was crazy influential for so much of the 2000's. "That man's got a beautiful telephone voice."
reviews.author: Lucan26

summary: The captivating crime-fighting trio who are masters of disguise, espionage and martial arts are back! When a devious mastermind embroils them in a plot to destroy individual privacy, the Angels, aided by their loyal sidekick Bosley, set out to bring down the bad guys. But when a terrible secret is revealed, it makes the Angels targets for assassination.

title: Fifty Shades Darker

reviews.text: did any of these storylines make any sense together??? and how did they manage to take the tension out of the stalker/murderer/ex plot? this movie’s a mess.
reviews.author: samtasia

reviews.text: I enjoyed this way more than the first. Plus, the teaser for the next movie after the credits roll...wow! Can't wait to see how the next book unfolds on the big screen!
reviews.author: lunatee

reviews.text: This was better than first. The acting has gotten a bit better but still.. a bit cringe lol. Glad Anna grew some balls (girls of course) and at least took less sh*t than before.
reviews.author: kbree

reviews.text: Fifty shades of awful! Acting, plotting, dialogue... all bad! I wasn't expecting much, but this had me clawing out my eyes within minutes. Of course, sadomasochist that Christian Gray is, he would probably approve of the pain I was in.
reviews.author: Lee Brown Barrow

reviews.text: From when they meet to when they get married is only a time frame of 81 days, that just reasonable for a relationship especially for the expectations that Ana had. Plus who goes straight from college to a cushy job like that. No one. Just this whole series is not believable at all. I watched to watch, it's over. I'll never go back.
reviews.author: julienicoletv

reviews.text: "You're not putting those in my butt" Yep, Anastasia Steele is still the worst female character in movie history. [this movie] was complete dog shit that I'm not sure why I even saw it. Just watch Lego Batman or John Wick instead.
reviews.author: Bradym03

summary: When a wounded Christian Grey tries to entice a cautious Ana Steele back into his life, she demands a new arrangement before she will give him another chance. As the two begin to build trust and find stability, shadowy figures from Christian’s past start to circle the couple, determined to destroy their hopes for a future together.

title: The Hangover Part III

reviews.text: The story starts to get old, the jokes are less spontaneous and the story feels a lot like more of the same. It is an Ok comedy to watch, but far from the first one of the bunch. For fans.
reviews.author: siggi963

reviews.text: Why call it a "hangover" WHEN NOBODY HAD ONE TO BEGIN WITH!?! This movie was nothing more then a cheap cash in, I can't believe the actors actually agreed on reprising their roles on such a weak script!!!
reviews.author: WitWolfy

reviews.text: A darker and more violent sequel with Chow (Ken Jeong), more annoying than ever. With the cast even more wasted than they were in the first sequel.
reviews.author: Jim222001

reviews.text: Reviews made me pass on this film, finally watched it and it was decent. Great end to this weird ass trilogy. Loved the post-credits scene too, hilarious and a nice nod to previous films. Like seriously, this film is much better than everyone else is making it out to be.
reviews.author: xLite

reviews.text: [this movie] isn't a terrible film, but it's certainly the weakest entry in the trilogy. The new setting offers some visual freshness, and Goodman's performance is a highlight. However, the repetitive jokes and the predictable plot points leave you feeling like you've seen it all before.
reviews.author: searsgamer

reviews.text: I hadn't seen this movie since its release and it was really much better than I remembered. Instead of doing a more or less exact copy of the first movie in a different country, it goes a completely different route while still having connections to the first movie. I laughed quite a few times, maybe it's because I was expecting something way worse but I was pleasantly surprised rewatching this movie.
reviews.author: WalkingKev

summary: This time, there's no wedding. No bachelor party. What could go wrong, right? But when the Wolfpack hits the road, all bets are off.

title: Speed

reviews.text: very good action movie good acting, good storyline and the action is from the beginning to the end for sure to see again e people.
reviews.author: Makaveli..

reviews.text: 7/10. This movie is definitely not perfect and has a lot of flaws but it was a pretty enthralling action movie. Fun watch for what it was.
reviews.author: musa_ftw

reviews.text: Waaaay cornier than I thought it was going to be, but that made it way more enjoyable. There are lots of moments of genuine tension, and the score is surprisingly good.
reviews.author: JonTheMantis

reviews.text: Watching this classic for the millionth time and always getting better every time I watch it and by far one of keanu’s best films it’s made into my top films list XD
reviews.author: CinemanicBonkers

reviews.text: Turns out this is actually a real fun movie. I liked it as a kid but growing I started to remember it as a bad film but rewatching it now I'm having a blast.
reviews.author: Nox Anexayi

reviews.text: I watched it for the first time as a teenager and was impressed. I'm still in this feeling, it's rare for a movie to keep you so suspenseful until the end, even if you already know the plot.
reviews.author: Idek

summary: Tensions run high when a crazed bomber rigs a Los Angeles bus with a device that will kill everyone on board if the vehicle's speed dips below fifty miles per hour.

title: Caligula

reviews.text: [this movie] movie is p*rno. They must have spent most of the budget on hiring the wh*res. It was way too long. But it's still worth watching. Just don't watch it with your family or friends.
reviews.author: Pueblo-Goldmine-Severity-Aversion

reviews.text: this is a botched historical fiction film that even tho they deny it's porn.. IT IS PORN. Plus include the cast who can't seem to act, it's such a waste of time. p.s. malcolm's so gay here.. :s
reviews.author: mg_grey

reviews.text: Walk through a Bosch painting and marvel at the excesses and debauchery. Critics don't take this seriously because a porn producer snipped it up and inserted his own scenes. It is what it is. A near masterpiece.
reviews.author: Arrrrrrrach

reviews.text: Just awful, nothing good comes out of It: not the acting, story, cinematopgrahy... not even the blowjobs are worth watching. If your curious to watch besides every review telling you otherwise, just watch any other ancient tome movie or any other porn If thats what your looking for.
reviews.author: Lucas_Marx

reviews.text: Hedonistic debauchery, that I guess is fitting when portraying a period like this. The problem is not that it features such graphic sex, rather it focuses on it way too much, and completely randomly, where it isn't necessary. Just when the story starts to get interesting, we slip back into another needless orgy. And the film is lesser for it.
reviews.author: jekyl6669

reviews.text: Once again my lack of research prior to queuing led to quite the surprise when I threw this one in. I had no idea that it was a Penthouse production. There is no other way to say it--this was porn...with an ounce of history edited in. The balance of sex/story was skewed much too far in the porn direction to call this a good movie yet it was entertaining. As previously mentioned the HBO series Rome has much better balance with the emphasis on story and some debauchery intelligently interlaced in the plot.
reviews.author: Bob.Frapples

summary: After the death of the paranoid emperor Tiberius, Caligula, his heir, seizes power and plunges the empire into a bloody spiral of madness and depravity.

title: Scent of a Woman

reviews.text: I think this was a great movie and an important one to see for everyone. It is a good classic oldie, different from the movies made nowadays.
reviews.author: yqtkzb

reviews.text: This film really exceeded my expectation. I didn’t know anything about this movie before just watching it because Al Pacino. Wow he’s truly delivering fantastic performance here.
reviews.author: uppie92

reviews.text: I found it kinda of masterpiece..Great messages nice soundtrack brilliant directing and ofcourse one of the best acting perfomances i have ever seen from an actor.Al Pacino at his best he really deserved an easy oscar! Don't miss this one i liked everything about it 8.8/10
reviews.author: Horror future #7

reviews.text: The first 30 minutes are funny, the last 15 minutes are glorious. For the remaining 1h 45m Al Pacino plays a utterly unlikable, insufferable, bitter, blind asshole. I almost quit, at least the ending was good.
reviews.author: Bac0nSandwich

reviews.text: So [this movie]. This was on my list for a while now. I like Al Pacino. He has this edge about him. His deliveries are so power packed that he leaves everything behind and comes forth on the screen. He appears more of a drama actor where a single spotlight covers his speeches. Al Pacino plays a blind retired army officer. He is now dependent on his family and needs to be watched over. On a thanksgiving weekend, the family has to leave him in the care of Chris O’Donnell, a timid but strong willed gentleman. These two people are a class apart and their moments together change them both.
reviews.author: Sólstafir

reviews.text: Hoo-ah! Lt. Col. Frank Slade can tell her soap and perfume from a whiff afar. Al Pacino plays the role of blind old Frank, who is just a lump of sugar beneath all his harsh blues. If you're tangled up, just tango on. It is a lengthy film, but it never fails to entertain throughout with his shenanigans. Never have I seen a more abonimably cherishable, miserable, blind motherf*****r. The music was magic to my ears, and the acting was truly a sight for the sorest (or blindest) eyes. There is an extravagant amount of goof and beauty in this masterpiece. Most of the script was beyond brilliant—some lines especially touching—living long after the scenes have faded away.
reviews.author: chickenlasagna

summary: Charlie Simms is a student at a private preparatory school who comes from a poor family. To earn the money for his flight home to Gresham, Oregon for Christmas, Charlie takes a job over Thanksgiving looking after retired U.S. Army officer Lieutenant Colonel Frank Slade, a cantankerous middle-aged man who lives with his niece and her family.

title: Cloudy with a Chance of Meatballs

reviews.text: Such a creative and unique movie. I love this original idea and all the cute characters in this film. Who wouldn’t want an ice cream snow day?
reviews.author: sabss_del

reviews.text: A little bit better than most of these type of animation films although they are usually pretty easy to watch. Good voice work, enough humor to entertain.
reviews.author: sage020

reviews.text: Apart from the bizarre concept of weather changing into food, this is pretty generic. For such an unusual idea, the characters themselves are bland, there is very little humour that works and the finale act becomes tiresome. Disappointing!
reviews.author: SimonYNWA

reviews.text: For something so far out of my wheelhouse, I do have a certain level of appreciation for _[this movie]_. _Final rating:★★½ - Had a lot that appealed to me, didn’t quite work as a whole._

reviews.text: A surreal, artsy, and unexpectedly trippy animated film that stood out visually and thematically when I was younger. The animation holds up beautifully, vibrant, colorful, and creative, with genuinely cool character designs and set pieces that gave the whole thing a magical, dreamlike vibe. The plot itself isn’t particularly strong or compelling, but the heart, energy, and originality behind the concept are undeniable. It’s one of those films that sticks with you because of the atmosphere, not the narrative. Solid nostalgia value, and definitely unique in the animated canon.
reviews.author: jacogiu

summary: Inventor Flint Lockwood creates a machine that makes clouds rain food, enabling the down-and-out citizens of Chewandswallow to feed themselves. reviews.text: Produced in 1989 and even more beautiful than many animations made today. The dedication to the artistry and hand crafted work is always a delight. Some issues with the storytelling and characters (particularly adult men vying for the affections of a young girl), still... grace allowed due to the era, but overall a lovely film. It's also great to see the inspiration for our modern animation "Wild Robot".
reviews.author: Van Nyx

reviews.text: Easier to get into than _Nausicaä_, this is a much more propulsive, adventurous film by comparison. The animation is more detailed and colourful, Miyazaki’s storytelling abilities improved by leaps and bounds (no more clunky exposition; bolder themes and messaging), the music is beautiful and there are a lot of scenes that are very entertaining in their own right. I like that the visuals put a strong emphasis on the aesthetic differences between both worlds (the industrial vs the ethereal), which reflects the main theme of the film.
reviews.author: Jordyep

reviews.text: Look, it’s obviously gorgeous to look at – every frame looks like someone spent three months painting clouds just to flex – but it also has that same Miyazaki thing where suddenly there’s a new floating rock and you’re just expected to nod along like “Yeah, no, of course. That makes sense. Brilliant. Genius stuff.” And I did find myself slightly losing the thread, partly because the film kept hurling shiny lore at me. It’s not nonsense exactly, it’s just very “and then another thing happens!” which is charming until it isn’t. I liked it though! It’s fine!

reviews.text: Its been a long while since I've enjoyed a sci action fiction film, as much as "[this movie]". Obviously inspired by films like "Alien(s) and "Predator" (the originals not the horrible woke remixes), this film builds in extra elements, that are genuinely creative and add depth. For instance, having the aliens act a lot like human special forces, with gear that's familiar but adapted to reflect their status as an advanced, if brutal, race. The story is quite sophisticated too, for what is essentially a film driven by action. On the subject of which, the action is frenetic, convincing and well paced, throughout the length of the film. There really are, few dull moments.

reviews.author: Jay Shuai

reviews.text: Charlie Chaplin's last semi-silent picture, and his final appearance as the little tramp. It's also a not-so-subtle critique of the change in America's popular attitude during his professional heyday, decrying the abundance of automation in local factories while the great depression still raged in city streets. Despite the weighty deeper implications, it remains a genuinely charming set of skits and Chaplin is at his emotive, expressive best from curtain to curtain. The film gets bonus points for throwing its star into so many unique, visually spectacular situations, including what's probably his signature scene inside the belly of a giant, mechanical assembly line.
reviews.author: drqshadow

reviews.text: This is a great introduction for those who are interested in a Charlie Chaplin film though it’s also the last one where Chaplin dons the Tramp persona. The machine segment and that force feeder early in the film is crazy but laughable at the same time. Also I ended out finding out the assembly line scene is what many films and shows have took inspiration from. The visual effect works still holds up today for a film that is 90 years old now. There even some themes in the film that has grown to become more relevant today.

reviews.text: Some cool monster designs and some fun fantasy action sequences. There's great visuals, even if the concept is kinda bonkers. I will say this, at least it was far more entertaining than Jason Bourne...
reviews.author: jekyl6669

summary: European mercenaries searching for black powder become embroiled in the defense of the Great Wall of China against a horde of monstrous creatures.

title: Extraction 2

reviews.text: Unfortunately the second [this movie] movie is nothing special in my opinion. It's chaotic and it felt like the shooting and screaming just didn't stop. For me this was overkill.
reviews.author: Gusanito1886

reviews.text: The prison break in one shot is crazy, the action in the skyscraper is tense, the final battle in the church is from flesh to soul - at least it's been tried.
reviews.author: littlebasin

reviews.text: Another enjoyable throwback, I do think the first one is better overall, but the first action sequence is awesome. Unfortunately the load is blown early and it doesn’t top it by the end.
reviews.author: JimDarko

reviews.text: It is good but worse than the first one. The first movie had more realistic action scenes and was more centered on the main character. This version lost the essence of the first film.
reviews.author: _nicoc

reviews.text: Incredible action sequences connected by a "good enough" plot. I would put in on par with the first installment and find myself wishing for more...not what I expected to think prior to putting it on the tube.
reviews.author: TKPNPodcast

reviews.text: A good film, with incredible action scenes, although I missed the memorable songs to accompany them. Some parts of the film can be a bit atrocious, but the story is simple and has moments of family drama.
reviews.author: Belenus

summary: Back from the brink of death, highly skilled commando Tyler Rake takes on another dangerous mission: saving the imprisoned family of a ruthless gangster.

title: Ghost Rider

reviews.text: I thought he started strong and finished strong too. He had a bit of a dip in the middle for me. Now on to the next one; it sounds promising...
reviews.author: GoPrayer

reviews.text: Not good not bad just very mediocre. Superhero movies have come a long way. Sam Elliott is great and seeing him go full cowboy is awesome.
reviews.author: nmahoney416

reviews.text: A non MCU marvel movie about a dude that's made a pact with the devil. A contract fulfilled in exchange for saving the one. Boring storyline but an okay CGI. The sequel's CGI went down the drain.
reviews.author: mimoo19

reviews.text: La esperada primera adaptación de este superhéroe resultó ser una decepción que no logra alcanzar su "potencial infernal". Lastrada por efectos especiales mediocres y un guion pobre, la peli reúne todos los elementos que un fan detesta, diálogos pobres y secuencias de acción carentes de emoción. 🔥🏍
reviews.author: russof

reviews.text: Worst movie with Nicolas Cage. Ever. And after Dare Devil, this is the worst movie in any way linked to Marvel. Cheesy lines, terrible script, average special effects.
reviews.author: RiGHT

reviews.text: As cheesey as they get was [this movie], especially the prologue, "erh" is how I would describe it. Every piece of information in this film is a spoon-feeding process done to you in dialogues plainer than white bread, and that seams to be the only way Hollywood handled comic adapts back the 2000s. To think that this only came 3 years before Ironman for me is still troubling to believe.
reviews.author: OMEGANCQ

summary: In order to save his dying father, young stunt cyclist Johnny Blaze sells his soul to Mephistopheles and sadly parts from the pure-hearted Roxanne Simpson, the love of his life. Years later, Johnny's path crosses again with Roxanne, now a go-getting reporter, and also with Mephistopheles, who offers to release Johnny's soul if Johnny becomes the fabled, fiery 'Ghost Rider'.

title: The Dictator

reviews.text: There were very good and clever jokes, but the end was kinda cheesy. Not as good as Borat but better than Brüno. I give it an 8 out of 10.
reviews.author: Meiwakuna

reviews.text: I think this piece of work is good. If you're only looking to laugh and have a good time watching a movie with your friends, then this is the right choice. In my opinion, it has great humor! I aladeen this movie.
reviews.author: pato22

reviews.text: So to those who are expecting and hoping for something similar to Bruno and Borat you may be left a little disappointed, but for those who wouldn't mind seeing something slightly different, and can take a movie for what it is, then you should enjoy this, as I did.
reviews.author: AlexanderZ

reviews.text: Sacha Cohen is probably too recognizable to get away with the unscripted bits that fueled his characters on Da Ali G Show any longer, which is a pity because those provided the fodder for most of his biggest laughs. He gets by okay in [this movie], his first starring vehicle without any such scenes, but also feels more homogenized and common than ever before. It's an intentionally crass, stupid film that leaves no culture un-mocked and no softball un-smacked.
reviews.author: drqshadow

reviews.text: I should have watched it sooner. With all the indie comedies that provide sensible chuckles, I missed a sharp, crass comedy like this one. It's not as good as Borat but it's close enough.
reviews.author: dtsouza

reviews.text: Ok for a Sacha Baron Cohen comedy, not as good as his previous works, and i must say, it have an awful cheesy ending, 4/10
reviews.author: fabiomello

summary: The heroic story of a dictator who risks his life to ensure that democracy would never come to the country he so lovingly oppressed.

title: 300: Rise of an Empire

reviews.text: Shitty. The first one was already bad, but it was unique, fun too watch and had some unique acting and features. This one is everything the first movie was, without it's positive points and all aspects done a tad worse.
reviews.author: Lainfan

reviews.text: The film was better than I thought it was to going to be. But nothing like the first one. The action is fun to watch but the story itself is pretty lacking and takes lots of plot elements from the original.
reviews.author: ebone70

reviews.text: Zack Synder has made two good movies in his entire career - [this movie] and Wonder Woman. **Please don't expect this movie to be any good.**
reviews.author: DatBabyAintMine

reviews.text: "[this movie]" was ground breaking at the time of release, "Rise of an Empire" merely perfects that first step into a world of a different, and maybe more enigmatic, way of story telling. For these reasons [this movie] gets a 8.5/10.
reviews.author: AlexanderZ

reviews.text: While the visuals were stunning (yay 3D blood!), I found it ridiculous that the seemingly sexual tension between Themistocles and Artemisia ended up becoming the focus of the story. Script is also full of motherhood statements that don't make sense except to men who think there is "glory" in war.
reviews.author: sairapambid

reviews.text: Thought this movie was pretty good when I wasn't expecting too much from the bad ratings and reviews I'd seen. I was pleasantly surprised at the storyline, and the visuals and battle scenes were pretty epic. Overall I would say this is worth a watch but don't expect too much from the film. The original is better but this is a worthy follow up.
reviews.author: zag

summary: Greek general Themistocles attempts to unite all of Greece by leading the charge that will change the course of the war. Themistocles faces the massive invading Persian forces led by mortal-turned-god, Xerxes and Artemesia, the vengeful commander of the Persian navy.

title: Freakier Friday

reviews.text: Almost as fun as the first film. I love all the cameos and guest stars. The 4 way body swap can be a tad confusing some of the time.
reviews.author: thangcuoi

reviews.text: I actually had low expectations and only watched it because I enjoyed the first one, but it turned out to be genuinely funny. And anna being a mom was a nice touch .
reviews.author: Shahera adly

reviews.text: A great fun movie. Nice and light and enjoyable. Sometimes I forgot who was who.. 🙈 😂 The scene in the record shop was hysterical. Well worth a watch. 👍
reviews.author: Davezn

reviews.text: Predictable just like its first movie, but much funnier than its prequel. I felt SO represented by Lily-turned-Tess trying to get up after kneeling ಥ⁠‿⁠ಥ
reviews.author: magnusthorek

reviews.text: Wow! This movie is sooo out of touch. This was just a money grab for F list actors. Painful to watch! Oh no! This is a MUST-NOT-WATCH!
reviews.author: tpasi

reviews.text: Un tuffo nel passato con un sequel che non delude Lo scambio tra corpi questa volta avviene tra tre generazioni, nonna #JamieLeeCurtis, figlia #LindsayLohan e nipote, triplicando il divertimento #Adoooro #QuelPazzoVenerdì2 #QuelPazzoVenerdìSemprePiùPazzo #[this movie]2
reviews.author: ChiaraNataStanca

summary: Years after Tess and Anna endured an identity crisis, Anna now has a daughter of her own and a soon-to-be stepdaughter. As they navigate the myriad challenges that come when two families merge, Tess and Anna discover lightning might indeed strike twice.

title: The Monkey

reviews.text: Tries to be a horror and a dark comedy, doesn't achieve either. Had potential to be a mixture of death note and final destination but alas.
reviews.author: mk677hd

reviews.text: It's a fun and tense flick, not so much scary, but the deaths are creative and even if they go overboard, there's the constant question of who's next.
reviews.author: Singis1

reviews.text: I could not write a better review than what a child’s voice says at the very end of the credits roll; “Shit man that sucks”
reviews.author: FLUXCAPA

reviews.text: I loved it so much. It is a strange, strange movie and that made it unpredictable just in the right way. You have to be in the right mood for it, but if you will be entertained to no end
reviews.author: TimNow

reviews.text: Holy cow!, this was terrible. I grew up watching and liking “[this movie] Shines”. I went in expecting this to be not great but a decent B or straight-to-video movie but this was even worse.
reviews.author: eroz

reviews.text: "WE GOTTA MAKE LIKE EGGS AND SCRAMBLE!" There's a scene in this which is just a cut to a picture of the director, and it's one of the funniest movie moments I've seen in a while.
reviews.author: hgram

summary: When twin brothers find a mysterious wind-up monkey, a series of outrageous deaths tear their family apart. Twenty-five years later, the monkey begins a new killing spree forcing the estranged brothers to confront the cursed toy.

title: Suzume

reviews.text: While watching the last ten minutes, with tears down my face, I said “10 out of 10”, and kept bawling my eyes out. So that’s it. 10/10.
reviews.author: Kyria Crosszeria

reviews.text: visually stunning, audibly breathtaking, i was completely enraptured. i just know when i hear this score again it’ll be just like walking through [this movie]’s door ;-;
reviews.author: nomegan

reviews.text: What a cute movie! I really enjoyed it. Really interesting story, even though some things one kind of made sense and then did make sense, then didn’t anymore. Still very sweet in itself sad way.
reviews.author: alopix

reviews.text: A young adult girl's journey in discovering that everything they need in life was already given, despite the loss she had when she was a young girl. From living in the past, from pain, to embracing it, so she can live in the present and face her future with happiness and fulfilment.
reviews.author: YourOnlyOne

reviews.text: If we compare this movie with Your Name and Weathering with You, it would come in third place. However, the movie is still worth watching for its entertainment value.
reviews.author: UnderDoggo

reviews.text: My god... This movie is absolute trash, the plot is full of holes, the characters are plot device and the relationship between characters is so bland and lame... Nothing in this movie except the animation worth it. Yeah, right, the visuals are great but nothing in the films works is very meh to me.
reviews.author: Bat-Kaled

summary: Suzume, 17, lost her mother as a little girl. On her way to school, she meets a mysterious young man. But her curiosity unleashes a calamity that endangers the entire population of Japan, and so Suzume embarks on a journey to set things right.

title: National Treasure

reviews.text: What can I say about this that hasn't been said elsewhere? Cage is a legend, it's a fun Disney movie, and has a strong pace throughout.
reviews.author: Nat2r

reviews.text: A story so unbelievable that you can just shut off your brain and enjoy how they do it to steal the original constitution n of the United States. A good action-adventure.
reviews.author: siggi963

reviews.text: I know people shit on this movie a lot, and I get that the plot is ridiculous. but its so FUN! Thats all I ask for- to be entertained. ignore the insanity of the plot and just enjoy it.
reviews.author: NardiMae

reviews.text: Ok for an action adventure type movie. A bit like a Disney take on a Dan Brown novell I guess. Has it's flaws but not painful to watch. Something for the family.
reviews.author: FinFan

reviews.text: Nicolas Cage trying his damndest to be as un-Indian Jones as possible and succeeding. A good old-fashioned [this movie] hunt adventure you won't be able to help but enjoy. Cage is thoroughly enjoyable in this pacy romp. The unheroic hero is the best kind of hero, in my humble opinion.
reviews.author: Rob

reviews.text: What an epic adventure film with a cool story about a [this movie] and the historical family that has always been searching for it and how it ties into great American history. Nicholas Cage and others put on a brilliant act as the plot development is fantastic and the hook gets you right from the beginning.
reviews.author: Johnny.Lumsden

summary: Modern treasure hunters, led by archaeologist Ben Gates, search for a chest of riches rumored to have been stashed away by George Washington, Thomas Jefferson and Benjamin Franklin during the Revolutionary War. The chest's whereabouts may lie in secret clues embedded in the Constitution and the Declaration of Independence, and Gates is in a race to find the gold before his enemies do.

title: Spaceballs

reviews.text: A classic parody. It's not as funny today as it was 30 years ago. But for nostalgia and a few classic sketches, an additional +1 is well deserved.
reviews.author: Idek

reviews.text: I probably should've watched Star Wars first, but this is still pretty funny on its own. Looking forward to [this movie] 2: The Search for More Money.
reviews.author: Caleb P.

reviews.text: A movie like [this movie] certainly works better within its original timeframe. And that's what you have to keep in mind if you watch this for the first time today. Everyone who knows this from before, like myself, while probably not laughing as hard as we did the first time, will nevertheless still like it. Of course most of the jokes only work if you know your sci-fi cinema.
reviews.author: FinFan

reviews.text: Just a classic Mel Brooks spoof movie on the original Star Wars movies. Just excellent fun. You must though watch the first three Star Wars movies first in order to fully appreciate the jokes.
reviews.author: siggi963

reviews.text: _[this movie]_ is a hilarious 80's movie that is a must-watch for fans of Mel Brooks' humor. The film is a great spoof of _Star Wars_ and features several iconic scenes and memorable characters that have become a part of pop culture. The comedic timing and delivery of the actors are excellent, and the jokes are on point throughout the movie.
reviews.author: VantageReel

reviews.text: Still hysterical after all these years and all these watches. So many one-liners and sight gags. Love the 'breaking the fourth wall' moments, and inside jokes that are missed the first few times you see it. A must watch! What the hell am I looking at? When does this happen in the movie? Now. bahaha
reviews.author: Schenley

summary: When the nefarious Dark Helmet hatches a plan to snatch Princess Vespa and steal her planet's air, space-bum-for-hire Lone Starr and his clueless sidekick fly to the rescue. Along the way, they meet Yogurt, who puts Lone Starr wise to the power of "The Schwartz." Can he master it in time to save the day?

title: Winnie-the-Pooh: Blood and Honey 2

reviews.text: J’ai plus apprécier cet opus que le précédent , celui si a une meilleure intrigue, des bon acteurs qui sache mieux jouer et quoi de mieux que du gore. Même si c’est pas mon film préféré j’ai hâte de voir le suivant pour voir si il va aussi bien comme celui, la ou ennuyant comme le premier
reviews.author: Mystique.6578

reviews.text: I throughly enjoy campy horror that knows it’s campy and isn’t trying to be something it’s not. This is leagues better than the first in story telling and acting, neither of which are really all that important to this kind of movie but boy does it help. Sure, it’s dumb. If you didn’t know that going in and are upset it didn’t live up to your standards, that’s on you.
reviews.author: giroux

reviews.text: Why are they trying to make it bad? They thought about how to make a bad movie and made it for that purpose. The scenes are slow, I can't find anything to say about the acting. I waited this long for this movie to come out and I'm very disappointed. It's watchable but my suggestion to you is don't waste your time. Watch another movie. Anyway, thanks for your efforts anyway.
reviews.author: Enes_

reviews.text: [this movie] (2024) - ❤x2 I knew this was going to be bad - and it did not disappoint. It was truly horribly bad. So far non of these old school IP's that have gone to the public domain have been any good - sadly. Do not even think about watching this dreck. How I rate: 1-3 ❤ = seriously! don't waste your time 4-6 ❤ = you may or may not enjoy this 7-8 ❤ = I expect you will like this too 9-10 ❤ = movies and TV shows I really love!
reviews.author: +schmoogie

reviews.text: Definitely much better than the first one, in fact I found it interesting that what we saw there, they show in this one as a film that left Christopher with a bad reputation. Much better acting in this one, better script and photography. Don't get me wrong, it's still bad, but not as horrible as the first one. The only thing I wish would be that they had developed the plot better and not give them the opportunity to make another movie, why? It's not necessary, just end with this suffering hahahah.
reviews.author: Daniela G

reviews.text: A complete trainwreck from start to finish and I say that going in without high expectations. If you thought the first one was bad, even with a bigger budget the producers of this second part manage to screw up everything yet again. Set aside the special effects, which are again terrible and anyone with even basic knowledge of After Effects could do better, nothing works. From the acting (I still don't understand why half of the actors have an American accent and the other half have a British accent, even though the movie takes place in the UK.
reviews.author: KingKon_NL

summary: Five months following the murders, Christopher Robin struggles to maintain a regular life while dealing with PTSD. However, deep within the 100-Acre-Wood, a destructive rage grows as Pooh, Piglet, Owl, and Tigger find their home and their lives endangered after their existence is revealed.

title: Home Alone 3

reviews.text: Well i dont think either [this movie] or 4 is as good as Home [this movie] 1 and 2 and they dont feel that much like Christmas movies
reviews.author: dwraluffy

reviews.text: Bad movie. Not very Christmas-y at all. A lot of the traps make no sense. The villains being these professional spies compound that problem. Highlights are Scarlett Johansson playing the sister & whoever the brother was. The writing on those 2 is actually pretty good.
reviews.author: Whidmark

reviews.text: For me the last "real" Home [this movie] film. It is quite the downgrade from the first two movies in the franchise, but you still get a good laugh from it. The "bad guys" are simply worse actors than Marv and Harry. The film itself also does not have the real Home [this movie] feel diento the cast being completely different.
reviews.author: Wazz10a

reviews.text: First rewatch since I seen in theaters when I was like 12y. This was one of my favourite movies back than. Now not so much. The problem with these bad guys they meant to ve like trained spies but as soon as they come close to a trap they change into idiots. Thr big difference with these and the Wet bandits from 1 & 2. They where kibd of goofy and silly. It worked much better on those first 2 movies.
reviews.author: operator

reviews.text: This one was always my favourite Home [this movie] growing up and I still really enjoy it despite how kinda dumb it is. I have many fond memories with this film and I think it's way better than the two ones before it. It's funny and actually scary at times. The kid actor is great, the storyline is fantastic, the traps are creative, and I completely forgot Scarlett Johansson was in this. Much fun indeed.
reviews.author: csrz

reviews.text: Remembered used to like watching this as a kid but years later opinion has changed much since then. Given it’s set of different characters and strange international terrorist plot alienated much of the original Home [this movie] fanbase pretty much. The new kid isn’t much better than Kevin but he isn’t terrible unlike the next few kids in later HA films. Funnily that did not know this was Scarlett Johansson earlier film roles though she in movie for like 2 minutes.
reviews.author: Rin J Tohsaka

summary: 9-year-old Alex Pruitt is home alone with the chicken pox. Turns out, due to a mix-up among nefarious spies, Alex was given a toy car concealing a top-secret microchip. Now Alex must fend off the spies as they try to break into his house to get it back.

title: Sentimental Value

reviews.text: ‘I want a home.’ Well done and thank you to all who pit this poewrfully layered film together. In a good way, I won’t be watching this again
reviews.author: ytijani1

reviews.text: I wanted to like this more then I did, but I did think it was very good. I feel like her Dad didn't try to understand her as much as he should have.
reviews.author: myke2145

reviews.text: I cannot criticize [this movie]. The film is great. I loved some of the cinematography and the acting was on point. The story just didn't grab me. Moments of it did, but as a whole, it just didn't pull me in.
reviews.author: fasterfilmcritic

reviews.text: 03.14.26 - A slow burn movie with some of the most gripping acting I've seen in a while. In the beginning I was wishing to connect emotionally more to the film, particularly the father-daughter dynamic, but by the end I was hooked.
reviews.author: smokedbock

reviews.text: Meh. I rarely dislike films with a 94% rating but I gave up on this one with an hour left. I could not get myself to care about the plot or any of the characters. By tomorrow I will have forgotten I even watched it.
reviews.author: t.linn

reviews.text: As a child of crappy parents, these kinds of movies resonate with me. They make me question my ability to forgive and question how important blood relatives really are. I think the best part of the movie is the slow release of the unresolved tensions that have built up over the years. I can see how that isn't for everyone. follow me at or facebook IHATEBadMovies
reviews.author: AdamMorgan

summary: Sisters Nora and Agnes reunite with their estranged father, the charismatic Gustav, a once-renowned director who offers stage actress Nora a role in what he hopes will be his comeback film. When Nora turns it down, she soon discovers he has given her part to an eager young Hollywood star.

title: Platoon

reviews.text: Movies like this are the most impactful, as they show the true horrors and hell of war, versus the usual romanticization used to help lure future soldiers.
reviews.author: SpiderJerusalemInTheMountains

reviews.text: Overrated movie, Sheen the worst and Defoe the Best, the story sucks, a bad soap opera using a vietnam set. This is under other war movies.
reviews.author: edgrande

reviews.text: Amazing movie about war and the impact that it has on men. Some really impactful and impressive stuff. And man, what a joy to see the young faces of all these amazing actors. Did they realize back then how much of these actors were going to be big stars? My god.
reviews.author: JoeyvanAwesome

reviews.text: A really great war movie. It feels very grounded, nothing too over the top. It's more about the people fighting and how it effects them. I thought Charlie Sheen was great and Willem Dafoe was fantastic.
reviews.author: nmahoney416

reviews.text: Une énorme claque lorsque je l'ai vu pour la première fois il y a longtemps. Casting, interprétation, mise en scène, scénario... rien n'est à jeter. [this movie] est et restera un chef d'œuvre du film de guerre. À voir, à revoir, encore et encore. J'ajoute : pour un visionnage optimal de ce merveilleux film, à voir impérativement en V. O. sous-titrée !!!
reviews.author: nathpatasado_e725e5

reviews.text: A really great war film that's truly devasting I love how we see the effect on the characters just as much as the effects of the actual war. Both are shown just the right amount of time to show the effect of the war. Charlie Sheen is really good and Willem Dafoe is great.
reviews.author: Cb Uppercut

summary: As a young and naive recruit in Vietnam, Chris Taylor faces a moral crisis when confronted with the horrors of war and the duality of man.

title: Gonjiam: Haunted Asylum

reviews.text: I actually enjoyed this more then I expected , I watched it because I heard it's similar to grave encounters and it really was , I loved this I highly recommend.
reviews.author: danyggqg

reviews.text: First half hour or so of the movie is slow but I quite enjoyed the rest of it. Doesn't resort to cheap jump scares, actually had me feeling a bit creeped out!
reviews.author: DDD19

reviews.text: Well worth the hype. Predictable, yet the horror elements did work. I wished to watch the other projects of the creator, that is a success in my book, because I don't easily do that.
reviews.author: Bonebag

reviews.text: Eerie, creepy, atmospheric - [this movie] is a well-made horror movie. The premise lends itself well to the found-footage format. The movie drags a bit in the middle and the plot is nothing special, but it was worth the watch.
reviews.author: tiny_thanos

reviews.text: A pretty scary Korean horror movie. It takes a while for things to start happening, but once it does, it never really stops. I think the directing was pretty unique in how some things were shot, so for a found-footage-esque movie, this one was good.
reviews.author: Chinalover33

reviews.text: If you can live with the format and the usual drawn out intro, [this movie] is a very respectable entry in the found footage genre. While relying a little too heavily on jump scares and tropes in some portions, [this movie] displays enough great tension and truly unnerving scenes to make it worthy of any horror fans watchlist.
reviews.author: Xiofire

summary: The crew of a horror web series travels to an abandoned asylum for a live broadcast, but they encounter much more than expected as they move deeper inside the nightmarish old building.

title: The Great Dictator

reviews.text: i'm only 20 years old and i just saw this for the first time. Some scenes had me dying from laughter and others had me depressed. Great movie
reviews.author: OsoInfinite95

reviews.text: ★★★★☆ (4/5) Bold and surprisingly daring for its time. The satire is sharp, but there’s real heart behind it too. Chaplin balances comedy and commentary really well, and that final speech is unforgettable. It’s not subtle, but it doesn’t need to be. Still powerful.
reviews.author: fulltimewatcher

reviews.text: Great movie with incredibly funny humour, but sometimes it just stretches a bit. The joke was funny for 10-15 seconds maximum but they make it for 30s-1m and then it's just not that funny anymore. The 2h 5m could've worked in 1h45m as well. But still of course an amazing film for that time.
reviews.author: loenne

reviews.text: German cinemas decided to bring this back for one day on November the 5th, 2024. On this fateful day with one of americas most consequential elections going on, war again (still) raging in europe and all over the world, quite a time to watch this again. The final speech in this movie has not lost, nay it gained, more impact than it ever had even 80 years ago.
reviews.author: MellowB

reviews.text: One of the most amazing masterpieces ever made. You have to watch it with the knowledge that is was made one 1940, during WW2 when not all the warcrimes of the Nazis were known by the world. The reality was much worse than the satire, but Chaplin hit the nail on the head in his depiction of Hitler’s character. A classic that you should not miss
reviews.author: siggi963

reviews.text: Like a nation's flag, what _[this movie]_ is made of is less important that what it represents. The film is overlong and many of the gags fail to entertain (two notable exceptions for me were, of course, the globe balloon but also the impeccable timing in the single-shot Brahms-barber shop scene) yet what makes the film powerful are not the threads and fabric that went into making it, but the struggle, the heroism and the humanity it stands for. Chaplin made _[this movie]_ in 1940, openly mocking a world leader whom many countries had not yet decided to denounce.
reviews.author: Saint Pauly

summary: Dictator Adenoid Hynkel tries to expand his empire while a poor Jewish barber tries to avoid persecution from Hynkel's regime.

title: Overboard

reviews.text: The original was no classic but it was enjoyable at least. This remake is incredibly poor, and is a film you should throw [this movie] if you are tempted to watch it. Drivel!
reviews.author: Lee Brown Barrow

reviews.text: [this movie] is a compelling psychological drama based on the memoir by Susana Kaysen. After a suicide attempt a troubled young girl finds herself committed to a psychiatric hospital and must find her way back to sanity through her madness. Both Winona Ryder and Angelina Jolie give brilliant, captivating performances, and are backed by a strong supporting cast that includes Brittany Murphy, Clea DuVall, and Whoopi Goldberg. Also, the directing is exceptionally well-done and enhances the psychological themes of the film. And, the soundtrack perfectly complements the tone and setting. A fascinating look at the struggles of mental illness, [this movie] is an extraordinarily powerful and moving film.
reviews.author: jarvis-8243417

reviews.text: Winona Ryder is on great form here in this rather brutally frank look at a girl struggling with mental health issues. "Susanna" had been rushed to hospital by her worried parents after an apparent attempt at suicide. Diagnosed with a potential personality disorder, she is admitted to the "Claymoore" facility under the care of "Dr. Wick" (Vanessa Redgrave) and nurse "Valerie" (Whoopi Goldberg). As you'd expect, this place has a multitude of characters inside and she (and we) are introduced to a mixture ranging from the pathological liar to the anorexic, the sociopath to the schizophrenic. Some are friendlier to her, others ignore her altogether. It's "Lisa" (Angelina Jolie) whom she seems to relate to her best.
reviews.author: CinemaSerf

reviews.text: I have been meaning to watch this for the longest time. It wasn't actually as disturbing as I thought it would be, which was a good surprise. Some of the characters were a bit caricatured and that would be my biggest issue with the film. Angelina steals the show. My favourite scene I think is the one after [spoiler] Daisy's suicide when Susanna is in her bed talking to Val about her depression, just because I thought it was such a simple and sensible way to describe it [/spoiler]. 8/10
reviews.author: 2016moonlight

summary: Set in the changing world of the late 1960s, Susanna Kaysen's prescribed "short rest" from a psychiatrist she had met only once becomes a strange, unknown journey into Alice's Wonderland, where she struggles with the thin line between normal and crazy. Susanna soon realizes how hard it is to get out once she has been committed, and she ultimately has to choose between the world of people who belong inside or the difficult world of reality outside.

title: For a Few Dollars More

reviews.text: Too long, but a fine watch in all other aspects. By now I’ve learned that it takes me some time to get into a western and this one was no different. It’s enjoyable, but it’s a bit [this movie] forgettable than others that I’ve watched.

But as the school’s stern principal closes in and the Battle of the Bands looms, Dewey must risk everything to prove that rock 'n' roll can change lives.

summary: One morning in an ordinary town, five people are shot dead in a seemingly random attack. All evidence points to a single suspect: an ex-military sniper who is quickly brought into custody. The interrogation yields one written note: 'Get Jack Reacher!'. Reacher, an enigmatic ex-Army investigator, believes the authorities have the right man but agrees to help the sniper's defense attorney. However, the more Reacher delves into the case, the less clear-cut it appears. So begins an extraordinary chase for the truth, pitting Jack Reacher against an unexpected enemy, with a skill for violence and a secret to keep.

summary: The fate of the galaxy rests in the hands of bitter rivals. One, James Kirk, is a delinquent, thrill-seeking Iowa farm boy. As fiery instinct clashes with calm reason, their unlikely but powerful partnership is the only thing capable of leading their crew through unimaginable danger, boldly going where no one has gone before. The human adventure has begun again.

The laughs obviously come from Goldberg's street wise gal trying to adapt to life in a convent.

reviews.author: ecstatic

reviews.text: This is an amazing Japanese classic written and filmed without flaw. The action unfolds in story-telling within story-telling. This is a film about truth. Whose truth? That is the unfoldment. In a perverted way, this amazing piece of work has become predictive of Western corporate banking. Perhaps you'll see what I mean at the end of the film.
reviews.author: badelf

reviews.text: **It's a film that might scare modern audiences a bit, but it deserves the opportunity we want to give it.** In addition to having a very strong film industry, Japan is a country with a very rich past that we in the West tend to devalue. A somewhat ethnocentric attitude, more typical of small minds. For a long time, the Japanese were a people divided by several feudal princes who fought among themselves, disputing power and regional influence.
reviews.author: Filipe Manuel Neto

reviews.text: I went in thinking I was getting a traditional samurai epic, and in a way, I did get the story of a true samurai, but it’s told through such an unromanticized, raw, gritty, and genuinely shocking lens that it feels like something else entirely. This isn’t a celebration of honor. It’s a deconstruction of it. A brutal exposure of corruption, facades, and the horror that can hide behind “duty” and social ritual. The film is meticulously crafted. The cinematography is flawless, every shot feels composed like a painting, controlled and deliberate, while still carrying this unbearable tension. Every line of dialogue feels perfectly placed, like each conversation is tightening the noose.
reviews.author: jacogiu

summary: Down-on-his-luck veteran Tsugumo Hanshirō enters the courtyard of the prosperous House of Iyi. Unemployed, and with no family, he hopes to find a place to commit seppuku—and a worthy second to deliver the coup de grâce in his suicide ritual. The senior counselor for the Iyi clan questions the ronin’s resolve and integrity, suspecting Hanshirō of seeking charity rather than an honorable end. What follows is a pair of interlocking stories which lay bare the difference between honor and respect, and promises to examine the legendary foundations of the Samurai code.

reviews.text: The message is actually really good. I do like most kind of music but there are always be some certain genre elitists which can be super annoying. It's just the delivery of the message just didn't hit right. They put too much sugar coating to deliver making it super basic and cheesy family movie, introduced too many groups which I think some of them weren't necessary (without having decent character building), and heavily rely to the music somehow overshadowing what they wanted to deliver.
reviews.author: csrz

reviews.text: Anna Kendrick does an excellent job and Justin Timberlake provides a likeable side character. The animation is by far the crown jewel of this movie and the music is decent, even if it doesn't quite ever leave the realm of pop, hip-hop, and rock. Ironically, they diss disco at one point which is funny considering the message of the movie. Worth a watch! Totally meant for kids but enjoyable enough for bored teenagers such as my siblings.
reviews.author: DastenHero

summary: Queen Poppy and Branch make a surprising discovery — there are other Troll worlds beyond their own, and their distinct differences create big clashes between these various tribes. reviews.text: There are three stories here, all interlinked - but only at the start and only tangentially at that, that ask questions of humanity and loyalty amidst the sometimes quite brutal, lustful and occasionally humorous environments of a Mexico City inhabited by rich and poor alike. The opener follows the life of “Octavio” (Gael García Bernal) who lives with his mother, brother and his wife “Susana” (Vanessa Bauche) - for whom he has the hots! He hasn’t much money but that changes when his formidable dog proves to be more than a match for the local champion and so starts to earn his keep in a graphically gruesome fashion.

reviews.text: The acting in this film is extraordinary. Really, top-notch stuff as you might expect from this cast. That said, the movie didn't come near the quality that I had hoped that it would. I think the core problem that I have with it is that I just didn't feel the developing love story. I think part of this is the lack of speaking by one of the leads and then the lack of loving interaction between the two leads. It didn't feel like they were in love - we were just kind of told that they were. It's a fine film - I just didn't see how it would rank among the all-time greats. follow me at or facebook IHATEBadMovies
reviews.author: AdamMorgan

reviews.text: Holly Hunter is on good form here as "Ada", a mute who is adept with her [this movie]. Soon to be married to a Kiwi farmer, she sails with her daughter to his remote home where he "Alisdair" (Sam Neill) seems to be rather indifferent to her presence. The same cannot be said for their neighbour "Baines" (Harvey Keitel) though, and he engineers a land for [this movie] swap with her husband as a prelude to inviting her round to his home to play. After a few meetings they work out a peculiarly unique bartering system that might see both get what they ultimately want from the arrangement.
reviews.author: CinemaSerf

reviews.text: **A great movie.** For me, this is one of the great films of 1993. The story is not pretty, and we could almost call it “love in times of mud”, not only because of the continuous rain and the amount of mud on the set, but mainly because of the rudeness and brutality of the male characters. However, the film is very good, it's engaging, captivating and really deserves to be brought back these days. Winner of three Oscars (Best Actress, Best Supporting Actress and Best Original Screenplay), I believe it just didn't win more due to fierce competition from "Schindler's List". The film also won the prestigious Palme d'Or for Jane Campion in Cannes.
reviews.author: Filipe Manuel Neto

summary: When an arranged marriage brings Ada and her spirited daughter to the wilderness of nineteenth-century New Zealand, she finds herself locked in a battle of wills with both her controlling husband and a rugged frontiersman to whom she develops a forbidden attraction.

reviews.text: Not necessarily a unique story plot for an action film but despite that it was edge of your seat entertainment all the way through. The casting is fantastic and so is the plot development, but this is just a simple good action movie you can see at home.

reviews.text: 71/100 An ex-Interpol agent and his daughter move to a Louisiana town. An altercation between a bully and his daughter escalates into a full blown war ...and the members of a motorcycle gang from the agent's past is showing up. Excellent, high-action film with Jason Statham doing what he does best. Excellent editing and superbly choreographed fight scenes. Izabela Vidovic was great as the daughter, as well, and John Franco was great as a mildly psychotic killer. Very exciting film. -- DrNostromo.com

reviews.text: Is this movie likeable? Yes. Enjoyable? Sure. Well-acted? Yes, I would say so. So why only a 6? The music is absolutely terrible. I realize that I am probably in the minority when I say that, but the music felt like it was aimed at teenage girls. One cheeseball hook after another, and we have to try to pretend like there is some emotional moment going on. That said, because it was likeable on other levels, it isn't the worst movie in the world. follow me at or facebook IHATEBadMovies
reviews.author: AdamMorgan

reviews.text: I went in expecting a really cheesy movie from Paul Rudd and company, but this ended up being my favorite Rudd film in years. I certainly didn’t expect it to so deftly explore how genuine art can also be great commercial art, and how that artistry can sometimes get lost in the minutiae of life and mediocrity. The film’s central theme will resonate deeply with anyone who has ever created something. The trepidation of wondering whether your work is actually good is very real—and what if the people closest to you don’t even acknowledge it? John Carney wrote a smart, funny script that knows exactly when to dial up the emotion.
reviews.author: kwontuum

reviews.text: This started out pretty good. I was digging the music and the whole wedding band story. The longer this went on it began to drag. I really enjoyed the scene with Paul Rudd and Nick Jonas. Up until that point I was really enjoying the movie. After that scene things began to slog along. I liked Paul Rudd overall here. He was good and was a really likable character. You can absolutely feel for him in this. I liked the music as a whole. Something just kind of felt like it was missing for me. It was good I just wish it was a bit better for me.
