reviews.author: Mikelesi

reviews.text: Decent animation, a creative world and some gags and sequences show a glimpse of similar creativity. The rest of the movie is any other animated movie from the mid 2000s- dated pop culture references, out of place needle drops, fart jokes, big butt jokes, ugly woman jokes, the whole gauntlet. Like sure, some of it caught the time and where things were going- right to repair, preying on body image, corporate greed and the exploitation, pricing out, and destruction of the lower class. But it also still subscribes to two great men- Bigwald and Rodney- leading the way with the right kind of inventive capitalism. Tucci’s earnest and heartfelt performance is the highlight.
reviews.author: JC230

reviews.text: "Rodney" is the creative sort of robot. He has grand designs that will never come to fruition at home, so he heads to the big city where he hopes that the legendary "Big Weld" will snap up his inventions. Thing is, by the time he arrives there's been a bit of a coup at the plant and the business in under new management. The rather menacing "Ratchet" has now taken the helm and his new motto is cheap and cheerful. Basic products that need upgrading constantly then replacing for a new model. There will be no more repairs, no more spare parts - it will be survival of the fittest until something even fitter is manufactured.
reviews.author: CinemaSerf

summary: Rodney Copperbottom is a young robot inventor who dreams of making the world a better place, until the evil Ratchet takes over Bigweld Industries. Now, Rodney's dreams – and those of his friends – are in danger of becoming obsolete.

reviews.text: Honestly? Its solid. Mark Moseley's Eddie Murphy impression being not Eddie Murphy himself stops being a problem pretty quickly for me. The story is cute, not GOOD but cute. The Three Princesses are fun and highlights for me, especially Mei. The only thing that REALLY made me go "ok, yaknow what, I HATE this" is Mushu being a... complete ass in this one. It just feels like a roll back for the charachter.
reviews.author: madhackrviper

reviews.text: DisneyToon butchers yet another Disney property with [this movie], an insipid piece of trash that’s excruciatingly formulaic. Lacking any subtlety (as if written for a 5-year old), the story follows Mulan and her former army friends as they escort the Emperor’s three daughters to their arranged marriages...and surprise, surprise the daughters fall in love with the soldiers. The animation isn’t half bad, though it stays pretty simple and limits the scope. And most of the original cast returns, but the absence of Eddie Murphy is felt; not so much in the voice as in the characterization of Mushu, which is all wrong (with him coming off as an uncaring, mean-spirited jerk).
reviews.author: jarvis-8243417

reviews.text: An alright sequel. It's a more watered down story regarding Ming-Na Wen's character, with more focus put on lovey-dovey stuff as opposed to a fight of some kind. Therefore, things are naturally less enjoyable than in the original film. To me, everything's just a little slow and predictable so I can't rate it higher. Away from Wen, the supporting cast is weaker with the absence of Eddie Murphy as Mushu. Mark Moseley actually comes in with an OK performance, yet it's not a jot on Murphy's. There are some notable newcomers though, with Lucy Liu (Mei) and Sandra Oh (Ting-Ting) appearing. The music is average, as is the animation.
reviews.author: r96sk

reviews.text: A very good sequel to a Disney Classic. As the plot points of the last 10 mins of the first film seeming a bit rushed when Mulan and Li Shang got together, this 2nd film picks up right where the first left off. A good mix of slowing down and showing the life Mulan now has as a hero and the dawn of a new adventure. As Mulan and Li Shang, amongst the three stouges, have to escort the emperor's three daughters to nearby allies to be married off in order to avoid conflict between the allies.

reviews.text: 73/100 An impostor, posing as the U.S. President, tries to destroy the Joes and then start Armageddon in a typical megalomaniacal style. The highlight here is the action sets that were explosive, tightly choreographed, well shot with a minimum of shaky cameras, and incredibly exciting ...the cliff side fight sequence was pure gold. Overall, my wife and I found this to be a very entertaining watch. -- DrNostromo.com

summary: Searching for a safer habitat, the prehistoric Crood family discovers an idyllic, walled-in paradise that meets all of its needs. Unfortunately, they must also learn to live with the Bettermans -- a family that's a couple of steps above the Croods on the evolutionary ladder. As tensions between the new neighbors start to rise, a new threat soon propels both clans on an epic adventure that forces them to embrace their differences, draw strength from one another, and survive together.

reviews.text: Majestic in scope and story telling. The truth is, is that [this movie] deserved every award that was showered upon it. It's a titanic film both in structure and scope. It doesn't need me to go over old ground about how much the film cost to make, the number of extras, the number of sets and etc, it's now folklore that this film could have bankrupted MGM such was the investment, but they needn't have worried since the film went on to make 40 million and still counting.

reviews.author: anishkotal23

reviews.text: While a group of youngsters are exploring the forest, they encounter a great well amidst the foliage. Intrigued, they ask one of their guides to regale them all with a story of elemental proportions that takes them back centuries to the very emergence of local deities in the ancient Bangra kingdom. There were two tribes who coexisted, peaceably enough, sharing the fruits of their idyllic wilderness until one strayed onto the territory of the other with tragic results.
reviews.author: CinemaSerf

reviews.text: When Rishabh first announced a sequel, I was skeptical. [this movie] was already a well-rounded, self-contained story that didn’t really need a continuation. The idea of exploring the origin stories, though, did spark my curiosity and made me want to give it a chance. What we ultimately got, however, feels like a film weighed down by enormous expectations. It tries to do too many things at once, but instead of reaching the heights of the original, it falls short. Sometimes, bigger is not necessarily better. Certain creative choices also felt overdone, as if the film leaned too heavily on liberties that didn’t quite fit.
reviews.author: drjshetty

reviews.text: not sure how to rate it tbh. 1st half is cliche and really boring. i wouldn't even give it 1 star. 2nd half got some bits and pieces but they are strong enough to rise my rating to 3 stars. can you imagine, from not even 1 star to 3, just for a handful of bits and pieces? it says a lot abt the movie in itself. whatever people do, i fail to find a movie which can top movies like tumbbad or bhramayugam. Even though they have the same talent and probably money but just to cater people from a certain region or with a certain taste, these directors can't really make a realistic entertainment.
reviews.author: whatsInTheName

summary: During the Kadamba reign, King Vijayendra, the ruler of the fictional feudatory land of Bangra, meets his final fate while venturing into the mystical forest of Kantara. Witnessing this, his son Rajashekara seals the borders of their realm. Later, Prince Kulashekara reopens them through a brutal massacre. The protagonist, Berme, in search of prosperity, crosses the divide and ignites a conflict of faith, power, and destiny between the Kingdom and Nature.

reviews.author: TKPNPodcast

reviews.text: Like a huge dump after an Easter dinner of cheese, crackers & salami as an appetizer, then a huge slab of prime rib, potato cakes, and shredded asiago on broccoli, Brussel sprouts & green beans, with chocolate chip cookies for dessert: [this movie] is a lot to get through but is ultimately rewarding and makes you feel better (if a little worn out) when it's over. [this movie] is a classic for good reason. The (award winning) special effects are especially impressive for 1956 and the pacing of a work with such scope is surprisingly balanced.

reviews.text: ★★★½☆ (3.5/5) A nostalgic, ambitious take on Peter Pan with a big-hearted core. Robin Williams brings warmth to the grown-up Peter, while Dustin Hoffman’s Captain [this movie] is delightfully theatrical. The sets are vibrant and imaginative, even if the pacing drags at times. Messy but magical in spirit, a childhood favorite of many that still has charm.
reviews.author: fulltimewatcher

reviews.text: A classic that isn’t perfect but deserves better reviews. The casting is top notch. The musical score is magical. As are the visuals. The movie just takes a wrong turn when one of the lost boys are killed by [this movie]. It takes away some of the magic.
reviews.author: Jim222001

reviews.text: So, I found this in my collection and thought I watch it again. I remember I went to the cinema back then. It's definitely from a different time. There are early stages of CGI but almost everything you see is real. Which works in favor of the movie. The sets are great and almost give this a theatre feeling. And the costumes are great, too. Acting shows highs and lows but Dustin Hoffman is stealing this movie. Well, he's the title character, isn't he ? Williams is OK, I felt he's holding back. Julia Roberts I think was weak. The story idea is actually pretty interesting and I have to admit I shed a tear or two towards the end.

reviews.text: The lower ratings and a couple of the comments are obviously from dumbasses that know nothing about history. While this is FICTIONAL, the house was an actual concentration camp commandant's quarters in Poland. He did have his family there with him. The only thing unbelievable really is any Nazi child wouldn't have been fully brain washed by 8 years old. They were expected to turn in their own parents, which also is addressed in the movie. But this takes it to a different level, at the core, that all our actions against each other will come to hear upon ourselves. it's poignant.

As he immerses himself in his clients' worlds, he begins to form genuine bonds that blur the lines between performance and reality.

title: Thelma & Louise

reviews.text: I reaaaally thought this was going to be my first 5 ⭐ movie in a while but that third act was a little too Hollywood for my taste. I freaking love them tho 😭
reviews.author: 2016moonlight

reviews.text: This is attempting to be a pretty detailed critique of the patriarchy. For a while it stays surprisingly nuanced for a big Hollywood movie, pointing at stuff like the juridical system, marriage, manipulation and sex to keep women in their place. However, the movie unfortunately gets dumber and more black & white as it goes along, thus turning from an interesting drama into a full blown genre exercise. For example, it's a pretty big ask to attempt to let the viewer empathize with people who rob a gas station because they lost money due to their own naïvety. You have two very likable characters in the lead, but that's simply one bridge too far.
reviews.author: Jordyep

reviews.text: A very American, beautiful, exciting and entertaining road movie. Would have been a nice movie with a predominantly male cast, but having these adorable women makes it great. The unique female angle is just great. The combination of fun and serious feminism (as much as that is possible in a road movie) is rare. Things I didn't like: it's limited by the boundaries of this genre. They make the dumbest mistakes. Repetitively. (Otherwise such movies wouldn't work). Their transformation from nice person to criminal is compressed into a day or two and thus difficult to believe. And could there not one man - only 1 - who isn't a pig?
reviews.author: alexlimberg

reviews.text: Reading the comments section it seems I didn't understand the movie at all. The premise of the movie was good and started off well. I feel the entire series of unfortunate events that unfolded were causes completely by poor decision making the 2 ladies.
reviews.author: Blinder07

reviews.text: Movie's fucking amazing. At the end, I realized that this boiled down to the unlikely bond and connection between Thelma and [this movie]. At the beginning of the movie, we see each character packing their bags for the big trip. Lousie travels light, and through her neat and precise ways of loading the suitcase, we see who she really is; a sensible woman. She packs only essentials, and folds everything up neatly so it will fit well. Thelma on the other hand, packs way too many unnecessary things. Clothes she'll never wear, soaps she'll never use. This little interspliced sequence with the two women packing their bags tells us a lot abbout their characters. They're completely different people.
reviews.author: fokum8

reviews.text: Thirty-odd years later, and this is still a classic piece of cinema. It all centres around best pals "Thelma" (Geena Davis) and "[this movie]" (Susan Sarandon) who are a bit bored with their respective fellas and set off on a drive. Stopping off at a roadside bar, things get out of hand when the latter woman shoots dead a man trying to rape her friend. Now it's a dark car park and they had been drinking and dancing with this guy all night, so circumstances being what they are - the girls decide discretion is the better part of valour and off they drive.
reviews.author: CinemaSerf

summary: Taking a break from their dreary lives, close friends Thelma and Louise embark on a short weekend trip that ends in unforeseen incriminating circumstances. As fugitives, both women rediscover the strength of their bond and their newfound resilience.

title: Bloodsport

reviews.text: This movie is all action, and that's what makes it awesome. The writing and plot are complete crap, but the fight scenes make you want to be a martial arts expert. Perfect mindless action movie.
reviews.author: maxwelldeux

reviews.text: Very dynamic film, JCVD is extremely inspiring, Frank Dux's story pictured in here might turn some on to combat sports or their history. Extra appreciation belongs to Belo Yeung, who would have thought while watching the movie that he was 14 years younger than JCVD.
reviews.author: morokutokage

reviews.text: As iconic as this movie is, I find the casual racism intolerable —the one black fighter whose entire "style" is acting like a monkey gets the longest sequence; the only one who acts like a normal person is only shown when he gets defeated… and even Forrest Whittaker is presented as a clown. It's an unpopular opinion, but all the action sequences and memorable scenes, they're hardly redeeming. Some may enjoy it (which is fine); but for me, it takes me completely out.
reviews.author: Ovation

reviews.text: This pure 80s action at its best, you have the awesome JCVD (Frank Dux), Bolo Yeung (Chong Li) and so many more in this film to make it the ultimate 80s cheese fest full of awesome action sequences, funny (bad) dialogue and one of the best soundtracks ever. I recommend this film to anyone looking for a fun time, because thats what this film is and to take it anymore seriously than that is insane.
reviews.author: KevinSocial9697

reviews.text: >*"Very good. But brick not hit back."* Perhaps the most predictable movie i've seen in my life. Every single match was predictable and it's written in the sky from the beginning of the matches who the final two will be because there's only three players that stand out. Why? I've seen this type of competition structure countless times before in anime especially and they always put some unpredictability into it and everyone is badass so there's no telling who will win. The final match was a culmination of foreshadowing. Maybe I could like this more on a rewatch when I know what to expect because the predictability was frustrating on a first watch.
reviews.author: Acoucalancha

reviews.text: Kumite, kumite, kumite, kumite! I don't care what anyone says or whatever film van Damme will make, this will forever be my van Damme holy grail. The soundtrack, the facial expressions, the fights, the simplistic story, the horrendous acting by the kid playing young Frank, all the splits, Jackson, young Forest Whitaker, the chase scene, the sad song montage, the "Fight to Survive" song and I could go on. [this movie] will never fail to entertain me. Damn I miss my [this movie] shirt.

reviews.text: ★★★½☆ (3.5/5) A surprisingly heartfelt sequel. The time-travel angle gives it more emotional weight than expected, especially with Josh Brolin’s spot-on younger Agent K. It balances humor and sentiment better than the second film, even if it doesn’t quite reach the original’s magic. A satisfying and thoughtful third entry.
reviews.author: fulltimewatcher

summary: Agents J and K are back...in time. J has seen some inexplicable things in his 15 years with the Men in Black, but nothing, not even aliens, perplexes him as much as his wry, reticent partner. But when K's life and the fate of the planet are put at stake, Agent J will have to travel back in time to put things right. J discovers that there are secrets to the universe that K never told him - secrets that will reveal themselves as he teams up with the young Agent K to save his partner, the agency, and the future of humankind.

title: The Hills Have Eyes

reviews.text: Maybe I'm becoming a softie in old age, but the brutality in this film was not enjoyable. Veers on the edge of torture porn. The scene design was sparse and empty. There were moments that were weirdly CGI. While I enjoyed this more than Wrong Turn, that's not saying much.
reviews.author: ziggymacarthur

reviews.text: Horror fan. Yeah, updated version of original, but both mediocre, definitely nothing worth bothering with despite this version having a little bit of interesting back story. To be honest, better off watching Breakdown for a better film, much better, and a sweet af Kathleen Quinlan.
reviews.author: TIBS2014

reviews.text: One of the best horror remakes to come out in this most recent trend. Rather than ignoring its source material, or taking the other extreme of drearily rehashing it scene for scene, Aja and Levasseur's _[this movie]_ simply expands and improves upon the original. _Final rating:★★★★ - Very strong appeal. A personal favourite._
reviews.author: Gimly

reviews.text: Beast is the real MVP of this story. The main reason I like this film is it's nostalgic for me. I used to camp and hike in desert hills extremely similar to the area in the film. When I was young, my brother's friends were very good at convincing me that this was a true story. It was true nightmare fuel because I camped in those hills each summer. Watching it now I realize it's not a very good film but I'm adding a point for nostalgia.
reviews.author: TheAmnesiac

reviews.text: Excellent Horror/Thriller/Gore movie, similar to the movies in the Wrong Turn movie series. A must watch if you are a fan of the genre. I found out that this is a reboot of a 70’s original and there’s a sequel after this movie. I’m not sure what some of the people here who got offended by this movie were expecting. This isn’t Frozen. I can assure you that. 😂
reviews.author: durack

reviews.text: Aside from some pretty significant plausibility issues, this is actually quite a decent shock horror. A family stop off at gas station where the elderly attendant tells them of a dirt track shortcut across the desert that will save them a few hours. Towing their caravan, off they go, but when a puncture causes them to lose control and crash into a big rock, they begin to realise that they are not the only folks nearby - and I use the term "folks" loosely. What now follows sees our travellers terrorised by some hideously mutated people who had been left there ever since the US Government carried out nuclear tests.
reviews.author: CinemaSerf

summary: Based on Wes Craven's 1977 suspenseful cult classic, The Hills Have Eyes is the story of a family road trip that goes terrifyingly awry when the travelers become stranded in a government atomic zone. Miles from nowhere, the Carter family soon realizes the seemingly uninhabited wasteland is actually the breeding ground of a blood-thirsty mutant family...and they are the prey.

title: Sherlock Holmes

reviews.text: tried to watch cus i like robert downey jr but turned it off halfway through like 5 months ago and i havent turned it back on
reviews.author: kirstensnow

reviews.text: Superb acting from the entire cast but what stands out most to me is the sets. They look amazing and really feel like they're time appropriate. One of my favourite RDJ films.
reviews.author: Nox Anexayi

reviews.text: Ritchie's Victorian action reboot works better than it should — the [this movie]-Watson dynamic is genuinely playful, the deductive-reasoning sequences are visually inventive. Broad rather than precise, but committed to its own register throughout.
reviews.author: RedRudolf

reviews.text: On the plus side detective deduction of a pair of main characters, on the minus fights as if Sherlock forgot that it is not Iron Man or something. ;)
reviews.author: Idek

reviews.text: This is a BIG movie! It is made to be a rollicking good time with tons of popcorn munched. Smaller kids will not be able to follow the story, but anyone who has read a [this movie] story (and isn't against a little artistic license) should see the film. It is extremely entertaining and fun to watch.
reviews.author: AlexanderZ

reviews.text: okay... so basically I like [this movie], but this movie was completely different. Was much more like a regular action film which has nothing to do with [this movie]. I recommend the tv series 'Sherlock' if you want true [this movie] & Watson experience ;)
reviews.author: disrupted

summary: Eccentric consulting detective Sherlock Holmes and Doctor John Watson battle to bring down a new nemesis and unravel a deadly plot that could destroy England.

title: Zombieland

reviews.text: The zombie comedy that made the genre stop taking itself so seriously. It's fast, fun, has a cast with brutal chemistry and the on-screen rules are great.
reviews.author: Aratea

reviews.text: Most (if not all) zombie related shows and movies I've seen are very serious or take themselves very serious. This one is fun! I can't say anything else about it really... it's just a very fun movie!
reviews.author: Marinka678

reviews.text: Amazing special effects and incredible chemistry of the main cast. The finale in the theme park was really epic! Really delivered on both the comedy and horror elements. Sucks how much fatphobia and misogyny is present though
reviews.author: SunnyGabe

reviews.text: What a pleasant surprise. The first 15 minutes were a little intense (I'm not a fan of the genre) but the rest of the film was quite enjoyable. The scene in the middle steals the movie, as you would expect. follow me at
reviews.author: AdamMorgan

reviews.text: The ONLY funny horror comedy I know! I was very skeptical after the highly acclaimed "Shaw of the Dead" (which I found mediocre, at best!) but this flick really delivers! 2 thumbs up!!!
reviews.author: DRNKMNKY

reviews.text: ★★★½☆ (3.5/5) Fun, fast, and doesn’t take itself too seriously. The cast has great chemistry, and the humor mostly lands. It’s not deep or anything, but it knows exactly what it is. Easy, entertaining watch with a few genuinely memorable moments.
reviews.author: fulltimewatcher

summary: Columbus has made a habit of running from what scares him. Tallahassee doesn't have fears. If he did, he'd kick their ever-living ass. In a world overrun by zombies, these two are perfectly evolved survivors. But now, they're about to stare down the most terrifying prospect of all: each other.

title: Dances with Wolves

reviews.text: One of my all-time favorite movies. I can't begin to remember how many times I've seen it. And I'll watch it again. Kevin Costner gives a compelling performance, but so does the entire cast. One gets a great sense of who the Lakota were and are. Respect.
reviews.author: Steve Butterworth

reviews.text: There was very little dancing and only one wolf. But seriously, this is great. A little long and slow, I watched the extended cut. Kevin Costner and Graham Greene are both good. Still a little upset this beat Goodfellas for best picture.
reviews.author: nmahoney416

reviews.text: This movie is so good that the long runtime doesn’t bother me. Although I understand that the 4 hour version might be a bit much for some people, even for an amazing movie like this. Still, it’s such a well paced and beautiful story with an breathtaking scenery to top it all off. Even if you watch the longest version, you could do a lot worse with your time.
reviews.author: JoeyvanAwesome

reviews.text: Although this was slowly paced, it was still beautifully told! Wind In His Hair, Kicking Bird, and Smiles A Lot truly weaseled their way into my heart; they were such beautiful people❤
reviews.author: Imme van Gorp

reviews.text: [this movie] is a great story told with too much confidence and too little restraint. It mostly idles at a pace that allows for bathroom breaks without missing anything. That said, it’s hard to dismiss what it does well. The cinematography is consistently strong, and there’s a level of care in how the culture and environment are presented that gives the film credibility. It’s a film that deserves respect, just not as much as it receives.
reviews.author: fasterfilmcritic

reviews.text: A lovely slow burn movie... It's nostalgic to see a movie from the times around my birth. I can't help but feel every healthy human with have taken the route of Dancing With [this movie] under the same conditions. There's a certain peace to be observed in living in simpler ways. I wonder if a newer generation has the patience to appreciate this type of movie.
reviews.author: Astranora

summary: Wounded Civil War soldier John Dunbar tries to commit suicide—and becomes a hero instead. As a reward, he's assigned to his dream post, a remote junction on the Western frontier, and soon makes unlikely friends with the local Sioux tribe.

title: Batman Returns

reviews.text: more like a catwoman and penguin movie with batman as a spectator, but i did enjoy it a lot! and it has the definitive batcat for me
reviews.author: mlamferreira

reviews.text: The most memorable of the pre-Nolan Batman films, [this movie] embraces its gothic weirdness with style and surreal flair. It’s the best of the bunch by far.
reviews.author: jacogiu

reviews.text: The film is confusing and funny at the same time. It has a lot of plot holes, but it makes up for it with great scenes and special effects. The city setting is the best part of the film. However, the villains are many and leave no room for character development.
reviews.author: Belenus

reviews.text: Tim Burton's original Batman definitely deserved a worthy sequel. Unfortunately, this just doesn't cut it. Keaton's Batman deserved more grit and drama, not corny comical antics. It's worth a look, but keep your expectations low.
reviews.author: Rob

reviews.text: This is definitely better than the more recent 2022 Batman. The plot is cleaner and more engaging, Batman seems much more Batman. The main drawback is that it was shot almost completely in studio, and the scenography seemed not realistic and artificial.
reviews.author: Obione_TdG

reviews.text: Batman's a bit limp. Penguin"s terrifying. Catwoman's smoking hot. Christopher Walken is good but are they seriously telling us they couldn't find a proper villain for him to play? Danny Devito and Michelle Pfeiffer earned this 2 extra ♥'s.
reviews.author: paulrobson666@duck.com

summary: The monstrous Penguin, who dwells in the sewers beneath Gotham, joins up with corrupt mayoral candidate Max Shreck to topple the Batman once and for all. But when Shreck's timid assistant Selina Kyle finds out, and Shreck tries to kill her, she's transformed into the sexy Catwoman. She teams up with the Penguin and Shreck to destroy Batman, but sparks fly unexpectedly when she confronts the caped crusader.

title: Bad Boys for Life

reviews.text: A late, 25 years after entry to the franchise with manages to connect to the fist movies. A solid movie that you must see if you liked the first movies.
reviews.author: siggi963

reviews.text: This is a solid "Meh", in my opinion. I was distracted for the ~ 2 hour runtime and barely remember watching it a week later.
reviews.author: nauip

reviews.text: all i wanted from bad boys movie, it was awesome and funny. even the villian was badass from start to finish. why can't more sequels be like this? My Score: superb 9/10
reviews.author: elyonholic

reviews.text: Not as good as the others. Martin Lawrence's character just didn't seem like he gave a 100% of his role in this movie. Kind of thrown off the chemistry they once had. It was still an ok movie.
reviews.author: Andre Gonzales

reviews.text: big dumb action movie but it had fun moments the humor was too much try hard even for the franchise, it was very strange to see Alexander Ludwig playing the nerd guy
reviews.author: IzakJordan

reviews.text: Mediocre final for this good series of movies. Martin barely can act it is in very bad shape. The history is regular at most, really is the son? born in 1996 an the first movie was in 1995? Please. Bad movie.
reviews.author: hmelero

summary: Marcus and Mike are forced to confront new threats, career changes, and midlife crises as they join the newly created elite team AMMO of the Miami police department to take down the ruthless Armando Armas, the vicious leader of a Miami drug cartel.

title: Vertigo

reviews.text: One of the most unique and intruigung mystery-thrillers. The well-thought out, perfectly-paced and unpredictable storyline, along with pristine direction and incredible performances made the film a gripping experience from start to finish.
reviews.author: ismamzaman

reviews.text: I will never understand the universal adoration for [this movie]. Blindly inherited wisdom is the only explanation. How anyone could prefer this to North by Northwest or Rear Window is beyond me. An exceptionally made, exceptionally boring movie
reviews.author: tmdb47633491

reviews.text: Not one of my favorites from Hitchcock, and certainly dower, but still visually striking and two amazing performances from James Stewart and Kim Novak. This is only the second time seeing this, guessing the last time was maybe 10 years ago or so, not entirely sure when I'll revisit it. **3.75/5**
reviews.author: JPV852

reviews.text: I can't help but think that something about this film _must_ have gone over my head. I'm certainly no genius at analyzing and critiquing the finer points of cinema, so it's a definite possibility. On the other hand, I certainly love plenty of films that are either old, slow, difficult to understand, or all three combined. This is not one of those. To be fair, it has been years since I watched this, so take this "review" whit whatever amount of salt you feel like.
reviews.author: Scorer3168

reviews.text: A Hitchcock film was the last place where I would think to find such a hard-hitting reflection and exercise on the toxicity of the male gaze and men’s deep rooted and perverted need to control and mold women to their liking. A quick search on Hitchcock’s intentions with this film shows that he himself is most likely aware of his own perverse way of perceiving and fetishising specific women. I don’t know if that makes him more or less likeable as a man, but it certainly makes him even more fascinating as an artist.
reviews.author: 2016moonlight

reviews.text: All I know, this film wasn’t so successful at first and this probably because the audience didn’t expect a film so dark and claustrophobic. [this movie] was so strange already from the beginning because of its surreal and nightmarish atmosphere. I bow to Hitchcock in his creativity in visualizing Jimmy Stewart’s acrophobia by implementing one of the oldest cinematography techniques, using zoom lens as it zooms in while the object moves away, emphasizing his terrified feeling and insecurity whenever he’s at a particular height due to a chronic [this movie] he suffers.
reviews.author: Eky

summary: A retired San Francisco detective suffering from acrophobia investigates the strange activities of an old friend's wife, all the while becoming dangerously obsessed with her.

title: Love

reviews.text: this film has an extremely transmisogynist (this is the most horrible depiction of a trans woman i have ever seen WTF!!), heteronormative, anti-gay macho protagonist who is sex-shaming women.
reviews.author: kokibe

reviews.text: This an awesome movie. I totally enjoyed it and [this movie] the premise of it. Threesome can be sometimes the pinnacle of life and basically anything that disrupts islamic terrorism beliefs surrounding porn and freedom deserves a 5 star. 🗽🇺🇸
reviews.author: taher_jafari_29793f

reviews.text: Reminded me of the 2005 film Kiss Kiss Bang Bang (the title, not the story). There is not a lot of merit to the story which is told in flashback and mundane in its plotting.
reviews.author: Lee Brown Barrow

reviews.text: People dismiss this as just explicit content and completely miss the point. Gaspar Noé isn't trying to titillate - he's trying to show what [this movie] actually costs. The messiness, the obsession, the way you can destroy something beautiful without even realizing you're doing it. Murphy is deeply unlikeable and that's entirely intentional. You watch him lose everything through his own hands and feel the weight of it. The explicit content is the language of the film, not the point of it. Long, slow, deliberately uncomfortable. Not for everyone. But it leaves a mark.
reviews.author: patelritiq

reviews.text: In general i like Gasper Noe’s films. I like that he pushes boundaries, and when he does this with film technique he is at his best. There isn’t much of that here. Instead, it’s his usual BS of sex and drugs. He comes across immature af. All that is boring and i strongly dislike it. However, the portrayal of [this movie], cheating, obsession, desperation, jealousy… i do like. And thats what kept me going. Gasper, please be more mature in choosing ur subject matter. Quit the sensationalism and focus on ur story and film technique and u could make some masterpieces. 6/10
reviews.author: Jay Shuai

reviews.text: **The story that was narrated backwards!** This was from the director of 'Irreversible'. This story was told in backwards. It opened with a married couple having sexual intercourse and after a phone call, the flashback rolls. Which begins from that point of the story where it stands to where it all began as per the film character who recalls all the events. Actually, it was impressive idea, not that reverse way storytelling, but how the characters were drawn. And then the story was very simple, like the film '9½ Weeks', the drama and the sex parts shared the remaining narration alternatively for like every 10-15 minutes.
reviews.author: Reno

summary: Murphy is an American living in Paris who enters a highly sexually and emotionally charged relationship with the unstable Electra. Unaware of the seismic effect it will have on their relationship, they invite their pretty neighbor into their bed.

title: Beetlejuice

reviews.text: one of those "'tis the [spooky] season" movies firmly rooted in the 80's for better (fun, not so scary effects) or for worse (pervy [this movie])
reviews.author: serenityTV

reviews.text: There's a certain "scene" of this classic of a "💎" that just about anyone that has watched the entire whole "movie" will perform it at their "wedding party".
reviews.author: m3Xtr3m343V3r

reviews.text: One of my favourite constantly rewatched staples from childhood. So much fun. Shrunken waiting room head is a personal fave. A top 3 Keaton performance. 8.4
reviews.author: boatoar

reviews.text: This movie is so silly and unserious and also so original and creative, which makes for a fun experience. Unfortunately, it's a bit slow and a bit weird regarding the overall movie structure. Notheless, it's definitely worth a watch!
reviews.author: faggurgle

reviews.text: This is the first time I watched this movie and I quite understand the fuss about it. First thing I noticed though, was damn! Alec Baldwin was so gorgeous. lol.
reviews.author: mg_grey

reviews.text: I loved this, but this is the first watch in decades. It's...problematic. An old man creeping on a young teen girl doesn't feel so funny any more. Yes, he's supposed to be a creep, but it was just uncomfortable. Who knows how it'll go down in another ten years.
reviews.author: notnixon

summary: A newly dead New England couple seeks help from a deranged demon exorcist to scare an affluent New York family out of their home.

title: Dragonkeeper

reviews.text: Lots of potential here, but it all falls apart due to bad writing, acting, and in certain places, bad animation. The premise is great so I hope the story this is based on is done proper justice one day. For now, I'd say pass on this one.
reviews.author: LeviSnoot

reviews.text: An average movie with a somewhat unusual story. Despite having characters with potential, they are not developed enough. The dubbing is merely average, and the film fails to be truly engaging throughout its runtime, leaving some important questions unanswered. The animation is acceptable, without any major highlights. Additionally, I didn't find the design of the dragons appealing.
reviews.author: Belenus

reviews.text: With the emperor ailing in his capital, he sends out messengers to secure the one thing that can save him from certain death: the blood of a live dragon. Luckily for the few remaining dragons, though, there's a young girl "Ping" and her pet rat "Hua" who are determined to preserve their last egg and ensure that "Kai" is born in the sacred birthing pool safe and sound.
reviews.author: CinemaSerf

reviews.text: This movie's premise is great. I had decent expectations before going to see this but I was disappointed. Not only did the movie itself look incredibly ugly sometimes (sometimes also beautiful) but the storytelling was boring as well. If you want something animated with nearly the same budget and having to do with dragons I can only recommend "Wish Dragon" on Netflix. Looks wayyy better and is way more entertaining.
reviews.author: loenne

reviews.text: If you’re obsessed with dragons and need to watch everything dragon, this isn’t the worst thing you’ll come across. The mythos is very cool, and it’s centered around a few aspects of dragons that’s often ignored. The sound design is awful. The art style is inconsistent, sometimes feeling like they bought an asset pack on Humble Bundle and flew with it. Some of the voice actors have wonderful voices, others not so much. And as much as I agree that the dialogue is poor, it’s great for a low budget Chinese translated dub.
reviews.author: clipsco

reviews.text: A production with certain ambitions that, however, fails to justify why it is interested in co-producing with China if the approach to Eastern culture is mainly Western, full of all the clichés of Hollywood animation cinema. The story develops with all the simplicity that a poorly worked (and above all, scarcely inspired) script provides, while the music by Arturo Cardelús at least manages to push the action scenes much better than the irregular direction of the Spanish-Chinese duo. It is a mix of many stories without even providing a visual concept that goes beyond the standard.
reviews.author: miguelreina

summary: Set in Han Imperial China, the plot follows the adventures of enslaved girl Ping with ancient dragon Long Danzi. Dragons had been banished from the kingdom. Ping, an orphan, finds one of the last remaining dragon eggs. Palace guards force Ping to run away in order to return the dragon egg to the ocean and save all dragons from extinction. Ping discovers that she is a true Dragonkeeper.

title: Final Destination 3

reviews.text: My favorite out of the FD series. With bimbos, jocks, emos, and skeezy, the characters are as two-dimensional as they should be and the death scenes are elaborate and hilarious!
reviews.author: ScorpiaLovesMedia

reviews.text: Not as good as the first two but still the deaths are a lot of fun. I've never ridden a roller coaster and this makes me never want to. That tanning bed scene is horrifying.
reviews.author: nmahoney416

reviews.text: I can't honestly rate this because I have tried 3 times at various points in my life and I simply can't make it past the tanning beds. I first saw that scene when I was 15 and it apparantly traumatized me for life. 😭
reviews.author: Marinka678

reviews.text: The 3rd part of the FD series is better than the really bad 2nd part but still it is an absolutely unnecessary movie: there is nothing new and basically all the ideas were already present in the first (and best) FD movie... Skip this one!
reviews.author: DRNKMNKY

reviews.text: ★★★☆☆ (3/5) It sticks to the same formula, but it still manages to be pretty entertaining. The rollercoaster setup is a strong start and sets the tone well. The characters aren’t super memorable, but the creative death sequences are what you’re really here for. Not groundbreaking, just solid horror fun.
reviews.author: fulltimewatcher

reviews.text: >"It's never better staying ignorant. Willful ignorance is surrendering control." Ok the premonition isn't near as good, but the deaths are still fun. I think it's starting to lose it's excitement just a little bit. I am glad I don't use tanning beds but after watching this I would've never used them anyways.
reviews.author: Narate

summary: High school senior Wendy's premonition of a deadly rollercoaster ride saves her life and a lucky few, but not from death itself — which seeks out those who escaped their fate.

title: Die Hard: With a Vengeance

reviews.text: Samual L. Jackson helps to keep this third movie in the franchise at a very high level for a movie of the kind. Highly recommended
reviews.author: siggi963

reviews.text: First time I watched it I hated it and second time it was actually pretty good. I still love [this movie] 1 & 2 more though haha
reviews.author: kirstensnow

reviews.text: Seems about the same as the second one, maybe just a tiny bit better. Even though nothing can beat the first, the third movie is still great — already a classic!
reviews.author: ragnarLothbrok

reviews.text: This one really didn't jive with me. Plot felt very aimless, pacing was bad, and it was obvious that this was meant to be a standalone film that got changed into a [this movie] film.
reviews.author: CrazyCaps

reviews.text: Paco Cinema 1: Image 3.5/5, sound 4/5. Long time ago without see and like me again. What times action movies without so much CGI and shit
reviews.author: juliosoft

reviews.text: While [this movie] will forever be a classic, this will always be my favorite in the franchise... I think the trio of Willis, Jackson and Irons was perfection, it just worked, and I love this film!
reviews.author: SpiderJerusalemInTheMountains

summary: New York detective John McClane is back and kicking bad-guy butt in the third installment of this action-packed series, which finds him teaming with civilian Zeus Carver to prevent the loss of innocent lives. McClane thought he'd seen it all, until a genius named Simon engages McClane, his new "partner" -- and his beloved city -- in a deadly game that demands their concentration.

title: Meet Joe Black

reviews.text: A sensual modern fairytale-like movie about death that is surprisingly well made as the story, that seems too weird to work on paper, does effectively work on screen. Good entertainment.
reviews.author: siggi963

reviews.text: A slow burn... I can imagine it being a little to slow for some. But it's alright for me. What can I say, I liked all of it... The casting and acting the most.
reviews.author: Astranora

reviews.text: yes really good storry of the both of them super acting of Brad & Hopkins Amazing very nice ......continu to acting so hehe .... : )
reviews.author: Makaveli..

reviews.text: It was too long, boring and absolutely horrendous. Such a waste of talents here, however Claire Forlani isn't a waste, cause she isn't a talent either... The conversations were just dumb and meaningless. Anyway, would 100% not recommend.
reviews.author: psara

reviews.text: Well, I liked this one a lot less. When I read up on this movie I thought it still sounded fascinating, which convinced me to see it, even though it lasted 3 hours. Unfortunately I didn't like it much, I thought it was way too slow and I don't understand why it had to take so long. No, this is just one to quickly forget for me. I might have liked this movie more if it had lasted half as long.
reviews.author: GoPrayer

reviews.text: The melding of music and acting...and story...have elevated, "Death and taxes," to a *romance that breaks my heart open. every time I see it...made all the more perfect by Claire Forlani. *The romance between Susan and Joe, and between Bill and his life
reviews.author: VWFringe

summary: Bill Parrish has it all - success, wealth and power. Days before his 65th birthday, he receives a visit from a mysterious stranger, Joe Black, who soon reveals himself as Death. In exchange for extra time, Bill agrees to serve as Joe's earthly guide. But will he regret his choice when Joe unexpectedly falls in love with Bill's beautiful daughter Susan?

title: It Ends with Us

reviews.text: This movie was brilliant and it had a good message!! I really enjoyed it and it kept me on my toes until the end but it was well executed
reviews.author: vstaffen

reviews.text: first thought out of the theater: what. were. those. outfits???? it felt like dress to impress on roblox if they had 10 seconds left to put an outfit together
reviews.author: meltedsilvers

reviews.text: This movie was just corny! You won't be missing anything if you do not watch this movie. I wonder why this was a controversial movie.
reviews.author: tpasi

reviews.text: It wasn't clear what this movie was about, so I turned it off before the end. If something happened that was abusive, they didn't show it that way. The lady was dealing with different men.
reviews.author: tvjackson

reviews.text: Justin Baldoni didn't act. He lived the role, which is real easy to do when you are an abusive narcissist. He is a horrible person and a bad actor.
reviews.author: drbi

reviews.text: The movie was okay to watch, but it had more potential. The depiction of abuse was shallow and could've been better in my opinion, as it is such an important subject and many women (and men) go through it daily.
reviews.author: dorinaldi

summary: When a woman's first love suddenly reenters her life, her relationship with a charming, but abusive neurosurgeon is upended, and she realizes she must learn to rely on her own strength to make an impossible choice for her future.

title: High and Low

reviews.text: Was expecting a masterpiece and didn’t quite get that. But still, it’s very good and an easy watch. Could probably have been a little more ruthless in the editing room. 7/10
reviews.author: Jay Shuai

reviews.text: It started out great for me. The tension in the first half is amazing. The second part gets a bit slow. Especially the police meeting went on for way to long in my opinion. Still, I think it’s a solid film!
reviews.author: JoeyvanAwesome

reviews.text: Amazing film. Gets right into it and is high pressure cat and mouse until the very end. The ransom method on the train is top notch. Surely this has been copied in other films, right? I can't think of any though...
reviews.author: KurtMoney

reviews.text: what a psychological masterpiece. kurosawa's skill shines through ever scene and the actors do a phenomonon job immersive the viewer. goes to show how smart people are even decades ago. only technology changed. human mind is the same then as it is now
reviews.author: kixbi

reviews.text: A well worked, high stake crime thriller. The stakes are deeply personal to our main characters and puts them in an impossible situation. The performances and direction are very solid, the story is engaging and ultimately, it's a simple yet enjoyable film. Kurosawa comments on modern corporate greed and poverty in post-war Japan, and he does it very well.
reviews.author: Zak_Jaggs

reviews.text: Like a blind man in the Louvre: hearing what other people have to say about this helps me appreciate it more. A rich guy's chauffeur's kid is kidnapped by mistake so morality, ethics, and a police procedural ensue. Everyone knows I'm a cinevore and not a cinéphile, and that I've never been to film school to learn what to like so thank God I have more intelligent friends than I to tell me what's good and why.
reviews.author: Saint Pauly

summary: A Yokohama shoe executive faces a wrenching choice when kidnappers mistakenly seize his chauffeur’s son but demand the ransom anyway.

title: Faces of Death

reviews.text: The actually made a movie based on the story of the original. Not going to be easy. To be fair the movie turned out OK!
reviews.author: extremesh

reviews.text: I really enjoyed this. Super fascinating way to tie into the original movies. With a cast that definitely understood the assignment. Offering a modern exploration of what the original touched on. Would Recommend

reviews.text: I’m not familiar with the original, but this struck me as a slightly different take on found footage. I think it stands out in the body horror genre thanks to Barbie and Dacre’s performance in the closing scenes – both give everything they’ve got, and it’s a satisfying conclusion.
reviews.author: tempestwood

reviews.text: Meh. It's watchable, but barely. The story started out promising, but the final act was disappointing. The characters were not likeable, so there was nothing to root for. The killings were nothing even close to the original FOD. This was nothing more than a serial killer slasher movie trying to ride the coat tails of a dead franchise. It's not a reboot, or sequel and only name-drops FOD.
reviews.author: chewy74

reviews.text: This is a meta-remake And it is a poor effort at that. It is too well-aware of itself, and its context, has some seriously strange casting-choices, and is at times shot as it deliberately trying to defuse any tension the scene might have. It is frustrating, because a movie like this could do something good, but it falls flat, and never truly gets up again.
reviews.author: Sierbahnn

reviews.text: I watched this because I thought the plot was good, but I found some scenes ridiculous and it was a boring, pointless production. The acting, in particular, is very artificial. The script is different, and that's nice, but they couldn't pull it off. The effects are passable. Is it watchable? I think it's a waste of time. Watch it if you have nothing else to watch. Otherwise, it's not really watchable.

reviews.author: siggi963

reviews.text: [this movie] is a film that knows exactly what it is and doesn't apologize for it. It's a brash, loud, and explosive action flick that delivers exactly what it promises: mindless entertainment with a patriotic heart. If you're in the mood for some good old-fashioned, gun-toting, explosion-fest with a touch of emotional resonance, then strap yourself in and enjoy the ride.
reviews.author: searsgamer

reviews.text: The best of the sequels. 2 and 3 are definitely better than the new ones. That have [this movie] doing Jason Voorhees like murders. There’s plenty of suspense and action in this movie. With [this movie] stranded in Vietnam by the people who sent him on a secret mission. [this movie] wants revenge on them. As well as the people who captured and torture him.
reviews.author: Jim222001

reviews.text: While lacking the nuance of First Blood, this sequel is a defining 80s action flick. Its blend of explosive set pieces, Stallone’s charisma, and unapologetic patriotism offers a time-capsule glimpse into Cold War cinema. For fans of high-octane spectacle, it’s a must-watch; for those seeking depth, it’s a reminder of Hollywood’s power to rewrite history—one bullet at a time.
reviews.author: Edgerk

summary: John Rambo is released from prison by the government for a top-secret covert mission to the last place on Earth he'd want to return - the jungles of Vietnam.

title: Journey 2: The Mysterious Island

reviews.text: The best part of the movie was the acting. It was acted extremely well especially Chloe Mortez. She was excellent. All of the actors/actress' were fantastic but it wasn't enough to make the movie a good movie.
reviews.author: AlexanderZ

reviews.text: I didn't know anything about this movie so I entered the theater with no expectations. It was actually a pretty good movie. I liked it. It was funny. Rowley was the best. I wish I had a best friend like him...well except for the silly outfits. All in all, I really liked this movie. Good for kids and adults.
reviews.author: ohlalipop

reviews.text: A pretty fun silly family movie that teaches a good lesson to young kids that popularity is not everything as friendship is most important. The plot development of this film is very good as you see two best friends juggle the tough social life of being new to middle school. There are some great characters like the older brother and the dad that are comical to add the fun to this film.
reviews.author: Johnny.Lumsden

reviews.text: I have a child who loves the "[this movie]" series of books. Once she found out that there was going to be a movie about the middle school misadventures of Greg Heffley I got a homework assignment from her to read the first book. I'm not the least bit concerned to admit that I really enjoyed it so with only some trepidation I agreed to see the live action adaptation of the debut book. The "[this movie]" movie was pretty entertaining and funny in places but the casting of the characters just seemed off. Not the least of which was Greg Heffley himself played by Zachary Gordon.
reviews.author: Whitsbrain

reviews.text: Rather decent adaptation of the first Diary of the Wimpy kid film. The casting is good and Zachary Gordon is who I see plays Greg Heffley. Chloë Grace Moretz Is also in this film playing a character who doesn’t exist in the book though she isn’t in film as much. Theodore Shapiro score is fine to say and some of the song in movie is bit distracting at times. Nevertheless unlike the animation version from Disney Plus, at least this keeps some of the more iconic scenes which Disney Plus one left out.
reviews.author: Rin J Tohsaka

reviews.text: Decent watch, probably won't watch again, but can recommend, especially for younger audiences. The big problem I have with is this is that the protagonist is irredeemable until he's basically a broken person in the 3rd act, and even then he's not a better person, he's just punished for his shallow attempts of social power advancement so much that accidentally chooses the correct political move to stumble into a happy ending. The rest of the movie is surprisingly good, and reminds me of a younger "Mean Girls" where the social environment of the social is dissected as if it a "natural environment" and there is a metaphoric pecking order of life or death.
reviews.author: Kamurai

summary: Greg Heffley is headed for big things, but first he has to survive the scariest, most humiliating experience of any kid’s life – middle school! That won’t be easy, considering he’s surrounded by hairy-freckled morons, wedgie-loving bullies and a moldy slice of cheese with nuclear cooties!

title: The Equalizer 2

reviews.text: Found the movie mildly interesting at best. Story is boring. Too many nonsense side stories. Acting was more than decent, but that was about it.

When more lies backfire, Katherine's kids become involved, and everyone heads off for a weekend in Hawaii that will change all their lives.

reviews.text: This was so fun to watch, the story is so meta and some of the dialogues are just delicious. It doesn't hold up as well as some other classics I've watched, but it is still a great movie.

reviews.text: The intriguing and myserious characters add tension. That with the setting creates a good atmosphere. The story was about hollywood. Each character has intense needs and dreams, which revolve around hollywood. A web is weaved. Shot very well. Some good dialogue.

reviews.text: It's fine! Interesting to see this story about a silent movie star who has gone completely insane, because of her lost fame and beauty. The way this is acted isn't really my cup of tea, but the relatively short run time makes this an easy watch. It doesn't drag and it's kind of fun, just nothing really special in my book.
reviews.author: JoeyvanAwesome

reviews.text: Delusional Old Lady: The Movie But seriously, Gloria Swanson was fantastic. Her performance is something special. The dialogue was snappy and quick. A classic for a reason.
reviews.author: nmahoney416

reviews.text: "[this movie]" has a special place in my heart as one of the first classics that interested me in cinema. It still works great after 70 years as it's a simple, straightforward, but focused film that manages to deal with timeless themes with sarcasm and intelligence without having no arthouse pretentiousness or making no life-changing statements. Video quality aside, there is nothing I would change about it. The characters are iconic thanks to the fact that they are played by actors that actually experienced the dawn of the silent era and the struggles to survive in the ever-changing Hollywood industry.
reviews.author: manicure

reviews.text: This movie holds up a mirror in front of the Hollywood movie business from different perspectives. It shows how cruel it is to former stars, especially women, but also towards writers or newcomers who want to succeed in the business. It also shows how a former star does not want to admit that she cannot get back to her former glory. One line that sums up this tragedy is: “There is nothing tragic about being 50. Unless you try to be 25.”. An excellent movie that still works for today’s show business and even for many situations in everyday life.
reviews.author: siggi963

summary: A hack screenwriter writes a screenplay for a former silent film star who has faded into Hollywood obscurity.

title: Atonement

reviews.text: An epic love story that explores the nature of guilt, betrayal and loss. Impeccably executed, from the set design to the cinematography to the unique score.
reviews.author: hgram

reviews.text: Ohh jamie is soo good looking and you root so hard for him and keira's character, also Brionney has one of the most complex characters

reviews.text: I feel like I’ve just watched two separate movies. It started out strong, but then we completely lost the plot after the timejump. I wanted to see the lie and its consequences unravel in real time, but instead we completely skipped over all that, just so we could end up in a war movie that had little to nothing to do with the original storyline.
reviews.author: Imme van Gorp

reviews.text: "Cecilia" (Keira Knightley) has fallen for "Robbie" (James McCoy) - a man well down the social ladder from her family and their stately home. It's love, though, and the young man is doing his best to fit into their privileged world by studying (at their expense) at Cambridge with a view to becoming a doctor.
reviews.author: CinemaSerf

reviews.text: Gostei de tudo nesse filme, da história, da ambientação, da época em que se passa, dos personagens. A Briony é uma personagem muito interessante. O filme é muito bem dirigido, tecnicamente excelente. A trilha sonora e a fotografia também ajudam a contar a história e deixam o filme lindo, quase mágico em alguns momentos, e isso me ganhou muito, unindo tudo muito bem ao contexto de guerra em que o filme está inserido. É uma experiência muito agradável de assistir, uma poesia em forma de filme. O final me surpreendeu e me fez refletir. Lindo filme.

summary: A young girl irrevocably changes the course of several lives when she accuses her older sister's lover of a crime he did not commit.

A wonderful feminist movie, allegorical and all that, but not scary at all.

reviews.text: [this movie] struggles to make an impact. The story is predictable, the pacing uneven, and the characters are thinly written. While a few action moments land, most of the tension falls flat, and the film feels like it's repeating familiar beats without adding anything new. Watchable in a pinch, but ultimately forgettable.
reviews.author: ReviewBot

reviews.text: There was another movie with the same theme. It had sharks in it, and I think that one was much better. The action only really starts after the halfway point. Before that, it's just dialogue-based storylines. The acting is passable, the script is classic, and the effects are good. If you like trap and survival genres, give it a chance. Otherwise, I wouldn't recommend wasting two hours of your time. Still, thanks for your effort.
reviews.author: Enes_

reviews.text: Bafflingly bad greenscreen. It is a cheap "The Shallows" (American version) but with two people stuck on a rock rather than one, and an Orca rather than a Great white shark.The characters are unlikable, the plot silly, the visuals poor
reviews.author: jarvis-5251579

reviews.text: [this movie] (2026) unfortunately falls far short of expectations, delivering a disappointing and lackluster experience. Despite the intriguing premise of a predator-themed thriller, the movie struggles with a weak and predictable plot that fails to engage or surprise. The characters are underdeveloped and lack depth, making it difficult to care about their fates. The pacing is uneven, dragging in parts and rushing through crucial moments in others, which disrupts the overall flow. Visually, while there are occasional glimpses of effective cinematography, the film does not capitalize on its potential to create a truly immersive atmosphere. Overall, [this movie] feels like a missed opportunity, with uninspired storytelling and forgettable performances that leave little impact.
reviews.author: OtakuWatcher1

reviews.text: I didn’t have high hopes for this but I expected to enjoy it enough. Unfortunately this movie was a pretty big let down. I’m always a complete sucker for a creature feature but this just wasn’t very good. The CGI is pretty bad. There’s one scene in particular where the [this movie] looked beyond ridiculous and so unrealistic. Virginia Gardner is the only decent thing about this movie. The script didn’t really do her or the rest of the cast any favors though. It was nice to see them try something other than a shark but they didn’t execute it well. I’m glad I checked it out but it won’t ever be something I revisit again.
reviews.author: robertaajr

reviews.text: Bafflingly bad greenscreen The movie isn't any good. It is a cheap "The Shallows" (American version, not the Chinese one), but with two people stuck on a rock rather than one, and an Orca rather than a Great white shark. This movie, however, does have bafflingly poor greenscreen, which was never necessary. You could easily have done those shots outdoors, in a pool on a soundstage, or even with a painted backdrop. But they went with a greenscreen, and sis so poorly. The characters are unlikable, the plot silly, the visuals poor, and there is simply very little good to say out it. I would swim elsewhere.
reviews.author: Sierbahnn

reviews.text: Lean, functional sequel that respects the original's survival-horror logic — the jungle-planet relocation is a smart reset. Brody carries more than expected. Genre competence without distinction.

reviews.text: This movie falls in the weird space that it’s not quite action, not quite suspense, and not quite thriller but instead blends all of them with together at varying points. It never felt very cohesive but if you’re willing to accept the story for what it is and not have an expectation of its genre, you should enjoy the ride like I did.
reviews.author: phatkroger10

reviews.text: “[this movie]” feels like someone asked ChatGPT to churn out a movie that crams Adventure, Thriller, Action, and Sci-Fi into one chaotic script—then sprinkled in some random French for good measure. If throwing a pizza at the wall and calling the mess ‘cinema’ was a genre, this would be its poster child.
reviews.author: durack

reviews.text: [this movie] is a competently done survivalist, end of the world, action thriller, that feels incomplete. This French film has all the right ingredients, a family boating vacation, a sudden, extreme change in the earths oceans and some crime/horror elements, that look promising. Regrettably, whilst this film is superficially, quite watchable, it feels less than satisfying when viewed as a whole. I think the main reason is it doesn't take key aspect of the film's story far enough, for it to amount to anything particularly substantial. On the upside the acting is strong, the character development is reasonable if not exceptional, the core premise and setting is creative, plus the special effects are competently done.
reviews.author: MovieGuys

reviews.text: "Tom" (Andreas Pietschmann), wife "Julia" (Émilie Duquenne) and their two teenage kids are having a peaceful boating holiday when huge meteor-sized things start falling from the skies. Next thing - well where has the ocean gone? Their boat is now perched on what we assume is the sea bed, an arid desert like landscape, and the family are suitably perplexed. What now? Well they do manage to make contact with a nearby diver whose bell was stranded on the sea bed, and he tells them some stuff about the poles being reversed and the water all skedaddling to the far side of the Earth. Maybe go join up with him?
reviews.author: CinemaSerf

reviews.text: ★★★★½☆ (4.5/5) Effortlessly charming and full of personality. The laid-back tone and jazzy soundtrack give it a breezy, timeless appeal. Baloo and King Louie steal the show, and the hand-drawn animation has a warmth that still holds up beautifully. Simple in story but rich in character, one of Disney’s most rewatchable classics.
reviews.author: fulltimewatcher

reviews.author: saltedlolly

reviews.text: I don't think this is a particularly strong effort from Disney, but it's fine. Dull animation (especially compared to what came before and what would come in the 90s) and a super boring set of characters doesn't add up to much. This was never one of my childhood Disney movies, so perhaps I'd feel differently if I weren't encountering this for the first time as an adult. But it's a strange one.
reviews.author: soonertbone

reviews.text: Good watch, might watch again, and can recommend if you've seen any other version or are looking for a writing analysis. During a lot of the movie, I was kind of in nostalgia mode, remember things I saw / felt when I was a kid, just sort of enjoying the way back machine experience. It wasn't until almost the very last scene that it clicked how good the writing is in this. I know this is known for the excellent animation styling, the catchy tunes, and charming coming of age semantics, but this uses several strong formulas that have been used since Aesop's fables.
reviews.author: Kamurai

summary: The boy Mowgli makes his way to the man-village with Bagheera, the wise panther. Along the way he meets jazzy King Louie, the hypnotic snake Kaa and the lovable, happy-go-lucky bear Baloo, who teaches Mowgli "The Bare Necessities" of life and the true meaning of friendship.

reviews.text: The atmosphere is there, but it never amounts to much beyond vibes. The story circles its own dread without ever tightening the knot. Performances are fine, the craft is competent, but the film keeps you at arm’s length so long that engagement flatlines. It’s not bad so much as frustratingly inert—a slow burn that forgets to actually light the match.

Half of the runtime is almost wasted on predictable art house shots. The cast does a decent job with what they're given, but the acting becomes extremely repetitive. If there's one thing I've taken away from this, it's that Perkins should explore other genres, and I mean that in a positive way.

Maybe I'm just dumb, though. ++ Some of the spectres, ghouls, dead ex-girlfriends or whatever were creepy and off-putting. Everything seems to be going fine, they’ve even got a chocolate cake left by the caretaker, but when he has to go back into the city for a medical emergency and leave her alone for the day - well, things start going bump in the day. Is it the cake, or the red wine she has consumed?

reviews.text: There's a real mix bag here. And a cast list that just keeps turning up big names. The good points - the Jennifer Aniston/Ben Affleck storyline is my favourite. reviews.author: PorterUk

reviews.text: Based on a self-help book by Greg Behrendt and Liz Tuccillo, it explores the complexity of modern dating and relationships in the form of a multi story Rom-com drama. The film explores diverse romantic frustrations, from crushes to marital infidelity, in interconnected stories. It offers a "no-excuses" dating truth, seen as refreshing & relatable by some, but others find it oversimplified and lacking humour & warmth. While it boasts an impressive ensemble cast, the film often struggles to give enough depth to its numerous characters, leading to some feeling like stereotypes rather than fully fleshed-out individuals.
reviews.author: patelritiq

reviews.text: "The Exception, not the rule.." refers to a line repeated throughout the movie but I thought it could also refer to the recent trend of these all-star cast movies not being equal to the sum of their parts. There is a long history of let downs like _Dr. T and the Women_. Though this movie isn't great, it is at least enjoyable and bucks that trend. It is very slow starting with an awkward attempt to introduce you to the interwoven cast of relationship misfits with very few laughs. But it does improve with Scarlett Johansson turning in one of her better performances.
reviews.author: Bob.Frapples

reviews.text: He’s [this movie] is a smart and funny romantic comedy that’s based on a bestselling novel. The film follows several interconnecting stories of romance as the characters find themselves dealing with different aspects of relationships. The writing is especially good, particularly in how it weaves the stories together and develops the characters without any of them feeling short changed or under used. Additionally, the ensemble cast is outstanding, and features Ben Affleck, Jennifer Aniston, Jennifer Connelly, Bradley Cooper, Scarlett Johansson, and Ginnifer Goodwin. The directing is also very impressive, and uses a meta narrative that keeps the tone lighthearted.
reviews.author: jarvis-8243417

reviews.text: Gigi (Ginnifer Goodwin) is searching for her true love in the city of Baltimore. As she is set up by friends and co-workers, she often takes a shine to her dates but, frequently, the gentlemen involved never call her again. This could be, in part, because Gigi leaves phone and text messages for her dates to the point of scaring any caring men away. Meanwhile, a married twosome, Ben and Janine (Bradley Cooper and Jennifer Connelly) are restoring a lovely townhouse but having personal problems. This is compounded by the fact that hubby meets a yoga instructor-aspiring singer, Anna (Scarlett Johanssen) at a corner grocery and is smitten. Despite his protestations that he is married, the two meet again.
reviews.author: arash Mihajlović

summary: Have you ever wondered why they said they would call but didn't, or why they don't want to sleep with you anymore, or why your relationship isn't going to the next level? Maybe they're just not that into you. Gigi wants a man who says he'll call her - and actually does - while Alex advises her to stop waiting by the phone. Beth wants a proposal after years of a committed relationship with her boyfriend, Neil, who is just fine with the way things are. Janine's not sure if she can trust her husband, Ben, who can't quite trust himself around Anna. Anna can't decide between the sexy married guy or her straightforward, no-sparks standby, Conor, who can't get over the fact that he can't have her. And Mary, who's found an entire network of loving, supportive men, just needs to find one who's straight.

reviews.text: Christopher Nolan’s [this movie] (2002) is a solid thriller that's a haunting, atmospheric character study set against the disorienting backdrop of the Alaskan midnight sun. The exhaustion Pacino portrays is palpable, as his weary eyes and sluggish movements perfectly mirror a man losing his grip on both his morality and his sanity. Robin Williams provides a chillingly understated counterpoint as the manipulative killer, making this a tense, visually striking exploration of guilt that proves Nolan can command a straightforward noir just as effectively as a high-concept epic.

reviews.text: i plan to rewatch this soon so maybe will comment again, but i just want to say this movie is incredibly important, and continues to hold a special place in my heart to this day. for being made in the early 2000s when female sexuality was still a punchline and a myth to most people, and bdsm was seen as a weird outlier fetish, it's realistic and raw and somehow still strangely beautiful. the characters are undeniably damaged at certain points, but the way the director doesn't shy away from showing all that damage is important, and feels necessary rather than exploitative.

reviews.text: copied from letterboxd “i’m your [this movie].” my face has been stuck in a smile ever since the credits started rolling. a movie has not affected me this deeply and strangely since fight club. i am so much like lee in so many ways and i desire e. edward grey deeply and that’s not just because its james spader. everything about this movie has me in awe and amazement. my heart has been in the pit of my stomach multiple times but it was so worth it oh my god. the set, the music, the acting, everything is perfect. i genuinely couldn’t improve anything if i tried.

reviews.text: Misunderstood by people who approach it with the wrong lens. This isn't shock value. It's actually a surprisingly tender, oddly funny love story about two broken people finding something that fits. The subject matter could easily have gone wrong but the film handles it with a strange delicacy. Maggie Gyllenhaal carries this completely. She makes Lee feel real, layered, and quietly powerful - never pathetic, never a caricature. It's a performance that deserved far more recognition than it got. Spader as always brings that unsettling stillness that makes him perfect for roles like this. "Who's to say that love needs to be soft and gentle?" - exactly.

reviews.text: Dominance and submission at the office (um... no) RELEASED IN 2002 and directed by Steven Shainberg, "[this movie]" is a romantic dramedy about a young woman (Maggie Gyllenhaal) who spent some time at a mental hospital for self-harm (e.g. cutting). She apprehends a job as a [this movie] to a quirky, arduous lawyer (James Spader) wherein their employer-employee bond turns increasingly sexual in a dominant/submissive way. This is the first mainline film in America to breach the difficult topic of BDSM, walking the balance beam between being either too amusing or too offensive. reviews.text: Thi is a dumb movie, even for kids. I understand the suspension of disbelief, but this is too much to take. This movie is about a snail whose dream is to be a racer. Said dream has the chance of becoming true when the snail magically get superspeed through some strange liquid. Now, a snail that gets fast is not a bad idea for an animated movie... but did you have to change it into a CAR??? What I mean is, this snail not only becomes fast! It is also able to pick up radio stations and its eyes become headlamps. And these "amazing superpowers" are never ever used in the movie! So why would you include them??

Jackson, Snoop Dogg, Luis Guzman, Ryan Reynolds) which on its own makes it worth the watch. Biggest downside is the 'snail is fast' song that is just trying too hard to be cool.
reviews.author: Lainfan

reviews.text: From DreamWorks comes the incomprehensible animated film [this movie]. When a snail is transformed by ingesting NOS from a racecar engine he sets his sights on entering the Indianapolis 500. DreamWorks has always had problems intermixing human and animal worlds, and it’s never more apparent than it is here; the plot and the characters make no sense whatsoever. Still, some of the comedy works and there are some exciting race scenes. And the cast is pretty impressive, featuring Ryan Reynolds, Paul Giamatti, Michelle Rodriguez, and Samuel L. Jackson. Yet ultimately [this movie] just doesn’t know what it wants to be, and as a result it ends up being a jumbled mess.

A Wuxia movie starring both Jackie Chan and Jet Li, what could go wrong? Well, I didn't anticipate a CGI Jet Li Monkey King, an old man make-up Jackie Chan, a generic looking main kid and I was hoping for more fights between these two legends. But I can't complain, I never thought I would see these two together in a Wuxia movie. Rob Minkoff did a decent job. We've seen better fights from these two, I do love that Jet Li plays the silent Monk type character and Jackie Chan a drunken beggar.
