reviews.author: MatheusGuimas

reviews.text: [this movie] is one of those odd animated films with a unique tone and setting, kind of like a grungy, British, sewer-dwelling cousin of Ratatouille. It’s got a distinct vibe: the visuals actually hold up surprisingly well, and there’s a definite charm to the grimy-yet-colorful underground world it creates. The animation style, while unconventional for its time (being Aardman’s leap into CG), still manages to maintain some of their trademark aesthetic, which adds a bit of identity. Unfortunately, while the world looks great, the story just doesn’t land. The plot is shallow, formulaic, and largely forgettable, and the characters don’t leave much of an impression.
reviews.author: jacogiu

reviews.text: Simply put, one of my favorite "family" movies ever. I've watched this multiple times and STILL laugh...and usually at the same scenes. The storyline, the slugs, the various one-liners and "pay close attention or you'll miss 'em" jokes throughout, all of it added up to a hilarious movie that was fun not just for the kids but for the grownups as well. After watching Hugh Jackman in all the _X-Men_ movies as the nearly-infallible "Wolverine", it's hilarious to think of him as a bumbling little high-society rat...but he pulls it off beautifully. Definitely one of my favorite "fun" movies ever and definitely worth watching when you just need a laugh!
reviews.author: $hubes

reviews.text: [this movie] (2006) Dir: David Bowers & Sam Fell [this movie] is an adventure comedy animation about a rat called Roddy who lives a luxurious lifestyle in a flat in Kensington, until he gets flushed down the toilet into the sewers of London. (I know, iconic.) [this movie] definitely isn't the best animated film ever released, but I honestly have to say that it may be one of my favourites. It is a genuinely laugh out loud film for children and adults alike. The premise, like the majority of animated films is so ludicrous that it makes it so fun to watch. Rich rats, poor rats, evil frogs, singing slugs, you name it, it's in there.

reviews.text: The problem with this film in the 2020s is that the book it's loosely based on was already out-of-date when it was made. The Jack Ryan novels have not aged well; briefly put, the world-view projected is post Cold War & 'the USA (& particularly the CIA) has won, because the USSR has collapsed'. Not quite how it was turning out, even in the early 2000s. Then there are the many plot-holes, most visible in the scenes that take place in Baltimore; mobile signal post EMP, anyone?

reviews.text: At a quick glance - and judging from the mediocre 70% overall rating on here - this movie was not well received. However, I found it very enjoyable, even though a bit dated. (Of course, at my age, I'm getting to where I _prefer_ the "dated" movies as all the current stuff is mostly just tripe and rehashed vomitous.) Maybe I'm getting jaded by watching so many movies in the Horror genre here of late, and something that is completely different seems to bring a breath of fresh air. There were, yes, a few scenes that were eye-rollable but for the most part, it was an enjoyable, suspenseful, cat-and-mouse political thriller.
reviews.author: $hubes

reviews.text: Far-fetched? Absolutely. Great story. Absolutely. Worth watching? Absolutely. Worth watching AGAIN? You guessed it: ABSOLUTELY. Loved this one. I don't understand why the hatred, but I thought this was a great movie. Yes, there were plot holes big enough to drive a truck through, but guess what? **IT'S A HOLLYWOOD-PRODUCED WORK OF FICTION!** Sit back and forget everything and watch the flippin' movie already. If you're looking for "true-to-life", let me suggest one of the many documentaries available on Netflix. Or perhaps you would enjoy the History channel.

reviews.text: Another fine movie that had a theme that dealt with good versus evil and how fine a line there can be between the flawed good guy and the good bad guy. I was pleasantly surprised by this film.
reviews.author: AdamMorgan

reviews.text: Watched the extended cut and regret it. This movie was looooooong. last 40 minutes were amazingly satisfying though. Maybe if I watched the normal cut this would be up in 8/10. Such a heavily story driven movie is unfortunately not very rewatchable, so I won't.
reviews.author: Bac0nSandwich

reviews.text: Quite a disappointed since it is really as much as you expect, but nothing new. Washington and Russell perform really well, so, as a characters movie, it works. It doesn't work at all as a biopic. Too much Hollywood on it.
reviews.author: Andres Gomez

reviews.text: Great movie. Lucas' life is what people in criminology would call as "ethnic succession theory". The blacks were the "representation of progress" that drove away Italians in the crime world. Loved the way Ridley Scott narrates Lucas' life and movies timeline with the progress on Vietnam War.
reviews.author: xaliber

summary: Loosely based on the criminal career of Frank Lucas, a gangster from La Grange, North Carolina, who smuggled heroin into the United States on American service planes returning from the Vietnam War, before being detained by a task force led by Newark Detective Richie Roberts.

title: The Goonies

reviews.text: So if you've not seen it do it right now, and if you have kids sit them down, hold their hand through the scary bits and enjoy!
reviews.author: AlexanderZ

reviews.text: Many years without seeing it, and I still like it, although you don't have that feeling like when you saw it in the cinema when you were young.
reviews.author: juliosoft

reviews.text: I went in with low expectations and was veryy impressed with how fun this was! The child actors really make this film great and the story is simple, but compelling.
reviews.author: Parmlog

reviews.text: An 80’s classic that entertains me every time I watch it. It’s a fun and funny adventure with a great cast. It’s one of the best family films of all time despite some PG-13 jokes for a PG movie.
reviews.author: Jim222001

reviews.text: >"[this movie] never say die!" I always wanted to be part of [this movie] as a kid. The movie is silly, fun, adventurous and most of all, you have to have a good imagination. You got booby traps, pirates, thieves, rascals, romance... everything a kid adventure movie should have.
reviews.author: Narate

reviews.text: I will always cherish and remember this movie! first time i saw this film was when in turned 9 years old in 1996... still one of my favorites to this day! Everyone deserves to see this flick! a Masterpiece
reviews.author: Trevor Devendorf

summary: Young teen Mikey Walsh and his friends set off on a quest to find Pirate One-Eyed Willie's treasure in hopes of saving their homes from demolition. However, on their quest to find the treasure, they run into a family of recently escaped criminals, determined to capture the kids and reach the treasure first.

title: The Last Viking

reviews.text: [this movie] is stupidly sentimental and surprisingly sweet. It’s a film about a bunch of individuals who are completely and totally dysfunctional on their own but somewhat functional together.
reviews.author: Chris Sawin

reviews.text: This movie is filled with dark humour. Mads Mikkelsen is the name that dragged me into it. However, the supporting cast were amazing as well.
reviews.author: durack

reviews.text: Una divertida comedia sumergida en el drama y la realidad de los traumas. En la que el loco es realmente el más cuerdo y el más cuerdo también reprime la realidad de una vida difícil a la que intenta llevar adelante. Apesar de sus errores.
reviews.author: josanz_nme

reviews.text: A director whose amazing films are unmistakable sends a family to search for lost roots in the past. Only by returning to where they were both happy and sad can they understand that if every [this movie]'s hand were cut off, they would all be the same! Kind, but sad. About humans
reviews.author: jjjjs

reviews.text: Another excellent movie from Anders Thomas Jensen. From the trailer you might get the impression that this movie is only comedy and crazy stuff - but it has a quite deep and emotional story line as well. The cast is perfect for the movie and I think it is one of the directors best ones yet - and perhaps also one that speaks to the zeitgeist.
reviews.author: Clausdh

reviews.text: Película muy entretenida. Se nota el mismo humor negro que Anders Jensen le puso a la otra película que dirigió de "Men and chicken''. En mi opinión fue una gran película, llena de momentos crueles y a la vez divertidos. Su final revelando cosas del pasado realmente no me lo esperaba. Es una lástima que no llegara a tantos cines ya que no la pude disfrutar en la región que vivo.
reviews.author: pami_tutos_d185ae

summary: After serving fourteen years for robbery, Anker is released from prison and reunites with his mentally ill brother Manfred, who alone knows where the stolen money is hidden but has forgotten its location, sending them on a journey to recover the loot and confront who they are.

title: Jujutsu Kaisen 0

reviews.text: A very good film and quite well paced. but it would have been possible to do something better with a better soundtrack and more intense fights. It's still a good movie with a good story.
reviews.author: theosaintvoirin

reviews.text: It's pretty much what you expect from a movie... Ok but forgettable. I kinda liked the first half more as it showed potential... But it being a movie I knew it would end how it ended.
reviews.author: Astranora

reviews.text: I like Yuta, even more so now that he got over his whimsical attitude. Eager to see him in the main series. Apart from that, the fights could use more sauce, and sometimes the movie was a bit boring.
reviews.author: Kaito6

reviews.text: Great story, god tier animation and a whole lot of awesome fights. If you liked the anime you'll love this movie it keeps the same quality. Loved the different cameos we get from the teachers and students. Can't wait for the anime to come back!
reviews.author: Acoucalancha

reviews.text: As someone who hasn't watched the anime I thought the fights were neat but the plot pacing was breakneck speed and barely allowed you to savour any of the moments. It was still a fun experience though, will have to check out the anime series.
reviews.author: csbarker

reviews.text: >"I just couldn't wear a heartfelt smile, living in this world." If you like the anime, this is a great movie. It adds a lot more to the ongoing anime story as a prequel I can't wait to see some characters to show up in the future.
reviews.author: Narate

summary: Yuta Okkotsu is a nervous high school student who is suffering from a serious problem—his childhood friend Rika has turned into a curse and won't leave him alone. Since Rika is no ordinary curse, his plight is noticed by Satoru Gojo, a teacher at Jujutsu High, a school where fledgling exorcists learn how to combat curses. Gojo convinces Yuta to enroll, but can he learn enough in time to confront the curse that haunts him?

title: Elevation

reviews.text: Not a bad movie, but there is one scene more in the credits (after the map)… I hope we get part 2 next year (2026).

reviews.text: Pretty bad all around. The reapers were lame, the cgi was terrible and the plot made no sense and left us hanging without anything being explained at the end…

reviews.text: Great casting direction, but this concept would’ve worked much better as a television show or even a miniseries where they could’ve expanded on the myriad of concepts introduced. This was a speed run
reviews.author: B1indBlossom

reviews.text: This is what hollywierd should go back to, simplicity. Good acting and a simple storyline. Is this the best movie in 2024? Nope, but it is a MUST WATCH.

reviews.text: Was way too short, but for what it was I enjoyed it... Definitely fishing for a sequel type of movie and the suspense up until the end was a hit or miss... Miss for me

reviews.text: Managed to watch the whole film in just 20 minutes, you can literally fast forward and still get the whole point of the storyline. I can’t believe a weak storyline like this even got a budget
reviews.author: PaulMSUK

summary: Post-apocalyptic survivors find refuge in the Rocky Mountains to hide from giant, insect-like creatures that can't live above 8,000 feet. However, when one of them needs life-saving supplies, they risk it all to venture into the danger zone.

title: Training Day

reviews.text: A good cop story that is probably not that for from reality for some cops in real life. Good action. Good characters and a bit of food for thought.
reviews.author: siggi963

reviews.text: This is the second time I saw this. I remembered this as being a realy good movie. Seeing it today,opposed to 10 years ago, I think if you take away Denzels performance this is a decent but not awesome piece.

reviews.text: A pretty good performance from both Ethan Hawke and Denzel Washington, and this may be one of Director Antoine Fuqua's best movie's even if it isn't perfect.

reviews.text: You can't get tired of watching this iconic movie. no movie is gonna top this one, action, thriller or drama, this is the shit, it's second to none the chemistry of Hawke and Washington is unmatched and this was the debut of Terry Crews, it can't get any better than that.
reviews.author: MSJL

reviews.text: >"King Kong ain't got shit on me!" This is a great gritty flick about corruption in the police force. I rememeber watching this as a kid but it got even better with a rewatch. I would say it is pretty good but Denzel's performance is what elevates it to another level.
reviews.author: Narate

reviews.text: The razor thin line of morality is obfuscated in such a way throughout this movie, I'm still not sure who was in the right or wrong. Dark, bleak but brought to life with a bustling pace and Denzel's flowing charisma, [this movie] is worthy of the prestige it has garnered over the last 23 years and is still as enthralling today. Glad I finally got around to striking this one from my backlog, it delivered on all fronts.
reviews.author: Xiofire

summary: On his first day on the job as a narcotics officer, a rookie cop works with a rogue detective who isn't what he appears.

reviews.text: ★★★½☆ (3.5/5) Not as fresh as the first one, but still fun. It keeps the meta humor and tension going without completely repeating itself. Some great set pieces and solid performances, even if it feels a bit more predictable this time. Good sequel, just not on the same level as the original.

reviews.text: Solid sequel for something that was pushed out a year after the first, doesn’t overshadow the first in any way but also doesn’t really need to, gets points for referencing House: The Second Story

summary: Two years after the Woodsboro murders, Sidney Prescott acclimates to college life while someone donning the Ghostface costume begins a new string of killings.

reviews.text: Yes, it’s utter trash in just about every regard. But, you can have so much fun with it, especially with the right amount of friends and alcohol. It’s also the ultimate time capsule of the early 2000s.

reviews.text: Don't know why this movie is so low rated. It's not the best movie I've seen, sure. But it is not horrible, I found it enjoyable and I've seen much worse movies, and even with higher ratings _Rating: sure/10_ _Posted: 17 oct. 2019_

summary: Liquidated after discovering a corporate conspiracy, mild-mannered graphic artist Patience Phillips washes up on an island, where she's resurrected and endowed with the prowess of a cat — and she's eager to use her new skills... as a vigilante. Before you can say "cat and mouse", handsome gumshoe Tom Lone is on her tail, fascinated by both of her personas.

title: Rambo

reviews.text: [this movie] teaches that fighting sucks, good intentions can be futile, and coalitions of the willing are a charade: A man's got to do what a man's got to do.
reviews.author: Edgerk

reviews.text: Kick-ass action all around and although the story is on the basic side and has minimal character development for [this movie] himself, just a bloody, albeit too much of it CGI'd, entertaining especially an action-fest finale. Amazing, especially being the fourth entry into the series.
reviews.author: JPV852

reviews.text: This might the best of the [this movie] movies. [this movie] has retired to Thailand and feels compelled to use his abilities to save some imprudent aid workers. It is closer to real life through it is still a good [this movie] action movie.
reviews.author: siggi963

reviews.text: If you watch, then I'd recommend the Extended version. And watching First Blood of 1982 followed by this - ignore all others in the anthology. Extended 7.5/10 Theateical 6.5/10

reviews.text: No sense of fun or adventure. Like part 2 and 3. [this movie] and Last Blood are just for blood thirsty people. Who want to see [this movie] kill people Jason Voorhees style. Better than the last movie at least.
reviews.author: Jim222001

reviews.text: Surprisingly good but also very bloody and gory! The plot has some depth and topicality (at least on its release date in 2008, because all takes place in Burma) and is fast paced. The hundreds of killings are very brutal but they achieve that one really despises the inhuman military regime of Burma.
reviews.author: DRNKMNKY

summary: In Thailand, ex-Green Beret John James Rambo joins a group of mercenaries to venture into war-torn neighboring Myanmar to rescue a group of Christian aid workers who have been kidnapped by a ruthless local infantry unit.

title: Sex and the City

reviews.text: I fell in love with the movie when it first aired and I love it still. Every woman can find a piece of her in one of the charecters or in their "life story" and it never fails to make me laugh or cry. Or both.
reviews.author: loverly

reviews.text: I watched this movie when it came out with my girlfriend at the time, having never seen the show before, and it made me feel terrible about myself, my body, and prospects for women in general. I still feel the same way in 2021, but I think I aged better than this movie did, so that's something. And there is a cute puppy and plenty of romcom tropes, if you like those.
reviews.author: quirks

reviews.text: I didn’t watch any of the television series, twenty years earlier, upon which this was based so came to this new - and for a while it’s quite enjoyable. It picks up the story of four women, all of whom are now approaching their fifties, and is narrated by “Carrie” (Sarah Jessica Parker) as she looks forward to the wedding of the decade with her very own “Mr. Big” (Chris Noth).
reviews.author: CinemaSerf

reviews.text: Gosh. Even if you liked the TV show and think that's season 7 (and it kind of *is* a final season), this is really hard to watch. Doesn't work as a movie. Everything what's wrong with the TV show is amplified in this movie. Even worse, it's boring most of the time. Only the Chinese girl, Magda and the dogs are adorable. Plus, they allow an actual black person to say something meaningful. I hate that they seem to have invested about 50% of the additional budget into make-up and hair. The girls look unreal - not in a good way. It's worse than the TV show.
reviews.author: alexlimberg

reviews.text: >"They say nothing lasts forever; dreams change, trends come and go, but friendships never go out of style." I recently finished the HBO TV series and have to say the finale was so disappointing (seems to be something HBO does more often than I'd like to admit), so I thought maybe the movie brought some justice to the show that the fans deserved. After finishing this movie I can say... it did not. I almost feel like I dislike the characters more than I did after the finale. Not all characters are hard to like, but Miranda and Carrie really did their fair share of damage. Stick to the early seasons of the show.
reviews.author: Narate

reviews.text: I had to downgrade my original rating. In my early 20s I loved this film, but now I see some glaring issues that become apparent with maturity. The film is entertaining enough, but feeds on the typical melodramatic stereotypes of shallow romcoms that the original show tried to destroy. Samantha's storyline of choosing to be true to herself is probably the only thread still linking this generic cheese fest to the superior characterization of the small screen. Some things didn't age well. I had to pause for a bit to figure out what was wrong with Sam's tummy - still looking. Carrie accusing Miranda of ruining her marriage was just rich too. Women (Carrie, Miranda, even Louise from St.
reviews.author: Wynter02

summary: When Carrie's big step forward in her relationship goes awry, best friends Charlotte, Miranda and Samantha are there to help her pick up the pieces.

title: No Strings Attached

reviews.text: In my opinion Jake Johnson, Lake Bell, Greta Gerwig and Mindy Kaling where the most interesting part of this movie - basically all the side characters. Natalie Portmans character was quite annoying. It did turn out to be an okay movie at the end. To be fair, the end credits were the funniest part of the movie.
reviews.author: someonestolemyoreo

reviews.text: I can't believe Hollywood really released the same movie twice in one year (this and friends with benefit). Anyway, friends with benefits approached this topic better and way more balanced.
reviews.author: sir.me_

reviews.text: This was definitely one of the better romantic comedies on the market. The cast was top-notch, and Natalie Portman and Ashton Kutcher had strong chemistry together.
reviews.author: jmg999

reviews.text: "[this movie]" poses the question: Is it possible to have sex with someone without risking that you could fall in love with them? The answer is YES. It also poses the question: Is it possible to make a clichéd and hackneyed film that smells like ass? The answer is YES. A bland and dated mainstream romantic comedy, which attempts to give itself an edge through raunchy humor and language and situational comedy right from the 80's. Kutcher and Portman have no chemistry. That lack of understanding of how people interact with each other and this carries over to all of the relationships in the film. None of these actors feel like they enjoy each other.
reviews.author: arash Mihajlović

reviews.text: [this movie] is romantic comedy starring Natalie Portman and Ashton Kutcher. Now, I'm not a prolific watcher of the rom-com genre and honestly I've probably only seen a few of them throughout my entire life to this point. I bring this up because it seems like most of the criticisms people have of this film deal with the idea that it's not all that original and the only thing it did differently was add in foul language. I, on the other hand, really enjoyed this film for what it is. I think this is primarily because I'm still pretty inexperienced with the rom-com genre, but I also think it's because there's nothing really "wrong" with this film.
reviews.author: GDawson2

reviews.text: >"We don't get to pick who we fall in love with, and it doesn't happen like it should." I always get this confused with Friends with Benefits. After watching this I realized it was the other movie that I liked more haha. These 2 are charming actors, I just think the story isn't that great. It does have some funny moments though.
reviews.author: Narate

summary: Emma is a busy doctor who sets up a seemingly perfect arrangement when she offers her best friend Adam a relationship with one rule: No strings attached. But when a fling becomes a thing, can sex friends stay best friends?

title: Twelve Monkeys

reviews.text: One of the best films of all time. Willis is at his best here. Totally engrossing. I think I have spent 0.00193403% of my life watching this film

reviews.text: Not worth the hype. Only interesting thing about the movie is when the lead character was sent through the time not to change anything and just to observe it. Otherwise meh.

reviews.text: It’s a pretty cool movie with Terry Gilliam type art and visuals, but like all of his movies, it’s definitely not for the mainstream crowd.

reviews.text: Interesting premise but the story was all over the place and did not find myself constantly engaged. Cliched romance, silly and comical mad scientists that invented time travel? Anyway it was all right.
reviews.author: techdough71

reviews.text: An absolutely brilliant movie. It doesn't try to be too much. The hero isn't some superhuman. He's flawed, and far from perfect. There's a lot going on, and it just all comes together so well. So tragically. So cleverly.
reviews.author: bastardsheep

reviews.text: This was totally crazy, but in an undeniably interesting way! Honestly, though, I really do think the concept of this movie was so cool, but I have to admit the execution does feel very old.
reviews.author: Imme van Gorp

summary: In the year 2035, convict James Cole reluctantly volunteers to be sent back in time to discover the origin of a deadly virus that wiped out nearly all of the earth's population and forced the survivors into underground communities. But when Cole is mistakenly sent to 1990 instead of 1996, he's arrested and locked up in a mental hospital. There he meets psychiatrist Dr. Kathryn Railly and the son of a famous virus expert who may hold the key to the Army of the 12 Monkeys; thought to be responsible for unleashing the killer disease.

title: Drag Me to Hell

reviews.text: More supernatural mumbo jumbo. Throw in she's a gypsy so she must be evil with witchcraft. a button? really? critics must have been on drugs when they watched this.
reviews.author: Wambie

reviews.text: Doesn't take itself too seriously and doesn't try to be anything other than what it is; Just a fun movie with some horror elements mixed in.
reviews.author: KingKon_NL

reviews.text: Yeah this one is definitely one of the guilty pleasure movies for me. Is it great? No. Would I recommend it? Probably not. But I'll be damned if it's not fun.
reviews.author: TimeRaider

reviews.text: Over the top silliness, as expected of Sam Raimi's work. If you are a fan of intentionally bad horror movies, this is the one for you.

reviews.text: I rank the film among the average moments, the film seemed to me more like a horror comedy, certain passages of the film were more of a laugh than to be afraid, but despite certain shortcomings, the film did not bore me.
reviews.author: Tomas Tom

reviews.text: 3 minutes in, and I'm thinking: "Yes, I will let my future children watch the first 3 minutes of this movie to teach them a lesson...and that's why you don't steal kids, you'll go to [this movie]." 😂😂
reviews.author: mg_grey

summary: After denying a woman the extension she needs to keep her home, loan officer Christine Brown sees her once-promising life take a startling turn for the worse. Christine is convinced she's been cursed by a Gypsy, but her boyfriend is skeptical. Her only hope seems to lie in a psychic who claims he can help her lift the curse and keep her soul from being dragged straight to hell.

title: Bride of Chucky

reviews.text: My favorite out of the series. Not only is this funny but they take turns trying to show each other up in there killings. Really love this movie.
reviews.author: Andre Gonzales

reviews.text: This is where the series switches gears to full out satire. And for the most part, it works brilliantly for me. Pretty much all the ingredients just came together perfectly. A couple corny jokes aside, the humor is fantastic, and only makes sense at this point in the franchise. Love all the little tongue-in-cheek nods and cameos.
reviews.author: jekyl6669

reviews.text: This is a personal favorite for every reason. Rarely have I seen a franchise bounce back so hard but this is so far above 3. Jennifer Tilly is so cool and so great in this movie honestly probably the first time I ever found a girl cool growing up was this movie. The charm is still all over this movie since the first time I ever saw it.
reviews.author: SpitOnMeMommy

reviews.text: [this movie] abandons nearly all the menace and tension that defined the series, opting instead for campy self-parody and constant winks to the audience. The shift toward referential humour and over-the-top comedy makes it hard to take seriously as horror, and much of the atmosphere I enjoyed of the original trilogy is lost in the process. There is no denying Jennifer Tilly's arrival as Tiffany is nothing short as iconic, but she's not enjoy to carry or elevate this past mediocrity to me.
reviews.author: Xiofire

reviews.text: _[this movie]_ was the true turning point for the franchise, and though they hadn't 100% embraced comedy at this point like they did in the followup, there's still at least as much humour and reference in this one as there is elements of "horror". The central premise of a horror road trip, where the lead couple each believe the other party is the culprit (and are both wrong) is pretty solid, as is the final showdown, but the connective tissue is a bit wishy washy, and the inability to commit to a tone doesn't serve the movie very well, putting it at a lower point than any of its predecessors.
reviews.author: Gimly

reviews.text: I love that they just turned this into a totally self aware comedy. The whole concept of a killer doll is absurd so might as well embrace that and make it funny. Adding Tiffany was a great idea and boy is that ending something.
reviews.author: nmahoney416

summary: For ten years, the tortured soul of serial killer Charles Lee Ray has been imprisoned inside a child's doll. Chucky is reborn when his old flame, Tiffany, rescues his battered doll parts from a police impound. But Chucky wants his new playmate cut down to size, so he transforms his blushing bride into a stunning little terror. Chucky and Tiffany can't wait to start their own homicidal honeymoon. When this demonic duo hits the road and hooks up with a pair of unsuspecting newlyweds, they leave a trail of murder and mayhem behind them. Chucky's back!

title: Expend4bles

reviews.text: There are too many 3d effects used in the filming of the movie, resulting in a too fake picture. The plot is too simple and the characterization is very perfunctory.
reviews.author: tagicc

reviews.text: Aaand that's the end of the expendables. This movie should never have been released, script and sfx are generally terrible, a far cry from the first 3 movies and have likely caused the franchise to pass into the void
reviews.author: PjMontgomery

reviews.text: Megan Fox - the Expendable with perfect make-up throughout. Poor CGI, no story and plot holes you could drive a tank through. A sad 4th installment indeed
reviews.author: rastarr

reviews.text: This fourth movie was not really necessary. It feels like they just wanted to integrate some more second and third rate action stars into the franchise without caring of a story that made any sense at all. Well, for fans only
reviews.author: siggi963

reviews.text: The opening bar scene was enough to make me hate this movie and its characters. Edit: I just realized Stalone totally murdered that guy from the bar... because he beat him in poker I guess? wtf

reviews.text: I know the screen writers are on strike I didn’t realise SFX people were too! The green screen scenes are so obvious and so poorly made I would have easily assumed this film was produced in the 80’s

summary: Armed with every weapon they can get their hands on and the skills to use them, The Expendables are the world’s last line of defense and the team that gets called when all other options are off the table. But new team members with new styles and tactics are going to give “new blood” a whole new meaning.

title: Silent Hill

reviews.text: One of my favourite horrors. So creepy when it first came out and it still is. Excellent film, not without faults, but I still love it.
reviews.author: angel1online

reviews.text: Never have looked at foggy mornings the same since I watched this almost 20 years ago. Hard re-watch with my kid. Changes between the worlds in [this movie] still creepy as ever.
reviews.author: Fondlingpitchforks

reviews.text: >"Fire doesn't cleanse, it blackens!" This is not near as bad as I thought it was going to be. It's a pretty good adaptation and it definitely has the [this movie] feel that the game had. Pyramid Head is awesome of course.
reviews.author: Narate

reviews.text: First watch, I was impressed with the attempt at keeping the film terrifyingly spooky and keeping you on edge at what could come next. The creature effects are too notch creepy and the imagery of what we're seeing will Haunt some, if lucky. I really enjoyed the game in total Darkness and with the sound coming through my stereo with the bass deep enough to feel their foot steps. I'm always ready for the 100th+ watch.
reviews.author: patient1

reviews.text: You have to give it to the film and to the people behind it: they seemed to actually try to make a good movie. It could have been just a shameless cash grab to ride on the wave of the game's success, but you just feel there was passion behind it. Unfortunately, passion is not always good enough. Granted that this movie is a hard to one to adapt, with the game's confusing and complex story and creatures that are hard to make look good in real life. But that's not just it.
reviews.author: faggurgle

reviews.text: ❤x6 I rewatched this movie and found it to be a little bit more enjoyable than the first time I saw it. I remember feeling a bit lost on th plot the first time I saw this but it made more sense this time. What the movie does very well is setting a mood. How I rate: 1-3 ❤ = seriously! don't waste your time 4-6 ❤ = you may or may not enjoy this 7-8 ❤ = I expect you will like this too 9-10 ❤ = movies and TV shows I really love!

reviews.text: The good news - you get to see two fantastic actors in a movie where the script probably isn't up to part with their talents. They are sweet and funny and have great chemistry. The middle third of the movie is actually very good, although based on the nature of the storyline you kind of know that the end is going to have to be at least a little bit hokey. That said, I didn't expect the last 5 minutes - I thought that was an excellent addendum to the movie. follow me at or facebook IHATEBadMovies
reviews.author: AdamMorgan

reviews.text: It's a little heavy-footed and almost tries too hard, yet I quite enjoyed '[this movie]' . Reese Witherspoon and Mark Ruffalo are a strong pairing, with Jon Heder spearheading a good support cast ably. It's a well paced film at around 90 minutes, there are some decently amusing scenes in there alongside some more sombre ones - the majority of which come off rather well. Some parts are cliché, but not to the degree that it affected my enjoyment. One that is well worth a watch, in my opinion of course.
reviews.author: r96sk

summary: Shortly after David Abbott moves into his new San Francisco digs, he has an unwelcome visitor on his hands: winsome Elizabeth Masterson, who asserts that the apartment is hers -- and promptly vanishes. When she starts appearing and disappearing at will, David thinks she's a ghost, while Elizabeth is convinced she's alive.

reviews.text: The neighbor is going to be PISSED if this were IRL, because messing with the tree WILL cost him massively. Most states have arborist protection laws and cutting down a tree on someone else's property can run up to three times the cost of the tree. Think in the area of a few 10's of thousands of dollars, PLUS having to pay for the cost of a replacement tree. Other than that IRL thing, this movie is very enjoyable and corny as heck.
reviews.author: eric.v.mazzone

reviews.text: This one will forever hold a place in my heart. It might not be great, but this one hits all of the nostalgia buttons for me and I will forever love it. I remember when it was released and the toys were everywhere. I am surprised that this was not turned into a bigger franchise, but I am happy we at least got this movie! Rating: 4/5 - 85% - Would Recommend
reviews.author: Copeland1994

reviews.text: Now I won't lie, this definitely is a silly movie but it is still quite a fun watch if you ask me. From a certain point of view it can be seen as a clever movie too. I don't know for sure if it was intentional but I really love the way the movie's self aware satirical humor pokes fun at the fact that war has been merchandised and aimed at children tons of times throughout history. The movie itself actually says "Don't call it violence, call it action; kids love action, it sells!". Even the movie's marketing gives all its attention to the antagonist soldier toys instead of the Gorgonites.
reviews.author: MisterX867

reviews.text: I was obsessed with this movie as a kid, I used to watch it on repeat. I remember relating to it sinse I have the same name as the main character which was a rarity (and still is) for me. I was afraid of rewatching it now because I wasn't sure if i'd still like it as an adult. ***[this movie]*** still holds up as a great 90s action flick with good comedy and some great action sequences. I'm surprised I wasn't scared of this as a child, some of the visuals are kinda disturbing and there's certainly some light horror elements especially with the Barbie sequences (which are some of the best in the movie). So many funny one-liners.

summary: It's vacation time for Carter as he finds himself alongside Lee in Hong Kong wishing for more excitement. While Carter wants to party and meet the ladies, Lee is out to track down a Triad gang lord who may be responsible for killing two men at the American Embassy. Things get complicated as the pair stumble onto a counterfeiting plot. The boys are soon up to their necks in fist fights and life-threatening situations. A trip back to the U.S. may provide the answers about the bombing, the counterfeiting, and the true allegiance of sexy customs agent Isabella.

reviews.author: fasterfilmcritic

reviews.text: Set in the loose and grimy 1930s, when money was short and times were tough, _[this movie]_ plunges us into a city of con artists, constantly on the prowl for easy marks. Some of these scoundrels might specialize in street-level sleight of hand, others in gambling scams or boardroom swindles, but just about everyone is trying to pull something to get a leg up on the world. And if some unlucky rube happens to get hurt along the way, hey, better you than me. Think twice next time.
reviews.author: drqshadow

reviews.text: A magical plot, dead on art direction, brilliant supporting roles, and the guiding hand of Redford/Newman chemistry make this one of the Hollywood's great films. If that isn't bad enough, there's tension between the two detectives when Marcus discovers that playboy Mike is secretly romancing Marcus’ sister, Syd.

reviews.text: Personally I prefer Olympus on all accounts. Sure it's a matter of taste but I´m not seeing one area where this was the better movie.

summary: Capitol Policeman John Cale has just been denied his dream job with the Secret Service protecting President James Sawyer. Not wanting to let down his little girl with the news, he takes her on a tour of the White House, when the complex is overtaken by a heavily armed paramilitary group. Now, with the nation's government falling into chaos and time running out, it's up to Cale to save the president, his daughter, and the country.

title: Enemy at the Gates

reviews.text: Terrible film, with unconvincing actor performances and down right stupid story. The sole redeeming factor is that it compares favorably to Pearl Harbor. The film set might be grandiose, but the film is missing entirely the grittiness of the German film named Stalingrad.
reviews.author: thomas.a.roche

reviews.text: >"Vodka is a luxury we have. Caviar is a luxury we have. Time is not." If you can get over the accents since this was made with Hollywood stars for Hollywood fans, I think you might enjoy it. The first half of the film is definitely stronger than the second half, but the sniper scenes were pretty good and the score was on point. A few cheesy lines and moments during a horrible era, but Jude Law and Rachel Weisz will always win me over.
reviews.author: Narate

reviews.text: A very bad film that may appeal to those who still believe the stupidest lies inherited from the Cold War. The Soviets are shown as cowardly, stupid and monstrous. By contrast, the Germans are shown in their best light, offering to help the Russians under Stalin's vile regime. Nothing could be further from the truth, and a number of clichés have been disproved by historians (one rifle for two, no retreating, Soviet soldiers deserting in droves as if the Red Army wasn't a real army, etc.). The film is anti-communist and not even subtle in its affection for the Nazi regime. The acting doesn't even raise the bar. Watch it just to laugh at the West's view of communism.
reviews.author: Raziorx930

reviews.text: Based on true events, _[this movie]_ is a thrilling and suspenseful World War II epic. The story follows a sniper duel between a Russian and a German during the Battle of Stalingrad. Featuring an all-star cast that includes Jude Law, Joseph Fiennes, Rachel Weisz, and Ed Harris, the performances are quite good. Additionally, the directing is well-done and brings a lot of tension and suspense to the sniper scenes. The set designs are also very impressive; giving a realistic feel to city ruins and setting up interesting sniper positions. And, James Horner provides a remarkable score that captures the mood and tone of the film.
reviews.author: jarvis-8243417

reviews.text: It's a very old fashioned movie. . Like 1940s and 50s American war propaganda movies. The sentimental score is old fashioned. British actors pretending to be Russians in Russia is old fashioned (Bob Hoskins was comically miscast). The love story is old fashioned. I expected something in the tone of Saving Private Ryan. Having said that, I understand why it's a beloved movie. It's entertaining. The tense sniping scenes are very well done. They are the highlight of the movie.
reviews.author: The_Argentinian

reviews.text: ***War of the rats in crumbling Stalingrad during WWII*** RELEASED IN 2001 and directed by Jean-Jacques Annaud, "[this movie]" takes place in the last four months of 1942 during the pivotal Battle of Stalingrad. Russian troops are carted in by the literal trainloads as the Germans attack/bomb the city. Once the dust clears the situation settles into a more personal battle of sharpshooting wills. A lowly young Russian soldier named Vassili (Jude Law) distinguishes himself for his shooting skills and is promoted as a national hero to motivate the Russian cause. After numerous German officers are assassinated, Major König (Ed Harris), the top German sniper, is assigned to seek out and eliminate Vassili.
reviews.author: Wuchak

summary: A Russian and a German sniper play a game of cat-and-mouse during the Battle of Stalingrad in WWII.

The first movie was a fun, well-crafted action thriller—this one is a lifeless, low-budget mess. Stallone is barely in it, the plot is nonsense, and the CGI looks awful. It lacks the tension, creativity, and charm of the original. Watch the first one again and pretend this doesn’t exist.

summary: When the crew of the Enterprise is called back home, they find an unstoppable force of terror from within their own organization has detonated the fleet and everything it stands for, leaving our world in a state of crisis. As our heroes are propelled into an epic chess game of life and death, love will be challenged, friendships will be torn apart, and sacrifices must be made for the only family Kirk has left: his crew.

summary: Jack Harper is one of the last few drone repairmen stationed on Earth. Part of a massive operation to extract vital resources after decades of war with a terrifying threat known as the Scavs, Jack’s mission is nearly complete. His existence is brought crashing down when he rescues a beautiful stranger from a downed spacecraft. Her arrival triggers a chain of events that forces him to question everything he knows and puts the fate of humanity in his hands.

title: Conan the Barbarian

reviews.text: What the eff did I just watch? Everything is terribly bad: the action, story, acting. Soundtrack is good but feels like it's made for a different movie.

reviews.text: The best sword and sorcery movie ever made IMO. And perhaps the best score ever produced. The score… the score… all of it is so good. F-ing best movie ever made. and if you watch the directors commentary version… pricelessssssss….

reviews.text: I was expecting a lot more considering the two great screenplay writers involved on this one. It's just a dumb 80s fantasy action movie. A more serious Flash Gordon. The 2 hours and 10 minutes felt interminable for me.

reviews.text: Soo damn good! All around great fantasy flick. It's also aged really nicely. One of the best of Arnold's career. It's too bad we never got the third movie to wash the taste of the second away, and leave a finer legacy.
reviews.author: jekyl6669

summary: A horde of rampaging warriors massacre the parents of young Conan and enslave the young child for years on The Wheel of Pain. As the sole survivor of the childhood massacre, Conan is released from slavery and taught the ancient arts of fighting. Transforming himself into a killing machine, Conan travels into the wilderness to seek vengeance on Thulsa Doom, the man responsible for killing his family. In the wilderness, Conan takes up with the thieves Valeria and Subotai. The group comes upon King Osric, who wants the trio of warriors to help rescue his daughter who has joined Doom in the hills.

title: Mission: Impossible III

reviews.text: [this movie] may have the greatest opening sequence in the franchise. Philip Seymour Hoffman is definitely the best villain. The film isn't perfect, but for an over-the-top action film, it is a lot of fun.
reviews.author: fasterfilmcritic

reviews.text: This is the best one out of the first three movies. Interesting story, a lot of fun and excitement, Tom Cruise runs a lot - what else do you need from that kind of movie?
reviews.author: ragnarLothbrok

reviews.text: Abrams brings genuine emotional stakes to the formula — Hoffman's villain has real menace, and the personal cost to Hunt's relationships gives the action sequences actual weight. Underrated entry that set the template for the series' later quality.
reviews.author: RedRudolf

reviews.text: The third movie comes back with again a bit more focus on the story and a villain, played by Philip Seymour Hoffmann, that is just superb and gives the movie an extra kick upwards. Excellent entertainment.
reviews.author: siggi963

reviews.text: These movies continue to disappoint. I remembered two being horrible, but I don't remember this one being so bad. Maybe I skipped it after how pathetic two was. As has been said in other comments, where are the actual missions, with competent people, and agency support? These movies really have nothing interesting to offer.
reviews.author: wpafbo79

reviews.text: This was some action packed fun! It mixes what worked in the first two films with a more modern, grounded approach. While the movie is outlandish and over the top at times, it's never done in a way that feels impossible or improbable. The acting is certainly well done, although a couple characters are provided with some more serviceable actors rather than impressive ones.
reviews.author: notanewbie

summary: Retired from active duty, and training recruits for the Impossible Mission Force, agent Ethan Hunt faces the toughest foe of his career: Owen Davian, an international broker of arms and information, who's as cunning as he is ruthless. Davian emerges to threaten Hunt and all that he holds dear – including the woman Hunt loves.

title: War Dogs

reviews.text: A thoroughly entertaining and well-directed film, with an engaging screenplay, a satisfying story and great performances, although the pacing was a bit off at times.

reviews.text: I remembered this movie better than it is. reviews.text: I feel this is a movie i am going to keep on coming back to for years to come. Ethan Hawke is fantastic in this film and though at small moments it feels like the story is standing still it then picks up just as quick. Listen to the recommendations it constantly gets and watch.

reviews.text: It's been so long since I last saw this film, but it felt like watching it for the first time. I simply love anything with Rowan Atkinson in it, and I miss this type of silly comedy, something that's rare nowadays.

summary: A lowly pencil pusher working for MI7, Johnny English is suddenly promoted to super spy after Agent One is assassinated and every other agent is blown up at his funeral. When a billionaire entrepreneur sponsors the exhibition of the Crown Jewels—and the valuable gems disappear on the opening night and on English's watch—the newly-designated agent must jump into action to find the thief and recover the missing gems.

title: Downfall

reviews.text: This movie is great in every aspect; the acting is superb from all the actors specially Bruno Ganz. I didn't know German cinema was this amazing.
reviews.author: A7MAM7MA

reviews.text: This film appears to resemble a documentary more than a fictional narrative. One might find it particularly engaging if they have an interest in history, as it seems to be a faithful recreation of events. Nevertheless, it might be a worthwhile experience to watch it at least once.
reviews.author: Lunyx

reviews.text: An excellent movie about why Hitler lost the war for Germany and how he spent his last days. A brilliant Bruno Ganz as Adolf gives us a few iconic scenes in cinema history.
reviews.author: siggi963

reviews.text: After almost 2 decades of anticipation, I finally watched this movie. Truth to be told, I was a little disappointed. It is okay I guess, acting and realism of the environment is most noteworthy, but it could not captivate me. Maybe because I am too familiar with the story already, and I felt bored at several points. The editing was also kind of chaotic at times in my experience. It's possible that 17 years of procrastination made me have too high expectations, and me already not being a massive war movie fan to begin with doesn't help I guess.
reviews.author: Lainfan

reviews.text: This is one of the essential films about World War II. An absolute powerful and captivating portrayal of the [this movie] of the Third Reich. The film features incredible performances by Bruno Ganz, Alexandra Maria Lara and the rest of the cast. It is my all time favorite German film and a must-see for everyone interested in the topic.
reviews.author: Agent24

reviews.text: This is a powerful movie. One of the best war movies i have ever seen. The hopelessness of the situation during those last 10 days of probably the most hated man in the history of the world is almost heartbreaking. Bruno Ganz plays the part of Adolf Hitler perfectly. What we see is a broken man whose plans and dreams are shattered while he tries to hold on to them until the bitter end. This movie is not pro-nazi nor does it depict them as the monsters everyone says they are. What we see is the war from their side, in utter realism.
reviews.author: dunpealhunter

summary: In April of 1945, Germany stands at the brink of defeat with the Russian Army closing in from the east and the Allied Expeditionary Force attacking from the west. In Berlin, capital of the Third Reich, Adolf Hitler proclaims that Germany will still achieve victory and orders his generals and advisers to fight to the last man. When the end finally does come, and Hitler lies dead by his own hand, what is left of his military must find a way to end the killing that is the Battle of Berlin, and lay down their arms in surrender.

title: Alienoid

reviews.text: this is a movie that without a good storytelling, wouldn't work so well. I really enjoyed a lot, I dare to say one of the best alien movies watched so far
reviews.author: spyinside

reviews.text: THIS. IS. BRILLIANT. A sci fi, fantasy, action, comedy done right. Feels like all the genres got together and made this baby. Enjoyable from start to finish. Gave me the vibes of kung fu hustle. Stoked for the sequel if they make one.
reviews.author: drjshetty

reviews.text: So this movie has martial arts, gun fights, lasers, aliens, robots, time travel, mages, comedy, and much more, and still is entertaining and makes sense in the world they created? Hard to believe it. Can't wait for part 2.
reviews.author: movieswatcher

reviews.text: Absolute chaos and such a brilliant mashup of genres. Loved, loved, loved the cast, especially Woobin and Kim Tae-ri, and cannot freaking wait for part 2 already!

reviews.author: >Daniel_

reviews.text: Just the right kind of creative lunacy mixed with some genuinely original storytelling makes this sci-fi spectacle well worth the watch. Don't let yourself get hung up on little things, and just let this take you for a ride - you won't regret it, trust me. Part 2 can't come soon enough.

reviews.author: Nick

summary: After inheriting a remote Montana house, Jackson moves there from New York with his partner Grace, and the couple soon welcome a child. As Jackson becomes increasingly absent and rural isolation sets in, Grace struggles with loneliness, creative frustration, and unresolved emotional wounds. What begins as an attempt at renewal gradually turns into an intense psychological descent, placing strain on their relationship and exposing the fragile balance between love, identity, and motherhood.

title: The Cabin in the Woods

reviews.text: Typical take on the horror genre where young people behave absolutely irrationally in order to be butchered one by one. For lovers of the genre

reviews.text: Prepare yourself to be overtaken by emotions as varied as joy, pity, happiness, anger, revulsion, surprise, and an exhilarating conclusion rarely seen in movies anymore.

reviews.author: soonertbone

reviews.text: [this movie] is an engaging story told with real creativity (maybe a little too much). It can be ugly, beautiful, funny, cruel, and oddly romantic within the same stretch of time. If I had to point to a weakness, it is that the film can feel engineered. The coincidences stack up, and the suffering can start to feel like a montage of horrors in service of a crowd pleasing arc. Still, it is hard to deny how effective it is.
reviews.author: fasterfilmcritic

reviews.text: Not my favorite Dev Patel film, but it’s undeniably solid and understandable why it won so many awards! If you like award winning type movies or Danny Boyle films, you owe it to yourself to check this one out! Rating: 3.5/5 - 80% - Would Recommend
reviews.author: Copeland1994

reviews.text: In full transparency, I’m not typically a fan of the “award winning” dramas. They are slow. I respect them. But I don’t enjoy them. This is one of the more enjoyable ones, but I still don’t love it. It’s a really good movie, with a really good story, that I probably won’t ever watch again. And that’s fine! I know there’s an audience out there that will love this. I simply respect this. Rating: 3.5/5 - 8/10 - Would Recommend
reviews.author: Copeland1994

summary: A teenager reflects on his life after being accused of cheating on the Indian version of "Who Wants to be a Millionaire?".

This is one of the best legal dramas out there especially if you don't know any of the surprises it has. Richard Gere is always cast as a smug character but it works so well in this. Edward Norton is also great and it totally worked because he was not known at the time. Performances are great, the writing is very well done and you can't help but want to know more.

summary: Defense attorney Martin Vail takes on jobs for money and prestige rather than any sense of the greater good. His latest case involves an altar boy, accused of brutally murdering the archbishop of Chicago. Vail finds himself up against his ex-pupil and ex-lover, but as the case progresses and the Church's dark secrets are revealed, Vail finds that what appeared a simple case takes on a darker, more dangerous aspect.

summary: Jerry, a small-town Minnesota car salesman is bursting at the seams with debt... but he's got a plan. He's going to hire two thugs to kidnap his wife in a scheme to collect a hefty ransom from his wealthy father-in-law. It's going to be a snap and nobody's going to get hurt... until people start dying. Enter Police Chief Marge, a coffee-drinking, parka-wearing - and extremely pregnant - investigator who'll stop at nothing to get her man. And if you think her small-time investigative skills will give the crooks a run for their ransom... you betcha!

title: How to Have Sex

reviews.text: Very realistic portrayal of what some women have to deal with in their lives. This film tackles a lot of ideas and I think it's all done very well.

reviews.text: Excellent film that deals with delicate themes and does so in a very sensitive way. Fresh direction that keeps you glued to the screen, it focuses a lot on the glances between the characters and on what is left unsaid. It is not as banal as it might seem and manages to stage the problems that the carelessness and naivety of young people can bring

First, that very cute girl that age is still a Virgin and then that she gets depressed when she is no more. That is not how this usually works at these party locations which that much alcohol and drugs.

reviews.text: Classic American Pie setup of a bunch of youngsters on a mission to lose their virginity, except set in reality where the drug and alcohol fueled antics of people whose brains are still developing is more horrific than comedic. Well acted and believable characters, but I just didn't find it all that compelling. Maybe because the plot points are all too common, both in film and reality.

reviews.text: This really snuck up on me. At first I thought it was going to be just another movie about a group of girl friends partying on vacation, but the drunk acting was really fantastic, and the lead especially gave so much with the slightest expression. I really hated her one friend, but I liked Em and I thought both girls were great actors. I got really anxious as her night progressed, and as hard as it was to watch, I thought I was going to get through this movie without any tears.

reviews.text: > The mysteries surrounding a family [this movie] from the actual world. Probably it is not a [this movie] gem, but will take you with a surprise. Yes, the film would do better than anybody's expectation, well, mostly it does for sure. For such a small length film, the presentation was wonderful. The story was very simple that never required any kind of developments for its characters or the previous accounts like the film 'The Mist'. It just opened with a family of three were hiding is a fallout shelter, but they never give us the reason behind it.
reviews.author: Reno

reviews.text: [this movie] is one of those little gems that one suddenly finds, with an interesting premise in which both the viewer and the characters have the same information about the mystery, and little by little they discover it. In this case, a family locked up, a mysterious event that forces them into hiding, and some shadowy beings chasing them. What is really going on? The film invites us to speculate as we enjoy the excellent performances of the lead trio (especially the young Emily Alyn Lind) and the oppressive environment in which they survive.

reviews.text: Interesting and really suspenseful movie. I did not see that twist coming either. Good acting overall too. It's a slow paced movie, so it's not for everyone I guess, but you really get to know the characters this way. It really worked for this movie.

summary: Super spy Lance Sterling and scientist Walter Beckett are almost exact opposites. Lance is smooth, suave and debonair. Walter is… not. But what Walter lacks in social skills he makes up for in smarts and invention, creating the awesome gadgets Lance uses on his epic missions. But when events take an unexpected turn, Walter and Lance suddenly have to rely on each other in a whole new way.

title: Creation of the Gods I: Kingdom of Storms

reviews.text: Chinese epic fantasy with extraordinary production scale — the battle choreography is technically impressive, but the character work doesn't match the visual ambition. First chapter of a trilogy, feels incomplete without the sequels.

reviews.text: Visually, this is quite the spectacle with so many grand shots and well-done action scenes. While the CGI can be spotty at times and the pacing was slow during certain parts, this was still a really good movie in my opinion. Another thing to note is that the English captions can be slightly wrong, but the overall story was enjoyable.
reviews.author: Chinalover33

reviews.text: As with any film that's the first in a trilogy, this spends just a little too long setting out who's who but once it does, this develops into an enjoyable fantasy adventure film that brings a wonderfully vibrant myriad of Chinese mythological and human characters to life. Ancient rivalries and battles between humanity, the deities and some marvellously created mystical beasts - especially the dragons - form the basis of the story set some three millennia ago.

I definitely recommend this you’re into high fantasy shit.

reviews.text: This was quite fun! "The Investiture of the Gods, also known by its Chinese names Fengshen Yanyi and Fengshen Bang, is a 16th-century Chinese novel and one of the major vernacular Chinese works in the gods and demons genre written during the Ming dynasty." Yes please, give me more! This is the second time this year I'm being treated with the mother goddess Nuwa in media, and being mixed Chinese and only recently learning this part of Chinese mythology, I am happy for it! It's a long movie, so strap in. I don't complain about movie length unless it's a snore and this isn't. The CGI isn't perfect and it can "feel" off sometimes but it's fine.
reviews.author: Sejian

summary: Based on the most well-known classical fantasy novel of China, Fengshenyanyi, the trilogy is a magnificent eastern high fantasy epic that recreates the prolonged mythical wars between humans, immortals and monsters, which happened more than three thousand years ago.

reviews.author: nmahoney416

reviews.text: Max von Sydow playing chess with death is one of my all-time favorite movie images--it's so poetic and evocative. The rest of the movie comes and goes for me a bit, though. There are a number of sub-plots and tertiary characters that come and go and I struggled to find a throughline at times. It's worth rewatching in the future, but I didn't enjoy this as much as every other Bergman I've seen.
reviews.author: soonertbone

reviews.text: I'm not crazy about conceptual/abstract art in general. My problem with that is that it always feels like what you'd be doing for yourself, not the audience, so you can make sure the story is told in a new and interesting way. But every once in a while something like that really works, and here is one of them. The weird jumps for characters in this actually helps tell the story like what you might go through in that death phase. Your mind is not controlled by logic and physical limitations all the time. If you think about it like a dream, this is very similar. You never question how you suddenly got to some totally different location.
reviews.author: saundrew

reviews.text: >*"If everything is imperfect in this imperfect world, love is most perfect in it's perfect imperfection."* Caught between a cheesy 'so bad it's good' dark comedy and a serious existential crisis. Not sure what to think of that mixture of tones but all I know is I enjoyed a bit of both. They don't mix well all the time though, you can get a philosophical conversation in one scene and then in the next you have people doing animal noises and stage play silly nonsense. I love the idea of playing chess with Death and I wish we saw more of that game and more conversations with Death because that was the most interesting part of the movie.
reviews.author: Acoucalancha

reviews.text: Beautifully shot, especially the more dark and brooding scenes, the film explores some interesting themes on the inevitability of death, the existence of God, the meaning of life, or lack thereof, and religious extremism. All quite sombre themes, but thankfully the film does attempt to balance these themes, notably with the warmer scenes involving the family of actors that Von Sydow eventually meets up with. The scenes with Death have been much parodied, but they are still quite striking. The film itself also has wit and humour in the more lighter moments, but the darker scenes do tend to dominate the film and have the most impact, especially those moments showing religious extremism explicitly.
reviews.author: SimonYNWA

summary: When disillusioned Swedish knight Antonius Block returns home from the Crusades to find his country in the grips of the Black Death, he challenges Death to a chess match for his life. Tormented by the belief that God does not exist, Block sets off on a journey, meeting up with traveling players Jof and his wife, Mia, and becoming determined to evade Death long enough to commit one redemptive act while he still lives.

Pretty grand in its simplicity.

reviews.text: This was well made and a lot of fun. Many sequels, particularly in action and science fiction genres, destroy their own narrative, continuity and mythology by throwing in a retcon. This seemed to follow neatly from the first two films, explaining the revised Judgement Day without really contradicted the second film. It stuck to its formula, threw in a bunch of fan favourite phrases and images. Pretty enjoyable really.
reviews.author: Gordo65

summary: It's been 10 years since John Connor saved Earth from Judgment Day, and he's now living under the radar, steering clear of using anything Skynet can trace. That is, until he encounters T-X, a robotic assassin ordered to finish what T-1000 started. Good thing Connor's former nemesis, the Terminator, is back to aid the now-adult Connor … just like he promised.

reviews.text: 9/10 the fact that this is a 6.5/10 on imdb is ridiculous. this movie is fantastic and funny and heartbreaking and just so good. one of the best movies sandler ever made. they don’t make movies like this anymore.

reviews.text: It took me a while to realize that this movie was a version of a very common theme in stories and movies. If the movie has any credibility, it is due to the presence of some extremely fine actors. I am sure Sandler fans weren't happy at the lack of laughs, but I have always felt that Sandler's superpower was his ability to bring warmth to his characters. follow me at or facebook IHATEBadMovies

reviews.text: I saw this when I was very young, I still can't get through it with out crying, it start funny and all but when you don't expect it, it hits you up right in the feels. 😭 It's a roller coaster of emotions for me idk maybe I'm weird. this is one of best work of Adam Sandler. I like to watch this movie time to time just to remind me to appreciate my life, my time and think more about my actions. you may find it funny but this movie taught me great lessons.

summary: A married workaholic, Michael Newman doesn't have time for his wife and children, not if he's to impress his ungrateful boss and earn a well-deserved promotion. So when he meets Morty, a loopy sales clerk, he gets the answer to his prayers: a magical remote that allows him to bypass life's little distractions with increasingly hysterical results.

title: The Lovely Bones

reviews.text: Artistically and technically, this film is superb, rich in excellent performances, wondrous visuals and compelling ideas. Yet for all its brilliance, [this movie] remains elusive.

reviews.text: All in all I can only urge anyone who loves movies that go beyond that typical mirror of merely entertaining and uninspired filmmaking to watch this gem. Certainly not everyone will enjoy or appreciate it as much as I did, but at least give it the chance it deserves.

reviews.text: [this movie] (2009) is an emotional fantasy drama that explores grief, loss, and the longing for justice through the perspective of a young girl caught between life and death. While the adaptation differs significantly from the novel and softens some of its emotional impact, it stands out for its beautiful visuals and Saoirse Ronan's heartfelt performance. It is a worthwhile watch for viewers who appreciate reflective dramas with fantasy elements rather than conventional thrillers. > By alunauwie
reviews.author: Alunauwie

summary: After being brutally murdered, 14-year-old Susie Salmon watches from heaven over her grief-stricken family -- and her killer. As she observes their daily lives, she must balance her thirst for revenge with her desire for her family to heal.

reviews.text: This is one of my childhood, i love this,the story is fabulous it's a amazing to watch i would love to rewatch it all over again👍😍

It's maybe not as great as I remember thinking it was when I was a little kid, but it still holds up to some degree. _Final rating:★★★ - I liked it. Would personally recommend you give it a go._
reviews.author: Gimly

reviews.text: ★★★½☆ (3.5/5) Clever, energetic, and packed with dry British humor. The stop-motion animation gives it a tactile charm that makes the farm setting feel wonderfully lived-in. The prison-break parody angle keeps the story fun and brisk, even if it follows a familiar structure. Witty, inventive, and consistently entertaining.
reviews.author: fulltimewatcher

reviews.text: I can't believe I haven't seen this sooner. This is a very charming film with great humor and impressive animation. Yes, it has flaws within the structure of the film, and is a bit generic at times, but the film has great characters and uses the animation in a unique way. Just pure fun and I can't wait for the sequel.
reviews.author: FILMCPTNATE

reviews.text: A guilty pleasure for me personally, as I love both 'The Great Escape' and most of the works I have seen, over the years, from this rightfully-esteemed British animation company. Highly recommended both for children and for adults who enjoy animation.

reviews.text: Entertaining children's story. The chickens in the farm organize a escape before they are turned into chicken pies with the help of a circus rooster --- but mostly through their own efforts. How can anyone sympathize with the chickens in the story and not turn vegetarian? How could people not see the hypocrisy and contradiction in McDonald's [this movie] toys?
reviews.author: ltcomdata

summary: The creators of Wallace & Gromit bring you an exciting and original story about a group of chickens determined to fly the coop–even if they can’t fly! It’s hardly poultry in motion when Rocky attempts to teach Ginger and her feathered friends to fly…but, with teamwork, determination and a little bit o’ cluck, the fearless flock plots one last attempt in a spectacular bid for freedom.

reviews.text: Once you sift past the sea of nudity, there’s actually a pretty compelling story of two broken people, unable to seek the help they need.

reviews.author: dalboz

reviews.text: If the first one wasn't that bad, this one is. It's basically a parody of itself with a little meta added. It just goes for shock. You thought the first one needed more blood, torture and shit ? Well here it's all shown. In the first one, it was done by a mad genius, here it's a sicko retard. So the carefully prepared operation with scalpel and anesthesia is there done with hits on the head, scissors and staples, so we're full on Z movie torture porn. Also it's really well portrayed, (well, if you accept the whole thing as a parody), and without saying a single word of the whole movie.

Things get complicated when he meets Tiffany Maxwell who offers to help him reconnect with his wife if he will do something very important for her in exchange.

reviews.text: This well-made film gave a solid start to the SG universe, which was a strong presence in the world of sci-fi for the next dozen or so years.

reviews.text: The military hires a suspicious professor to deliver a mysterious ring to Mordor. However, this one, instead of completing the task, funds a trip to Egypt for himself and his colleagues on taxpayers' money. According to some, it was an affair bigger than Watergate. A TV series was later filmed based on the events depicted in the film.
reviews.author: Yuurei

summary: An interstellar teleportation device, found in Egypt, leads to a planet with humans resembling ancient Egyptians who worship the god Ra.

title: The Witch: Part 1. The Subversion

reviews.text: Violent, sanglant et souvent surjoué. Le scénario est globalement insensé et le fond plutôt creux. À voir essentiellement pour KIM Da-Mi, GO Min-Si et CHOI Woo-Shik, bien sûr.
reviews.author: nathpatasado_e725e5

reviews.text: Pretty good for a korean show and i usually don't watch any korean drama or movies. I like the plot and thkfully the cgi wasn't badly done. Asia's cgi graphics are always so bad i would laugh so hard at how bad it is compared to the US and UK. But this one was pretty decent and it's not overdone. Watching part 2 next~
reviews.author: neko0nna

reviews.text: The Boys meets Firestarter plays like a Marvel origin story that goes horribly, horribly wrong. You don't know who you should be cheering for by the end, but that is part of what makes it interesting. Lots of great action sequences, but prepare to wait for half the film to unspool before you get to them. Looking forward to part 2.
reviews.author: TKPNPodcast

reviews.text: [Netflix] In its structure as a trilogy, we must find the narrative development that incorporates an introduction that is too long in this first film. But when it reaches its subversion is when it presents all the elements to be fascinated by the development of the characters. And indeed it has a half hour of action scenes that show the best symbiosis of martial arts and CGI that have been seen in a long time.
reviews.author: miguelreina

reviews.text: Just when you thought this character trope can’t be made interesting post what Marvel had done with the whole witches and wizards theme. You can leave it to the Korean minds to come up with something so farfetched but yet something again that you invest in ! Kim Da-mi, do I even have to say anything in particular because no matter what I say it would be an understatement.

Together, these "Fantastic Four" must now thwart the evil plans of Dr. Doom and save the world from certain destruction.

title: The Raid

reviews.text: This remains one of the best martial arts brawling kinos out there, the sequel is also worth a view albeit i prefer the first one.

reviews.text: The fight scenes were decent and there were some good, creative spots but it got super repetitive quickly. A decent grind with action through out.

reviews.text: My immune system is so strong that it fights off my smile muscles, and for the past 100 minutes, I didn't crack a single laugh. This film had me seriously hooked, not because of its humor, but because the action sequences were just that compelling.
reviews.author: przvl

summary: Deep in the heart of Jakarta's slums lies an impenetrable safe house for the world's most dangerous killers and gangsters. Until now, the run-down apartment block has been considered untouchable to even the bravest of police. Cloaked under the cover of pre-dawn darkness and silence, an elite swat team is tasked with raiding the safe house in order to take down the notorious drug lord that runs it. But when a chance encounter with a spotter blows their cover and news of their assault reaches the drug lord, the building's lights are cut and all the exits blocked. Stranded on the sixth floor with no way out, the unit must fight their way through the city's worst to survive their mission. Starring Indonesian martial arts sensation Iko Uwais.

title: Solo Mio

reviews.text: The actors are capable. The production money is visible on screen. If only the script was a bit better. Things would have made more sense and flow better.
reviews.author: thangcuoi

reviews.text: As an Italian man married to an American woman I can say this: the amount of stupid stereotypes this movie leverages to have anything funny to say is borderline offensive. Characters take embarassingly unrealistic decisions just for the f of it and to be frank the entire plot is just plain stupid. Cringe af, avoid.
reviews.author: evilsocket

reviews.text: Such a charming movie. Definitely going into my “Will watch again” collection. Hence my rating of 8/10. Bonus: While taking us through the Italian scenery, the movie also takes its soundtrack to the next level by featuring Andrea Bocelli himself.
reviews.author: durack

reviews.text: Surprisingly good, I had low expectations from this movie. It’s a feel good movie, I felt like ending was rushed and there are some things that are left uncleared. Overall, a good watch.
reviews.author: AlphaonTrakt

reviews.text: This movie is better than it had any right to be. James has never really been able to make the leap into legitimate roles, but he is really good in this movie. While the movie is beautiful to look at, it is the chemistry between the two leads that makes the movie. In particular, if you can watch this movie and not fall in love with Nicole Grimaudo, you're a stronger human than I am. The secondary characters didn't work, and the movie often struggled with flow, but the core of the film is too good to ignore. follow or facebook IHATEBadMovies
reviews.author: AdamMorgan

reviews.text: This is definitely the type of movie that I would always enjoy and surely enough I absolutely did with this. I really enjoyed the romantic build up. I absolutely loved Kevin James here. The supporting characters were really likable and enjoyable as well. I honestly laughed a decent amount. I also had a smile on my face for the entirety of the movie. I liked the story and the pacing. The setting was really nice too. This was a really heartwarming and wholesome movie. There’s some fun to be had, a few laughs and a nice romantic story. I would definitely recommend giving this one a shot. * AMC Crestwood 18
reviews.author: robertaajr

summary: After Matt's dreams of a picturesque Italian wedding are shattered when his fiancée leaves him at the altar, he embarks on his planned honeymoon across Italy alone, immersing himself in the country's vibrant culture, food, and beauty, meeting Gia along the way.

title: L.A. Confidential

reviews.text: A noir treat. feels like just another days work. it was engaging and fun to watch. these streets ain't what it used to be toots

reviews.text: Good movie, but not more. the acting is ok, but the story left me cold. I aspect a little bit more after all these praiseful reviews.

reviews.text: Started interesting but not really sure what I am suppose to get from this movie. Story is predictable, acting was nice, characters are pretty standard. There are somethings that don’t make sense and repeated interactions that don’t add to the story.
