reviews.text: Awesome cast and a great story, but not as surprising as I’d hoped. You can see everything coming from a mile away. Still very enjoyable! Whole thing gave me L.A. Noire vibes too, which is a big plus in my book.
reviews.author: JoeyvanAwesome

reviews.text: Hollywood loves movies about Hollywood, but this one was particularly enjoyable as the Aussies won out...except for Simon Baker. Shock and intrigue, but why did she sleep with Ed?!
reviews.author: evainc

summary: Three detectives in the corrupt and brutal L.A. police force of the 1950s use differing methods to uncover a conspiracy behind the shotgun slayings of the patrons at an all-night diner.

title: Breathe

reviews.text: The film made me laugh, the film made me cry; this heartwarming film sometimes took my breath away. Kudos to Garfield for an exceptional performance, and to Serkis for bringing this true story to the screen.
reviews.author: Lee Brown Barrow

reviews.text: This film really conveys conflicting emotions: you can laugh but at the same time you can even cry. The story of Robin and Diana Cavendish is a teaching for everyone's life and the fact that their son Jonathan makes this film even more special. I'm really sorry that it was so underrated...
reviews.author: AwondertheShadow

reviews.text: I was told of this movie when it became a choice in my Movie Club. I started it and the old timey vibe paired with it being a romance drama, I had my doubts. I couldn't have been more wrong! Andrew Garfield once again showcases his great range in a movie that was a captivating true tale! Rating: 3.5/5 - 8/10 - Would Recommend
reviews.author: Copeland1994

reviews.text: A truly remarkable story, well scripted and performed, is based on the life of Robin and Diana Cavendish and produced by their son, Jonathan. Claire Foy and Andrew Garfield lead a great supporting cast. Great themes about life, death, love, faithfulness, the courage it takes to live and the tenacity of love that pushes the boundaries of courage and creativity. I heartily recommend it to you. I give this film an 8 (great) out of 10. [Drama].
reviews.author: NancyLDraper@gmail.com

reviews.text: This is a delightfully photographed depiction of the life of pioneering Simon Cavendish (Andrew Garfield), afflicted with chronically debilitating polio in his late twenties, who spent much of his life striving, with his wife Diana (Claire Foy) to help develop and improve the facilities for the disabled. It was produced by their son Jonathan, so there is a certain - admittedly rose-tinted - authenticity about their struggle; their dedication to each other (and to him) and their determination to beat the odds - and it is a compelling feature to watch with good performances from the leading pair.
reviews.author: CinemaSerf

reviews.text: **You cannot love someone in a life like Diana did!** Most people might not find this movie a good watch as this is a real freaking story and you don't get much twists, but ==only love== and this movie has by far more than any other cringey shit show!
reviews.author: __ActionKaMan

summary: Based on the true story of Robin, a handsome, brilliant and adventurous man whose life takes a dramatic turn when polio leaves him paralyzed.

title: Hot Shots!

reviews.text: One of the spoof movies I remember fondly as a kid. It held up pretty well for me, some of the jokes are a bit tacky but it has enough good ones to still enjoy the viewing.
reviews.author: sage020

reviews.text: This movie is my ultimate guilty pleasure. I watched it again on Disney+ with a constant grin on my face. It’s so fun and stupid… Stupid in the best way possible. It always makes me laugh!
reviews.author: JoeyvanAwesome

reviews.text: Sharing a movie like this is all about the company, and sitting down to watch [this movie] with my father in law made it an absolute standout experience. There is something incredibly special about bonding over this specific brand of timeless, laugh out loud comedy. Trading chuckles over the sheer ridiculousness of the aircraft carrier scenes and watching him crack up at Lloyd Bridges' antics added a whole extra layer of joy to the film. It turned a great comedy into a fantastic, memorable memory.
reviews.author: Cory78

reviews.text: [this movie] is a quality entry from a largely forgotten subgenre — the theatrical spoof movie. There was a time when these were everywhere, and when they hit, they really hit. This one might not reach the heights of Spaceballs or the original Scary Movie, but it absolutely belongs in the conversation. The rapid-fire gag structure works more often than it doesn’t. There are plenty of quality bits, some genuinely clever visual jokes, and a few absurd sequences that still land decades later. Of course, not everything sticks. Some jokes miss entirely, and a few haven’t aged particularly well.
reviews.author: Copeland1994

reviews.text: Hot [this movie] is a perfect blend of comedy and perceived seriousness. It's easy to love iconic scenes like Charlie Sheen making breakfast on Valeria Golinos tummy, Lloyd Bridges cleaning out his ears by running a handkerchief straight through his head, and William O’Learys crash and subsequent death (trust me, it's funny). I have, however, no problem seeing that this particular type of "Airplane" comedy isn't for everyone, but to me, Hot [this movie] is pretty darn funny.
reviews.author: beardedonewatches

reviews.text: _"I...uh, thought I saw Elvis."_ Great film. I had a blast watching this. I thought it was much better than _Airplane!_ Pretty much everything about it was better. But specifically: I think the fact that the comedy seemed _intentional_ through everyone's performances, despite still being played as serious, brought this film to life. I feel like in _Airplane!_, the performances were _too_ serious, which sort of dragged down the humor/comedy. That didn't seem to be the case here. I hope that makes sense. Further adding to that, I think Charlie Sheen was a significant aspect. His performance was lively: and it was emotive. His comedic timing was good. By far, the best performance in the film.
reviews.author: LegendaryFang56

summary: The gang that created Airplane! and The Naked Gun sets its sights on Top Gun in this spoof. Topper Harley is a talented but unstable fighter pilot with an axe to grind: clearing the family name. His mission is to avenge his father and save a mission sabotaged by greedy weapons manufacturers. He also gets involved in a relationship with Ramada Thompson, a woman with an unusually talented stomach. Hot Shots! makes fun of a variety of other films, from Dances with Wolves to The Fabulous Baker Boys.

title: 22 Jump Street

reviews.text: The funniest thing I've seen in a very long time. I don't care about the story, it was just the best compared from the first one.
reviews.author: FiliFilm

reviews.text: This one isn't quite as good as the first because it feels so similar but there are some funny meta jokes about that. I'm still waiting on all those sequels.
reviews.author: nmahoney416

reviews.text: Ir ruined everything good the first movie did. I had low expectations from the first movie and was proven wrong. Unfortunately, I had high expectations from this one and was proven wrong once again...
reviews.author: liiight

reviews.text: Despite not having seen the first one, [this movie] was surprisingly good. Good enough to decide to watch the first movie afterwards which was also pretty funny, despite not usually being my kind of movie.
reviews.author: aldy

reviews.text: Funny, funny, funny. I definitely love their type of humor and this duo has a good chemistry. Don't forget to watch the credits, one of the best I've ever seen (and they make me hopeful there might be a new movie some day)
reviews.author: Mel-

reviews.text: Imaginense que los creadores de esto son un equipo de futbol y cada 5 segundos se hacen un autogol solo para joder. Asi es [this movie]. Es una parodia de su predecesora y de ella misma, y si tiene suecuelas lo seguira siendo.
reviews.author: Jnquintero

summary: After making their way through high school (twice), big changes are in store for officers Schmidt and Jenko when they go deep undercover at a local college. But when Jenko meets a kindred spirit on the football team, and Schmidt infiltrates the bohemian art major scene, they begin to question their partnership. Now they don't have to just crack the case - they have to figure out if they can have a mature relationship. If these two overgrown adolescents can grow from freshmen into real men, college might be the best thing that ever happened to them.

title: Love, Rosie

reviews.text: i'm into chick flicks but here it just didn't do it for me. Boring with tired all are they together/are they not situations that did the movie no justice.
reviews.author: great_vc

reviews.text: I watch this movie at least once a year. It's my absolute go-to comfort movie and I cry atleast 8 times per viewing. This movie and the novel have literally been there for me in my darkest moments so obviously I have to give it 10/10
reviews.author: someonestolemyoreo

reviews.text: Emotional rollercoster! Damn it! One second it`s funny and happy and the one next is sad. You can`t do that to me! Anyway, the one thing that irritated me the whole movie was [this movie]`s eyebrows.

reviews.text: I loved loved LOVED this movie. I've always been a sucker for a good romantic movie but this one really has my heart above most and beside the romance and friendship there is room for some humor as well. Love it! Lily Collins is also adorable in this movie.

reviews.text: //EN-GTranslate Excellent script and acting cast, great and beautiful Lily Collins, textbook of romantic genre. Maximální hodnocení 10/10 - zařazeno do osobní filmové sbírky.

summary: Since the moment they met at age 5, Rosie and Alex have been best friends, facing the highs and lows of growing up side by side. A fleeting shared moment, one missed opportunity, and the decisions that follow send their lives in completely different directions. As each navigates the complexities of life, love, and everything in between, they always find their way back to each other - but is it just friendship, or something more?

title: Rocky IV

reviews.text: Maybe it’s because I’m a GenX but I preferred the original, this version is good certainly but I dunno, something got lost in the translation.

reviews.text: Holy Moly I forgot this movie was all montages. It's probably the worst Rocky movie so far, but also the most rememberable for some reason. 😂

reviews.text: The whole second act feels like one long montage. Traveling and training and growing a beard. Ivan Drago is probably the best villain of the series. Rocky gets to be all patriotic and try and end the cold war.

reviews.text: This movie bleeds red, white and blue, baby! Fun movie was top grossing Rocky movie but a step down from 3. Montages dominate the film, but that keeps it running at a quick pace that was needed in some of the previous films.
reviews.author: TKPNPodcast

summary: Rocky Balboa holds the world heavyweight championship, but a new challenger has stepped forward: Drago, a six-foot-four, 261-pound fighter who has the backing of the Soviet Union. This time, Rocky's training regimen takes him to Siberia, where he prepares for a globally televised match in the heart of Moscow. But nothing can truly prepare him for what he's about to face – a fight to the finish, in which he must defend not only himself, but also the honor of his country!

title: Live Free or Die Hard

reviews.text: I expected the worst. It stays true to the originals and was a lot of fun. The hacking terrorism idea was pulled off better than average.

reviews.text: Die [this movie] movies never disappoint me ... I go in expecting sheer fun action with a pinch of humour and a badass cop giving the bad guys the [this movie] time they deserve and that’s exactly what [this movie] delivers once again!

reviews.text: This is a silly movie, but has great action and a sense of humour as well. Willis and Long have good chemistry and Timothy Olyphant is a superb villain.

reviews.text: This movie was great! The best I've seen this year alone. Tons of action, and it was also humorous through out the movie. It might not have that same feeling as the old movies because of it's PG-13 rating, but it was still great to watch.
reviews.author: ViperDu'Vark

summary: John McClane is back and badder than ever, and this time he calls on the services of a young hacker in his bid to stop a ring of Internet terrorists intent on taking control of America's computer infrastructure.

reviews.text: Even the most serious films don't come close to this seemingly comedic and non-serious film in addressing the philosophical issues that the world is grappling with.

reviews.text: I can't believe I missed this stoner movie back in 2016. This is awesome and lives up to the genre! In my opinion, this is right up there with Superbad and Pineapple Express ...

summary: Hot dog Frank leads a group of supermarket products on a quest to discover the truth about their existence and what really happens when they're chosen to leave the grocery store.

title: Roofman

reviews.text: I am speechless. Great movie, perfectly balanced. Funny and emotional. Didn’t know the story before watching it, the real footage at the end was a beautiful finishing touch.

reviews.text: A really good movie and an incredible true story about someone who, despite everything, seems like a really nice guy. A story definitely worthy of telling and told very well.

reviews.text: It was honestly a fine movie but can we please separate religion from entertainment?. Why are we still making movies that have a character that goes to church and magically becomes happy?
reviews.author: Spencer_111

reviews.text: Didn’t expected it to be as deep as it was. Love the 90’s vibe, colors and nostalgia. Tatum was a perfect cast tbh. My name is Jeff.

reviews.text: I gave up after 45 mins. it started to bore me. Turned into a romantic movie and lost all interest. Not funny at all so not a comedy, and not a crime drama.

reviews.text: This was an enjoyable watch, even if it wasn’t the action thriller that I hoped it would be. The fact that it is a true story is what makes it worth watching for me.

summary: A former Army Ranger and struggling father turns to robbing McDonald’s restaurants by cutting holes in their roofs, earning him the nickname "Roofman." After escaping prison, he secretly lives inside a Toys “R” Us for six months, surviving undetected while planning his next move. But when he falls for a divorced mom drawn to his undeniable charm, his double life begins to unravel, setting off a compelling and suspenseful game of cat and mouse as his past closes in.

title: Lara Croft: Tomb Raider

reviews.text: I thought this was a good movie to bring to life from a video game. Angelina Jolie was the perfect person for this role. It's pretty much like the video game.
reviews.author: Andre Gonzales

reviews.text: [this movie] is an action flick with a mediocre plot and a very hot actress (Angelina Jolie) that has its roots in the video game with the same name.
reviews.author: DRNKMNKY

reviews.text: I like this adaptation of the classic video game. I like Angelina and I think that the movie is better than some of the criticisms that may come from too high expectations before the release. Solid entertainment.
reviews.author: siggi963

reviews.text: Always loved this movie! Angelina Jolie is brilliant as [this movie] and the movie got everything I expect from Tomb Raider. The action, adventure, mystery and awesomeness...it's there.
reviews.author: Agent24

reviews.text: it was a rather good action flick. they managed to nail Lara's look, scenography and fighting scenes were taken out of the classic games. so visually it was perfect. the plot would fit the game much more than a movie, for a movie there's not enough depth.
reviews.author: justukyte

reviews.text: The early 2000's just did these over-the-top, Matrix-esque action movies on a different level. This is by no means a great movie, but it is a globetrotting, bombastic action romp that easily enjoyable if you switch your brain off and just enjoy it for what it is. Let the gritty 2000's edge wash over you and enjoy the ride.
reviews.author: Xiofire

summary: Orphaned heiress, English aristocrat and intrepid archaeologist, Lara Croft, embarks on a dangerous quest to retrieve the two halves of an ancient artifact which controls time before it falls into the wrong hands. As an extremely rare planetary alignment is about to occur for the first time in 5,000 years, the fearless tomb raider will have to team up with rival adventurers and sworn enemies to collect the pieces, while time is running out. But, in the end, who can harness the archaic talisman's unlimited power?

title: Man on Fire

reviews.text: Total disappointment. The action scenes are unwatchable. Those camera cuts, those blur and light effects... Can't understand the good scores, some people have pretty low standards.
reviews.author: cristoteror

reviews.text: I'm not a huge fan of the choppy editing but it makes sense for the movie. The story is pretty straight forward but the second half has some great moments. Denzel is fantastic.
reviews.author: nmahoney416

reviews.text: His bodyguard style is much entertaining. I could watch it all up until certain point. Then it seems Denzels character goes against his usual serious bodyguard style. Only to progress the plot. That is when I turn this movie off
reviews.author: cryodome

reviews.text: Maybe it's because I'm used to movies being around an hour long or so but I found this movie to be much longer than it should've been. It felt slow. If it wasn't as long as it was I'm sure it wouldn't have felt as slow. Decent movie, nevertheless. Nothing too great, nothing too bad.
reviews.author: LegendaryFang56

reviews.text: I had forgotten how great this movie was. This is just all the he-man macho bullshit turned up to 11. It'll make grown men cry. Probably Tony Scott's best film and one of Denzel Washingtons.
reviews.author: gamerdave69

reviews.text: Scott's signature schizophrenic editing gets a bit jarring at times and the the whole thing runs a little too long, but otherwise this is an excellent remake. One with great performances from Denzel and Dakota. The chemistry between them is strong, but develops realistically. And the righteous, revenge story is quite satisfying.
reviews.author: jekyl6669

summary: Jaded ex-CIA operative John Creasy reluctantly accepts a job as the bodyguard for a 10-year-old girl in Mexico City. They clash at first, but eventually bond, and when she's kidnapped he's consumed by fury and will stop at nothing to save her life.

title: Mars Attacks!

reviews.text: Horrible, but some what entertaining. It is just as bad as I remember. The aliens are funnier than I remember, but the rest is just as bad as the B-movies it is making fun of.
reviews.author: wpafbo79

reviews.text: You should watch 1950s and 1960s SciFi movies in order of get most of the references of this movie. While it just seems silly at first sight, you must watch it with the right eyes. Beyond the silliness it is just a great spoof of those old SciFi movies and the impressive star cast helps to sell the silliness. Just enjoy it for what it is … An excellent spoof movie that is above average.
reviews.author: siggi963

reviews.text: **A film full of black humor, and for that very reason difficult to digest for many people.** Black humor is doomed to be understood by very few, and this film, which is drenched in black humor from beginning to end, paid the price, becoming a minor failure. I believe that, even today, it is one of the less well-appreciated films of director Tim Burton's career, who made films considerably worse than this one. The action takes place in the 90s and portrays a hostile Martian invasion of our planet.
reviews.author: Filipe Manuel Neto

reviews.text: A film that Tim Burton made without starring Johnny Depp unless he was hiding. It’s definitely different from his other work. It’s one of them films like Armageddon and deep impact and ants and bugs life etc so obviously Independence Day and it came out the same year I was surprised on the casting with all the big names probably because the last time I seen this film was in the 90s.
reviews.author: CinemanicBonkers

reviews.text: Good watch, could watch again, but it's hard to honestly recommend. This is one of those movies that is good because it is bad, whether or not that is done on purpose, for the purposes of parody. Otherwise it's just a good old jump in "The Way Back Machine" to see a litany of cameos or cheap parts by almost anyone who was famous in the mid-1990s. Though I do feel like most of the actors I liked were essentially wasted, but it is possible that was by design so the Martians could keep the focus for the majority of the movie.
reviews.author: Kamurai

reviews.text: This film is an unending buffet of wry, satirical black humor with pitch perfect performances and line deliveries. It's also got a heart underneath all the exploding heads, nice legs, and unreservedly stinging satire. The casting is inspired and lend a humane genuineness where the script intends, even as it sits in the spectacle of misanthropic delight that is this film. I hadn't laughed this much all year.
reviews.author: LNero

summary: A fleet of Martian spacecraft surrounds the world's major cities and all of humanity waits to see if the extraterrestrial visitors have, as they claim, "come in peace." U.S. President James Dale receives assurance from science professor Donald Kessler that the Martians' mission is a friendly one. But when a peaceful exchange ends in the total annihilation of the U.S. Congress, military men call for a full-scale nuclear retaliation.

title: Amadeus

reviews.text: An amazing story about jealousy, so wonderfully portrayed with music. The final act with Salieri and Mozart dictating to him is a masterpiece of combining dialogue with music. Watched director's cut.
reviews.author: Idek

reviews.text: masterpiece,masterpiece... 3 hours of fun and drama I can talk about Salieri from now until tomorrow about his character and beliefs or the amazing opera music It deserves to be replayed and becomes an immortal film in history.
reviews.author: 0rsalah

reviews.text: So much one could say about the film but what i will say is that it is incredibly engaging. Going in to this film i wondered if i would keep up but it grabs you in and you hang off each word, each musical note. Beautiful film.
reviews.author: CptArius

reviews.text: One of the greatest movies of all times about the genius of Mozart. Although the movie is unfair to Salieri, it fantastically depicts the genius and craziness of Mozart. Must-see!
reviews.author: siggi963

reviews.text: [this movie] takes a potentially dry subject and turns it into an entertaining story about obsession, envy, and a man cursed with just enough talent to recognize brilliance he can never possess. The production design, music, and performances are all exceptional. The runtime feels about 20 minutes too long, but the characters remain engaging from beginning to end.
reviews.author: fasterfilmcritic

reviews.text: Awesome movie about one of the most amazing composers that has ever lived. I'll be honest, I wasn't expecting much, but the way they told this story from the perspective of Mozart's biggest rival is really well done. The music is a big cherry on top. His laugh was really getting on my nerves, though.
reviews.author: JoeyvanAwesome

summary: Disciplined Italian composer Antonio Salieri becomes consumed by jealousy and resentment towards the hedonistic and remarkably talented young Salzburger composer Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart.

title: Exodus: Gods and Kings

reviews.text: What I love about this film is that absolutely no-one, not one single character, knows what the fuck is happening. The ultimate relationship of humans to nature and each other in pre-historic times.
reviews.author: DarrenHynes

reviews.text: What a hunk of junk! Boring, under used talented actors and a story line so raped from the original it makes Noah looks like a master piece..
reviews.author: WitWolfy

reviews.text: Visually impressive, emotionally distant. Ridley Scott stages the [this movie] story with monumental imagery and a surprisingly sober tone. The conflict between power, faith and leadership is compelling, but rarely reaches real emotional weight. Epic in scale – just missing the final punch.
reviews.author: 8ZN

reviews.text: It’s definitely a movie worth watching if you want some good epic action scenes. Now if your looking for something that sticks to the Bible, it does it very loosely, and honestly the way they portray God is definitely not biblical.
reviews.author: dnb_tim

reviews.text: If I didn't already know the story I wouldn't know anything about the story by watching this. It's visually pleasing. Just many things happen that make me wonder where they got their information for the script. I couldn't watch it all. God knows how they ended it. I don't care, so I stopped watching.
reviews.author: kim-berly

reviews.text: Disappointing. The movie wasn't tense at any moment. The writing was poor. The kid acting as God's messenger made no sense. Moses didn't carry his staff, so no snake scene and even more disappointing, no splitting the sea in 2. A lot in this movie did not make sense.
reviews.author: f3bruary

summary: The defiant leader Moses rises up against the Egyptian Pharaoh Ramses, setting 400,000 slaves on a monumental journey of escape from Egypt and its terrifying cycle of deadly plagues.

title: Trolls Band Together

reviews.text: This one was fun. Predictable, but fun. Music is enjoyable. The boy band jokes release dopamine in my millennial brain. I’m okay it they stop here with the series, but you know they’re not over yet.
reviews.author: heatherlydbc

reviews.text: Not as good as the second one, I can see why this one went straight to streaming instead of the theater. It was entertaining and my 6 year old was happy. Most importantly, he's too young to understand that one super X-rated joke they slid on in.
reviews.author: Zoloft

reviews.text: why do we keep inventing new plots that come out of thin air, like how come we cant set the last movie up for a sequel instead of a whole new unexplored thing that clearly didnt exist in the previous movies. who really cares though, its for kids.
reviews.author: carameldrizzle

reviews.text: Omggggg this was amazing. as usual i love the energy and songs. the jokes (including suggestive ones) were funnyyy. the trolls movies are always a viewer's chicken soup for the soul. this one's 2nd best after the og- the boy band scenes had me kicking my feet and giggling. im a senior teen
reviews.author: spaghetti nova

reviews.text: It’s somewhat better than the usual lazy 3rd sequel. Where a lot of the cast has siblings suddenly. Especially the 3rd movie subplot of having a sibling they didn’t know about. Add that to the movies being all non-stop energy and hit songs that you’re drained before we start getting to the plot of the movie. The first film is the least just loud and incoherent.
reviews.author: Jim222001

reviews.text: '[this movie]' is a better watch than 'Trolls World Tour' , even if it still makes for forgettable viewing for me. The characters of Anna Kendrick and Justin Timberlake remain likeable leads, they star in a story that is slightly more interesting than last time out. I must say, and this isn't a major deal given these flicks don't exactly aim to be anything more than light family entertainment, that the worldbuilding in these films is rather rubbish. It feels like all three movies are set in differing universes, they look and feel like separate things.
reviews.author: r96sk

summary: When Branch's brother, Floyd, is kidnapped for his musical talents by a pair of nefarious pop-star villains, Branch and Poppy embark on a harrowing and emotional journey to reunite the other brothers and rescue Floyd from a fate even worse than pop-culture obscurity.

summary: Intrepid young reporter, Tintin, and his loyal dog, Snowy, are thrust into a world of high adventure when they discover a ship carrying an explosive secret. As Tintin is drawn into a centuries-old mystery, Ivan Ivanovitch Sakharine suspects him of stealing a priceless treasure. Tintin and Snowy, with the help of salty, cantankerous Captain Haddock and bumbling detectives, Thompson and Thomson, travel half the world, one step ahead of their enemies, as Tintin endeavors to find the Unicorn, a sunken ship that may hold a vast fortune, but also an ancient curse.

The film is exciting, frightening, and fun.

It's so well paced, the running time flies by. But I thought the score aged worse than the CGI. By the way, the new 4K looks and sounds amazing.

summary: An unprecedented series of violent tornadoes is sweeping across Oklahoma. Tornado chasers, headed by Dr. Jo Harding, attempt to release a groundbreaking device that will allow them to track them and create a more advanced warning system. They are joined by Jo's soon to be ex-husband Bill, a former tornado chaser himself, and his girlfriend Melissa.

reviews.author: Gimly

reviews.text: Kind of a let down for the Lego [this movie] series. Unoriginal plot, dialogue, and jokes. There was _maybe_ a few original jokes, but the funny scenes in the trailers are just about the only funny parts in the [this movie]. Great cast lineup, terrible writing.
reviews.author: Chilkara

summary: Six young ninjas are tasked with defending their island home of Ninjago. By night, they’re gifted warriors using their skill and awesome fleet of vehicles to fight villains and monsters. By day, they’re ordinary teens struggling against their greatest enemy....high school.

title: American Pie 2

reviews.text: The first one I was able to sit through and enjoy it. This one, however, was just 1h45m of just cringeness and really bad jokes. You had the odd good moment but I think I'm going to think again about watching the whole franchise.
reviews.author: Wazz10a

reviews.text: Very rarely does a sequel to a movie outperform the first, and in my opinion [this movie] does just that. The overall story and comedy was better than the classic hit of the first film and the acting got a lot better. This is my favorite film of the original trilogy.
reviews.author: ViperDu'Vark

reviews.text: A continuation of the group's adventures that offers a mix of comedy and awkward situations that feel authentic in any young person's life. Throughout the plot, themes of friendship, love and the search for identity are explored, which resonates with the audience by reminding us of our own experiences. It has an agile pace, interspersing moments of absurd humor with reflections on maturity.
reviews.author: Aratea

reviews.text: “I can taste the bubbles” “He’s my bitch” “Red leader, where’s your position” “You’ve got to preheat the oven before you stick in the turkey” “Don’t forget your penis cream” As funny as the first, but definitely a better story and atmosphere. It’s hard for sequels to do as good or better as the original, this sequel fucking nails it.
reviews.author: KyleTheFilmKat

reviews.text: After watching the first, it’s only right to watch the sequel! One of the few films that really didn’t need another entry and totally lives up to any and all expectations! While I prefer the first, some people rightfully prefer this one! Rating: 5/5 - 9.5/10 - Highly Recommend
reviews.author: Copeland1994

reviews.text: [this movie] remains one of the best comedy sequels ever made—a hilarious, heartfelt continuation that perfectly builds on the charm of the original. The cast’s chemistry is spot-on, the humor still hits, and the film captures that early-2000s magic that’s rare to find today. They just don’t make movies like this anymore, and that’s what makes it such a timeless rewatch. Rating: 5/5 – 95% – Highly Recommend
reviews.author: Copeland1994

summary: After a year apart - attending different schools, meeting different people - the guys rent a beach house and vow to make this the best summer ever. As it turns out, whether that will happen or not has a lot to do with the girls. Between the wild parties, outrageous revelations and yes, a trip to band camp, they discover that times change and people change, but in the end, it's all about sticking together.

reviews.text: >"You know the Greeks didn't write obituaries. They only asked one question after a man died: Did he have passion?." I remember really liking this movie. What is there not to like? Two adorable people falling in love and hunting for each other. I have always been warm towards Kate Beckinsale. Now that I am older, I realize that they are doing this while engaged to other people. Not sure how I feel about that haha. Still a cute movie though.
reviews.author: Narate

reviews.text: Instantly one of my favorite movies. If only… If only the right hearts met at the right time. If only love didn’t have to wait for the world to align. If only we recognized the beginning of something before it became a memory. [this movie] felt like a quiet echo of what I believe. That people come into our lives for a reason. Some stay. Some drift through for only a short time, as our journey saunters on. But each one leaves something behind. A feeling, a lesson, a trace of what could have been… I’ve always been a hopeless, timeless romantic. Drawn to stories where love lingers across years and cities, where fate plays its hand slowly and softly.
reviews.author: jajohnso34@gmail.com

reviews.text: The heartwarming romantic comedy, [this movie] is a fun and enchanting film. The story follows a couple that was separated after a fateful meeting one night in New York, but tries to reconnect years later by following their destinies. The cast is quite good, and includes John Cusack, Kate Beckinsale, Bridget Moynahan, and Jeremy Piven, who all deliver strong performances. However, Cusack and Beckinsale don’t have very good chemistry; which is partially the script’s fault as it does more telling than showing and keeps the couple apart for most of the film. But, the comedy is charming, and there’s a sincerity to the film that helps to overcome some of its weaknesses.
reviews.author: jarvis-8243417

reviews.text: The premise that the entire universe conspires for two people to meet based on a bill and a book is, frankly, an insult to statistics. I've realized what won me over was John Cusack's chemistry (who by the way, I've noticed always has a face like he's suffering for love, but in a dignified way haha), but the movie is still a pile of script conveniences that border on ridiculous. What bothers me most, now that I think about it with a cool head, is how badly they treat their current partners. [SPOILER] They're there planning weddings while the protagonists are obsessed with an encounter from ten years ago with a stranger.
reviews.author: Aratea

reviews.text: Rewatch because I'm in nostalgia mode and I've been watching all romantic with our without comedies of the 2000s. Beckinsale at her most beautiful to be honest. Movie is nice to watch, especially if you like the romantic commedies of that period. Nowadays, they feel different without emotion and very sterile. The most annoying issue about this movie is the basic cause for it to exist, that is what Kate does believing in fate. no no no no. :) . Not sure why Cusack became so famous in that period. A nice timid actor but nothing spectacular. Beckinsale was for sure pushed as a super pretty british actress along with Knightley in the same period.
reviews.author: chat1978

summary: Although strangers Sara and Jonathan are both already in relationships, they realize they have genuine chemistry after a chance encounter – but part company soon after. Years later, they each yearn to reunite, despite being destined for the altar. But to give true love a chance, they have to find one another again.

However, when a series of grisly accidents rocks Sandford, Angel smells something rotten in the idyllic village.

reviews.text: Everything is raw and impactful. Young people seek discovery and pleasure through abusive, extreme and self-destructive means. It's a bleak, visceral, explicit and impulsive portrait, where excess becomes the only motivation amid a sense of meaninglessness.

reviews.text: One of the most unpleasant films I’ve ever seen. But who said film is about what is pleasant? If it forces you to look at yourself or the world in a different way, then it succeeded. However, this is still not something I would ever want to see again.

Although I do suggest watching it because it does actually grab your attention and keeps it. If you have seen movies that were similar like "Bully" and liked it then I feel comfortable enough to that you will like this as well. reviews.text: Boring for me. Listening to [this movie] talk about sex in a semi-realistic way is about as exciting as listening to [this movie] talk about sex in a semi-realistic way. The characters were also dicks so I just didn't care about them. They're pretty much braindead posers. The dialogue focues on sex way too much and it's often delivered with such exaggeration it's like watching hammy bonobos. It's tries to be gritty by having dumb [this movie] in a city saying the words fuck , sex and virgin over and over again. In the second half it introduces younger [this movie] and drugs. Bully was a better Larry Clark movie.
reviews.author: moonkodi

reviews.text: I get just as annoyed as the next person at the overly sanitized depiction of teenagers in movies. However, much like _Euphoria_, I think this overcorrects. Every character’s written like a sex deprived college student that’s constantly doing drugs, drinking, smoking, swearing or doing other edgy stuff. I just can’t buy into that, for me it doesn’t ring true to the life of a teenager. On top of that the acting’s fairly weak (Leo Fitzpatrick feels miscast; Rosario Dawson and Chloe Sevigny are clearly the most talented of the bunch) and technically it’s not that remarkable. It feels grounded and I like the handheld feel, but there’s not much of a vision.
reviews.author: Jordyep

reviews.text: The nurse coughs and says: "must be something I ate"(McDonald's sticker just behind). Casper gives the no legs man a coin, and just after this scene Jenny's friend gives her a coin to call home.

summary: A group of bored, disaffected New York City teenagers spend a day skating, smoking, drinking, partying, deflowering virgins, and getting into fights.

title: Rashomon

reviews.text: Cool concept. I would like to see a modern movie with the same ideas one day. As for this, it’s good, but I struggled to keep my attention during some parts. And I didn’t love some of the acting, the woman in particular.

reviews.text: It reminded me of "The Last Duel" that came out in 2021. Great movie, amazing visual storytelling, but I don't consider it a masterpiece though.

reviews.text: [this movie] presents profound contentions of philosophy in exquisitely blocked, effortlessly paced screenplay of a simple story. The fact that Kurosawa makes this amazing feat so painless to acheive is the reason why he's the superlative filmmaker.
reviews.author: drtfx7

reviews.text: Intriguing and keeps surprising throughout the movie. Impressive with the character depictions in their variants and damn that is some fierce swordplay early on. A little bit stale at times with aged mannerism and I could be without that out of place Bolero in the soundtrack.
reviews.author: bäversvans

reviews.text: The film is 75 years old, and with that in mind, it's a great film. Unfortunately, it hasn't stood the test of time. The only woman in the story does nothing but scream and cry, and just when you think she is finally standing up for herself by shouting that the two fighting men are both losers, she almost immediately reverts to her subordinate role as a whining drama queen, which eventually becomes rather annoying.
reviews.author: jeroenvanstrien

reviews.text: This is only the second Kurosawa film I’ve seen. This one impressed me more, and I’m eager to watch more films by this clearly acclaimed director. Aside from my weakness for black-and-white films, I really like the interesting narrative style. Even when not much happens—or rather, when the same story is told from multiple perspectives—he manages to make it compelling and give each character significance. The background music and excellent cinematography round out the experience.
reviews.author: Lizzie2023

summary: Four people recount different versions of the story of a man's murder and the rape of his wife.

title: Trolls

reviews.text: Kids will love because it’s colorful and had okay music. As an adult I won’t be going back to this one. In my opinion it’s very overrated.

reviews.text: Its been awhile since a movie just made me wanna burst out in random dance. Loved this one a lot more than I thought i would. :3

reviews.text: Much much better than I thought would be. Really sweet characters and interesting storylines (although a bit cliche) and actually fitting songs. Cute and moving at times too.

reviews.text: It's as if somebody poured rainbow dust into my eyes and then topped it off with glitter! Not awful, kids will love it, but I need to watch something monochrome to wash away the colour.

reviews.text: I like it. Reminds me of an episode of the Smurfs where they have to avoid being eaten. It's probably even more like the Smurfs than the Smurfs movies were. [this movie] is also way better than a troll doll based movie has a right to be.
reviews.author: Jim222001

reviews.text: Happiness is in all of us, but sometimes you need someone to bring it out in you. Oh my, that was one of the colourful-est, and cutest movies I've ever seen! I wasn't a fan of the reality troll dolls in my childhood, they came off creepy. The sense of humour in this film was spot on, and the song mix covers were a good laugh. I never want to grow up!
reviews.author: CinemanicBonkers

summary: After the monstrous Bergens invade Troll Village, Princess Poppy, the happiest Troll ever born, and overly-cautious, curmudgeonly outcast Branch set off on a journey to rescue her friends. Their mission is full of adventure and mishaps, as this mismatched duo try to tolerate each other long enough to get the job done.

title: Vantage Point

reviews.text: Great concept -- watch a 20 minute segment about an assassination attempt on the President of the U.S. from the "[this movie]" of several different people. I'm not sure they pulled it off though. The beginning was fantastic, I was hooked. I thought the movie should have opened with a little back story but the high noon common thread was not to be strayed from. By the time we had rewound for the fourth time, I was beginning to get a tad annoyed. Not sure why, but I was. I wish we could have gotten into the whys a little more, we never really get a glimpse of what has motivated our bad guys to do this.
reviews.author: Bob.Frapples

reviews.text: The movie is Okay. I've watched the film and liked the way it showed the various aspects of the main action ([this movie]). But I didn't like the ending, I think it was cooked and shallow. Also there was no dive into the motive for the assassination itself to justify all of this killings.
reviews.author: hshendy

reviews.text: It was great till the ending. Not that ending was bad, it was just a little low than the whole highs of the movie. The suspense that something happened and someone knows something, and then showing it from various POVs kept me hooked. But the end was little low on my expectations. But overall it had a great feel, a good watch.
reviews.author: patelritiq

reviews.text: [this movie] (2008) REVIEW #[this movie] #vantagepointreview #riteshreviews . . . 📜 Plot: The attempted assassination of the American President is told and re-told from eight different perspectives of the assassination attempt. . . . 👨‍⚖ Review : A presidential assassination told and retold from different perspectives if people present there. We get a series of takes which show the events of a busy few minutes from multiple viewpoints. The movie is crisp, engaging and beautifully linked together with each aspect presented throughout. Director Pete Travis masterfully connects all dots and presents a beautifully enagaging and hard hitting premise backed with some brilliant actors at his helm.
reviews.author: ritz657

reviews.text: Decent if not also contrived quasi-political thriller (the politics of it is rather thin and safe, so neither side will be offended) with each segment were okay though the Forest Whitaker one was the most ridiculous. Also not sure if there was meant to be one with the news team, and Sigourney Weaver's talent was utterly wasted. All that said, the stunt and car chase sequences in the final act was great and a good choice more or less having Dennis Quaid being the lead of the ensemble. This probably makes for a fine weekend viewing even if the pacing, that is the jumping from one POV to the other, never quite worked but still found it entertaining. **3.5/5**
reviews.author: JPV852

reviews.text: Let's imagine that you're the producer of a movie set up in Salamanca, but Spain is too far away, and you already spent most of your budget on the actors payroll. What do you do? Easy! Just film in Mexico, it's a nice country, it's closer to Hollywood, and they even speak the same language! To disguise it a little bit, distribute a few Spanish flags amongst the extras, and surely nobody will notice it's not Spain! :) _(For non Spanish speakers: yes, Mexican and Spanish people share the same language... in the same way that somebody from Texas, London, Australia or Hong Kong would share English.
reviews.author: ajperez81

summary: During an historic counter-terrorism summit in Spain, the President of the United States is struck down by an assassin's bullet. Eight strangers have a perfect view of the kill, but what did they really see? As the minutes leading up to the fatal shot are replayed through the eyes of each eyewitness, the reality of the assassination takes shape.

title: Live and Let Die

reviews.text: [this movie] is a brilliant use of a new Bond (Roger Moore) and an iconic title song for one of the best Bonds there is.

reviews.text: I liked Roger Moore's James Bond. New Orleans is a cool setting but the plot and villains is weak. This is probably the best Bond song so far.

reviews.text: "[this movie]" isn't Roger Moore's best Bond outing, but not his worst, either. It's definitely better than his next one, the thoroughly tiresome "The Man with the Golden Gun".

reviews.text: As far as James Bond flicks go this one was pretty fun. It maybe wasn't as good as Goldfinger or Skyfall, but it's one of the few James Bond pictures I've seen thus far that I can foresee myself rewatching.

reviews.text: The first Roger Moore Bond is good. I feel they know what they want to be in the post-Connery era, but the execution was pretty average. It is certainly a step up after the last Connery nonsense. Rating: 2.5/5 - 70% - Worth Watching
reviews.author: Copeland1994

reviews.text: Finally, we get to see Roger Moore as our favorite MI6 operative, as he was to busy to join the franchise earlier, and we also have voodoo, snakes, and, of course, the theme song. [this movie] is a bit slow in parts, and the plot is so absurd it only really works in a James Bond movie, but it picks up and eventually becomes rather exciting. Especially that "little" boat chase. To be honest, [this movie] is far from my favorite Bond movie, but it has its charms, and yes...Jane Seymour is certainly one of them.
reviews.author: beardedonewatches

summary: James Bond must investigate a mysterious murder case of a British agent in New Orleans. Soon he finds himself up against a gangster boss named Mr. Big.

summary: When his helicopter goes down during his fourth tour of duty in Afghanistan, Marine Sam Cahill is presumed dead. Back home, brother Tommy steps in to look over Sam’s wife, Grace, and two children. Sam’s surprise homecoming triggers domestic mayhem.

title: Battle Royale

reviews.text: It is overacted and silly in the best of ways. I wouldn't call it the greatest of movies, but for what it was, it was entertaining and I would rewatch it.
reviews.author: SirRodas

reviews.text: Most of the acting belonged in a pantomime. The deaths…just comical! Maybe it was supposed to be cheesy, but it didn’t feel intentional. It just felt…out of place and inept.

reviews.text: I'm a little disappointed with this movie. The book is really amazing, it's the perfect combination of emotions and brutality. I think they wanted to reproduce the same aspects but it turned out to be a hasty representation
reviews.author: gwendol

reviews.text: Well, regret having not seen it as a teen. If you’re 11-14 years old it’s quite a great movie to see - a film centered on the allegory, raw emotions and aesthetics of being a young teenager; otherwise don’t bother, it’s boring.
reviews.author: liebesschmerzen

reviews.text: It was entertaining but extremely cartoonish. Firing multiple machine gun shots and not landing one, getting shot multiple times and not immediately dying? I don't know if this was an ode to anime or what, but it would have been better as one.

reviews.text: i can appreciate it for the fact that it inspired a whole genre, and i don't mind some over the top acting, but i have to admit, i think i missed something. i'm pretty confused about why they were doing all that in the first place.

summary: In the future, the Japanese government captures a class of ninth-grade students and forces them to kill each other under the revolutionary "Battle Royale" act.

title: The Breakfast Club

reviews.text: Very much of its time, and unfortunately hasn't aged well. Hard to locate a lot of appreciation for it these days, but can't argue with that soundtrack.
reviews.author: soonertbone

reviews.text: Holds up soo well. It's a timeless window into the different lives teenagers lead. Sure, it gets kind of hokey at times, but the raw emotions are authentic.
reviews.author: jekyl6669

reviews.text: Watch this movie has a teen and now as 42yo father of three. I was one of the 5 and I do all I can so that my kids are not

reviews.text: This is a classic movie. It really shows how teenagers are all so much alike, but they hide behind a persona, but deep down inside they’re all dealing with the same insecurities and anxieties.
reviews.author: dnb_tim

reviews.text: This is a completely 80s movie. It has all the vibes, with the looks, the music, the general esthetic. The story that was later reproduced countless times in books, movies, and TV. I enjoyed it.
reviews.author: ArielRodriguez

reviews.text: After a few years, I finally watched this movie again and it's just as good as I remember it. This will always be one of my favorite classics. None of the other high school movies will ever compare to this!
reviews.author: jarvis-14882094

summary: Five high school students from different walks of life endure a Saturday detention under a power-hungry principal. The disparate group includes rebel John, princess Claire, outcast Allison, brainy Brian and Andrew, the jock. Each has a chance to tell his or her story, making the others see them a little differently -- and when the day ends, they question whether school will ever be the same.

title: Underworld: Evolution

reviews.text: Has to be one of the coldest looking franchises. Hard to deny the visual transformation effects, even if the film like the franchise is exceptionally bleak.
reviews.author: Tomizuka0829

reviews.text: Not quite as good as the first. Speedmans character still is the weakest one, there is no developement. But good entertainment and a complement to the whole story.
reviews.author: FinFan

reviews.text: Bad writing and direction really crippled this film. The whole idea is that Michael is supposed to be this hybrid werewolf/vampire who's stronger and more capable than any of either species. Yet, he's now spent two movies getting his head kicked in and tripping and falling over everything in sight. Genius!
reviews.author: jmg999

reviews.text: Sequel amplifies action, diminishes narrative. More battles, fewer character moments. The vampirelycanthrope conflict becomes repetitive formula. Direction lacks finesse. Kate Beckinsale reprises role without new dimension. Scott Speedman's hybrid character remains underdeveloped. The film assumes bigger equals better. It does not. Mythology introduced in first film is abandoned for combat sequences. Visually darker but narratively emptier. Franchise has lost whatever substance remained.
reviews.author: RedRudolf

reviews.text: I'm sorry but I've denied myself this for far too long. _[this movie]_ is a cinematic masterpiece and I will fight to the death to defend it. (I won't actually fight to the death to defend it, or even really try to defend it at all. I know I am in the vast minority here, but I absolutely love this film.) _Final rating:★★★★½ - Ridiculously strong appeal. I can’t stop thinking about it._
reviews.author: Gimly

reviews.text: >"I knew Viktor made a mistake by keeping you as a pet." A lot of people like this one better than the first one, and I can see why. I am so attached to the first one that I can't rate this one better, but there are so many things to appreciate in this one. The werewolves are still awesome, cinematography is still stylish, and Selene is still awesome.
reviews.author: Narate

summary: As the war between the vampires and the Lycans rages on, Selene, a former member of the Death Dealers (an elite vampire special forces unit that hunts werewolves), and Michael, the werewolf hybrid, work together in an effort to unlock the secrets of their respective bloodlines.

title: Enemy

reviews.text: One of the most complicated movies ever. I didn't quite comprehend the story even though i've read some explanations. this film actually requires serious thought.
reviews.author: AKW

reviews.text: A weird movie that might be a little complicated to figure out what is actually happening. Although, it's a pretty unique idea that's executed pretty well.
reviews.author: Chinalover33

reviews.text: An outstanding example of how to engage your audiences brains. The film won't be for everyone but if you take the time to THINK about the metaphors in this film it is an absolute gem, everything is intentional, the music, the cinematography, those spiders...
reviews.author: fungus1487

reviews.text: I really though I would enjoy this a lot more than I did, but it's still pretty good. The symbolism with the spiders also falls flat for me because I really have no idea what to make of it, and it seems like nobody else does either.
reviews.author: Jimenez7trillion

reviews.text: This is one of those films that really isn't good, but people will leave higher ratings than it deserves to try and impress internet strangers. The pretentious reviews were at least entertaining. I got a good chuckle at the clowns who watched it 5 or 6 times. The metaphors were obvious enough to land in one viewing.
reviews.author: DNAXIII

reviews.text: Way better on rewatch. This movie is not easy to understand but a second viewing definitely helped me understand and appreciate this movie more. Jake Gyllenhaal is just fantastic. As if one Jake wasn't enough, we get two in this movie. The movie looks beautiful, the yellow overload was great. Denis Villeneuve is a fantastic director.
reviews.author: nmahoney416

summary: A mild-mannered college professor discovers a look-alike actor and delves into the other man's private affairs.

But when a new enemy called Parallax threatens to destroy the balance of power in the Universe, their fate and the fate of Earth lie in the hands of the first human ever recruited.

title: The Addams Family

reviews.text: This version of [this movie] has to be one of the greatest portrayals of the characters, all the actors do their roles so amazingly well.
reviews.author: mk677hd

reviews.text: Raul Julia's Gomez in the original is the definitive version — macabre warmth and genuine wit. The 2019 CGI reboot loses the tactile darkness for franchise-accessible aesthetics.
reviews.author: RedRudolf

reviews.text: A tonally loyal adaptation of the 60's TV show. Some nonsensical moments and lacklustre scenes but Huston and Julia steal the thing with such fervour you can't help but enjoy yourself at least a little. _Final rating:★★★ - I personally recommend you give it a go._
reviews.author: Gimly

reviews.text: While I remember liking this movie hen I was younger, I felt that is was flat and just too tame and thus boring when I watched to again recently. It is a classic, but after seeing namely Wednesday, it is just too dull and too much uncaring humour to be really good.
reviews.author: siggi963

reviews.text: Wednesday Addams is my queen! Morticia and Gomez are THE best married couple of all time and they're at the center of the most well-adjusted, supportive, and loving [this movie] ever portrayed in fiction. I absolutely adore this movie and the way it manages to subvert every stereotype, be funny as hell, provide iconic one-liners, and subtly convey such positive life lessons that feel fresh even after nearly 30 years from its release.
reviews.author: tvjunkie:)

reviews.text: The entire cast is perfect. Especially Raul Julia and Christopher Lloyd. Christina Ricci is perfectly evil and adorable. You also can’t of course leave out Anjelica Huston either who has the second best one liners next to Ricci. The second one is bad yet good at the same time due to the laughs. So of course it’s considered superior.
reviews.author: Jim222001

summary: When a man claiming to be long-lost Uncle Fester reappears after 25 years lost, the family plans a celebration to wake the dead. But the kids barely have time to warm up the electric chair before Morticia begins to suspect Fester is fraud when he can't recall any of the details of Fester's life.

title: Notting Hill

reviews.text: So I recently rewatched this movie.. And I liked it allot.. All the characters are nice and funny.. because of the beautiful written dialogue. The movie felt genuine (:

reviews.text: Possibly the greatest ‘cop buddy’ movie of all time. I’ve seen it countless times and never gotten bored. In fact as I got older I appreciate it more and more. Mel Gibson and Danny Glover’s chemistry is a joy to watch.

reviews.text: This film will not be for everyone due to its complexity and length, but for those who are true fans of films this epic in nature will truly appreciate the film.

Por otra parte, la interpretacion por parte de un actor dd varios personajes resulta un reto para ellos y hace mucho mas atractiva la peli
reviews.author: leomovies

summary: A set of six nested stories spanning time between the 19th century and a distant post-apocalyptic future. Cloud Atlas explores how the actions and consequences of individual lives impact one another throughout the past, the present and the future. Action, mystery and romance weave through the story as one soul is shaped from a killer into a hero and a single act of kindness ripples across centuries to inspire a revolution in the distant future. Based on the award winning novel by David Mitchell. Directed by Tom Tykwer and the Wachowskis.

title: Locked

reviews.text: So glad I was doing some random work on my laptop while watching this. It's bad and never really goes anywhere. Do yourself a favor and skip this one.
reviews.author: RayTaylorhome

reviews.text: Overly preachy boomer wanting justice in a world created by boomers that pushes the fault and responsibility on to the younger generation. Pretty much the movie. Has some other good concepts.
reviews.author: On Cinema At The Cinema

reviews.text: Hopkins did helluva job delivering the facettes of his character by using his voice only. Pretty impressive. The movie was okay, I anticipated more social commentary when they started delving in that direction. In hindsight, social commentary and philosophical questions felt rather timid.

reviews.text: **You wouldn't steal a car?** Disappointing stuff. Very boring story despite some great shots and performances. Overall, no depth, just 2D characters doing 2D things. _Skip this and watch Drop instead._

reviews.text: Kinda sus how Hollywood lately keeps pumping out these movies with 100% awful main characters and try to make us root for them. Nah. Not for one second did I care what happened to this character. Bad people are not likeable. _Also, this must have the worlds most advanced car battery._
reviews.author: mrkesu

summary: When Eddie breaks into a luxury SUV, he steps into a deadly trap set by William, a self-proclaimed vigilante delivering his own brand of twisted justice. With no means of escape, Eddie must fight to survive in a ride where escape is an illusion, survival is a nightmare, and justice shifts into high gear.

title: Till

reviews.text: it’s difficult to watch, but there aren’t enough words in the english language to describe how important it is for all of us to see this and talk about it
reviews.author: energykitty

reviews.text: It is good, but I just couldn't empathize with Mamie nor Bo. And I consider that was important for the film. Why would they portrait the victim as a brat? Danielle Deadwyler's acting was great, though. Interesting plot based on a true case, but I think there are better.
reviews.author: ArielRodriguez

reviews.text: Like me with my gentle dominatrix begging her to go harder and hurt me more. [this movie] is a harrowing film that does a good job conveying the history and repercussions of the 14 year old black child who was beaten, shot and then lynched in Mississippi in 1955. My only regret is that by dragging out the scenes of premonition before the murder and the scenes of grief afterwards, the director diluted the impact of what was on the screen. Nevertheless, this is still an important film which is easy to recommend.
reviews.author: Saint Pauly

reviews.text: The film itself wasn't particularly amazing, it was pretty solid though. It was powerful and moving in places. The pacing is a bit off in some areas though. With that said, it was a film and story that needed to be told. It primarily focuses on the black community and Mamie [this movie] looking for justice, instead of focusing on the suffering of Emmett [this movie]. Danielle Deadwyler is once again showing that she is a good actress. The courtroom scene alone will move you.
reviews.author: Mindless_City23

reviews.text: The intention of showing this story, told more extensively this year in the miniseries "Women of the movement" (ABC, 2022), from the mother's point of view, brings degrees of emotional depth that Danielle Deadwyler explores in a surprisingly stark way. The story, however, is damaged by this overflowing emotion, perhaps intentionally unfocused, making descriptions that sometimes contradict the point of view adopted, such as showing the interaction between Emmett and the white saleswoman. Despite this, it is a film that conveys pain and mourning in a moving way.
reviews.author: miguelreina

reviews.text: I know Cate Blanchett and Michelle Yeoh are deservedly the frontrunners for this year's Oscars. However, Danielle Deadwyler should win because this was an earth-shattering performance. There is a point in the film where I thought the real Mamie [this movie]-Mobley took over Danielle Deadwyler's body. Incredible work.
reviews.author: Bradym03

summary: The true story of Mamie Till Mobley's relentless pursuit of justice for her 14-year-old son, Emmett Till, who, in 1955, was lynched while visiting his cousins in Mississippi.

title: Dog Man

reviews.text: Hot garbage. This movie had the plot of a 90s kids cartoon but with less quality and worse jokes. If you told me a five year old wrote and directed, I’d believe you.
reviews.author: OutlierForLife

reviews.text: This was fine, perfectly serviceable and fun for kids. As someone who has read the majority of the early [this movie] books, I appreciated just how much they tried to adapt and reference, even if it did make the complete package feel a bit messy.
reviews.author: Jakurz

reviews.text: Not as enjoyable as Captain Underpants. They tried really hard, but the humour was just too juvenile to have broad appeal. My favourite scene was [this movie] and Little Pete piano montage.

reviews.text: The animation in [this movie] is great and Ricky Gervaisis is the perfect choice for a cartoon villain. However, the story moves fast, the conflicts move faster, and the experience feels chaotic throughout. With its lack of story arc and character development, it's perfect for today's children of no attention spans.
reviews.author: fasterfilmcritic

reviews.text: Had to watch in 1.5x speed because they move & talk so slow, was that a deliberate choice? I appreciate the art style and maybe it fit whatever book it was referencing but it looks… messy & too vibrant, it’s like your eyes get confused which part to focus on. Also found it cringe with [this movie]’s voice acting, not very convincing lmao. Only redeemable parts were lil petey and a few jokes here and there.
reviews.author: ahhncee

reviews.text: Brain Rot the movie. Talk about joke and sensory overload. This movie doesn’t stay put. Jumps scene to scene every 90 seconds, which makes it seem less like a movie and more of a series of skits. That doesn’t matter though because it’s absolutely fun! Pete Davidson actually tried here is the biggest surprise. Laughed frequently and the animation was stunning. Worth a watch!
reviews.author: RyeZoo

summary: When a faithful police dog and his human police officer owner are injured together on the job, a harebrained but life-saving surgery fuses the two of them together and Dog Man is born. Dog Man is sworn to protect and serve—and fetch, sit and roll over. As Dog Man embraces his new identity and strives to impress his Chief, he must stop the pretty evil plots of feline supervillain Petey the Cat.

title: Sin City: A Dame to Kill For

reviews.text: Visually stunning. That's what I love most about [this movie]. Eva Green's scenes were utterly breathtaking! Her beauty was a great addition to this sequel.

reviews.text: I really enjoyed the movie, deserved to do alot better at the box office than it did, some great performances, looks incredible, and great stories Rosario Dawson v Eva Green v Jessica Alba.......do you need any more than that?
