reviews.text: I rather enjoyed this, but I have been a Frank Miller fan for years. That and the fact that Eva Green and Jessica Alba makes any flick worth watching. The first one was a brilliant ten, this one a little less :)
reviews.author: Green78

summary: Some of Sin City's most hard-boiled citizens cross paths with a few of its more reviled inhabitants.

title: EuroTrip

reviews.text: Brilliant. I know that people in Bratislava don’t like it as they make the city to be very poor and filthy, but hopefully you all know it’s just for comedy purposes. The jokes are brilliant and it never gets old. :)
reviews.author: loverly

reviews.text: a few funny jokes and quirks. not worth it. i only watched it now because i remember enjoying this in the past, but fuck, it really does not hold. i would regret it if it didn't teach me something about how much i changed. if you want something like this but newer and funnier and much better story, try walk of shame, miss march, or no hard feelings.
reviews.author: cregox

reviews.text: It's not quite Road Trip or American Pie, but it does a nice job satisfying fans of the genre. Good time with some memorable parts that I will happily revisit from time to time. Rating: 3/5 - 75% - Worth Watching
reviews.author: Copeland1994

reviews.text: As a teenager of the 2000s, I saw this one on DVD and cable a dozen times. I hadn't seen it for 15 years. I thought I had grown out of raunchy humor. I was wrong. It's still hilarious! And so well paced. The 90 minutes fly by. I wonder how people with no nostalgia for it feel about it. There are jokes about sexual harassment, rape, incest and xenophobia. It wouldn't get made today.
reviews.author: The_Argentinian

reviews.text: I still laugh like a maniac every time I watch one of these movies. Looking back, especially after 2010, I can’t help but wonder—what was the last movie we saw before realising they’d never make anything this outrageous again? Films from the late '90s to early 2010s had a kind of wild freedom that just doesn’t exist any more. As I recall, the Hangover trilogy was the last of this kind.
reviews.author: durack

reviews.text: "Hey, Matt, I know you're deep into production for the new Bourne movie, but how'd you like to have the most random cameo of 2004?" "What do you need me to do?" "You're the lead singer of a local band dry-humping Kristin Kreuk in the middle of a song." "Sign me up!"
reviews.author: Digital_Phreaker

summary: When Scott learns that his longtime cyber-buddy from Berlin is a gorgeous young woman, he and his friends embark on a trip across Europe.

title: Coyote Ugly

reviews.text: I can't believe it took me 6 years after buying the DVD to finally get around to watching this. Completely exceeded all expectations and now a new favourite of mine!!! Maria Bello is the star for me, she is jaw-dropping in this, phew!
reviews.author: swanqueenz

reviews.text: I remember LOVING this movie at the time, having watched it so many times on cable. I knew it was poppy and trashy and the love had a thick layer of irony behind it. But on a recent rewatch, the cringe was REAL. This movie aged like brie outside on a hot florida summer day. Not even so bad it's good anymore.
reviews.author: Gazoo69

reviews.text: I’ve been a huge fan of this movie ever since I was a kid. It’s super nostalgic and a ton of fun. I figured I’d introduce Bekah to this. She enjoyed it but probably not as much as me. But I also have the nostalgia on my side. The characters play their roles perfectly. The soundtrack is excellent. I’ll always enjoy coming back to this one. * Watched the Extended Cut
reviews.author: robertaajr

reviews.text: **An excuse to make a film full of women swaying seductively without a hint of softcore.** What can we say about a romantic film, with light touches of comedy, that spends most of its time showing us very attractive women in tight, short clothes, and bouncing around sensually in an atmosphere of mockery and debauchery worthy of a university graduation party? A lot of things. What leaves us no doubt? It is a film made with an openly and openly heterosexual audience in mind. Released in 2000, I don't know if the film would be possible today without being immediately accused of sexism and giving a stereotypical and sexualized image of women. Let's start by talking about the good things.
reviews.author: Filipe Manuel Neto

reviews.text: >"Jim, Jack, Johnny Red, Johnny Black, and Jose; all my favorite men. You can have it any way you like it, as long as it's in a shot glass." I remember watching this back in the day as a kid and thinking "girls dancing at a bar!" and now rewatching this I realize it really wasn't as raunchy as I had remembered. Typical story of a small town girl trying to find her place in the world. Points for having comic book references in it!
reviews.author: Narate

reviews.text: //EN-GTranslate Cult sexy musical film for youngsters with Piper Perabo and Adam Garcia, with the amazing songs LeAnn Rimes, maximum rating 10 Stars / Totally Ninja! //CZ Kultovní sexy hudební film pro mládež s Piper Perabo a Adam Garcia, s úžasnými písněmi LeAnn Rimes, maximální hodnocení 10 Stars / Totally Ninja!
reviews.author: WatchByMood

summary: Graced with a velvet voice, 21-year-old Violet Sanford heads to New York to pursue her dream of becoming a songwriter only to find her aspirations sidelined by the accolades and notoriety she receives at her "day" job as a barmaid at Coyote Ugly. The "Coyotes" as they are affectionately called tantalize customers and the media alike with their outrageous antics, making Coyote Ugly the watering hole for guys on the prowl.

title: The Girl with the Dragon Tattoo

reviews.text: I don't know if it got better, but 45 minutes in I realized this wasn't working for me and pulled the plug. Movie did the complete opposite of grabbing my interest.
reviews.author: PaulVincent83

reviews.text: Music/Cinematography much better in this version. Overall movie flow, tone, and direction goes to the original IMHO. I guess the rape scene is better in the new one...
reviews.author: roryconeill

reviews.text: It's my fault I kept falling asleep trying to watch this because it was so late at night. I finally finished it today in daylight. After taking three days to get through it, it turned out to be a good watch.
reviews.author: Mave7ick

reviews.text: A surprisingly enjoyable film. What else could you want? Bond, two girls getting to know each other, action, suspense, etc. More importantly this was my introduction into the amazing Rooney Mara. follow me at
reviews.author: AdamMorgan

reviews.text: ★★★½☆ (3.5/5) Cold, slick, and really well shot. Rooney Mara is the standout and she completely owns the role. It’s tense and stylish, but it feels a bit long and emotionally distant at times. Solid thriller, just didn’t fully grab me.
reviews.author: fulltimewatcher

reviews.text: I loved the Swedish version (which I watched first) and I loved this version. Both are disturbing and brilliant but I do have to say that if you watch the Swedish trilogy first, it will make the US version a lot easier to understand.
reviews.author: larissaj

summary: Disgraced journalist Mikael Blomkvist investigates the disappearance of a weary patriarch's niece from 40 years ago. He is aided by the pierced, tattooed, punk computer hacker named Lisbeth Salander. As they work together in the investigation, Blomkvist and Salander uncover immense corruption beyond anything they have ever imagined.

title: Prisoner of War

reviews.text: A great historical action and MA film.Violent and brutal.Top notch choreography.Scott is, undoubtedly, one of the top 5 best MA movie stars in the world today.Scott shines.
reviews.author: jarvis-5251579

reviews.text: Interesting take on a Japanese [this movie] camp. Adkins makes great action movie and this is worth a watch for the cat and mouse deadly games between their captors and the prisoners of. A little drawn out. Brain in neutral sit back relax and enjoy the ride. 👍
reviews.author: Davezn

reviews.text: Even though it's a low-budget movie, it's still a good one with an interesting story. The setting is different from what we usually see in Scott Adkins movies. And even though the fights look very choreographed, they are choreographed really well, and it's fun to watch them. Scott is in great shape and he's 49 years old!
reviews.author: ragnarLothbrok

reviews.text: I'm not generally a martial arts film guy, nor seen any of Scott's films before. However the trailer pulled me in, (like they do), but I have to say this was quite good. Yes it was a tad long, and the end escape is a bit bollocks, as it wouldn't work. However I've seen far worse this year, and the acting is quite good too for this type of low budget film.
reviews.author: markj34

reviews.text: The Great Escape meets Van Damme. It is a while ago since I saw a new martial arts movie. This one is surprisingly good for the genre. Adkins is a great fighter, the fight scenes are excellent and the story around is really good for this kind of movie. A pleasant surprise. Good entertainment.
reviews.author: siggi963

reviews.text: "[this movie]" is a basic war movie with a martial arts theme that expands upon the antagonism and martial competition between a Western [this movie] and his Japanese jailers. I felt this film could have built upon the core concept of a sort of camp kumite (martial arts tournament) but instead it leads into a watered down great escape scenario. Acting is reasonable and action is mostly well done. In summary, a basic war, martial arts film. Worth a look.
reviews.author: MovieGuys

summary: British RAF Wing Commander James Wright is captured by the Japanese during WWII and forced to fight in brutal hand-to-hand combat. The Japanese soldiers get more than they bargained for when Wright’s years of martial arts training in Hong Kong prove him to be a formidable opponent.

title: It Was Just an Accident

reviews.text: I understand the filmmaker behind this is just as important as the film but it’s rough goings for quite a bit of this movie. It really hammers you at the end though
reviews.author: JimDarko

reviews.text: [this movie] is a moral thriller that sneaks up on you. Scenes play long, tension builds through small choices, and the film forces its central question to really sit with you. Tremendous filmmaking.
reviews.author: fasterfilmcritic

reviews.text: Panahi blends visceral tension with black humor, long takes amplifying raw debates on vengeance versus humanity—do victims risk becoming monsters? Essential, haunting cinema from a defiant master.
reviews.author: leon.trakt

reviews.text: I liked the movie till the very end. I hate these open ended movies! We know Eghbal pulled up in the Peugeot, but we don't know his intend. Ughhhh
reviews.author: mbze430

reviews.text: What a great film, rightly awarded multiple times. I liked the dynamics, the storytelling, and the character development right from the start. This work shows how different storytelling can be in cinema and how important it is to give non-American filmmakers more and more of a platform outside the mainstream.
reviews.author: Lizzie2023

reviews.text: First and foremost, the film deserves credit for tackling important themes without feeling heavy-handed or preachy. I would dare to say that it comes across as lightheartedly fun for most of its runtime. Then the final two sequences hit you sideways, completely shifting the tone and significantly boosting both the overall rating and the aftertaste it leaves behind.
reviews.author: manicure

summary: An unassuming mechanic is reminded of his time in an Iranian prison when he encounters a man he suspects to be his sadistic jailhouse captor.

title: Meet the Robinsons

reviews.text: This movie has some fantastic visuals and imaginative inventions. The "bowler hat guy" is inept, but the way that he is drawn is truly creepy. There were a few laughs and I appreciated some of the manic moments and quirky characters. The uninspired time travel story itself was secondary to the flashy animation.
reviews.author: Whitsbrain

reviews.text: This movie is a 10/10 People really sleeped on this one Such ahead of it's time It's a fantastic movie with such a beautiful message and a really good soundtrack I love all of the characters This movie is such a hug to the heart
reviews.author: G*ella

reviews.text: Fun movie to watch especially when all grown up. Love how Disney tackled on the adoption theme to it which it doesn’t do much these days. Kind of a shame that not a lot of people talk about Meet the Robinson now these days, Goob needs more recognition.
reviews.author: Rin J Tohsaka

reviews.text: Had a good final message about not letting the past ruin your future, but as a Disney movie it didn't age very well. I believe it went quite forgotten. The comedy was pretty bad, the characters were obnoxious most of the time and the animation felt kind of rushed and incomplete, especially if compared to movies like Ratatouille and Shrek the Third that came out the same year.
reviews.author: LovesickDead

reviews.text: I don't know what to say about this film, it's super creative for sure and the ending is so feel good that I can't stop recommending it to anyone who is feeling a little down in the dumps.
reviews.author: KevinSocial9697

reviews.text: Just for a minute, close your eyes, and imagine what it felt like watching this as a kid. Now imagine other kids around the world who got to watch this. Kids with different situations to what you went through. Some are happy, some are going through a hard stage in their life, some are finding meaning to follow. Life is hard. And somehow Disney managed to make a movie about what it means to move forward through storms and thunder in these darkest hours. We were once the children of the future, now we are adults. If you ask an adult now for their opinion, you'd receive a response beyond the purpose of this movie.
reviews.author: inhuYoung

summary: Lewis, a brilliant young inventor, is keen on creating a time machine to find his mother, who abandoned him in an orphanage. Things take a turn when he meets Wilbur Robinson and his family.

title: Geostorm

reviews.text: The brother, the one working in government is probably the worst written / played role in the entire movie history. I liked some scenes, but not the dialogue. oneplanetonepeople :))
reviews.author: l88per

reviews.text: Decent disaster picture. It has nothing new for the genre, and nothing really stand out, but if you dig these kind of movies, it's an entertaining enough way to waste some time.
reviews.author: jekyl6669

reviews.text: This movie is hilarious. Hilariously bad. For a movie with a budget of 135 million it has exceptionally bad CGI, a horrible plot, bad acting and it's not even fun bad, just bad. Please don't waste your time on this.

reviews.text: I should have looked at the director of this movie before watching, it's so stereotipically bad disaster movie, ignoring even the most basic laws of physics, with dumb plot and characters. Mr. Devlin, we are not in the 1990's anymore.

reviews.text: Started promising. The end. Would rather see a movie about how they build Dutch Boy. CGI was terrible, story the same as always, good cast but not the best acting.
reviews.author: Rickyrick-02

reviews.text: Oh dear. Dull doesn't come close. Unrealistic, not-to-say terrible plot, clunky, cliched script and awful CGI. Gerard Butler as a scientist, in charge of global weather management. Eeek. It's so bad, it's just bad. Don't bother..

summary: After an unprecedented series of natural disasters threatened the planet, the world's leaders came together to create an intricate network of satellites to control the global climate and keep everyone safe. But now, something has gone wrong: the system built to protect Earth is attacking it, and it becomes a race against the clock to uncover the real threat before a worldwide geostorm wipes out everything and everyone along with it.

title: Escape Plan

reviews.text: This movie doesn't feel right. Those two guys are so old now, they have earned enough money and should stop their actor careers. The movie was bad anyways.
reviews.author: ketu

reviews.text: I would have liked to see a bit more obstacles coming in their way, the plot is very straightforward and there's a lot of cutting corners. But it's still a solidly entertaining movie.

reviews.text: Sooooo fun to see childhood heroes again :) And i give 10 for movie idea, its something new in cinema industry, not slash and smash like always :)

reviews.author: Andre Gonzales

reviews.text: Although I'm not a particular fan of the main actors, I liked the movie. It is appealing for those of us who like escape games. I did some guessing as well and had a feeling where the high-end prison is minutes before the main character found out (I think this was intended by the script). I like movies where you can take part in the guessing.
reviews.author: maha

reviews.text: The Stallone/Schwarzenegger team-up we've deserved for 30 years. And it's a good thing that the part of the movie with the two of them together worked, because everything outside of that sucks. But _[this movie]_ does work exclusively off the back of the two experiences we get to see of them in gaol. _Final rating:★★★ - I liked it. Would personally recommend you give it a go._
reviews.author: Gimly

summary: Ray Breslin is the world's foremost authority on structural security. After analyzing every high security prison and learning a vast array of survival skills so he can design escape-proof prisons, his skills are put to the test. He's framed and incarcerated in a master prison he designed himself. He needs to escape and find the person who put him behind bars.

title: Maternal Instinct

reviews.text: lo que esa perra hizo no tiene perdón! pero que la hayan dejado llegar tan lejos con sus mentiras si alguien la hubiese detenido. tantas alarmas!!

reviews.text: I will never understand what happens to the human brain to concoct such an evil act against another human being. She deserves the most harsh punishment in this life and after.

summary: Police pull over a woman who claims she just gave birth. But the baby — and the blood — aren't hers. Twisted lies unravel in this true-crime documentary.

title: Practical Magic

reviews.text: First time watcher here. Although there were some interesting parts taken from folk [this movie] (broom falling - visitor coming), the rest was boring. I really wanted to like it but nothing really touched or mesmerized me about this movie. :(
reviews.author: rosaliestactics

reviews.text: I am not like most people - I don't find this movie cringey or poorly done. I really enjoyed it! Also found myself wanting to dress in long skirts and spaghetti strap singlets, and go do some gardening or write someone a letter.
reviews.author: JordyHarvey

reviews.text: This film is so underrated, hardly anyone I know has seen it. I love Nicole Kidman and Sandra Bullock and together they make a fantastic duo. This film is funny, magical and heartbreaking.
reviews.author: SparklinDiamond

reviews.text: Wonderfully cute movie that Bitty recommended. Very witchy, even if the story love story is a bit silly and contrived. Great dancing/drinking segment, particularly in the directing and cinematography department. The chemistry between Sandra Bullock and Nicole Kidman was just great.
reviews.author: mcswagger

reviews.text: Genuinely one of the most bizarre films I have ever seen in my entire life. I am at such a complete and total loss on _[this movie]_. I might have genuinely thought I'd fallen asleep and dreamt half a different movie if it wasn't for the fact that I watched it with my roommate and she had the exact same nonsensical experience as I. _Final rating:★★ - Had some things that appeal to me, but a poor finished product._
reviews.author: Gimly

reviews.text: Watched as part of the Halloween week, it's been a couple of years since the last time I saw it so I really enjoyed it! Nicole Kidman was stunning and very funny next to a warm and adorkable Sandra Bullock. "Always throw spilled salt over your left shoulder. Keep rosemary by your garden gate. Plant roses and lavender, for luck. And fall in love whenever you can."
reviews.author: sammy1405

summary: Sally and Gillian Owens, born into a magical family, have mostly avoided witchcraft themselves. But when Gillian's vicious boyfriend, Jimmy Angelov, dies unexpectedly, the Owens sisters give themselves a crash course in hard magic. With policeman Gary Hallet growing suspicious, the girls struggle to resurrect Angelov -- and unwittingly inject his corpse with an evil spirit that threatens to end their family line.

title: Police Story

reviews.text: I knew Jackie did his own stunts but I had no idea he also wrote and directed. What an absolute legend. The movie is hilarious too.
reviews.author: The_Argentinian

reviews.text: Too silly. Too stupid. Not funny enough. Not martial artsy enough. Strange mixture of kung fun, British spy movie, slapstick, super hero movies and mystery. Don't like it. I guess, Chan fans get everything they asked for and will be entertained. I think it's trash.
reviews.author: alexlimberg

reviews.text: The new Criterion blu ray of this and number 2 is a MUST HAVE. The restoration looks absolutely amazing and is loads better looking than what is streaming on iTunes. Also I would kill for a Jackie Chan stunt team shirt!
reviews.author: KurtMoney

reviews.text: Pure adrenaline rush filled to the brim with terrific and authentic only a Jackie Chan movie could pull off. Comedic relief between the action pieces is funny enough with great support from Brigette Lin. Everything else fades against the unadulterated physical charisma that Chan and team delivers with an action choreography that never ceases to blow you away.
reviews.author: drtfx7

reviews.text: I did not know this existed. I did not know I was strapping in for a subtitle movie. I did not know I was watching Rush Hour before Rush Hour. The action was great and the humor was fun. While age is here as a near 40 year old film, I quite enjoyed it and I am looking forward to getting around to the others! Rating: 3.5/5 - 80% - Would Recommend
reviews.author: Copeland1994

reviews.text: This movie slaps during the action sequences, those scenes are very impressive and filled with great stuntwork. The rest of the movie is pretty boilerplate, the story and characters are about as stock and predictable as it gets. Now, fortunately most scenes are quite funny, so it still manages to entertain, even if I don’t think it does slapstick as well as _The Naked Gun_. The directing and acting are pretty bad and stiff. They use some very odd lenses for the simplest of shots, and I don’t know what’s going on with some of the sound editing here. Also, I absolutely hate the use of music, way too much handholding for the audience.
reviews.author: Jordyep

summary: Officer Chan Ka Kui manages to put a major Hong Kong drug dealer behind the bars practically alone, after a shooting and an impressive chase inside a slum. Now, he must protect the boss' secretary, Selina, who will testify against the gangster in court.

title: Let's Be Cops

reviews.text: Too many cliche's, plus I hate when the trailer shows all the funny parts from movies because thats all it has going for itself. Thats this movie.
reviews.author: WitWolfy

reviews.text: Muy divertida, tenia tiempo que una comedia no me hacia reir. Soy muy exigente con las peliculas de comedia, o mejor dicho "no tengo sentido del humor para la mayoria"...pero esta me parecio hilarante.
reviews.author: Diegod_Rotten

reviews.text: Very enjoyable film, I've seen this several times but it's good enough to watch again. The story is okay, not amazing, but not bad. Not really much to talk about, just watch for yourself and have fun. 7/10 27/04/2019
reviews.author: joeshuff

reviews.text: I don’t understand how anyone can dislike this movie. It’s SUPER FUNNY and cringy. If you liked Dumb and Dumber, Rush Hour etc you will love it.
reviews.author: hirkiti

reviews.text: The cast was really good so that made the movie so much better,I don't think it would have been as good without Jake Johnson and Damon Wayans Jr,they're hilarious.Also,I really like the soundtrack. But,all and all,really liked this movie.
reviews.author: Devalabra

reviews.text: The premise is pretty ridiculous and stupid, but still, I enjoyed watching it, somewhat. I think it could've been better if it wasn't as over-the-top with several moments that induced cringing and I kind of wish it was. This is not a movie a majority of people would enjoy watching, even if it's to make fun of it, but I'd imagine if you're not the overcritical type when it comes to movies like this, you'd enjoy it in a humorous, and probably a cringing way.
reviews.author: LegendaryFang56

summary: Best pals Ryan and Justin are stalled in their respective careers -- a fact that is painfully driven home when they go to a college reunion. Dressed as police in the mistaken belief that they were to attend a costume party, Ryan and Justin find that the uniforms earn them much respect and attention. Although Justin is uncomfortable with the idea, Ryan decides to continue with the charade, putting them both in increasingly dangerous situations. When these newly-minted “heroes” get tangled in a real life web of mobsters and dirty detectives, they must put their fake badges on the line.

title: Dead of Winter

reviews.text: The acting was good, but the story was generic and even at the height of the action, I was extremely bored. I could go either way with the movie...
reviews.author: chewy74

reviews.text: It was filled with common tropes from the genre but the scenery was breathtaking so it gets a boost for that. Many of the characters are wacky but you just have to roll with it. A fine time passer on a snow day.
reviews.author: jarvis-16353394

reviews.text: What a beautifully sad movie. This movie actually stressed me out. An excellent thriller. Filled with hiding, gun fights, stupid saviors & and many a stressful moments. It was made very well interweaving the past with the present. Excellent storytelling, perfect acting, beautiful landscape. All in all an amazing watch.
reviews.author: nytmare

reviews.text: I really didn't expect this to be that bad, it felt like a totally b-movie, I don't know if Ema has money problems but the movie was bad, and her role was like a stupid, elderly crazy woman. Too much flashbacks with the husband, too many dragpoints. I total disappointment. Even the scenery which i love a good snow abandon area was not enough. The movie does not worth the watch.
reviews.author: great_vc

reviews.text: Dead [this movie] had all the right ideas for a good thriller—suspense, mystery, and a solid concept—but it just didn’t come together the way it should have. The execution felt off, and the story moved too fast, making it hard to really connect with what was going on. It felt like it needed more time and detail to fully develop. With better pacing and a little more work on the story, it could’ve been a much stronger film.
reviews.author: Ike-O

reviews.text: The plot is actually good, but there are so many movies like this. I got bored watching it. It's a very cheap production. I watched it over and over. The acting was decent, but the script was poor. If you like this kind of movie, give it a try. Or, if you can't find anything else to watch, watch it. Other than that, I didn't like it. I watched it in a week. Anyway, thanks for your effort.
reviews.author: Enes_

summary: A widowed fisherwoman, travelling alone through snowbound northern Minnesota, interrupts the kidnapping of a teenage girl. Hours from the nearest town and with no phone service, she realizes that she is the young girl's only hope.

title: The Mask of Zorro

reviews.text: A delight of a movie. Brilliant performances from the whole cast Banderas really nailed his character in particular. His roguish charm and banter was great.
reviews.author: tyrannic_puppy

reviews.text: So much fun! Felt like an 8 year old boy again watching this. Great action, stunts, music, cast, plot. Sure, it’s not perfect, but who cares? It’s [this movie]!
reviews.author: JoeyvanAwesome

reviews.text: Not great or epic by any means but still an entertaining and fun to watch action-adventure movie. As I stated many times before I like those movies for what they are, their honestness and they way they were made.
reviews.author: FinFan

reviews.text: Still as fun as we remember it. Taking the cartoonish bits aside, the movie is a great example of a hero/revenge action crowd-pleaser. It's like a nice pop-corn update of the classic swashbuckler picture of Old Hollywood. Banderas fits perfectly in the role.
reviews.author: 9takes

reviews.text: Catherine Zeta-Jones, the woman that you are! She’s a truly unparalleled beauty and a wonderful actress. Her character, Elena, was definitely my favourite too; so elegant, so intelligent, so powerful, so kind. I would have really liked to see more scenes with her and her father; those were surely the most meaningful to me.
reviews.author: Imme van Gorp

reviews.text: Solid swash-buckling action-adventure cast perfectly with Anthony Hopkins, Antonio Banderas and Catherine Zeta-Jones and finely directed by the great Martin Campbell. I don't remember much about its sequel, The Legend of [this movie], but kind of wished there would be one more to complete a trilogy (maybe titled [this movie]'s Last Ride?). In any case, was a fun ride and been a good decade plus the last time I watched. **3.75/5**
reviews.author: JPV852

summary: It has been twenty years since Don Diego de la Vega fought Spanish oppression in Alta California as the legendary romantic hero, Zorro. Having escaped from prison he transforms troubled bandit Alejandro into his successor, in order to foil the plans of the tyrannical Don Rafael Montero who robbed him of his freedom, his wife and his precious daughter.

title: Collateral

summary: Cab driver Max picks up a man who offers him $600 to drive him around. But the promise of easy money sours when Max realizes his fare is an assassin.

reviews.text: Like eating at a hibachi grill: very animated but sometimes things got a little mixed up for my taste. A beautifully drawn thriller about dream hijacking and how the wealthy suck.

reviews.text: This film doesn’t make much sense, and that’s a good thing. It’s made in a way where you feel like you understand the plot and then something happens and you’re confused again. But it’s truly sad that inception is essentially a copycat of this film and it’s not common knowledge.
reviews.author: Geekshere

reviews.text: The visuals, scene changes, and audio were all done really well and were quite entertaining. I had a difficult time following the story and I spent a good chunk of time confused while desperately trying to connect plot points together. It’s possible that I might appreciate a second viewing more than the first having some more insight going in but who knows.
reviews.author: sage020

reviews.text: Good movie with a lot of interesting visuals and ideas. However, I feel like they had to introduce so much for the audience to understand what was going on that there wasn't enough time to invest in the actual emotional part of the movie. The idea that these people had to reconcile with their dreams and thus themselves is interesting, but again it felt like there was little time to fully delve into that idea.
reviews.author: Chinalover33

summary: Dr. Atsuko Chiba is a research psychologist who uses a device called the DC Mini to enter her patients' dreams, wherein she adopts the alter-ego "Paprika". When the device is stolen, she must stop rogue elements from merging the dream and waking worlds.

title: Willy Wonka & the Chocolate Factory

reviews.text: A classic movie that everyone should watch at least once. This film is filled with pure imagination, I love how it's slightly dark but still full of whimsy!
reviews.author: SparklinDiamond

reviews.text: Back when I first saw it as a kid I liked it. but now a days if I have to choose between this one and the remake, I would take the remake.
reviews.author: Totoruano

Delightful musical-comedy featuring the great Gene Wilder and deadpan, sarcastic humor that I immensely loved. Also the production design was excellent and musical numbers, including the catchy Oompa songs were wonderful. **4.25/5**
reviews.author: JPV852

reviews.text: ★★★★½☆ (4.5/5) Strange, whimsical, and slightly unsettling in the best way. Gene Wilder’s Wonka is unpredictable and magnetic, balancing charm with a mischievous edge. The set design and songs create a surreal, storybook atmosphere that lingers long after it ends. Darkly playful and endlessly memorable. It is a true cult classic.
reviews.author: fulltimewatcher

reviews.text: Just a classic. This Gene Wilder version of Willy Wonka is just brilliant and has certainly be a reference for all versions of the story that came afterwards. Few managed to keep up with Wilder. Excellent entertainment for the whole family.
reviews.author: siggi963

reviews.text: Makes me wish I want to visit that chocolate [this movie] each time I see the Wonka movie over and over. Gene Wilder is a great choice for Willy Wonka and each of the kids actor are good as well. The musical numbers is good and crazy effects are fine to say at least.
reviews.author: Rin J Tohsaka

summary: When eccentric candy man Willy Wonka promises a lifetime supply of sweets and a tour of his chocolate factory to five lucky kids, penniless Charlie Bucket seeks the golden ticket that will make him a winner.

title: Exhuma

reviews.text: i don't even know why i didn't understand it lol maybe it had to do with the difference in the cultures ? no idea but still i think it ain't worth the big hype

reviews.text: Bloody memorable sequences aside, _[this movie]_ is worth the watch but would have benefitted from more efficient pacing and a little less emphasis on being so hungry after dealing with the dead for a living. **Full review:**
reviews.author: Chris Sawin

reviews.author: S26N

reviews.text: This is a great and intriguing film that possesses several qualities, but it could have been much better overall. The movie is divided in a relevant way into several chapters, which gives to the movie an interesting structure and a good pace, the movie has a wonderful rhythm in general. The cinematography of the film is not extraordinary, but yet some elements of the film make it cinematically appealing, such as the different scenes of the wood, the mountains, a great management of the lightning, and the actors, who are all good.
reviews.author: everlastingpain

reviews.text: They really can't help but dig up every darn grave they come across in this film! The film quality is really good, the sfx are great when present as well. I enjoyed it quite a bit, though it is a long film at 2 hours and 14 minutes. Most of the focus is on ghosts and the human element of the supernatural. This is based off of eastern mythology and spiritualism, if you're not familiar with that in general you'll be scratching your head quite a bit.
reviews.author: Agustttt

summary: After tracing the origin of a disturbing supernatural affliction to a wealthy family's ancestral gravesite, a team of paranormal experts relocates the remains—and soon discovers what happens to those who dare to mess with the wrong grave.

title: xXx: State of the Union

reviews.text: I liked the original [this movie] and I like this sequel. However, do not expect more than a solid action flick because otherwise you will be disappointed for sure!
reviews.author: DRNKMNKY

reviews.text: Yesterday I've watched the first [this movie] movie, today the second and in my opinion, the second is better. The plot is more developed (well, let's face it, it's not new, so not too much effort has been put there ^^), and it seems more legit to chose an ex-seal as an agent than some random criminal extreme sports freak. It's all good fun and action.
reviews.author: Syntis

reviews.text: We know the story (something bad is about to happen but then there is [this movie] and poof... all will be good). State of the Union has a soso story but damn did I like the movie. Lots of fighting, explosions, awesome cars, etc.... This will not be a Matrix like whooaaa what a great story but it is fun to watch nevertheless.
reviews.author: christopher-ffm

reviews.text: A decent action movie though Ice Cube takes the character way too seriously, which does not really work with the slightly goofy story. Still, a decent action movie. Somehow, Vin Diesel is missing though.
reviews.author: siggi963

reviews.text: Not my first time to watch this and I was 100% correct in my recollection that it was pretty bad years ago; it's even worse now. While the first one was laughingly unbelievable but watchable (assuming you were willing to disengage your brain for a couple hours) this wasn't even fun to watch it was so atrocious. At the risk of offending someone (and if I do, get over it) this installment seemed like it was nothing but an appeal to the black community: an effort to remake the original "[this movie]" film only geared towards the hip-hop "black" community.
reviews.author: $hubes

reviews.text: > "Wars come and go, but my soldiers stay eternal." These [this movie] movies are not great. Ok, now that that's out of the way, this sequel has a different vibe from the first one. Feels more focused and less weird and while most would say the first is better because of Vin Diesel, I found myself enjoying this one more. I think I was tired of the eastern european trope of the first one. Also Ice Cube makes everything slightly more entertaining.
reviews.author: Narate

reviews.text: ★★½☆☆ (2.5/5) It tries hard to recapture the original’s magic, but most of the jokes feel recycled or forced. Carrey and Daniels still have chemistry, but the humor doesn’t land as consistently this time. A few funny moments, but mostly forgettable. Definitely a step down.

reviews.text: [this movie] is about as stereotypical as chick flicks come, but it executes the formula well enough to be effective. The story leans heavily on the chemistry between its two leads, and both deliver exactly what you’d expect: heartfelt performances that give the romance some genuine weight. The film has its share of tearjerker moments, hitting all the emotional beats its audience is looking for. It’s not a movie I’d find myself casually rewatching, but it’s easy to understand the appeal. For its target audience, this is exactly the kind of romantic drama that delivers what it promises. Rating: 3/5 – 75% – Worth Watching

Despite these complications, Leo endeavors to win her heart again and rebuild their marriage.

There is no reason to put yourself through the plodding pretentiousness of _[this movie]_ unless you, like I was, are on some sort of quest to watch the entire 80s-90s Stallone filography. _Final rating:★★ - Had some things that appeal to me, but a poor finished product._
reviews.author: Gimly

reviews.text: This is one incredibly fun guilty pleasure. Watched it for the first time in ten years. But I enjoyed the whole movie with a grin on my face. It is not the best Stallone movie you will see nor the best masterpiece ever filmed. But you should not go in with that in mind. Just make sure your brain is turned to half power and ready to be entertained in a fun way.
reviews.author: Spitzer_

reviews.text: **Part of my 2022 Action Wednesdays** I had no idea that I owned [this movie] on Blu-ray. While I was looking for Judge Dredd yesterday, I found a whole box set of Stallone movies, and since I haven't seen this one since I had it on VHS back in the mid 90s, I chose this for today. Not the best choice I could have made... [this movie] is boring...plain and simple. Sure, there are a few nice explosions, and Sharon Stone is so sexy, both with or without clothes, that it can actually be a bit distracting. For those of us so inclined, of course.
reviews.author: beardedonewatches

When Ned Trent, embittered ex-partner of Quick's, is assigned to protect one of Quick's potential victims, a deadly game of cat and mouse ensues.

reviews.text: honestly had a few moments of entertaining dialogue and i like the neat wrap up. the hints about the time period they were in weren't subtle but i kept doubting it just because of things like the "no cell phones" moment in the spa. i swear cell phones weren't THAT commonplace then, right? technology is so bizarre.

reviews.text: This is one of my favorite coming of age movies ever made. I was very happy to introduce Bekah to this. She seemed to enjoy it. It’s heartwarming and sweet. I really liked the character development with the leads. The setting is really great, especially for this hot summer week we’re experiencing. I’d actually really enjoy visiting the location of where they filmed this sometime. If this is one that you somehow haven’t seen yet then change that immediately.
reviews.author: robertaajr

reviews.text: Just like the previous movies, and many other movies like this, who are these characters supposed to appeal to? Are there really people out there that connect to them? Atleast in the first 2 they tried to give them a bit of a personality. I literally care for none of these characters which takes away the excitement of their deaths. I'm not expecting a masterpiece but at least create some different kind of characters for a change.
reviews.author: Nox Anexayi

summary: Death is just as omnipresent as ever, and is unleashed after one man’s premonition saves a group of coworkers from a terrifying suspension bridge collapse. But this group of unsuspecting souls was never supposed to survive, and, in a terrifying race against time, the ill-fated group frantically tries to discover a way to escape Death’s sinister agenda.

title: After We Collided

reviews.text: Really sad how the movie made these characters so superficial, Hardin's trauma is just a poorly done flashback and Tessa is a trainwreck. Not to mention that all the other characters are just cardboard pawns with no personality or context at all. Just read the books if you're interested in the story (but if you wanna watch for the hot scenes then sure, you're gonna love it).
reviews.author: biancaxcarmo

reviews.text: I've sat through much more painful slogs, but '[this movie]' gave me two hours of insane plot - and while I forgot everything as soon as I left, I'll be back over the next couple of years just to enjoy my cheesy mess in this strange unnecessary franchise. - Chris dos Santos Read Chris' full article...
reviews.author: SWITCH.

reviews.text: Despite its flaws, the franchise still shows promise, and the second movie continues with the same concept as the first installment. However, this sequel fails to build upon the foundation laid by its predecessor. It lacks the necessary development and progression, simply meandering along without any real direction or growth. While it's a movie that you can watch once and be content with, it doesn't leave a lasting impression that would compel you to revisit or relive the experience again.
reviews.author: tmdb51616167

reviews.text: More of the same, but with more yelling and alcohol. Trevor enters the scene as the sensible and boring option, only for Tessa to fall back into the destructive spiral with Hardin. The movie is a constant cycle of "we fight, we yell, makeup sex, repeat." It tries to be more adult and "dark" than the first one, but stays at teenage tantrum level. It's exhausting because the characters don't evolve, they just hurt each other in a loop. Only for die-hard fans of the saga.
reviews.author: Aratea

reviews.text: [this movie], I knew my life would never be the same again. My eyes met yours as you played your moves on Amazon Prime. You lured me in with the promise of a better sequel yet once again, you dropped me like a rain-sodden date on a Friday night. I was left standing with nothing but distaste in my mouth at the sheer audacity of your terribleness. So now I must leave you, with sorrow in my heart. If you do have a sequel, I will try to keep my distance... but knowing you, you will probably lure me in again as I forget how badly you treated me.
reviews.author: Lee Brown Barrow

reviews.text: Well, I think my journey down the AFTER franchise path has come to a thudding stall. Such a waste of Josephine Langford‘s talents. This second instalment’s storytelling just defaulted to reunion, sex, mess up (repeat) to the point I didn’t care any more. I’m a little curious if the last 3 instalments could make a course correction but considering I paused the movie for a bathroom break at 95% completed and it took me 20 minutes to force myself to return to it to finish it, it doesn’t bode well that I’m curious enough to finish the franchise. I give this film a 5 (meh) out of 10. [Romantic Drama]
reviews.author: NancyLDraper@gmail.com

summary: Tessa finds herself struggling with her complicated relationship with Hardin; she faces a dilemma that could change their lives forever.

title: 27 Dresses

reviews.text: I love romcoms. This is a happy romcom, one of those you see and cry but not because it's sad but because it's so pretty.

reviews.text: When you think of cheesy, cliche rom-coms, this hits about all notes I would expect. If you like the genre, this will be comfort food. If you don't like the genre, there really is not much here to draw you in. Rating: 2/5 - 65% - Not Recommended to Everyone
reviews.author: Copeland1994

I LOVE that she finally stood up for her self and did something on her own but dam he’s the one who wrote the article, didn’t tell her- and even tho he asked for it to be held he knew it potentially would be published. he should’ve been the one to apologize first

reviews.text: Cute romcom love the chemistry I'm not sure if I would have forgive Kevin but that's the magic of movies so the leads do things I would never do But they are cute and I like the end of the movie And George was definitely the sweetest man I love that he cares for Jane and treats her well yeah yeah bare minimum but he's cute
reviews.author: G*ella

reviews.text: Romantic comedy that follows the formula to the letter but does so with enough charm to work. The premise of the eternal bridesmaid offers usable comedic material that the script squeezes without exhausting it. The protagonist conveys that mix of frustration and hope that makes us connect with her despite the predictability of her arc. The supporting characters fulfill their function without stealing the spotlight, contributing light moments that lighten the plot. Visually appealing, with the rom-com aesthetic of the 2000s that now feels nostalgic. The pace flows without major ups and downs, knowing when to accelerate and when to let it breathe.
reviews.author: Aratea

summary: Altruistic Jane finds herself facing her worst nightmare as her younger sister announces her engagement to the man Jane secretly adores.

title: Waterworld

reviews.text: This is such a 90's movie. The unbeatable male lead, the dumbfoundingly useless female love interest, the deadly annoying child, the comically evil bad guy. What bliss.
reviews.author: CorvusAstrum

reviews.text: I don't get why the rating is so low. It's one of the best movies ever made. I felt like I was watching Mad Max in the sea.

reviews.text: Sure, there's some huge plot holes and they don't seem to adhere to their own mythology throughout, but this is hardly the travesty most make it out to be. It's kind of silly, but it has a solid premise and some cool action setpieces.

reviews.text: This movie has really grown on me throughout the years. It's got a really cool, kinda plausible premise, along with a bunch of colorful characters and some really great action. The world is also really fleshed out and feels authentically lived in. It's some solid sci-fi.

reviews.text: [90/100] The struggle with adapting Jane Austen’s novels is that so much of what makes them great is not just the writing, but the interiority she so brilliantly conveys with it. Her descriptions of what’s going on in the characters’heads, the keen observations on human nature that come through in evocative, expositional stretches that elucidate their emotions and affect, are much of what elevates those stories.
reviews.author: AndrewBloom

reviews.text: As with any British period piece this quickly became an exercise in "where do I know that actor from again?", though I did not recognise Hugh Laurie without grey hair. Star cast, obviously, even if sometimes they overdo it a bit with their acting. I don't mind the changes from the novel, it's nice that Margaret (and Edward) are more interesting characters.
reviews.author: Cluisanna

reviews.text: The briefest of cameos from Tim Wilkinson informs us that due to inheritance rules, the second “Mrs. Dashwood” (Gemma Jones) and her daughters are going to be at the mercy of his son upon his demise. That fellow (James Fleet) is actually quite a kindly soul, but his rather more mercenary wife “Fanny” (Harriet Walter) reckons they can be left to get by with just their annuity of £500. With daughters “Elinor” (Emma Thompson); “Marianne” (Kate Winslet) and “Margaret” (Emilie François) to keep, that’s going to be quite a task. Luckily, widower distant cousin “Sir John” (Robert Hardy) and his lively mother-in-law (Elizabeth Spriggs) invite them to lodge in a well-appointed cottage on their estate.
reviews.author: CinemaSerf

summary: The Dashwood sisters, sensible Elinor and passionate Marianne, learn that their prospects of marriage seem doomed by their family's sudden loss of fortune. After Henry Dashwood dies unexpectedly, his estate must pass on by law to his son. These circumstances leave Mr. Dashwood's wife and daughters without a home and with barely enough money to live on. As Elinor and Marianne struggle to find romantic fulfillment in a society obsessed with financial and social status, they must learn to mix sense with sensibility in their dealings with both money and men.

reviews.author: Chin02

reviews.text: I continue to enjoy the random horror releases that pop up on AMC+, and [this movie] (2026) fits right into that lane. It’s not revolutionary and it’s certainly not the best horror movie you’ll see, but it scratches that itch for quick, experimental genre content. The biggest comparison point is something like V/H/S. The concept feels very much like a short film that’s been stretched into a full-length movie. At times that works in its favor — the [this movie] perspective keeps things uncomfortable and unpredictable, giving the film a distinct style that helps it stand out. Even when the execution is uneven, that unpredictability gives the movie a bit of personality.
reviews.author: Copeland1994

reviews.text: The use of the [this movie] footage made it entertaining and did add to some of the tension. But things did fall apart with some of the poor CGI effects and a somewhat clunky ending. Decent watch but feels flat at the end.

reviews.text: Found footage films are always a bit tricky. You have to establish why the cameras stay on. And a body cam born by a police officer is as good of a reason as any. The characters in this movie aren't bad at all and you feel engaged with their plight. The directing is good and the scenery is spooky. Overall it isn't bad at all. The Nebulous antagonist makes the tension a bit more interesting, and the ending is a trope, but nevertheless a good one. I recommend this if you like found footage.

reviews.text: I felt the series is starting to go down. It was overall less interesting. Less fights, less funny parts, less time abroad also. Baek Chang-gi, the main villain, was probably the highlight. But since he's mostly fighting against the other villains, he felt under used. And it's not clear why it focused on making it more personal for Ma Seok-do than the previous ones. Was pretty useless. The comic relief part felt mosty on Jang I-soo instead of the main character. I found him way too stupid and exaggerated so it's a bit of a let down too.
reviews.author: FLY_

reviews.text: I really enjoy [this movie] franchise, its fast , paced, simple fun. That said, I'm not quite so enthusiastic about the latest film Punishment. What makes these films work is simple fast paced, frenetic action combined with top class choreography. This film certainly has most of these elements but it doesn't work as well. Why? Perhaps its biggest short coming is its not especially cohesive. It builds and diffuses its much needed pace.This is not helped at all by jumping between geographical locations and complicating the team dynamic. The main character behaving like a medieval vassal, getting on his knees at one point to beg to keep a case, didn't impress either.

reviews.text: The complimentary movie to Chungking Express (1994), this is a neo-noir thriller that was shooted as a different movie because of the length of the total movie and differences between the two. As in the first this one also tells two stories: of a hitman (Leon Lai Ming) that wants to detach from his activities and his partner, a woman that cleans his apartment while he is out, and have a secret love for him, while he meets another girl nicknamed blondie.

reviews.text: Wong Kar-wai has one of the most delicious and delirious filmographies I’ve come across. His characters live such wildly different lives and yet share so many of the same feelings of longing and loneliness that I always connect to so deeply. His extreme close-ups and warped camera angles, claustrophobic settings and dizzying use of colour and light make for some of the most paradoxically pleasing and uncomfortable watching experiences in cinema (not to mention the fucking incredible soundtracks, every time). His work is absolutely unparalleled. [this movie] joins In the Mood for Love and Days of Being Wild as big favourites of mine.
reviews.author: 2016moonlight

reviews.text: [this movie] is a 1995 Hong Kong neo-noir film directed by acclaimed filmmaker Wong Kar-wai. The film employs Wong's signature avant-garde and dreamlike visual style, with heavy use of saturated colors, slow motion, and inventive camera angles. The nonlinear plot follows two interconnected stories - a hitman who wants to quit his job and the mute petty criminal he partners with. [this movie] examines themes of loneliness and alienation in the urban Hong Kong setting. Critics praised the film's striking cinematography by Christopher Doyle and atmospheric jazz soundtrack. However, some found the fragmented narrative difficult to follow and the characters underdeveloped. Overall, [this movie] cements Wong Kar-wai's status as an innovative auteur.

reviews.text: An undeniable classic. It’s got that magical, golden-era Disney vibe, beautifully animated, charming, and soaked in nostalgia. The story is really simple, but it works for what it is: a sweet love story that just feels warm. Personally, I never loved it, and it’s not really my taste overall, but I fully get the appeal. It’s whimsical, romantic, and undeniably pretty, with iconic moments like the spaghetti scene that have earned their place in pop culture. It’s a gentle kind of film, not trying to be loud or flashy, just cozy and heartfelt.
reviews.author: jacogiu

reviews.text: From Walt Disney comes the magical and delightful heartwarming animated classic _[this movie]_. The story follows a young dog named Lady whose world is turned upside down when her family has a baby; which leads her to take up with the [this movie], a street dog who shows her what a dog’s life is like free of human owners. The characters are really colorful, and feature an array of different types of dogs. And, there’s a lot of clever humor and fun musicals numbers. _[this movie]_ is a marvelous film that the whole family can enjoy.

reviews.text: Before there was fast the furious, there was gone in 60 [this movie]. Stealing cars in less the 60 [this movie] with Anglina Jolie by his side.

reviews.text: One of my favorite movies, ever. Who cares if it's "over-the-top non-stop action" that's completely unbelievable? It's just fun with a hint of drama mixed in (mainly to give them a reason for stealing all the cars). This is an absolute blast when you just want to disengage your brain and enjoy a lot of fun, fast-car action. This is my 4th or 5th time to watch it, and I'll watch it again and again! Great show!
reviews.author: $hubes

reviews.text: _Gone in 60 [this movie]_ is a classic action movie that delivers on both high-octane car chases and thrilling heist scenes. As a fan of the genre, I found this film to be a must-watch. One of the highlights of the film is the incredible car chases and stunts. The final chase scene, in particular, is a standout moment that will leave you on the edge of your seat. Cage is a standout in the lead role, bringing his trademark energy and charisma to the role.
reviews.author: VantageReel

reviews.text: Although Gone in 60 [this movie] is one of Cage's better films in my opinion I felt this film was very slow at starting up. In fact the whole first half of the film fells boring most times. It's not until when the mid marker starts when it starts to pull my intention back into the film as they start stealing the cars. Also some of the acting from some of the cast seemed like a joke at times.
reviews.author: ViperDu'Vark

reviews.text: The movie that forever names the 1967 Mustang Fastback as "Eleanor". It's still a very enjoyable watch for a car enthusiast even after 25 years from it's original release. I still don't get why Angelina Jolie had to become a blue-eyed blonde for this. That's the only odd/unnatural thing about this movie I still hate after all these years. They should have picked a better actress.
reviews.author: durack

summary: Ex-car thief Randall Raines is forced out of retirement to save his brother Kip after a boost gone wrong. With the help of allies old and new, they race to meet the demands of notorious crime boss Raymond Calitri as the police are in hot pursuit.

title: Legends of the Fall

reviews.text: Well it looked beautiful. Pitt and Quinn at their peak hotness. Hopkins chewing up the scenery like an old ham. But oh so so dull...
reviews.author: glasgow1975

reviews.text: A great film, with happiness and sorrow well mixed. Some very good scenes in photography. The moments of madness and rage are really good to portray the feelings of the characters.
reviews.author: pedroraf

reviews.text: "Some people hear their own inner voices with great clearness and they live by what they hear. Such people become crazy, or they become legends." -One Stab.
reviews.author: paezfaexz

reviews.text: This movie has me weeping for most of it. A masterpiece. 😢 The agony that stretches throughout the whole story. This is one of my all-time favorites. Also, Mr. Brad Pitt just looks stunning... #bromance
reviews.author: sevenup679

reviews.text: I love this film. It's beautifully shot, scored, and paced, producing a mesmerising effect. There is real love and depth in the story. I would highly recommend and will watch it every few years I'm sure. It's a perfect film for when you want to drawn into an emotional journey.
reviews.author: nftygirl

reviews.text: _**Similar to “A River Runs through It” but more heroic and melodramatic**_ Near the close of the 19th Century, a disillusioned Army Colonel (Anthony Hopkins) sets up a ranch in remote western Montana with his Cree friend, One Stab (Gordon Tootoosis). He nurtures a family of a wife & three boys, plus his loyal personnel. One son is sensible and “follows the rules (Aidan Quinn) while another is wild and well-versed in Cree traditions (Brad Pitt). After a harrowing involvement in WW1, the two brothers go separate ways during the Prohibition Era of the 20s and early 30s. Julia Ormond and Karina Lombard are on hand in the feminine department.
reviews.author: Wuchak

summary: In early 20th-century Montana, Col. William Ludlow lives on a ranch in the wilderness with his sons, Alfred, Tristan, and Samuel. Eventually, the unconventional but close-knit family are bound by loyalty, tested by war, and torn apart by love, as told over the course of several decades in this epic saga.

title: The Blair Witch Project

reviews.text: Well, I tried, twice but…I think it’s the most stupid movie concept I have ever seen. I won’t be back for a third try. 😔
reviews.author: klawson@234

reviews.text: It's hate it or love it I guess. I personally really like it since watching it for the first time in the early 2000s as a way too young kid lol
reviews.author: Julgo1989

reviews.text: Objectively, I can see why this movie is critically acclaimed. Subjectively, though, it's pretty bland. Also, if it's supposed to be found footage, who edited it to splice the footage from both cameras together? lol
reviews.author: jneowls

reviews.text: What this movie can fear with so little is insane... the guys just went to the woods whit a camera and they did everything looks so real, [this movie] was really too revolutionary for its time!
reviews.author: HeronAnc

reviews.text: One of the biggest movie scams in history. Three imbeciles go to explore a forest because of a witch, there is no witch. It becomes night they cant handle it (too scary), they go insane. Thats the movie.
reviews.author: Paganichi

reviews.text: This was a very new and unique style of movie when it came out. Very exciting to see. Of the 3 Blair Witch movies this is the one to see.
reviews.author: +schmoogie

summary: In October of 1994 three student filmmakers disappeared in the woods near Burkittsville, Maryland, while shooting a documentary. A year later their footage was found.

title: Deep Impact

reviews.text: You kinda know how it’s going to end and it does. The movie largely relies on you caring about the characters and I didn’t. Watchable, but definitely not twice.
reviews.author: Dudaai

reviews.text: Garbage movie, the whole movie is just about a few people instead of showing more destruction, but I should've expected it since it's from 1998. I just wanted to see destruction but barely got anything near the end, complete waste of time.
reviews.author: Loroski

reviews.text: I think is one of my favorites disaster movies, it has a feeling more good than the others with good visuals and a nice story. Sure it has cliches but they are not troubled nor ruin this movie. Totally underrated i may add.
reviews.author: great_vc

reviews.text: The usual American film with good actors but with a banal plot and a predictable sentimentality. The characters are all banal and in the eyes of a European the film is a simple pastime without pretensions, to watch while doing something else. Having said all this it has good special effects.
reviews.author: marcoric

reviews.text: Melodrama meets disaster. I first watched this when it was released and thought then, as I still do, that it is a better film than its contemporary 'Armageddon'., but that's a relatively low bar. Many of the characters look & sound too much like they've escaped from a soap opera. Still, it remains watchable and the science isn't too wildly off-kilter.
reviews.author: robinm0

reviews.text: Hmmmmm, global threat that effects everything, and there was a president who took action to protect the economy as best as he could by freezing prices and wages. Total fiction, a president actually taking action instead of ignoring and hiding the coming problem. Reality is way different. And before morons come at me about insulting someone, kiss my retired combat veteran rear, I don't care about your feelings.
reviews.author: eric.v.mazzone

summary: A seven-mile-wide space rock is hurtling toward Earth, threatening to obliterate the planet. Now, it's up to the president of the United States to save the world. He appoints a tough-as-nails veteran astronaut to lead a joint American-Russian crew into space to destroy the comet before impact. Meanwhile, an enterprising reporter uses her smarts to uncover the scoop of the century.

title: Caught Stealing

reviews.text: This is one of those movies where on paper, it sounds great (the director, the cast, the music, the locations) but it ends up being just okay?
reviews.author: The_Argentinian

reviews.text: It may be the only film by this director that I have truly enjoyed. Surprisingly captivating and interesting until the very end. It also has some good moral lessons.
reviews.author: andynagorny

reviews.text: A good slow burn action suspense movie . Interesting characters from different backgrounds. Good story line that builds up to a very tense and violent finish. Well worth a watch. 👍
reviews.author: Davezn

reviews.text: Boring and generic. Sorry, but the cast and the story didn't win me over at all. At least the second half of the movie was better, so it wasn't a total waste of time.
reviews.author: Lizzie2023

reviews.text: Overall a pretty fun movie, went into the movie not knowing what to expect, it turned out to be an action packed fun movie. Had some pretty good actors and was overall a fun watch
reviews.author: craig200210

reviews.text: An interesting storyline with an MC i couldn't care less about. I see the vision this movie tried to create and honestly, they just fumbled the main character too hard for it to be any good.
reviews.author: Ratski26

summary: Burned-out ex-baseball player Hank Thompson unexpectedly finds himself embroiled in a dangerous struggle for survival amidst the criminal underbelly of late 1990s New York City, forced to navigate a treacherous underworld he never imagined.

title: Icefall

reviews.text: Forgettable! An okay film with some good action scenes, good idea od storyline. Unfortunately, limited exploration of the story and possibly limited budget failed to make it as a memorable film.
reviews.author: jarvis-5251579

reviews.text: To be honest, I watched this for Kinnaman’s sake. He’s a good actor, but he was so underused in this movie. Actually, the movie is just an ordinary time killer. Nothing more.
reviews.author: dnzt

reviews.text: If you're here for Kinnaman, you got about 5 action scenes, one chase through the woods, and a moment for Joel to catch his breath and take a short nap. Other than that, yeah... it's tough times for the movie business, but actors have families to feed...no?
reviews.author: Typongtv

reviews.text: Oh the production quality.... Deciding not to go live-fire and to edit in muzzle flashes in post and using Styrofoam ice and backdrops that don't match the light is bad, absolutely. It makes everything else look cheaper by association. The methane-fires are even cheaper, naturally. The casting is decent, it is not poorly paced, and decently directed, but this never rises about the level of 'decent' which also makes this very forgettable. It was not worth my time, sadly.
reviews.author: Sierbahnn

reviews.text: Story/Plot: 4/10 Acting/Performances: 5/10 Direction/Cinematography: 5/10 Sound/Music: 4/10 Overall Enjoyment/Impact: 4/10 Review: [this movie] has an interesting premise, but it struggles to turn it into a compelling story. The pacing is uneven, and key plot points feel rushed or underdeveloped. The actors do a fair job, but most of the characters come across as flat or forgettable. Visually, the film has some nice moments, but the cinematography is inconsistent, and the music often feels generic and uninspired. Overall, [this movie] is a movie that you can watch if you have nothing better to do, but it fails to leave a lasting impression and is easily forgettable
reviews.author: ReviewBot

reviews.text: Short summary: cool action scenes, good villains, native Indian's culture lessons, and forgettable. I don't know why. Either Joel Kinnaman is a very good actor or he is just too forgettable. He just appeared on screen then disappeared, then forgotten. It's weird, he has a superhero body, very enigmatic stare, but he kept himself melting to the surrounding of his films and disappeared. His 1 memorable acting job was Altered Carbon season 1. I don't remember he has any memorable scene in Suicide Squad, both films. But dang, Danny Huston was a genius in playing memorable villain. He knows how to make his mark memorably. [this movie] is an okay film with good action scenes, good idea od storyline.
reviews.author: MikeRgr

summary: A young Indigenous game warden arrests an infamous poacher only to discover that the poacher knows the location of a plane carrying millions of dollars that has crashed in a frozen lake. When a group of criminals and dirty cops are alerted to the poacher’s whereabouts, the warden and the poacher team up to fight back and escape across the treacherous lake before the ice melts.

title: The Girl on the Train

reviews.text: Definitely better than expected. Difficult to understand from time to time, but then it al lo clicks. It has many strong scenes, specially at the end.
reviews.author: Totoruano

reviews.text: After reading the book, I did NOT like this movie. All the good parts of the book were butchered by this. Maybe it was good if you didn’t read the book.

reviews.text: I had no idea what to expect - I hadn't even seen the trailer for this movie. It started out slow but built up into a pretty decent mystery/thriller. Definitely worth your time.

reviews.text: It wasn't a bad film, but was boring me a little at times... just didn't make it to the station in time... good performance thought.. but all over the place with the story...

reviews.text: I just watched it because I read the novel and found out that there was a movie based on it. The novel was okay, and the movie is quite faithful to it, although I liked the novel better.

reviews.text: The main problem with this movie is that there was absolutely nothing compelling about it. Emily Blunt does her best with an uneven script, but this movie just feels half-baked. follow me at or facebook IHATEBadMovies

summary: Rachel Watson, devastated by her recent divorce, spends her daily commute fantasizing about the seemingly perfect couple who live in a house that her train passes every day, until one morning she sees something shocking happen there and becomes entangled in the mystery that unfolds.

title: I Know What You Did Last Summer

reviews.text: It only exists to remind us that the original is cool.It tries so hard to mimick everything from the original that it gets old REALLY quick.

reviews.text: So terrible… I have no words. How do they even come up with shitty trash like this? And the acting was so bad argh what a total waste of time
