reviews.text: Imagine having all that technology and somehow no one is able to figure out who the killer is or get any footage of them. It’s not as bad as everyone’s making it out to be but it’s not good either.
reviews.author: Mckobee

reviews.text: Why TF did they make Ray The Killer after he went through it in 97 and 98 that was unexpected but I liked his character
reviews.author: Rcarter25

reviews.text: I unapologetically love the first two movies, in part because Jennifer Love Hewitt is a goddess. This is a confused sequel that tries too hard in ways that are unnecessary and a bit corny.
reviews.author: miposuki

reviews.text: I don't know why I still watch these movies, they are very bad, they are only made to make money, but there is no content. I end up watching to see if it gets better, there is no improvement. Poorly done scenes, there are always cute ones to keep the audience going, but this one got over it, there's no emotion, and it's a waste of time. I won't even say more, so as not to get tired
reviews.author: amigoespirita

summary: When five friends inadvertently cause a deadly car accident, they cover up their involvement and make a pact to keep it a secret rather than face the consequences. A year later, their past comes back to haunt them and they're forced to confront a horrifying truth: someone knows what they did last summer…and is hell-bent on revenge.

title: Wrath of the Titans

reviews.text: This is really bad. The writing, directing, and acting were all pretty awful. If you like these types of movies, it's somewhat watchable, but I wouldn't recommend it.
reviews.author: jmg999

reviews.text: The first film Clash of the [this movie] like most films that has a sequel is better than this film. I felt like [this movie] was just an OK movie. It wasn't great, and it wasn't awful either. I never saw Clash of the [this movie] in 3D so I can't comment on the difference in 3D effects between the two; special effects had improved though. The story line in the film felt boring to me at times, and it could have used a couple of more action scenes in there.
reviews.author: ViperDu'Vark

reviews.text: It was so silly that Perseus had a buzz cut in the first film. That this sequel was made so they could get it right give him long hair lol. I’m kidding, it is actually based on a book, it turns out. I think I would have took the first film seriously though. If Sam Worthington looked like he does in this film. Either way this was a pretty forgettable sequel. The first is better despite Worthington’s buzz cut.
reviews.author: Jim222001

reviews.text: >"You will learn someday that being half human, makes you stronger than a god." Once again I need to just say it: I absolutely love Greek mythology and the encyclopedia of monsters they have. That being said I don't know why the Clash and Wrath of [this movie] movies can't figure out how to tell a good story. The creature design is awesome, so really you just need guidance on how to tell a good story.
reviews.author: Narate

reviews.text: The visual effects where very good. Unfortunately, that was about it. The script was just awful. I do not want to watch a movie about Greek mythology just to see the gods being portrayed as week, loosing their power and ultimately disappearing. I don’t know why so many writers today cannot do anything better than to take a well known setting and then totally destroy it for thrills. It seems like they all have some “Lets-destroy-the-Enterprise” complex. To me the awful script ruined this movie. It became depressing despite the good visual effects.
reviews.author: Dark Jedi

reviews.text: This could have a pass based on the 3D but, in all honesty, the script and the story is totally senseless and unconnected. The travel through the Underworld maze to the Tartarus is just the best example of how bad the story is. In addition, they just mix the Greek mythology in the most absurd ways, putting a minotaur where it doesn't belong. Make up is quite bad. Specially with the beards and appearance of the gods. Andromeda, who is also misplaced and doesn't really have any relevant role, is the spark to remark, played by Rosemund Pike.
reviews.author: Andres Gomez

summary: Perseus tries to live a quieter life as a village fisherman while – dangerously weakened by humanity's lack of devotion – the gods are losing control of the long-imprisoned Titans and their ferocious leader, Kronos.

title: Galaxy Quest

reviews.text: In space no one can hear you laugh. I don't really like slapstick and even less when it's as predictable as space dust in a vacuum.
reviews.author: Saint Pauly

reviews.text: A movie that works on all levels. The story, acting and special effects are all top notch. This is as close to a perfect film as you can make. A classic for any fan of film.
reviews.author: GK3

reviews.text: Simply epic. It works as a sci-fi adventure tale, a brilliant comedy (that doesn't rely on bathroom jokes or "humorous" stereotypes) and as a love letter to sci-fi fans. It's a genuine treat and holds up to repeated viewings even nearly 20 years after it was released.
reviews.author: Valkyrja

reviews.text: Brilliant and hilarious. Best appreciated if you have som good base knowledge of Star Trek. Great performances, especially by Allen Rickman who is just hilariously serious.
reviews.author: siggi963

reviews.text: You have to be a trekkie to get the humor of this movie. And for those who get the humor, this movie is hilarious. It plays on all the Star Trek stereotypes. It's fun, well written, and the characters are great.
reviews.author: mbody

reviews.text: I know! You construct a weapon. Look around, can you Form some sort of rudimentary lathe? - Guy Fleegman So much fun! Just an underrated spoof. 👽🐙🚀
reviews.author: tyluke

summary: For four years, the courageous crew of the NSEA Protector — Commander Peter Quincy Taggart, Lieutenant Tawny Madison, and Doctor Lazarus — set off on a thrilling and often dangerous mission in space... until their series was cancelled! Now, twenty years later, aliens under attack have mistaken the Galaxy Quest television transmissions for "historical documents" and beam up the crew of has-been actors to save the universe. With no script, no director, and no clue, the actors must turn in the performances of their lives.

title: Some Like It Hot

reviews.text: I figured I would laugh a lot more, seeing as this is rated as the :pound_symbol:1 comedy by the AFI. I laughed once at the very last joke. Honestly bringing up baby should be number one
reviews.author: sophiemanic

reviews.text: Two men preying on women is supposed to be romantic and funny? Some of the scenes are pretty uncomfortable to watch, but overall Marilyn makes it worth it, especially her wonderful singing voice.
reviews.author: amberrav

reviews.text: This wasn't quite laugh out loud funny the whole time, except that last line, but it still is really entertaining seeing all the shenanigans they get into. Plus Marilyn Monroe is beautiful and a joy to watch.
reviews.author: nmahoney416

reviews.text: Saw this with a sold out crowd at the LA Theater. So cool seeing it with a crowd that was super in. They played a cartoon beforehand and the Road Runner got applause. That's how in they were!! Not enough to cheer for the coyote. Poor guy.
reviews.author: KurtMoney

reviews.text: I heard a lot of hype for this movie but ended up disappointing me. This is listed as a Romantic Comedy type movie, but there wasn't a ton of comedy and the dramatic parts just felt weird to me in a way that's hard to describe. I kept thinking, "Why are they acting like this"?
reviews.author: Brad Bungleborn

reviews.text: The original White Chicks! What a silly and fun movie. Surprised the hell out of me. Sure, I didn’t fell out of my chair laughing, but I really enjoyed myself. And that Marylin Monroe… What a beautiful woman.
reviews.author: JoeyvanAwesome

summary: In Prohibition-era Chicago, musicians Joe and Jerry witness a mob hit, and flee the state in an all-female band disguised as Josephine and Daphne, but further complications set in.

title: The Electric State

reviews.text: It was a very good concert but the storyline felt a bit rushed.Great cast and the visuals were fantastic.A great way to kill 2 hours.
reviews.author: jarvis-5251579

reviews.text: I have to say i quite enjoyed this. A fun and entertaining movie, nothing groundbreaking and i think maybe more for kids but if i was 10 i would have loved it even more.
reviews.author: jarvis-1460686

reviews.text: These robots aren't as bad as the CGI paints them. Paradoxically, the film itself isn't anti-AI; it's about an earlier hype – VR, which, as it turns out, won't destroy on near future our world all at once. ;)
reviews.author: Idek

reviews.text: I cried. Any movie that can get an emotional reaction out of me is a good movie, in my book. This movie also has a good message about closing yourself off from others. It seems like a good movie for a family to watch together.
reviews.author: heddy1

reviews.text: Sucks because I really like the aesthetic of the movie, but it felt like the script was written by a fifth grader. Also, probably Chris Pratt's worst performance to date. Trust me, you can skip this one.
reviews.author: BobBurton1337

reviews.text: This is not a deep meditation on the nature of AI or labor...this is a sci-fi action/fantasy. If you go in knowing that, you can have a lot of fun with this. If you go in expecting Kubrick, you are actively engaged in your own disappointment.
reviews.author: TKPNPodcast

summary: An orphaned teen hits the road with a mysterious robot to find her long-lost brother, teaming up with a smuggler and his wisecracking sidekick.

title: I Am Frankelda

reviews.text: A wonderful journey into a world of nightmares and personal turmoil. I’m always down to watch a good stop-motion movie and this doesn’t disappoint. Characters and worlds that are deep and expansive that lend themselves to imagination and possibilities. Would Recommend
reviews.author: GodJester

reviews.text: The story reminded me of Corpse Bride, the music is wonderful, the style is unique. But it's missing something—maybe it's not scary enough, or the characters aren't developed well, I don't know—but overall, it's a good film.
reviews.author: Tom_Frontman

reviews.text: I had such high hopes for this stop motion project. It's so rare to find them these days, so I really want to support them when I came across one. Visually, the film was spot on. What lacking was a good plot that has a bit more depth than borrowing from Monster Inc.
reviews.author: thangcuoi

reviews.text: Contrary to what the pitch was selling, there is little happening in the "real" world, and Francisca's life is anecdotal. Which is great because the real world is not really interesting, and the **character design of the Spooks is absolutely gorgeous**. Even more when you see the actual figurines used for the stop motion in the behind the scenes during the credits. The story is classical, a version of real and dream worlds being intertwined. Appearing a bit childish in the beginning but with mostly adult themes. Maybe two hours is a bit too much and personally I could have done without the songs. Script wise there was two weird things. One, there is a time jump.
reviews.author: FLY_

reviews.text: [Fantasia '25] With an aesthetic inspired by 19th-century Mexican Baroque, this film develops a simple story that is sometimes unbalanced by a pace that seems too accelerated, adapting the narrative of an episodic show to a nearly two-hour feature film that requires a more gradual pace. There is a beautiful and colorful, dark and gothic artistic design that is sometimes too overloaded but creates a very personal world. The film has a childlike approach but with contemporary and psychological themes that bring it closer to a more adult viewer. But all the visual richness is too overwhelming and the script has trouble conveying the characters' emotions.
reviews.author: miguelreina

reviews.text: [this movie] is Mexico’s first stop-motion animated feature film. Written, directed, and produced by Rodolfo and Arturo Ambriz, the Ambriz brothers are proteges of Guillermo del Toro and even dedicate the film to the Mexican filmmaker. The film is a Mexican production produced by Cartoon Network Latin America and Warner Bros. Discovery. The Ambriz brothers did a miniseries consisting of five 12-minute episodes entitled [this movie]’s Book of Spooks, which [this movie] is essentially an expansion of. The series looks like it features the same characters and cinematic realms that [this movie] showcases, but is more focused on the stories [this movie] has written in her book.
reviews.author: Chris Sawin

summary: A gifted young writer in 19th-century Mexico journeys into her subconscious and comes face to face with characters from her own spooky stories.

title: Angels & Demons

reviews.text: rewatching the movie after so many years, having already forgotten the details in the book, and I found out it is actually a very legit movie!
reviews.author: zhangchaodao

reviews.text: Armin Mueller, Stellan, Nikolaj, I will personally drag my sweaty balls across your face, you did an amazing job acting and made me angry AF, very good movie
reviews.author: SpuppolSenpai

reviews.text: Wow. This movie is such crap. I can see why it has been mocked and parodied the world over, so many conclusions are such a reach. Tom Hanks provides a great performance - as ever - but this does not save it.
reviews.author: Anonymousse

reviews.text: This one had more action and was a little bit shorter than The Da Vinci Code but I found the story to be super uninteresting and a lot more boring.
reviews.author: nmahoney416

reviews.text: I liked the film, good suspense, deaths well done. Unfortunately it is different from the book, of course it has certain scenes the same but still had different paths from the book itself, which is understandable given the time limit of a film but still it is a pity.
reviews.author: adraude_m

reviews.text: Good acting and the story seemed ok. Essentially a treasure hunt ensues thru Rome with loads of action and explosions and all that.... BUT, so many elements that some characters did a zillion years ago that just happened to be eternally helpful out of the blue. Destroyed it for me...
reviews.author: christopher-ffm

summary: Harvard symbologist Robert Langdon is recruited by the Vatican to investigate the apparent return of the Illuminati – a secret, underground organization – after four cardinals are kidnapped on the night of the papal conclave.

title: Rambo III

reviews.text: Rambo 3 is a fun, action-packed adventure that delivers exactly what it promises: an over-the-top spectacle with a hint of political commentary. It won't win awards for its originality or character development, but it's a satisfying entry for fans of the Rambo franchise and 80s action cinema in general. Just be prepared for a film that leans more towards explosions than emotional depth.
reviews.author: searsgamer

reviews.text: >"I'll take football." "What is football? You play with your foot?" "Not really." LOL And I've always remembered that scene with the curious kid asking John Rambo about his knife and luck pendant.
reviews.author: Roth

reviews.text: Bigger, more. That is the motto of the third Rambo movie. Fighting the Russian army, who have state of the Art attack helicopters, with horses and old rifles. Cool. The movie has evidently not aged well, as those are the exact enemies the US was fighting in their subsequent war with Afghanistan. Anyway, it is excellent entertainment and was never meant to be a documentary of real events.
reviews.author: siggi963

reviews.text: An under-rated 3rd film that is better than the last two Rambos. Since it remembers to not take itself too seriously. Even if a lot of it feels like Rambo 2 all over again. With a villain who can conveniently fly a helicopter. The newer movies also aren’t as good without Richard Crenna. Who died a couple of years before Rambo 4.
reviews.author: Jim222001

reviews.text: Stallone always does an awesome job in his films 10❤- Masterpiece 💯 9❤- Excellent 8❤ - Amazing 👌 7❤- Great 🌞 6❤ - Good 👍 5❤ - Average 🤕 4❤ - Bad but watchable :octagonal_sign: 3❤ - Bad 😭 2😡- Awful :face_vomiting: 1:face_with_symbols_over_mouth: - Bull Shit
reviews.author: Predat0r

reviews.text: Someone must have been thinking "that middle section from part II was good, let's make that into another movie". There are obviously many similar scenes. And why not ? At least here the Russians don't feel misplaced. They were painting them as evil as they possibly can. And they are using every cliché in the book. Well, it was still the Cold War and that`s what people wanted to see. Despite all of that this is still a good action movie where almost everything looks so much better than a lot of the one's that came after this one. Here's to practical photography.
reviews.author: FinFan

summary: Combat has taken its toll on Rambo, but he's finally begun to find inner peace in a monastery. When Rambo's friend and mentor Col. Trautman asks for his help on a top secret mission to Afghanistan, Rambo declines but must reconsider when Trautman is captured.

title: Dr. Strangelove or: How I Learned to Stop Worrying and Love the Bomb

reviews.text: To me, this is a perfect movie. Funny and quotable throughout, and with a pitch-perfect satiric sensibility that holds up no less well 60 years later.
reviews.author: soonertbone

reviews.text: Actually, on re-watching it, I feel wasn’t nearly as funny as I remember. The stuff I remember being funny was but much of the rest felt rather slow paced and broadly drawn.
reviews.author: drbrake

reviews.text: This is a comedy? After 20 mins I led yet to laugh and had lost interest, switched it off as was already dragging on and boring. 1/10.
reviews.author: The Ace Face

reviews.text: How is this a comedy? This whole thing is massively overrated if you ask me. I literally almost fell asleep during this. That never happens and it speaks volumes.
reviews.author: JoeyvanAwesome

reviews.text: I'd never seen this until I recently came across it while randomly browsing for something to watch. It was... ok I guess. But it's supposed to be a comedy, right? There were some amusing moments but I don't think I actually laughed at anything.
reviews.author: hoder1

reviews.text: [this movie] was a really funny and well-made satire. While some of the editing and visual effects (obviously) don't hold up too well these days, it was no doubt really good for the time. The script and acting were fantastic, and I can see why it became a classic. Plus the trailer's ridiculously cool.
reviews.author: aldy

summary: After the insane General Jack D. Ripper initiates a nuclear strike on the Soviet Union, a war room full of politicians, generals and a Russian diplomat all frantically try to stop it.

title: Dark Shadows

reviews.text: I didn’t even realize I had seen this movie before until I saw I had previously rated it on another site. Still just as forgettable the second time around. It has a few moments but is mostly lackluster.
reviews.author: sage020

reviews.text: I´m not a Burton fan by any means but I enjoyed this one. A dark comedy with a subtle sense of humor. Yes, the final 10 min or so are a bit of a letdown but the 100 before that are ok.
reviews.author: FinFan

reviews.text: Unique styled film which is very typical for its director Tim Burton. The story is entertaining and it is just fun to watch the actors in their weird and crazy roles. But overall it's mediocre I would say.
reviews.author: Agent24

reviews.text: An uneasy mix of comedy and horror, this is still an entertaining watch for the most part. The third act falls apart quite literally, probably to please those who like special effects over story, which is a shame. When the film focusses on its weird array of characters and period setting this is a lot more involving.
reviews.author: Lee Brown Barrow

reviews.text: Decent Tim Burton movie that really falls apart in the third act. On a side note Depp is one of my favourite actors, but I'm really getting tired of seeing him in Burton & Pirates movies.
reviews.author: DavisNL

reviews.text: Anyone who calls this movie terrible has no idea about Tim Burton's style. This is his thing. He's gothic, old-fashioned, humorous and fairy tale-ish. It's not everybody's cup of tea, but many people find it to be interesting. Do some damn research about the director and don't watch it if you're not one of those people.
reviews.author: Adafeloz

summary: Vampire Barnabas Collins is inadvertently freed from his tomb and emerges into the very changed world of 1972. He returns to Collinwood Manor to find that his once-grand estate and family have fallen into ruin.

title: I Spit on Your Grave 2

reviews.text: A new attempt on the rape-revenge theme that is though a bit to focussed on the graphical part and not so much on the story.
reviews.author: siggi963

reviews.text: Pretty much the same movie as the first which if you liked you'll enjoy, but if you didn't you'll still hate it. I was a fan and will continue to the third soon.
reviews.author: PaulVincent83

reviews.text: Good movie in my opinion. I’ve watched this movie twice now and I gotta say I like it even more than the second one. Now onto the third one I haven’t watched yet. 7/10.
reviews.author: JustFinax

reviews.text: "[this movie]" tries to replicate the raw intensity of the original but falls short in almost every way. The first act is rushed and unconvincing, with little character buildup to ground the story or create emotional investment. The film leans heavily on gruesomeness, but without a strong narrative, compelling characters, or meaningful tension, it feels hollow and excessive. While the new out-of-country location had potential to be interesting, the film barely showcased the beauty or uniqueness of the setting. Jemma Dallender delivers a somewhat believable performance and looks great on screen, but even she can't salvage a movie that lacks the believability and nuance that made the first film impactful.
reviews.author: RalphRahal

reviews.text: As the first one, you spend the first half suffering (this is even harder to see than first one) but is awesome on second part, to me there were 2 more people that deserve a painfull death.
reviews.author: ALX1S

reviews.text: Kneejerk reaction: This wasn't nearly as good as the first _I Spit On Your [this movie]_ reboot. Same premise: rape/revenge but in this particular film, although the kills were a touch more gruesome, the overall feel of the entire story was just too big a stretch and the protagonist (Jemma Dallender) just wasn't nearly as enjoyable - or believable - as Sarah Butler was. The protracted rape/torture/rape/bury was difficult to watch but even that seemed "shallow"...missing the brutal reality of the earlier film. The same can be said for the part of "Kate"; it was really difficult to buy into her character because she was just shallow from the beginning.
reviews.author: $hubes

summary: Broke, and in desperate need to update her portfolio, New York City model Katie calls a number from a tear-off flyer offering free photos. But this innocent attempt quickly turns into an unthinkable kidnapping nightmare where she's ripped away from everyone and everything she knows.

title: American Reunion

reviews.text: Ahh the gang is all back for the final movie. I just wish everyone would have ended back to the way it started. Them as couples like before.
reviews.author: Andre Gonzales

reviews.text: Not really funny. Maybe its about I am getting older and dont like teenie movies anymore ... but I have watched the movie with another three people, and they dont liked it as well.
reviews.author: ketu

reviews.text: Not an absolutely required sequel but at least it partly reconnects to the originals unlike the many movies that failed entirely to do so. If you liked the first two movies, watch this one too
reviews.author: siggi963

reviews.text: Came for the nostalgia, what I got was the pin-up for rape culture. This movie's sole purpose is to objectify women at any chance it gets. There are a few chuckles through out, but they are FEW! Oh and let's not forget to throw a bit of homophobia in there too for good measure.
reviews.author: BobbyGYall

reviews.text: Sequels are rarely as good as the original but this was funny, not American Pie funny but more entertaining than an episode of The Gilmore Girls!
reviews.author: andrewjxn

reviews.text: Sadly this wasn't as good as the first one. I've watched every single one so was keen to see how they wrapped things up. It was great to see the gang together again but the story lacked any fun. It felt like they were trying to capture the same thing as the first movie but missed the target somewhere along the way.
reviews.author: blanktheman

summary: The characters we met a little more than a decade ago return to East Great Falls for their high school reunion. In one long-overdue weekend, they will discover what has changed, who hasn’t, and that time and distance can’t break the bonds of friendship.

title: Anna

reviews.text: This movie sucked. The premise was good but it was just plain boring..... not interesting... fell asleep a couple of times....just want to forget about it
reviews.author: gunsgirl

reviews.text: Better than expected. Can't believe some of the takes I'm reading in the comments though. Anybody finding the time jumps "too confusing" really needs to go back to school
reviews.author: cunninm

reviews.text: A novel take on the traditional spy thriller genre. Stylishly filmed, superbly acted, constantly surprising in terms of scripting, dedicated not only to the action but also to the characters.
reviews.author: WatchByMood

reviews.text: Delightful. Except the fact how everyone at the KGB is a really bad shot (RE scene with the locking doors at the end) Still, delightful. Especially with that cast. Delicious even.
reviews.author: Kyria Crosszeria

reviews.text: Probably the worst movie of Besson. Tried to recreate an alternative Lucy, completely failed. Fighting scenes are ok, but the plot is predictable and a little boring.
reviews.author: Matteo Parenti

reviews.text: This was a solid film, and Ms. Luss did quite a competent job in the lead role. I found the story to be engaging and entertaining, and while there were parts of the story that I questioned, overall, it was an enjoyable film.
reviews.author: jmg999

summary: Beneath Anna Poliatova's striking beauty lies a secret that will unleash her indelible strength and skill to become one of the world's most feared government assassins.

title: Batman & Robin

reviews.text: A misunderstood masterpiece. I laughed so hard it hurt to breathe. It's one of the worst movies I've ever seen and yet I want more.
reviews.author: DastenHero

reviews.text: This movie ended the franchise as the story and characters were again sacrificed for stars and budget to spend where it was not required. For fans of the genre mainly.
reviews.author: siggi963

reviews.text: This is the worse batman movie out of all of them. Besides Clooney, the acting was horrendous. No wonder why Clooney regrets being in this movie it sucked.
reviews.author: Andre Gonzales

reviews.text: I remember back in the day i defended this movie, now watching it again after many years... wow is this bad and boring... from the first set of movies Def this one is the worst...
reviews.author: CCIEdd

reviews.text: It's 2025, and I think _Batman Forever_ and _[this movie]_ are very much products of the '90s. They're a time capsule. Watching them brought me back to the 90s because of the aesthetics and colors. For people who also liked _Birds of Prey_.
reviews.author: Prodigious

reviews.text: Never really got why this one gets so much slack. Yes it's bad, but in a similar way to the 60s TV show. It's pure camp, and certainly more entertaining than Batman Forever.
reviews.author: Torgo

summary: Batman and his sidekick Robin attempt to the foil the sinister schemes of a deranged set of new villains, most notably the melancholy Mr. Freeze, who wants to make Gotham City into an arctic region, and the sultry Poison Ivy, a botanical femme fatale. As the Dynamic Duo contend with these bad guys, a third hero, Batgirl, joins the ranks of the city's crime-fighters.

title: Sin City

reviews.text: A movie with a unique visual style, that is more comic than real-life-action, though it is. The characters are also comic-like and the story reminds of a 1940s private investigator story. Just a unique piece of cinema with an all star cast. Brilliant. Must-see.
reviews.author: siggi963

reviews.text: La puesta en escena es genial, pero ningún personaje es carismático o no cuenta con el tiempo suficiente para demostrarlo. No se si es por que la ví en versión DVD, pero es muy molesto ver los créditos completos cada vez que terminaba una historia.
reviews.author: TavoBernal

reviews.text: Why is the internet gatekeeping the Theatrical Cut??? Everyone on the internet is saying the Recut version is worse and honestly... I can see why, but I can't find the original anywhere.
reviews.author: irine_elle

reviews.text: [this movie] is like that dark party nobody wants to go to but everyone ends up loving. Absurd violence, femme fatales, and an atmosphere so ridiculously intense you feel like you should be smoking while watching it. It’s so stylized it looks ripped straight from the comic, perfectly capturing what noir would be if it had the guts to snort more cocaine. It’s brilliant, brutal, and leaves you wanting a shower and a cigarette.
reviews.author: Calipso_etereo

reviews.text: A good comic book film. The Black and White effects and comic look of the film were great as was Mickey Rourke as "Marv" and Carla Gugino as "Lucille". It was enjoyable and better than I thought it was going to be.
reviews.author: Whitsbrain

reviews.text: La expresión 'Wow!' define a este peliculón totalmente. No simplemente las historias son arrechísimas, sino que el estilo visual con que se filmó coloca a [this movie] definitivamente entre lo más genial que se ha hecho en la historia del cine. No hay más que decir, es fenomenal en todos los aspectos. Una experiencia única que solo gente como Robert Rodriguez, Frank Miller y -Quentin Tarantino- saben elaborar.
reviews.author: Jnquintero

summary: Welcome to Sin City. This town beckons to the tough, the corrupt, the brokenhearted. Some call it dark… Hard-boiled. Then there are those who call it home — Crooked cops, sexy dames, desperate vigilantes. Some are seeking revenge, others lust after redemption, and then there are those hoping for a little of both. A universe of unlikely and reluctant heroes still trying to do the right thing in a city that refuses to care.

title: Hitman's Wife's Bodyguard

reviews.text: talk alot, then talk more, fk up and oh ye talk more again. the amount of fking this, that, everything. write better dialgoues for "fkign" sake!
reviews.author: skyemk

reviews.text: Don’t listen to the hate on this one. The first one was incredibly boring, but this one has fast pacing, and embraces the fact that it’s a joke.
reviews.author: CaterpieOnMom

reviews.text: One of the laziest films I have seen in a while. The first film was occasionally fun but this is a bit of a waste really. Terrible title too.
reviews.author: Lee Brown Barrow

reviews.text: The studio should be compelled to reimburse everyone who had to sit through this absolutely deplorable sequel, I for one will be doing my best to erase this rubbish from my memory
reviews.author: Scouse1960

reviews.text: As sequels go, this is the movie that followed the original. It is what you want in a sequel. The same movie with a new adventure, and it that way it succeeds.
reviews.author: TKPNPodcast

reviews.text: Watched [this movie] just before this movie and this sequel felt "hollow" ; they just tried to go over the top with everything and the end result was less funny and less exciting than the original :(
reviews.author: nforcer2000ro

summary: The world’s most lethal odd couple – bodyguard Michael Bryce and hitman Darius Kincaid – are back on another life-threatening mission. Still unlicensed and under scrutiny, Bryce is forced into action by Darius's even more volatile wife, the infamous international con artist Sonia Kincaid. As Bryce is driven over the edge by his two most dangerous protectees, the trio get in over their heads in a global plot and soon find that they are all that stand between Europe and a vengeful and powerful madman.

title: Police Story 3: Super Cop

reviews.text: Pretty awful movie with clumsy gags, but the stunts and action sequences in the last thirty minutes are definitely worth a watch if you are into the genre. The chain of explosions in the middle after the extraordinarily lethargic first half was also quite entertaining.
reviews.author: manicure

reviews.text: A must for Jackie Chan fans. As always, lots of great stunts by Jackie and also by the rest of the cast. For the rest, the story is simplistic as usual for these movies. I unfortunately also do not speak Chinese, so I had to watch the English doubling, which is pretty bad at times. In summary, forget the story and enjoy the good, solid Jackie Chan fun.
reviews.author: siggi963

reviews.text: Michelle Yeoh is awesome in this film and that is without a doubt, also Jackie he does his thing as usual and the action is shot really well but where this film lacks compared to its predecessors is in story. I found the story was super rushed and then when action sequences happened I find that you don’t care that much for the out come and mainly just wanna see your two main characters get out of the situation. The best thing in the film was the chemistry between the actors, some great fight choreography and really cool stunt work all round.
reviews.author: KevinSocial9697

reviews.text: After the lacklustre dud that was Police Story 2, PS3: Supercop is a return to form. The action is great yet again, the comedy is also better, and the chemistry between Chan and Michelle Yeoh are excellent. And the last 15 to 20 minutes are epic!!! Is it as good as the first one?!? Not really, but it's way more polished and the action seems "grander". The stunts are impressive, but not as much as the first one. But none of this really matter...If you like action movies and martial arts. This is a movie for you!!!
reviews.author: beardedonewatches

reviews.text: Another decent HK action movie with lots of hand-to-hand combat, slightly original plot and awesome climax sequence. Michelle Yeoh was a perfect addition to the series and its amazing to watch both Chan and Yeoh do their own stunts. Tong's direction is a bit westernised unlike Chan's but, the final 15 minutes of the movie outmatch all the shortcomings.
reviews.author: drtfx7

reviews.text: Ranked: Jackie Chan Putting Jackie Chan and Michelle Yeoh together is amazing and yet very dangerous because these two just want to outperform/out stunt the other. In [this movie] Jackie Chan's Chan Ka-Kui goes undercover, he hangs onto a helicopter, does dangerous fights on a moving train with working helicopter on it, has Michelle Yeoh jumping onto said train on a motorcycle, hangs on a van driving through traffic and has Maggie Cheung being in some funny slapstick scenes again! Super Cop is a fun film and another solid Jackie Chan film. Michelle Yeoh is the standout though and makes me wish these two made more movies in the 90s together.
reviews.author: LarZieJ

summary: A Hong Kong detective teams up with his female Red Chinese counterpart to stop a Chinese drug czar.

title: Sleepers

reviews.text: ‘[this movie]’ uses a disturbing and unnecessary narration to tell its controversial revenge story, but the rich characters and great actors easily make up for that. 8/10
reviews.author: AstroNoud

reviews.text: This film took me by surprise. It starts off as a Scorsese knock-off. Then it becomes a juvenile Shawshank Redemption. And then it turns into a courtroom drama.
reviews.author: The_Argentinian

reviews.text: Been a very long time since I last watched this and seeing it again it's a well acted movie that doesn't quite hit the emotional punch despite the very dark story (compare that with something like Mystic River). Still a very good movie with an amazing cast. **4/5**
reviews.author: JPV852

reviews.text: This movie is one of my all time favourites. I like the story, I love the vibe of the movie and I absolutely love the main cast and their performances. Certainly, the story asks you to make one or two leaps of faith in order for it to work, but all in all it is just a great story that spans over 20 years. Just an excellent drama about abuse, revenge and, before all, friendship. Just a must-see.
reviews.author: siggi963

reviews.text: ***Justifiable execution and justifiable lying*** “[this movie]” (1991) starts out as a coming-of-age film about four boys in 1966-1967 from Hell’s Kitchen, Manhattan, and then morphs into a juvenile prison picture, which covers the first hour. The rest of the movie is a crime tragedy turned courtroom drama, taking place 13 years later in the early 80s. Jason Patric plays the adult version of Shakes, the main protagonist and narrator, while Brad Pitt plays his attorney friend, Michael. When their other two buds, John and Tommy, are taken into custody for murder they hatch a plan to get them off for understandable reasons. Robert De Niro plays their Catholic pastor and father-figure while Dustin Hoffman appears as the dubious defense attorney.
reviews.author: Wuchak

reviews.text: One thing that stands out here is the acting, it is spectacular. You really feel for all the characters especially the boys and the suffering they endure. However, where everything breaks down is the finale. [spoiler] Watching this movie in the 2017 with the number of pedophilia cases and stories in the news and their outcomes makes the ending highly improbable and nearly fantastical. The shooting of Nokes is what real revenge usually is, messy and unplanned. However, the court confession of Ferguson is highly unbelievable. They set up a priest to lie in court but a pedophile is so morally strong that he cannot?
reviews.author: chamblet

summary: Two gangsters seek revenge on the state jail worker who during their stay at a youth prison sexually abused them. A sensational court hearing takes place to charge him for the crimes.

title: She Rides Shotgun

reviews.text: It was a decent watch, but it has more potential imo. Not sure how it was edited, feels like for some parts, we just got left in the dark. So again it could have been better!
reviews.author: unis303

reviews.text: Very generic story full of cliches and nothing interesting to say tbh but that said it's performances were fantastic, especially the main 2 characters of the father and daughter. First thing I've seen from the director Nick Rowland but he seems very talented.
reviews.author: Grogan1981

reviews.text: It’s sort of run of the mill but totally elevated by Egerton and a great performance by Ana Sophia Heger. The gut punch of the credit scene added the extra half star
reviews.author: JimDarko

reviews.text: Thrilling movie. Impeccable sound design and soundtrack. And phew, Ana Sophia Heher is a generational talent. Might be one of the best child actress performances I've ever seen. Side note: one minor plot point will make a whole lot more sense if you're familiar with the symbols of hate.
reviews.author: notanewbie

reviews.text: I love you Taron and this was awesome because of you, but holy cow did Ana Sophia Heger simply carry this entire film. Wow. What a performance. She has a very bright future. Love finding these little hidden gems! Great work by all involved!
reviews.author: Elfman

reviews.text: This movie was both extremely good and absolutely heartbreaking. The girl, played by Ana Sophia Heger did an amazing job and you absolutely wanna reach through the screen and protect her at all costs. She did an absolutely amazing job, especially for someone so young. I hope she has a long and brilliant career. Taron Egerton was also his usual brilliant self.
reviews.author: coachglove

summary: Newly released from prison and marked for death by unrelenting enemies, Nate must now protect his estranged 11-year-old daughter, Polly, at all costs. With scant resources and no one to trust, Nate and Polly forge a bond under fire as he shows her how to fight and survive—and she teaches him the true meaning of unconditional love.

title: The Commuter

reviews.text: Although formulaic in parts, it is done very well. There is a lot of clever film making behind this. If you have enjoyed Neesan's other work, you'll enjoy this.
reviews.author: rupertg

reviews.text: A typical Liam Neeson movie, but with that said you know what you are getting and it didn't dissapoint! great entertainment. When will they learn not to threathen this man's family!
reviews.author: damarikomu

reviews.text: My experience watching this movie was like a 1h45m ride in the train, long and boring. I wouldn't recommended it to anyone. Go watch Non-stop instead, pretty much the same with a different transportation and better pace.
reviews.author: Khawlah

reviews.text: Jaume Collet Sera the most predictable and boring director is back with another boring movie. Maybe he should spend some effort on story-telling instead of his tacky VFX-camera moves and "action for old men".
reviews.author: dEnbom

reviews.text: This is pretty much a clone of every other Liam Neeson film ever made. Whether its in a plane or a train, the plot doesn't change much which makes each movie less and less enjoyable.
reviews.author: mbody

reviews.text: I must admit, Liam Neeson movies are my guilty pleasure. I know, they all kinda use the same formula and all, but I just love the guy. :D So, I really enjoyed this one as well.
reviews.author: Schokominza

summary: A businessman, on his daily commute home, gets unwittingly caught up in a criminal conspiracy that threatens not only his life but the lives of those around him.

title: Pink Flamingos

reviews.text: But what the hell is this ... It's the sickest, weirdest and grossest movie I've seen in a long time, however, it has something that made me stick to the chair ... I no longer know whether to consider myself a fair and sane person.
reviews.author: Jaitower

reviews.text: A bizarre and disturbing comedy of absurdities that offers a social critique of the American way of life, presented in a chaotic and anarchic way. With totally dysfunctional characters, the exaggerations result in an empty movie, where violence, explicitness and scatology exist only to shock. The absence of a narrative that justifies the acts turns the experience into a parade of random, impactful scenes.
reviews.author: guzzlima

reviews.text: John Waters' [this movie] is a gloriously depraved assault on good taste, a true cinematic anomaly that revels in its own filth and absurdity. While it's obviously not for everyone, those who have the stomach to endure the madness in this Gonzo cult classic will find endless entertainment in Divine's quest to be the filthiest person alive, a journey paved with unforgettable, stomach-churning, and undeniably hilarious moments.
reviews.author: jekyl6669

reviews.text: Sorry John Waters fans but this is trash... and I don't mean in a good way. There is little of artistic merit here, and the chicken scene is just wrong. Animal cruelty is not clever and its not funny, and for that scene Mr Waters, hear this: You're a piece of shit, and worse than the turd Divine picks up off the floor at the end of the film.
reviews.author: Lee Brown Barrow

reviews.text: [this movie] is a manifesto of bad taste raised to an art form. The plot revolves around a fierce battle for the title of "the filthiest person alive." The main character, played by the magnificent Divine, is ready to do absolutely anything to defend her crown.Waters created a film that systematically breaks every social taboo. It is packed with grotesque imagery, pitch-black humor, and scenes that will remain burned into your memory forever. This is not just a movie; it is a social experiment and a test of endurance. If you are ready for radical art without censorship, it is a must-watch. For mainstream viewers, however, it might be a total nightmare.
reviews.author: puregory

reviews.text: I was fine with the filth up until a man tried to fuck a live chicken into a woman's vagina and killed it in the process. Then I was not so fine. Then there was like two minutes of close ups of a guy flexing his asshole at the camera, or in the words of Ebert: "not only do we see genitalia in this movie--they do exercises." That's this movie in a nutshell.
reviews.author: Brad Bungleborn

summary: Notorious Baltimore criminal and underground figure Divine goes up against Connie & Raymond Marble, a sleazy married couple who make a passionate attempt to humiliate her and seize her tabloid-given title as "The Filthiest Person Alive".

title: Jumper

reviews.text: The plot and characters were kind of a clusterfuck, but I will admit it wasn't boring and had *potential* themes going on instead of just going places real quick.
reviews.author: NowItsAngeTime

reviews.text: Hayden is hot, but this is one of the most obnoxious protagonist I'ave watched. The flashy idea of JUMPING ability is really cool, but the story is really poorly written, especially the storyline between adult David and Millie.
reviews.author: davidzfr

reviews.text: [this movie] was my boyfriend's movie pick, and I had no idea what to expect. Surprisingly, I really enjoyed it! The concept of teleportation and the action-packed storyline kept me hooked. It's not my typical choice, but it turned out to be a great movie night! 😄🍿
reviews.author: SparklinDiamond

reviews.text: Okay, so first of all, the concept of this movie is honestly just super cool. The idea of someone being able to jump from one place to another, all over the world, is just so awesome and I love that this movie was mostly about that. I remember watching this movie years ago and being absolutely obsessed with this superpower; I literally dreamed of how amazing it would be to be able to do that, because seriously, who doesn't think that teleportation would be the coolest thing ever?? Nonetheless, the rest of the storyline isn't too great.
reviews.author: Imme van Gorp

reviews.text: I'll give Doug Liman nothing but credit for making his, Jon Favreau's and Vince Vaughn's careers happen on an impossibly-tiny indie budgeted movie like Swingers, but this was such a fucking mess of an adaptation of an even messier novel that I kinda wish I ignored Third Eye Blind's urges from the opening lyrics of their similarly-titled hit song.
reviews.author: Digital_Phreaker

reviews.text: **Between jumps and stumbles, the film untangles itself with some aplomb.** What would be possible if we could all teleport at will? It would be chaos. For some reason, God, or whoever you want, didn't want to make it possible for humans. This is the belief of the Paladins, who hunt down and kill the “Skippers”, individuals who can, in fact, travel between different places in the blink of an eye. The film starts off with a very good premise and would have been a remarkable teen movie had it not been for the poor practical realization of it all.
reviews.author: Filipe Manuel Neto

summary: David Rice is a man who knows no boundaries, a Jumper, born with the uncanny ability to teleport instantly to anywhere on Earth. When he discovers others like himself, David is thrust into a dangerous and bloodthirsty war while being hunted by a sinister and determined group of zealots who have sworn to destroy all Jumpers. Now, David’s extraordinary gift may be his only hope for survival!

title: Sunshine

reviews.text: An unsavory blend of high concept science fiction and a half-baked third act that seriously undermines the movie. Everything comes off underdeveloped even though the visuals and acting is great.
reviews.author: drtfx7

reviews.text: I stand by my opinion. This is among the top 20 best movies of all time. Yes, there is some logical oddity going on, but this is just gorgeous and makes you feel just… minuscule in the face of something greater.
reviews.author: Antonio Ba

reviews.text: A decent sci-fi movie. The story is interesting but becomes overly complicated and messy in the third act. Visually it looks great. I thought the cast was good too, especially Chris Evans.
reviews.author: nmahoney416

reviews.text: Good but not great. Danny Boyle's direction is spot on, but Alex Garland's script loses its way in the last third of the film. But definitely worth a watch.
reviews.author: brendonla

reviews.text: In this movie, madness jeopardizes a mission essential to humanity's survival. It shows how faulty logic hardwired into our brains can make our lives less effective and meaningful. The movie gets a bit messy at the end and does a bit of cinematic mysticism which does not fit together with the rational message of the movie. Overall, this is one of my favorite movies because not a lot of movies try to send this particular message.
reviews.author: Rolpbert

reviews.text: I’d understand if you didn’t care of this one. It’s jarring and uncomfortable but that feels like the point. If you could combine the best parts of this with the best parts of Event Horizon I think you’d find the sweet spot for this type of story. (I love both EH and [this movie] because they are chaotic but I recognize that’s not everyone’s thing)
reviews.author: giroux

summary: Fifty years into the future, the sun is dying, and Earth is threatened by arctic temperatures. A team of astronauts is sent to revive the Sun — but the mission fails. Seven years later, a new team is sent to finish the mission as mankind’s last hope.

title: Martyrs

reviews.text: First half was enjoyable then it went down very fast. Last part is boring as hell and had 0 story. It's just torture without any meaning or storytelling.
reviews.author: furiax

reviews.text: There comes a time when the film becomes simply unpleasant and difficult to watch. The rawness of what is seen, and the suffering you imagine, prevents you from appreciating any artistic value.
reviews.author: condesoto

reviews.text: Rated this 5/10 due to large amounts of repeated and gratuitous violence. Is it worth torturing people to find out if there is life after death? This movie's answer seems to be "Keep doubting".
reviews.author: CipE

reviews.text: I rated this movie super high, almost exclusively for the ride it took me on. I agree with what many others have said about the movie, but that never stopped me from being thoroughly entertained, start to finish. [this movie] has its share of problems, but it was a hell of a fun ride!
reviews.author: lish408

reviews.text: Horror is generally not my thing but watched this to get a sense of new French extremity (or whatever the genre is called). I thought the story was a bit dumb and fast forwarded through the last 20 minutes. i was watching an english language dubbed version which sounded horrible and I’m sure that detracyed from the movie. I did appreciate parts of it - nice set, convincing performance from the lead actress etc.
reviews.author: tempestwood

reviews.text: This was surprisingly mediocre. I guess I expected more given its reputation. The film takes you in right from the start with the beautifully haunting opening scene. It grabs my attention immediately. The first half of it, the home invasion part, is what makes me stick with this film. The way it's shot and the sound design just makes your skin crawl. It's just so well done, enthralling, and brutal that I was so sure that this would be my new favorite horror film, but then the quality keeps on decreasing after that, losing my interest.
reviews.author: csrz

summary: A young woman’s quest for revenge against the people who kidnapped and tortured her as a child leads her and her best friend, also a victim of child abuse, on a terrifying journey into a living hell of depravity.

title: One Hundred and One Dalmatians

reviews.text: It's a classic. Great for all children and adults. Not really for me but I'll watch it if the family wants too. I prefer the live version more.
reviews.author: Andre Gonzales

reviews.text: _7 - Good_ I've got to say, this movie is a good kids story about dogs. Good characters, great voice acting and overall something everyone should see in their lives.
reviews.author: RPF_2001

reviews.text: The narration was very good in the beginning and film is okay, nothing super. It lags in a few parts, which is the only complaint I would have. It certainly is a nice story.
reviews.author: AlexanderZ

reviews.text: This movie is the definition of lovely: It had me in a constant state of either going “awwwww” or just completely ugly crying. We honestly don’t deserve animals: They’re such beautiful souls.
reviews.author: Imme van Gorp

reviews.text: At the first of the month..rent is due..you ain't got no job?..you ain't gonna have to worry about catchin no dog..you gonna have to worry about a dog...CATCHIN YO'ASS!!!! - Willie Jones
reviews.author: Mr. Sackamano

reviews.text: It looks great for 1961. Cruella De Vil has that great evil crazy eyes look. She must really love fashion. I still don't get how you can afford to keep 101 [this movie] though. Seems like a ton of work and money.
reviews.author: nmahoney416

summary: When a litter of dalmatian puppies are abducted by the minions of Cruella De Vil, the parents must find them before she uses them for a diabolical fashion statement.

title: Bird Box

reviews.text: It wasn't awful, not great just kind of good. Got a bit boring near the end. There was some good acting from most of the cast though.
reviews.author: Singis1

reviews.text: I am so disappointed. Was expecting so much more and actually thought the idea behind it was great, but then it was just … odd … and so many questions that are not answered.

reviews.text: i didn't understand the fuzz around this movie! it was good yes, but after all that hype and all i expected a really thrilling ride ere. but it was simple one to be honest!

reviews.text: Interesting concept to say the least! I thought this film was pretty enjoyable and is on par with "A Quiet Place". I would definitely watch this again
reviews.author: ruhro

reviews.text: i would say that the acting and cinematography were very good, 8/10 for me, but the story is kind confusing... it's interesting but i end the movie with a lot of questions, so i think the overall is kind good but could be a lot better. I give a 7
reviews.author: RafaHDu

reviews.text: Not as bad as it was received. For a thriller, it definitely gets the job done and keeps you well 'thrilled' throughout the movie. Only 7 because it was too simple, it was 2 hours long, but you can summarize it in two sentences. I would have wanted more backstory and events.
reviews.author: BaSsOo7

summary: Five years after an ominous unseen presence drives most of society to suicide, a survivor and her two children make a desperate bid to reach safety.

title: Pitch Perfect

reviews.text: A modern cult movie (in a good way, of course). It started a movement of sorts with people posting youtube videos with them singing and rearranging cups. Very powerful!
reviews.author: markuspm

reviews.text: I absolutely adore this movie, it's just great light hearted fun, teetering ever so slightly on the cringe side but who doesn't love a big old acapella bitch fest. Would definitely recommend.
reviews.author: jarvis-15168185

reviews.text: Worth a couple of chuckles. Dah, dada, da, da, da, dah. Dah, dada, da, da, da, dah. Dah, dada, da. Dada, da, da. Dada, da, da, dah, da, dah, da. That-a, that, that, that's all folks.
reviews.author: kennybyoung

reviews.text: Honestly? I had a great time watching this. Some of it felt very meta and like the screenwriters knew exactly what they were doing when they wrote it. Other bits were a bit were just pure cliché and one dimensional but still pretty damn entertaining. And girls. Hot.
reviews.author: 2016moonlight

reviews.text: Not sure why this movie has become so famous. It is not a really good comedy with the exception of the jokes by the competition commentators and the story as with any movie of this kind is weak and expectable. Nothing very remarkable here but the fact that there are so many fans of it.
reviews.author: Andres Gomez

reviews.text: Very camp and just plain fun if you like (acapella) musical performances! While slightly formulaic in plot and featuring a pretty forgettable romance, this movie is filled with a tour-the-force of guest stars and has a lot of solid performances. I just hated the vomiting scenes, just gross and not funny.
reviews.author: SunnyGabe

summary: College student Beca knows she does not want to be part of a clique, but that's exactly where she finds herself after arriving at her new school. Thrust in among mean gals, nice gals and just plain weird gals, Beca finds that the only thing they have in common is how well they sing together. She takes the women of the group out of their comfort zone of traditional arrangements and into a world of amazing harmonic combinations in a fight to the top of college music competitions.

title: Honey Don't!

reviews.text: If I could rate it below a 1 I would. No one should ever have to see this. Respect yourself and watch literally anything else.
reviews.author: LegendAF

reviews.text: Great cast and chemistry, kept me guessing and WTFing but nothing to raise it more. It was enjoyable but forgettable. Decent movie night choice though.
reviews.author: Reiko_lj

reviews.text: The trailers were far superior and more captivating than the actual film. This cast, on paper, seemed like a guaranteed success, but it turned out to be a complete disappointment.
reviews.author: Jmart2324

reviews.text: It's a real Grindhouse style movie. If you like that artistic vibe with some nudity and raw vioilence, watch it! I liked it a lot.

reviews.text: this started off fun, but then it just kinda ended without a lot of resolution to all the themes and plot points brought up in the film. at least chris evan’s was funny as hell
reviews.author: sad7

reviews.text: wish i could tell you what this was about but i can’t. so much of it made absolutely no sense so idk if it’s just me that doesn’t get it or whether others are on my wavelength

summary: Honey O'Donahue, a small-town private investigator, delves into a series of strange deaths tied to a mysterious church.

title: Wrong Turn 4: Bloody Beginnings

reviews.text: I actually kinda enjoyed it , sadly I couldn't finish it because of some internet issues , I watched 80% of it hope I didn't miss anything
reviews.author: danyggqg

reviews.text: What can i say, it’s the fourth of a franchise that is going downhill. The replace the script by sex and gore. The performances are weak, script is weak, not worth the watch unless you are watching the series.
reviews.author: ReDisz

reviews.text: Didn't see previous parts but this is really dull. Script is bad too. Incredibly dumb girls? No problem! One of the worst horror movies. If you read this comment before watching - STOP. 90 minutes of your life is not worth it.
reviews.author: ANT0x1

reviews.text: Weakest film in the franchise so far. They could have called this film anything other than "Wrong [this movie]" as it feels completely out of place alongside the other films. Director, "Hey, let's take the characters out of the woods and put them in a snowy environment". Yet another dull, cheap horror set inside a sanatorium with annoying teens/twenty-somethings. Offers nothing. Delivers nothing. I hope it returns back to the original films premise.
reviews.author: tonywd40

reviews.text: I didn't think the three previous films were bad at all and for the most part avoided dumb horror victim tropes but this one is noticeably worse. We have not one but two dumb girls who choose terrible moments to say things like "let's be better than them" and avoid killing the cannibals who just ate their friend in front of them. The dialogue is also a lot worse than in the previous movies. I see Declan O'Brien is also the writer for the next two so hopefully this isn't a thing now.
reviews.author: matt-n

reviews.text: I miss slasher movies like this from the late 90s and early 00s. Man they used to push the boundaries with the sick shit they do to these characters. Gratuitous nudity and gore. If you, as a viewer didn’t leave the experience wondering your own sanity for watching these, the movie failed to deliver. I left every one of these movies and similar franchises like SAW, The Hills Have Eyes, Wolf Creek etc., vowing never to rewatch. Because, once is enough. Having said that, it’s amazing how in the later years, I ended up watching these movies again from time to time and still get a shock similar to the first time.
reviews.author: durack

summary: A group of friends take refuge in a deserted sanatorium after they are left stranded in a snowstorm. Later, the place becomes a death trap when man-eating cannibals surround them.

title: The Fog

reviews.text: [this movie] is probably one of the best ghost stories ever made. Granted... Carpenter is one of my favourite directors, so don't take my word for it. Just watch it for yourself.
reviews.author: beardedonewatches

reviews.text: Great, effective, spooky ghost tale. This one has really won me over over the years. It's the best of Carpenter; moody, atmospheric and full of great characters.
reviews.author: jekyl6669

reviews.text: Not the sharpest movie in Carpenter's portfolio, but also not the worst. Of all, this is the most sinister and creepy. Acting was so-so, mood was decent, effects were splendid for its time.
reviews.author: IsharaLion

reviews.text: Boring. So incredibly boring. An absolute slog to get through. You know when you get so bored it literally gives you a headache? Someone please pass the Tylenol.
reviews.author: splenda

reviews.text: I like Carpenter but this does nothing for me. Slow and boring. Don't blame it me being the MTV generation. There are many slow films I like but this ain't one. It's well shot. It's not scary at all.
reviews.author: moonkodi

reviews.text: I didn't really care for this one. I was just bored for most of this. It's not really that scary. [this movie] "monsters" were kind of a let down. I was comparing this in my mind to The Mist.
reviews.author: nmahoney416

summary: Strange things begin to occur as a tiny California coastal town prepares to commemorate its centenary. Inanimate objects spring eerily to life; Rev. Malone stumbles upon a dark secret about the town's founding; radio announcer Stevie witnesses a mystical fire; and hitchhiker Elizabeth discovers the mutilated corpse of a fisherman. Then a mysterious iridescent fog descends upon the village, and more people start to die.

title: Pinocchio

reviews.text: I had more enjoyment reading the terrible reviews ripping this movie to pieces than the actual movie. This is the definition of a soulless corporate film.
reviews.author: Bradym03

reviews.text: The fairy is black, the bad guy at the puppet show was black in the original movie, but in this one he is white. The animations were really bad sometimes. The [this movie] was good actor.

reviews.text: It’s not the best live action Disney adaptation of an animated movie but 26% good reviews is harsh. Since it does capture the story well, despite some miscasting and unnecessary added scenes and characters.
reviews.author: Jim222001

reviews.text: Writing this review as a 27 year old. This movie is magical. Your kids will love it just like I did back in the day. Hearing the lyrics of Disney's theme song never gets old.
reviews.author: Heas Heartfire

reviews.text: I'm not done conversing!! Undoubtedly it has good effects, but it doesn't have that hook of the movies from before Disney, I don't know if they have lost that touch of their movies but it's from [this movie]. It's like watching a [this movie] X movie I think they've lost the touch 🤔.
reviews.author: maxmad

reviews.text: Excellent animation, but it fails in parts! - Cute story, in a way very faithful to the original movie, I found the songs cute. - I already saw live-action best of disney itself. this sin in parts of the animation, the story that not even told is faithful, but could be better. Anyway, great movie, but it takes a lot to be perfect!!
reviews.author: Kouji

summary: A wooden puppet embarks on a thrilling adventure to become a real boy.

title: Demolition Man

reviews.text: I literally can't say how many times I have watched this movie. LITERALLY. Everytime is just as fun as the last... Actually... no, no, it's even better. My family and I can quote almost the entire movie lol
reviews.author: MaiahAndrade

reviews.text: This is a fun and very entertaining movie with a great cast. Read “Brave new world” before watching it and you will appreciate it even more. Don’t take it too seriously though, it is just great fun to watch.
reviews.author: siggi963

reviews.text: A super cheesy 90s action flick. I love how seeing old movie portray the future. Seeing Sylvester Stallone being a fish out of water while kicking ass is great. I kinda want some taco bell now.
reviews.author: nmahoney416

reviews.text: The action, humor, explosions, it is all there. Just hop in for this wild and awesome ride in the future. If you have never seen it, do yourself a favor and go watch it. Definitely one of my favorite action movies, not only from the nineties, but from all time.
reviews.author: Spitzer_

reviews.text: How was this not made in the 80's? Not a good movie, but I've watched it more than I care to admit. It's one of those flicks you catch when you're clicking through the channels in the motel waiting for the connect to show up with more crack.
reviews.author: buddhalou

reviews.text: [this movie]: I still like it as an action film, that society of the future based on good luck, bad business "187 What is that? Death murder, which one? Death murder. There hasn't been a murder in 17 years."

summary: In 1996, brash L.A. detective John Spartan and maniac killer Simon Phoenix are both sentenced to decades in a cryogenic prison as punishment for a rescue mission gone wrong. When Phoenix escapes 36 years later to wreak havoc on the future, Spartan is awakened to capture his nemesis the old-fashioned way.

title: Wedding Crashers

reviews.text: The beginning is a little bit funny but the film gets worse and worse: everything is either illogical or very cheesy... Chicks may like the film, but I can not recommend it.
reviews.author: DRNKMNKY

reviews.text: This film didn't strike my fancy in the way that I see others so fondly remember this film. There were a few good moments or lines of dialogue, but overall, it wouldn't matter if I never saw this film.
reviews.author: ziggymacarthur

reviews.text: A surprisingly wholesome movie that has a compelling story while keeping its humor intact. Overall, this is another 2000s movie that many people watch for that nostalgic factor to it (Oh, and also it has Owen Wilson in it).
reviews.author: Chinalover33

reviews.text: Wonderful comedy! Owen Wilson and Vince Vaughn, together, are a guarantee. With the two of them, guaranteed laughs! I saw it three times and the fun has never gone!
reviews.author: giammy677

reviews.text: I happen to know everything there is to know about maple syrup. I love maple syrup I love it on pancakes, I love it on pizza. I love to take maple syrup and put a little bit in my hair when I've had a rough week. What do you think holds it up, slick?
reviews.author: padawan_seneca

reviews.text: The one beef I always have with these kind of movies is that all the characters are completely overdrawn. That is aside from the fact that the plots are oftentimes cheesy and always predictable. Plus, this has Bradley Cooper in it whom I cannot stand. But, hey, don`t let yourself be stopped by my personal opinion. It's not an awful movie just not one for me.
reviews.author: FinFan

summary: John and his buddy Jeremy are emotional criminals who know how to use a woman's hopes and dreams for their own carnal gain. Their modus operandi: crashing weddings. Normally, they meet guests who want to toast the romantic day with a random hook-up. But when John meets Claire, he discovers what true love – and heartache – feels like.

title: The Strangers: Chapter 2

reviews.text: It turns out that a pitchfork isn't such a serious weapon, since you can get stabbed and still walk around as if nothing had happened. ;)

reviews.text: The audacity and the hubris of stretching a simple slasher movie into a three movie saga as if it were an epic middle earth story. Truly astounding.

reviews.text: Bravo Renny Harlin you managed to make the second movie even worse than the first movie, pointless hopeless and ridiculous. And there is still one more chapter to come!!.

reviews.text: Find out who Tamara is? Does anyone really care? I’m curious to see how bad Chapter 3 will get, since these movies are just going downhill from here.

summary: After learning that one of their victims, Maya, is still alive, The Strangers return to finish the job. With nowhere to run and no one to trust, Maya soon finds herself in a brutal fight for survival against psychopaths more than willing to kill anyone who stands in their way.

title: Elysium

reviews.text: Great science fiction movie, keeps you entertained throughout. [this movie] itself is being portrayed beautifully. I wish I could plan a holiday there in the near future.

reviews.text: A good movie with some great ideas and good special effects. Though the story fails to make it a great movie. Still a good watch for SciFi fans.
reviews.author: siggi963

reviews.text: B- story. A+ visuals, action and performances. There's enough material in here for 3 or 4 movies. Not sure if that's good or bad, but it's definitely fun!
reviews.author: hgram

reviews.text: I really liked this movie. The visuals were beautiful. The story was compelling. The only flaw is a lack of character development. Would have liked to know more about the characters.
reviews.author: gunsgirl

reviews.text: The eight years since this was made, and the social schisms that COVID-19 has highlighted, have been kind to this film. What seemed over the top then is now all too believable.
reviews.author: ben_hr

reviews.text: They paid more focus to the action and less focus to the story and background. Had a lot of potential, but they fell short. Giving it a 6 for the adrenaline inducing action scenes
reviews.author: TheBabaYaga

summary: In the year 2159, two classes of people exist: the very wealthy who live on a pristine man-made space station called Elysium, and the rest, who live on an overpopulated, ruined Earth. Secretary Rhodes, a hard line government official, will stop at nothing to enforce anti-immigration laws and preserve the luxurious lifestyle of the citizens of Elysium. That doesn’t stop the people of Earth from trying to get in, by any means they can. When unlucky Max is backed into a corner, he agrees to take on a daunting mission that, if successful, will not only save his life, but could bring equality to these polarized worlds.

title: Three Billboards Outside Ebbing, Missouri

reviews.text: for what it is, i enjoyed this movie. i was surprised by its ability to make sympathetic characters of people i generally would not give grace to.
reviews.author: maheyhey34

reviews.text: Pretty dull and boring. No interest in this story. And I think I just don't like Martin McDonagh's films. All of the ones I've seen basically suck.
reviews.author: Jimmy_Two_Times-deleted-1783320634

reviews.text: I enjoyed my time with this one. It did have a bunch of subplots that it just sort of abandoned and I feel the comedic moments felt out of place. Overall a decent watch.

reviews.text: ‘As long as you hold on to so much hate, then I don't think you're ever going to become what I know you want to become.' - Willoughby ([this movie])

reviews.text: Weird movie. It’s okay, but the story feels a bit off. All these things happen, but nothing gets resolved or cleared up. It’s just people doing terrible shit to each other for various reasons. Expected a bit more to be honest.

reviews.text: An incredible tragicomedy, with a perfectly-paced story, that unfolds in an engaging and unpredictable manner. The perfect balance of heart-wrenching drama and witty dark humor made the film a thoroughly entertaining experience, and the writing, paired with the performances of the cast, made the characters feel real and compelling.
reviews.author: ismamzaman

summary: After seven months have passed without a culprit in her daughter's murder case, Mildred Hayes makes a bold move, painting three signs leading into her town with a controversial message directed at Bill Willoughby, the town's revered chief of police. When his second-in-command Officer Jason Dixon, an immature mother's boy with a penchant for violence, gets involved, the battle between Mildred and Ebbing's law enforcement is only exacerbated.

title: Who Framed Roger Rabbit

reviews.text: This was amazing! I did start a little skeptical but the film surprised me, brilliant work, and seeing all of my childhood together with all those toons, ah just kill me with nostalgia!

reviews.text: I think it's one of those movies that becomes more appreciated the more time passes. When it was released it was quickly forgotten because blockbusters appeared with digital FX, but it is very well animated, it is funny but not childish. In fact, some scenes may be scary for children.
reviews.author: De-mon

reviews.text: Sure it was amazing for its time, but when I watch it now it sounds like Roger [this movie] is voiced by Michael Jackson! Aaargh.... I keep on expecting roger to say "They're ignorant" the whole time!!!

reviews.text: Its alright. Looks good, especially for its time. There were some funny moments and it was cool to see Warner Brothers and Disney together. I was a little bored but the animation kept me interested. Maybe if I saw this when I was a kid I would have some nostalgia for this.
reviews.author: nmahoney416

reviews.text: This movie is really unique. It's SO enjoyable! I watched it years back as a kid, and as I watched today, as an adult, my perception of the movie changed drastically. I didn't remembered the plot! It was like watching it for the first time. I really liked Roger as a kid, but now I see how great Eddie is, and it's my favourite one this time.
reviews.author: MaiahAndrade

reviews.text: One of the best live action with animated character movies ever. In a world where toons are alive and live mostly in a place called Toontown, a human detective must find out who wants to frame Roger [this movie]. Meet the sexiest [this movie] ever (no, not Roger … Jessica). Great fun, good story and well made.
reviews.author: siggi963

summary: Toon star Roger is worried that his wife Jessica is playing pattycake with someone else, so the studio hires detective Eddie Valiant to snoop on her. But the stakes are quickly raised when Marvin Acme is found dead and Roger is the prime suspect.

title: Mr. Peabody & Sherman

reviews.text: I'm not a big fan of the loser-hero, boy-centric themes in this one, however the animation and sound is high quality and worth the watch.

reviews.text: Too childish for it's own good. Otherwise it's a pretty nice movie actually. It just could have been much better, if they had aimed higher, and it really shows.

reviews.text: Watched this film because there was nothing else on tv, was actually pleasantly surprised. I actually found myself enjoying it and getting interested in what was happening as each scene moved on. A fun film which is worth watching.

reviews.text: The description is wrong, it wasn't stolen Proper Description: The time-travelling adventures of an advanced canine and his adopted son, as they endeavor to fix a time rift they created.

reviews.text: Maybe I would have liked this one much more if I was younger, but I thought it failed to appeal to the whole audience. It’s decent. Nothing groundbreaking, but decent. There’s better family centered animated films out there, but not one to totally write off either. Rating: 2.5/5 - 7/10 - Worth Watching

reviews.text: Didn’t like it as much when first came out in theaters but grown to appreciate it over the years. Got plenty of funny jokes that lands including that one infamous out of context one said by Mr Peabody near end of film. Film did a good job making Penny unlikable to suddenly becoming somewhat likable in films. Ty Burrell wasn’t actually a bad choice to voice the main character and he did a good job same with Max Charles.

summary: A young boy and his dog, who happens to have a genius-level IQ, spring into action when their time-machine is stolen and moments in history begin to be changed.

title: The Polar Express

reviews.text: No matter how many times I watch this, it always brought me to tears! I only wish that I got to see it in 3D at the cinema.

reviews.text: It’s old and not as good as it used to be but still a great movie and a classic. One of the few movies I can show at work too😂

reviews.text: Although I’ve seen this movie more times than I can count, this year was special. Watching it through SharePlay & FaceTime with my 77 yr old parents who live 600 miles away made it “extra” special.

reviews.text: this whole movie feels like an extremely long video game cutscene . like it feels like you should be able to control it but you can’t... you just have to watch the Chaos

reviews.text: While the animation has not aged well, I always enjoy watching this movie during Christmas time. The story behind this movie is so fun to imagine and makes me want to be a kid again during Christmas.

reviews.text: One of my favorite Christmas movies. My family, since it’s release, has made a tradition to watch this movie every Christmas Eve. Just love how much of Christmas spirit this movie shows and how when you believe you’ll never loose the Christmas spirit.

summary: When a doubting young boy takes an extraordinary train ride to the North Pole, he embarks on a journey of self-discovery that shows him that the wonder of life never fades for those who believe.

title: Atomic Blonde

reviews.text: IN MY DREAMS I AM LORIANNE BROUGHTON, IN REALITY I AM MONA LISA VITO. OH WELL A GIRL CAN DREAM. CHARLIZE THERION IS ICEY COLD PERFECTION.

reviews.text: The action was very good but I think I was lost somewhere between the 2nd half of the movie regarding the plot... Don't expect too much.
