reviews.text: John Wick action but with a decent plot stringing it together. Still good the second time round. Theron gives a stellar performance. Great spy caper.
reviews.author: Reiko_lj

reviews.text: Great action scenes. Great soundtracks. Good storytelling. Amaaaazing lighting and editing. I just think the movie could be a little shorter and I wouldn't even blink my eye from beginning to end.
reviews.author: victordamasceno

reviews.text: Awesome movie that looks amazing and delivers a compelling story. Charlize Theron does a great job as a kick-ass agent and the soundtrack is really cool.
reviews.author: Agent24

reviews.text: Good action scenes, beautiful to look at, but I couldn't keep track of who was double crossing who and when. I guess if I really took my time and really super focused it's probably a brilliant plot, but that's not gonna happen.
reviews.author: Hellion Pickle

summary: An undercover MI6 agent is sent to Berlin during the Cold War to investigate the murder of a fellow agent and recover a missing list of double agents.

title: Apocalypse Z: The Beginning of the End

reviews.text: Its a bad movie, just don’t waste your time, it feels more like a tv movie, cheap and protagonist it’s very bad written, nothing feels natural.
reviews.author: alejandrogg

reviews.text: Just another zombie film. Unfortunately, the beginning of the pandemic is told very superficially and the characters also remain largely unfamiliar. The bottom line is that it's rather boring. 👀
reviews.author: Kaihar

reviews.text: This feels like a pure wish fulfillment fantasy. There is barely any plot here. The characters have no depth. Zombies are barely in the movie. I wish it focused more on the initial days of scavenging.
reviews.author: drbi

reviews.text: this was quite a surprise, as a zombie fan i gotta say this is great movie and possibly a start of a franchise. reminded me of 28 days later few times.. cant believe imdb rating is 6.0 at a time
reviews.author: JosipS85

reviews.text: Not awful but not brilliant. The film is good for about 1 hour, then the film starts to slow down and get confused about where it's going. It becomes very random. The movie ends well enough though. Worth a watch if you dont know what else to play.
reviews.author: DFlix2006

reviews.text: I've watched almost every zombie movie, even the terrible low-budget ones (for at least a few minutes). I enjoyed this one and am looking forward to a sequel. It's certainly a zombie movie but with a refreshing take. Manel is a very different type of hero and affects everyone he encounters.
reviews.author: depoteet

summary: When a kind of rabies that transforms people into aggressive creatures spreads across the planet, Manel isolates himself at home with his cat, relying on his wits to survive; but soon they must go out in search of food, by land and by sea, dodging many dangers.

title: The Swimming Pool

reviews.text: It is an interesting question whether this is a good film or not. In Europe, it has cult status – for a variety of reasons. And from today's perspective? The film seems a little too ‘contrived’, but it also conveys a certain attitude to life. This reduced, radical approach is difficult to understand today. However, I readily admit that I cannot escape the film's fascination – even though I know that it could never be made again in this way.
reviews.author: zisa

reviews.text: Perfectly looking after 4k remaster 55-year movie that can show how life was back then. Perfect visuals, set & costume design. I enjoyed watching it [spoiler]but was disappointed with how the movie ended. [/spoiler]
reviews.author: xever

reviews.text: I suspect this might be too methodically paced for audiences today, especially for a psychological thriller, but for me it was a completely hypnotic experience. I could not look away. It's one of the most scenic films ever made. I'm talking about both the location filming and the actors - Delon and Schneider absolutely sizzle. Alain Delon is excellent, but the film belongs to Romy Schneider. Those piercing blue eyes convey so much without saying a word. What a performance. Settle in, and let the film mesmerize you. In my view, it's one of the better 1960's films, and one of the better French films as well.
reviews.author: usuallee

reviews.text: I loved the film La Piscine. Given its age, I initially expected it to feel dull or outdated, but it turned out to be an excellent and captivating work. The story revolves around Jean-Claude and Marianne, a couple on holiday in the south of France, whose quiet retreat is disrupted by the arrival of Harry, Marianne’s former lover. The film skillfully weaves together a rich range of emotions—love, jealousy, hatred, joy, and sadness—set against a stunning backdrop: a villa in the south of France, in Ramatuelle. It is refreshing to witness a portrayal of life as it once was, without mobile phones or computers, and at the very beginnings of television.
reviews.author: Jo_67300

reviews.text: Now if I was on holiday with my partner enjoying the sunshine, [this movie] and plenty of sex, I don’t think I’d be very impressed at the arrival of their ex-lover and his teenage daughter. Even more inexplicably, it seems that “Marianne” (Romy Schneider) has actually invited “Harry” (Maurice Ronet) and “Pénélope” (Jane Birkin) to share the villa with the perplexed “Jean-Paul” (Alain Delon). It might be revenge or it might just be lust, but fairly swiftly the nose-out-of-joint “Jean-Paul” is becoming fond of the daughter whilst her father rather openly reminisces about and flirts with “Marianne”.
reviews.author: CinemaSerf

reviews.text: A real strong performance from Schneider and Delon, which together with the scenery makes this slow paced thriller a masterwork. Now unfortunately mostly forgotten Ronet also gives such a strong unpleasant personality to his character that when Delon kills him, the audience sides with the murderer.
reviews.author: julienpierre

summary: Set in a magnificent villa near a sun-drenched St. Tropez, lovers Jean-Paul and Marianne are spending a happy, lazy summer holiday. Their only concern is to gratify their mutual passion - until the day when Marianne invites her former lover and his beautiful teenage daughter to spend a few days with them. From the first moment, a certain uneasiness and tension begin to develop between the four, which soon escalates in a dangerous love-game.

title: Game Night

reviews.text: A fun, mid budget film that works because of the playful script and the chemistry between the leads. Also when it gets bloody, it doesn't hold back!
reviews.author: ziggymacarthur

reviews.text: marvellous lovely comedy movie which stand excellent with the brilliant couple _Rachel McAdams_ and _Jason Bateman_. I love this kind of smart naivety and special sense of humor :)
reviews.author: Steev1st

reviews.text: Decided I needed a fun movie to watch tonight and this one hit the spot again. Laughed numerous times and the cast, Bateman and McAdams especially, was amazing. **4.0/5**
reviews.author: JPV852

reviews.text: Frenetic, and slightly gamey nonsense, with fast paced dialogue that gives no pause for breath in this roller-coaster ride. It was fun, not uproariously funny, but it doesn't outstay its welcome. I'm a sucker for game-themed fare though.
reviews.author: amasulem

reviews.text: It was a fun movie that takes you for a wild ride. It’s amazing how comedy really seems to be dying now these days, but every once in a while something like this will come along and give you a breath of fresh air.
reviews.author: dnb_tim

reviews.text: Surprisingly funny. I actually really enjoyed the movie. I kind of expected it though; with a cast involving Jason Bateman and Rachel McAdams. Nothing too fancy, just a fun saturday night movie.
reviews.author: Marinka678

summary: Max and Annie's weekly game night gets kicked up a notch when Max's brother Brooks arranges a murder mystery party -- complete with fake thugs and federal agents. So when Brooks gets kidnapped, it's all supposed to be part of the game. As the competitors set out to solve the case, they start to learn that neither the game nor Brooks are what they seem to be. The friends soon find themselves in over their heads as each twist leads to another unexpected turn over the course of one chaotic night.

title: Superman Returns

reviews.text: The story of the film is a good closure of the original first two films plots. Visually, it is also not missing anything. However, the movie has one major drawback, it is too long for the common man. The action is developing too slowly, which, unfortunately, is very discouraging today.
reviews.author: Idek

reviews.text: Superman - 8 Superman II - 9 Superman III - 8 Superman IV - 7 [this movie] - 5 Man Of Steel - 3 Superman 2025 - 1
reviews.author: The Ace Face

reviews.text: Worst casted Superman movie EVER!!! I remember how all the actors complimented each other on their roles just to find out on release they were all just blowing smoke up each others' asses. Pfff!! What a joke!!! I personally think this movie ruined Brandon Routh's career. Avoid this MOVIE AT ALL COSTS!!!
reviews.author: WitWolfy

reviews.text: I had heard mixed/bad things about this movie and never got around to it when it came out. After watching it, I am pretty sure this is second favorite Superman film behind the 1978 version. It captured the tone and feel of what I expect of Superman. The plot was good. The action was really good. Rating: 3/5 - 75% - Worth Watching
reviews.author: Copeland1994

reviews.text: Brandon Routh makes an amazing superman, with Kevin Spacey as the perfect foil to this. I finally decided to watch this movie, and I was not displeased at all. At the time of release, I thought this would not be so good. I was wrong. I'm also glad that this Superman will be seen in the Arrowverse.
reviews.author: apokalupsis

reviews.text: A tentative to reboot the character that does though not really work. While the special effects are up to date, the story is just bad and the cast does not really convince. I recommend that you skip from Christopher Reeve (first two movies) to Man of Steel, with Henry Cavill. This one is not terrible but also not really worth watching.
reviews.author: siggi963

summary: Superman returns to discover his 5-year absence has allowed Lex Luthor to walk free, and that those he was closest to felt abandoned and have moved on. Luthor plots his ultimate revenge that could see millions killed and change the face of the planet forever, as well as ridding himself of the Man of Steel.

title: Tomb Raider

reviews.text: This movie might not be winning any storytelling prices, but I personally thought it was all quite fun and entertaining. The visuals all looked really vivid and vibrant as well.
reviews.author: Imme van Gorp

reviews.text: this is a well done movie and aside from some sfx hiccups i have zero complaints - but it made me finally realize i'm REALLY bored by action films. if action films are your thing though i can absolutely recommend this!
reviews.author: birdcages

reviews.text: This movie isn't as bad as everyone says it is, it's a decent action flick (7.5). if you like Lara Croft, and have played the most recent trilogy, give it a watch.
reviews.author: Subatomic8486

reviews.text: Some of the most generic shit ever put to screen. Don't get how this was supposed to please anybody, [this movie] fan or otherwise. _Final rating:★★ - Had some things that appeal to me, but a poor finished product._
reviews.author: Gimly

reviews.text: It's supposedly Lara's early days, but Jolie had more charisma and that same confidence as the heroine straight out of the game. P.S. A small plus for the sneaking scene in the camp, almost like in stealth games. ;)
reviews.author: Idek

reviews.text: I've seen it back in 2018 and I though the movie was ok, almost 6 years later I'm rewatching it and I love it even more! So sad that we will never see a sequel with Alicia Vikander again...
reviews.author: hexpresso

summary: Lara Croft, the fiercely independent daughter of a missing adventurer, must push herself beyond her limits when she finds herself on the island where her father disappeared.

title: 8 Mile

reviews.text: Eminem turned out to be a pretty decent actor. I love battle raps. Honestly he's one of if not the best to ever do it!
reviews.author: Andre Gonzales

reviews.text: I haven't seen this one since it came out and even though the plot has a lot of unresolved threads the novelty hasn’t worn off.
reviews.author: TimeRaider

reviews.text: Honestly, from a music standpoint, this movie gets an extra point from me. I've always head about how great [this movie] was but to finally be able to watch it.... just wow
reviews.author: Gamecreator2002

reviews.text: ★★★★☆ (4/5) Raw, intense, and grounded in authenticity. Eminem brings surprising vulnerability to the role, and the battle rap sequences feel electric and real. It’s a classic underdog story at its core, but the gritty Detroit backdrop gives it weight and edge. Focused, powerful, and capped off with an unforgettable final showdown.
reviews.author: fulltimewatcher

reviews.text: I'm not a fan of the plot of the movie, but you better lose yourself in the music, the moment You own it, you better never let it go You only get one shot, do not miss your chance to blow This opportunity comes once in a lifetime .....
reviews.author: Spivey

reviews.text: Haven’t watched this one in ages and it was a blast to revisit! Eminem isn’t the greatest actor in the world, but he sells this role for obvious reasons. One of the oldest (and best) biopics that I can recall before they were the hot craze. Rating: 4/5 - 85% - Would Recommend
reviews.author: Copeland1994

summary: For Jimmy Smith, Jr., life is a daily fight just to keep hope alive. Feeding his dreams in Detroit's vibrant music scene, Jimmy wages an extraordinary personal struggle to find his own voice - and earn a place in a world where rhymes rule, legends are born and every moment… is another chance.

title: Mrs. Doubtfire

reviews.text: Seriously how can this only have a rating of 75% crazy...one of the funniest films ever. A film you can watch many times over without getting bored.
reviews.author: Last Impressions

reviews.text: A good Robin Williams comedy for the whole family. Some like not more than myself, and I can understand why. They are better able to ignore the rather unrealistic story. Still good entertainment.
reviews.author: siggi963

reviews.text: I almost forgot how much I absolutely adored this film, one of Robin Williams' finest, (in my opinion). This is a really nice heartwarming, family comedy for all to enjoy. I would recommend this to anyone.
reviews.author: jmcornish-deleted-1783239869

reviews.text: ★★★★☆ (4/5) Heartfelt and hilarious in equal measure. Robin Williams is at his absolute best here, balancing rapid-fire comedy with genuine emotional depth. Beneath the disguises and chaos, it’s a surprisingly sincere story about family and separation. Funny, warm, and still deeply touching.
reviews.author: fulltimewatcher

reviews.text: "[this movie]" is an extremely funny and heartfelt film. It has tons of laughs as well as tears, this is definitly Robin Williams' best film. Watching williams do voices as well as play [this movie] is a real treat. Also the supporting cast of actors do an excellent job, I highly reccomend it.
reviews.author: AlexanderZ

reviews.text: This film was hysterical. Robin Williams was perfect for this role and it was one of the funniest movies I have ever seen. The movie did receive a PG-13 rating for inappropriate content. It is really sa because the movie would have been funny without any of it. I would have given this movies a much higher rating had it not been for the bad content. It probably would have even made my top 10 movies.
reviews.author: Panhead

summary: Loving but irresponsible dad Daniel Hillard, estranged from his exasperated spouse, is crushed by a court order allowing only weekly visits with his kids. When Daniel learns his ex needs a housekeeper, he gets the job -- disguised as a British nanny. Soon he becomes not only his children's best pal but the kind of parent he should have been from the start.

title: Inferno

reviews.text: Yet another reason for me to never listen to modern reviews. I quite enjoyed that. Actually I liked it far better than the previous two movies.
reviews.author: jekyl6669

reviews.text: Book was good, movie was beeeeeh If you havent read the book you dont have any clue what you are watching. I'll spare you the trouble, just dont watch this one, skip it!
reviews.author: Bassieh

reviews.text: I think this movie is the worst of the 3, don't know ho it has better ratings on some sites than the first 2, I don't think people understand what is a good movie
reviews.author: SpuppolSenpai

reviews.text: While I generally enjoyed the earlier installments in this series I can't imagine what Hanks was thinking when he went back to the well one more time. Woof.
reviews.author: AdamMorgan

reviews.text: Third Langdon outing runs on momentum rather than mystery — the symbology puzzle-box format is increasingly mechanical. Hanks remains watchable; the conspiracy stakes feel recycled. Genre comfort, diminishing returns.
reviews.author: RedRudolf

reviews.text: Compared to the first two movies in the Robert Langdon series, this was a poor and disappointing movie.. Slow and full of plot holes, this does not represent Tom Hanks wonderful acting at all.
reviews.author: Burningrose

summary: After waking up in a hospital with amnesia, professor Robert Langdon and a doctor must race against time to foil a deadly global plot.

title: The Roundup

reviews.text: A very funny and action-packed Korean movie, the main character is so overpowered though. I feel like we made a mistake watching this one before the first one, but it all still made sense.
reviews.author: Chinalover33

reviews.text: It's still weird to see how police officers don't have any weapon against criminals in South Korea. Nonetheless, the second movie is great and matches the first one for sure. Action scenes with the big guy are awesome!
reviews.author: ragnarLothbrok

reviews.text: The sequel to "The outlaws" (2017) lives up to the original, though the antagonist is a less exhilarating threat against Ma Dong-Seok. A story of kidnappers in Vietnam that uses cultural disagreements as the main humorous resource, with a certain air of superiority from the Koreans, and taking little advantage of the Vietnamese scenario. Choosing machetes and knives as the main weapon in the excellent fight choreography brings forcefulness and brutality.
reviews.author: miguelreina

reviews.text: South Korea is rapidly developing something of a reputation for quality action crime dramas. [this movie], the latest of a series of gritty crime dramas is yet another success story. Based around a simple formula, they pit the worst of organised criminals against a no nonsense hard man Korean copper and his team. Of course, we know the outcome but the ride is well worth taking, nonetheless. I did find this latest film a little slow at first but it picks up pace in the second half, delivering no shortage of thrills and violence with a simple but functional, back story.
reviews.author: MovieGuys

reviews.text: Since _[this movie]_ is a South Korean film, it feels like it’s able to break away from whatever expectations you may have for an American made action blockbuster. It may be an action and a crime film, but it also adds elements of drama and is borderline horror at times with how extreme some of the action sequences are. Don Lee has undeniable magnetic charisma and is overflowing with unbelievable talent. He’s a certified, bone-breaking megastar. _[this movie]_ is a savagely captivating action extravaganza with lightning fast action and brilliant performances. **Full review:**
reviews.author: Chris Sawin

reviews.text: Brutal, Adrenaline Pumping, Hillarious [this movie] is a riotously entertaining action comedy which takes its genre quite seriously. Following up as a sequel to blockbuster The Outlaws, [this movie] serves as yet another high octane actioner with superior stunt choreography and subtle humor which easily sparks a giggle. An enticing screenplay and a terrifying villain keeps you predicting and engaged. Don Lee is the king of mass action flicks in Korea and he proves it again and again. His mere presence makes the film likeable. The most satisfying part of any Don Lee movie is when he punches his heavy hands on the baddies and this one has plenty of it.
reviews.author: ritz657

summary: The 'Beast Cop' Ma Seok-do heads to a foreign country to extradite a suspect, but soon after his arrival, he discovers additional murder cases and hears about a vicious killer who has been committing crimes against tourists for several years.

title: Blue Is the Warmest Color

reviews.text: Adele: I miss you. I miss not touching each other. Not seeing each other, not breathing in each other. I want you. All the time. No one else.
reviews.author: President303

reviews.text: I became obsessed with Adele Exarchopoulos after seeing this. Didn't even have to look up that spelling. I ordered a custom-made 32" x 48" ish sized poster of her for my apartment that's still around somewhere. I'm pretty sure I tried to find her on snapchat. Thanks for reading.
reviews.author: tmdb47633491

reviews.text: a very special movie, as sp1ti said this movie isn't about the gender in this, it's about what love can go thru during life. two kinds of people from different worlds fall in love and have to deal with this. The first sex scene looks like bit fake for me, i just can't get the feeling between the girls, it's kinda a hilarious scene.
reviews.author: moniquecorrea

reviews.text: Yes, there are a few medium-core sex scenes in the film (hence the NC-17 rating), but this story would've worked extremely well even without them. It's a beautiful and very real love story and the main actresses were brilliant. It's hard to get the body language right for roles like these but they both nailed it. You could really feel what they were going through.
reviews.author: coachglove

reviews.text: I admit I bought the DVD to watch the lesbian sex scenes, which was the same motivation to buy "Carol" (which has a lot less sex scenes). But after a few more viewings I was enchanted by this love story & Lea Seydoux & Adele Exarchopoulos displayed an acting masterpiece. It's hard not to fall in love with Adele.
reviews.author: TheGloriousSOB

reviews.text: Honestly, I'm not really sure what the hype was about. The movie dragged, the prolonged sex scenes were unnecessary, and like in many other LGBT/queer films the story ends in calamity. It romanticizes the all-too-common gay/lesbian tragedy theme we see over and over in queer films without so much as a strong representation of the gay community. Also, I'm not a fan of the bi-erasure and misogyny portrayed in this film. The only reason my scoring isn't any lower is because Seydoux and Exarchopoulos' acting were exceptional.
reviews.author: yojeum

summary: Adèle's life is changed when she meets Emma, a young woman with blue hair, who will allow her to discover desire, to assert herself as a woman and as an adult. In front of others, Adele grows, seeks herself, loses herself, finds herself.

title: The Searchers

reviews.text: Some gorgeous cinematography, arguable some of the best. That mixed with the dark and mature themes of racism make this one of the best Duke movies I've ever seen.
reviews.author: jekyl6669

reviews.text: I've been a 'wild west' fan and read many books on this genre. Also watched a bunch of movies. But no other movie could show me any better western setting than this one as I fantasized while reading books.
reviews.author: iam_rasel

reviews.text: Loved the fight scene near the end, and the cinematography. Other than that, it was racist as hell. I am not talking about the main character. Indians were portrayed as plain villains. Like they always rape and kill people and our sweet white people are always the victim. I am white too, but it really irritated me.
reviews.author: Sacrer

reviews.text: The movie I saw before "[this movie]" was "Monster Hunter". I considered that movie to be pretty boring, uninspired and with shockingly one-dimensional characters. Then I saw [this movie] and everything was just as bad. Incredible that this was once considered a milestone. The only part that brought me some joy or entertainment was Vera Miles reading her letters.
reviews.author: Silrog

reviews.text: My background: I have been a fan of Westerns for a while now, but I had yet to dip into what are widely guarded as the "classics". I decided to give this film a look after being told for my entire life about what a classic it is. This movie is regularly in the top 5 (and often #1) on the 'best westerns' list. Is the movie important? Sure, for a variety of reasons. It influenced a generation of young filmmakers. It offered groundbreaking cinematography. But much of what makes this movie important is its imperfections.
reviews.author: AdamMorgan

reviews.text: A John Ford masterwork that's rich and spacious, just like the gorgeous western countryside that splashes every backdrop. John Wayne plays a flawed centerpiece, a grizzled former soldier with a chip on his shoulder and a strange, conflicted relationship with his extended family. As usual, cool confidence and raw masculinity seep from his pores and he takes hold of each scene with a pair of strong, old cowherder's hands. This is a film that rewards an active imagination, as there's much going on between the lines that, without being spelled out, brands the cast with an unusual level of depth and detail.
reviews.author: drqshadow

summary: As a Civil War veteran spends years searching for a young niece captured by Indians, his motivation becomes increasingly questionable.

title: Paris, Texas

reviews.text: A masterpiece of minimalism, especially in the quietly powerful performances. Every silence and every glance speaks volumes. Deep, melancholic, and visually poetic. An absolute must-watch, no ifs or buts.
reviews.author: Benedetto21

reviews.text: Incredibly stylish, first two thirds are a little slow but it all pays off in the last. Visually just gorgeous and the feelgood story has enough substance to match
reviews.author: FinnNegan

reviews.text: Like a LDR song, this makes you lonesome for a place you've never been and few people have ever looked so beautiful on film as Nastassja Kinski in [this movie].
reviews.author: mk677hd

reviews.text: There’s nothing more beautiful in film than a simple story about life’s most important emotions told in the most sincere, stripped back, reflective way, where you can tell each shot was intentional and well thought out and the visuals stunning but still quiet.
reviews.author: 2016moonlight

reviews.text: If a movie is described as a "slow burn," it means long, slow paced, and drawn out, and that it could have been a little more interesting along the way to getting where it's going. We've watched half of it last night, and it sure better be going somewhere. We'll find out tonight if it does.
reviews.author: kaayo

reviews.text: I only watched this movie for the first time this year. I am 30 years old and am now wondering why didn't i see this earlier. What a movie, it left me moved and i can't stop thinking about it. I am in love with this film, and it will be one i treasure for the rest of my years.
reviews.author: drjoyce

summary: A man wanders out of the desert not knowing who he is. His brother finds him, and helps to pull his memory back of the life he led before he walked out on his family and disappeared four years earlier.

title: The Deer Hunter

reviews.text: Every nation has its sins that it must deal with. Here, Americans try to overcome the trauma of Vietnam in the light of American small-town dramas.
reviews.author: Idek

reviews.text: Great to see all these legends in this cast and the movie was really well made with something to say but i expected more because it was really slow at times.Still a very good movie that you don't forget easily 7.4/10 Movie no1000
reviews.author: Horror future #7

reviews.text: Thoroughly engrossing and beyond heartbreaking. A group of actors at the top of their game plus Cimino's patience in living with these characters and allowing them to breathe combines to form what might be my favorite Vietnam movie. My attention was rapt throughout, and I was shook by the end.
reviews.author: soonertbone

reviews.text: [this movie] fails in some very basic areas. Long stretches struggle to justify their run time, characters are underdeveloped, and the story is uneven and unfocused. There are moments that captivate, but they’re surrounded by odd choices that disrupt tension and undercut emotional impact. At times, it feels as though entire plot-building sequences are missing. The film reaches for something meaningful, but it never earns it.
reviews.author: fasterfilmcritic

reviews.text: Slow pace movie which nicely depicts the life of worker class Russian inmigrants in USA and the impact that its young generation receives from Vietnam's war. The actual shock cause being the crazy game of the Russian roulette only helps from the artistic point of view of the film but it is well blended into the actual story.
reviews.author: Andres Gomez

reviews.text: Way too much time is spent setting up a bunch of (mostly) unlikeable guys. The first hour could have been cut in half easily. The rest had some amazing scenes (the Russian Roulette obviously), but gets slow and sloppy again in the final hour. De Niro carries this movie and I think this could’ve been more, but it’s not bad by a long shot.
reviews.author: JoeyvanAwesome

summary: Three steelworkers enlist in the army and are sent to Vietnam, one leaving behind a rushed marriage, the others a shared love. What they encounter during the war changes their lives forever.

title: Predator 2

reviews.text: I respect the filmmakers for trying something different and not repeating the same formula that worked before. Having said that, it's just too silly and over the top.
reviews.author: The_Argentinian

reviews.text: I am watching this movie moor than 40 times.the first time when i am kid 5 years old in that time he was ferry scary to me,i have good memoris with hem.
reviews.author: ghazwan karsifi

reviews.text: The film has unfortunately aged, which, given the film's relatively low ratings at the begining, spoils the reception. It's a shame, because this quasi-Robocop future atmosphere had its slight advantages.
reviews.author: Idek

reviews.text: Off-topic but it's hilarious that gunfire aside the city of Los Angeles is better off in this movie than with the anti ICE riots going on as of June 2025.
reviews.author: Astranora

reviews.text: It just doesn't have the same charm that the original did. Danny Glover is a good actor but he is no Arnold Schwarzenegger. Bill Paxton is great though. The city setting is an interesting idea but it is just so absurd that it doesn't work.
reviews.author: nmahoney416

reviews.text: Some stuff just doesn’t age well and isn’t as iconic as the first movie Jerry’s jokes really fall flat for me I’m currently in my third movie of this franchise cause I’m watching in chronological order and this is the weakest one so far Prey and the Original [this movie] are both better
reviews.author: KingJordi

summary: A police chief in the war-torn streets of Los Angeles discovers that an extraterrestrial creature is hunting down residents - and that he is the next target.

title: Into the Storm

reviews.text: Corny acting and cliches, but fun watch. Has some pretty good action shots with nice visual effects and surround sound. Not a keeper but worth the watch.
reviews.author: hostile

reviews.text: Agree with hostile - very corny acting, but movie is saved from full pan by tornado action scenes. First 40% of movie is stupid until first tornado touches down. Sarah Wayne Callies is not bad to look at either.
reviews.author: elclarkey

reviews.text: Yeah... it's pretty bland and forgettable. With as much great action and special effects as are in this, it's surprisingly boring. This ain't no twister.
reviews.author: jekyl6669

reviews.text: Entertaining movie with, at times, amazing special effects. Dialogue and relationships between the cast quite bizarre at times. I preferred a Twister as a movie which felt more realistic.
reviews.author: Danio-1972

reviews.text: Weather channel: The movie. I was expecting less but in fact enjoyed it more than Twister. Of course it is predictable and some scenes are not made according to our Universe physics, but well, this is a movie.
reviews.author: Michal

reviews.text: This is another one of those films that reminds mankind that if nature were really to take against us all, it could eridcate us without too much difficulty. This natural disaster movie is a variation on the "Twister" theme as the sleepy Oklahoma town of "Silverton" prepares for graduation day without the faintest clue that the valedictory speechifying is about to be cut short. Meantime, some [this movie] chasers are honing in on the radar clues that suggest that this could well be a super-[this movie].
reviews.author: CinemaSerf

summary: As a new day begins in the town of Silverton, its residents have little reason to believe it will be anything other than ordinary. Mother Nature, however has other plans. In the span of just a few hours, an unprecedented onslaught of powerful tornadoes ravages Silverton. Storm trackers predict that the worst is still to come, as terrified residents seek shelter, and professional storm-chasers run toward the danger, hoping to study the phenomenon close up and get a once-in-a-lifetime shot.

title: Knight and Day

reviews.text: i really went into this to make use of my amazon prime membership but holy heck it was enjoyable! cameron and tom worked really well together! so much fun!
reviews.author: itsavonell

reviews.text: 8/10 This was so much fun😂 that scene where Tom is swinging by the door this is what an action comedy is supposed to be.
reviews.author: Rickyrick-02

reviews.text: Started off really funny and all in all was a really pleasant movie. Each time I saw Tom Cruise topless I puked in my mouth a little, though.
reviews.author: SweatLoveBeer

reviews.text: Great action comedy. I really thought that he was crazy at first! And that scene - he's hanging inverted swinging left & right saying - "June i know this looks bad but we're gonna get through this" 😂😂
reviews.author: 2111anixt

reviews.text: the most thing that should be talked about within this movie is the chemistry between Cameron Diaz and Tom cruise like SO GOOD it's also a very enjoyable movie, such a sweet romance and a satisfying comedy
reviews.author: ima senpai

reviews.text: Don't understand the hate this one seems to get. Is it a perfect movie? No. Is it a fun movie? Hell yes. Not everything has to be a magnificent cinematic achievement. Sometimes it's nice to have a movie to just vege out in front of and have a laugh. This definitely delivers that.
reviews.author: tyrannic_puppy

summary: A fugitive couple goes on a glamorous and sometimes deadly adventure where nothing and no one – even themselves – are what they seem. Amid shifting alliances and unexpected betrayals, they race across the globe, with their survival ultimately hinging on the battle of truth vs. trust.

title: Peter Pan

reviews.text: It is a little slow until they get to Neverland but then it gets good. I love Smee and captain hook and of course the crocodile.
reviews.author: nmahoney416

reviews.text: Yeah we all know it wouldn’t hold up today because of a certain group depicted here. Captain Hook might be one of my favorite of classic Disney villains. This and probably the Hook one are one of the best of [this movie] adaptations.
reviews.author: Rin J Tohsaka

reviews.text: I went to Disney not long back, and after going on the [this movie] ride I was hyped to re watch this classic and many more from my childhood, and It's true as walt disney says 'you're never too old for Disney' and as [this movie] says never grow up... super as always!
reviews.author: CinemanicBonkers

reviews.text: I'm a huge fan of the entire [this movie] universe, and many of the modern perceptions stem from this iconic masterpiece. Yes, like Pan himself, the movie is flawed (stays too close to the source material, some dubious accents in the voice acting (I'm looking at you, Smee), some politically incorrect stereotypes and sexism) but the animation is top notch--even by today's standards--and the character of Pan in all his boyish charm and male egoism is rendered as perfectly as the art.
reviews.author: Saint Pauly

reviews.text: As soon as Mr. Smee opened his mouth, I knew I'd heard his voice before (and I don't mean from watching this movie as a kid). Adult me is highly amused to find that Smee shares his voice actor with the White Rabbit from _Alice in Wonderland_ (1951)—Bill Thompson. Turns out Kathryn Beaumont (Wendy) was also the voice of Alice in the same film.
reviews.author: dgw

reviews.text: An ideal subject for Walt Disney this one - a charming, humorous adventure with great characters. Before you start watching, do bear in mind that JM Barrie created the "[this movie]" character at the very start of the 20th century, so some of the language and roles are a touch on the stereotypical side - but that ought not to unduly spoil this experience. The "Darlings" are a loving, but pretty dysfunctional family with a huge great dog "Nana" whose three children all share the nursery in the attic of the family home.
reviews.author: CinemaSerf

summary: Leaving the safety of their nursery behind, Wendy, Michael and John follow Peter Pan to a magical world where childhood lasts forever. But while in Neverland, the kids must face Captain Hook and foil his attempts to get rid of Peter for good.

title: Plankton: The Movie

reviews.text: The SpongeBob movie you never knew you didn't want. A movie focusing on [this movie]'s marriage to Karen, where everything meant to be unpredictable just comes off as random.
reviews.author: Saint Pauly

reviews.text: I've always kinda liked this cartoon even when my Son was young and he didn't think much of it. I enjoyed watching this movie and the newer animations where an ok touch.
reviews.author: midwestchopper

reviews.text: I know I’m a 23 year old man watching this shit but it’s just awful I was bored in the first 20 mins. They took SpongeBob and turned into a Disney movie and it’s as bad as it sounds.
reviews.author: cliffy125

reviews.text: Pretty cute family fluff (although [this movie]’s butt is on full display a few times), and Mr. Krabs as this full-on rebellion leader in Bikini Bottom is a cool little thing in here.
reviews.author: Sherminator2049

reviews.text: An improvement on the Sandy movie, only on the level of being just boring instead of outright terrible. The change in animation styles is nice, and the romance is cute enough. The songs are bland but inoffensive. You’re not missing much if you skip this one, but you’re not suffering much either.
reviews.author: JC230

reviews.text: I walked in on my niece and nephew watching this and thought “huh? SpongeBob? Is that you?” Decided to join them and this is is much more unhinged and absurd than I was expecting. The animation is shit for the most part except for some really trippy scenes. I especially enjoyed Karen’s vision for dominating the universe. Some trippy ass visuals for my stoned ass. [this movie]’s backstory is actually kinda sweet but Karen’s computer chip debacle is silly. I’m just glad to see SpongeBob is still alive and kickin’ to this day.
reviews.author: TheAmnesiac

summary: Plankton's tangled love story with his sentient computer wife goes sideways when she takes a stand — and decides to destroy the world without him.

title: The Hitman's Bodyguard

reviews.text: Fast-paced action, a bit of humor, a plot without any major blunders and a top-notch cast. What more could you want? ps. Samuel rules! :)

reviews.text: this is about the funniest action movie i've ever seen ! ryan reynolds' class, just as in 6 underground + samuel l. jackson, that's supreme.

reviews.text: It's sound track goes with It's action, [this movie] and the [this movie] make a great comedy duo act and yes I'd like to see a motherfucking sequel with the same fun but more and better. XD

reviews.text: Very funny movie... Very funny dialogs... Superb adventure scenes also Samuel and Reynolds have amazing chemistry... You must see if you want to spend 2 amazing hours

reviews.text: Why on earth the start of this film is set in Manchester and Coventry when it's clearly all shot in London is beyond me. London has better international recognition anyway...

reviews.text: Total blast of a buddy road movie. Some of the jokes are a little try-hard and cringey, but Reynolds and Jackson share great chemistry, and make it fun. Lots of really solid action too, which I was not expecting.

summary: The world’s top bodyguard gets a new client, a hitman who must testify at the International Court of Justice. They must put their differences aside and work together to make it to the trial on time.

title: Coherence

reviews.text: This movie is such a hidden gem. It’s unbelievable that movies which cost 500 million dollars are not even 1 % as interesting than this movie.

reviews.text: Wow, such a good movie that makes you dizzled. It's recommended for people who are not into scary movies but loves some kind of overdose mystery

reviews.text: Finally decided to watch this one tonight and am glad we did. Low budget and not without its faults, but quite an engrossing little mind melter. Pay attention and enjoy. 7.4

reviews.text: Exciting, fun and trippy movie! Definitely a thinker and you need to lock in. don't get distracted and keep an open mind when enjoying this sci-fi!

reviews.text: Amazing movie. Truly underrated. Deserves so much more attention than its getting. I got to know they finished the filming in just 5 days and with the budget of 50 grand which is commendable!

reviews.text: This was much more than I bargained for. I was expecting some ok B-movie, but this is amazing! A lot of detail there, pay attention! Shoutout to my fresh existential crisis.

summary: Four couples gather for dinner the night a mysterious and powerful comet passes overhead.

title: Deepwater Horizon

reviews.text: A tragic true story, but the film didn't engage me emotionally. Good performances, however, and a worthy testament to those who suffered because of the event.
reviews.author: Lee Brown Barrow

reviews.text: heartbreaking movie. very intense and well acted. nothing else to say to this true story movie. loved the cast! just such a disaster and the lost souls.
reviews.author: mounirabbas

reviews.text: Really good movie with a sad and touching true story. This disaster was the worse oil disaster is US history. Movie depicted it well. Has you feeling and tense the whole movie.

reviews.text: Movies based on real stories like this one are always good. I remember the accident happened when I was a child and didn't how severe it was, but now I do. RIP.

reviews.text: what a beautiful movie full of many feelings that come loose on you especially on the last of the movie. i love true stories always comes to you full of emotions. nice story [this movie].

reviews.text: I don't think I've ever seen such an intense explosion sequence in any movie ever, incredible. Also everything else was way above par, pretty good movie with some solid performances - well worth the view.

summary: A story set on the offshore drilling rig Deepwater Horizon, which exploded during April 2010 and created the worst oil spill in U.S. history.

title: Apollo 13

reviews.text: [this movie] on 4k UHD never looked better than now. Rich colors, strong contrast. HDR10 sometimes helps sometimes is invisible. DTS track was redesigned but little less punchier as I’ve expected. Rocket launching is nice but not perfect.
reviews.author: svorenp

reviews.text: I remembered it well, but it was better. It transmits very well the anguish of those who are below and those who are above. And you know, Houston, we have a problem
reviews.author: juliosoft

reviews.text: A good movie with a true and interesting story that highlights how humanity, even in the face of difficulties, can progress through creativity and unity. The film captures this essence well, showing how seemingly unsolvable problems can be overcome when we work together.
reviews.author: Belenus

reviews.text: Ein absoluter Filmklassiker über einen der schwersten Raumfahrtunfälle unserer Zeit. Der Film ist spannend und das Schauspiel wirklich gut. Toller Film, muss man mal gesehen haben.
reviews.author: _kappa87_

reviews.text: [this movie] tells an incredible story, and it tells it well. It sets up the problem early, defines the stakes clearly, and never drifts. The performances are strong and believable, never pulling attention away from the story itself. [this movie] may not be the best movie about an [this movie] mission, but it is a damn good one.
reviews.author: fasterfilmcritic

reviews.text: Howard seems to remain slavish to authenticity, and it makes the film seem mechanical at times, but the movie is still engaging and tense enough throughout, even knowing the endgame. The cast are all around solid, especially Sinise. It's a nice window into a piece of American history.
reviews.author: jekyl6669

summary: The true story of technical troubles that scuttle the Apollo 13 lunar mission in 1970, risking the lives of astronaut Jim Lovell and his crew, with the failed journey turning into a thrilling saga of heroism. Drifting more than 200,000 miles from Earth, the astronauts work furiously with the ground crew to avert tragedy.

title: The Untouchables

reviews.text: I don't get the love for this one. Weak script, some really rough performances--it all plods along and never gins up much excitement for me.
reviews.author: soonertbone

reviews.text: Based on the true story of Eliott Ness, the guy who brought Al Capone to justice. Great movie, great atmosphere excellent cast that delivers. Just a great movie.
reviews.author: siggi963

reviews.text: Great movie. Eventhough it’s so over the top and some-what comical. When Ness’ team takes on bad guys in one scene. That you don’t expect the film to take such a violent and dark turn. When his team members start to be violently taken out.
reviews.author: Jim222001

reviews.text: I decided to watch this because of how lauded it was. Big mistake. Terrible acting from everyone other than Connery. Movie is overall just cringy. What the hell is the message even supposed to be, that you have to commit crimes to catch criminals? Terrible
reviews.author: natelaszlo

reviews.text: It's almost impressive how bad this movie is. None of the characters are likeable, none of the actors do a good job, with the exception of Connery. It's probably pretty difficult to make an audience empathize with a character like Ness, but a smarter director would have recognized that and adjusted accordingly.
reviews.author: Torgo

reviews.text: Maybe if i watched it in the 90's i would have appreciated it a little more. The fact that it escaped me so long i think makes even my consumption biased. I thought it was too cheesy to truly appreciate. I think i've been spoiled by the rawness of Boardwalk Empire for movies set in this era.
reviews.author: roryconeill

summary: Elliot Ness, an ambitious prohibition agent, is determined to take down Al Capone. In order to achieve this goal, he forms a group given the nickname “The Untouchables”.

title: Hansel & Gretel: Witch Hunters

reviews.text: The idea of adult [this movie] being in the witch-killing business is not bad, but the execution is. The movie is primarily dumb. If it was as funny as it is dumb, that would've been ok, but it wasn't. So what do we have: a cookie-cutter story, bad one-liners and shoddy special effects with bolt-on '3D-moments'. As I said, I liked the premise and some small ideas like Hansel suffering from diabetes. The rest is very forgettable.
reviews.author: johnny_poncho

reviews.text: I know... It is a bad movie, filled with clichés and so predictable. But it was fun! And it has blood and entrails, and a girl kicking ass. How was I suppose not to like it? But yeah, the CGI seemed a bit sketchy and the plot could be something better. I did like [this movie]'s character, it seemed somewhat feminist, and it was interesting to see Hansel with diabetes.
reviews.author: White_Lady

reviews.text: I saw this back in 2013 (according to my Facebook "On This Day" post), and one part I found hilarious was when Hansel did a somersault through the door and got hit with a frying pan to the face! It all happened so quick, it might go unnoticed. I had to rewind it to make sure I caught it and had a good laugh. LOL
reviews.author: Roth

reviews.text: “Fairy tale”… but make it loud and violent. It takes that simple story and just turns it into an action setup, witches, guns, blood, all of it exaggerated on purpose. No attempt to be subtle, just straight into chaos. Some of it works because of that attitude. It knows what it is and leans into it. But after a point, it starts feeling repetitive, same kind of action, same tone, nothing really evolving. It’s fun in short bursts, just not something that holds up for long.
reviews.author: patelritiq

reviews.text: This is a movie which you watch for the action and the special effects and pretty much nothing else. As such it is a excellent movie. The original story of [this movie] is essentially only used to boot this movie. The movie itself plays out when [this movie] are adult witch hunters. The movie is pretty much action all the way. It is fairly violent and goory action at that. It is not a movie for the kids. To me this is an advantage. I do not think I would have liked it as much if they had dumbed it down to a standard PG-rated Hollywood creation.
reviews.author: Dark Jedi

reviews.text: I am pretty sure I watched this movie back in 2013 when it first came out and I did not enjoy it much back then. I am not sure if the version I watched today was some kind of remaster, but this time around I really had fun with it. I loved this modern, darker take on the classic fairy tale, and it felt way more entertaining than I remembered. It did get a little slow toward the end, but overall it was way more metal and awesome than I expected. Gemma was especially great in her role, bringing a lot of attitude and energy that made the character really stand out and added to the fun of the movie.
reviews.author: durack

summary: After getting a taste for blood as children, Hansel and Gretel have become the ultimate vigilantes, hell-bent on retribution. Now, unbeknownst to them, Hansel and Gretel have become the hunted, and must face an evil far greater than witches... their past.

title: Y Tu Mamá También

reviews.text: I loved it. I loved the story, the acting, the cinematography (those long takes), the emotions, everything. Just a fantastic coming of age road trip movie.
reviews.author: nmahoney416

reviews.text: "[this movie]" is a stunning exploration of sexuality, frienship, social class and a nuanced exploration of Mexican culture and society, and the issues that affect its people
reviews.author: ashray.bhandare

reviews.text: Y Tu Mama Tambien is a coming-of-age story about sexuality and betrayal. It's a sad story, but it's real. Cinematically, there is much to praise.
reviews.author: fasterfilmcritic

reviews.text: And so it is, I have finally watched this film. It was awesome, had such a good time watching it and the social commentary as the backdrop (and simultaneously the stand out feature) for the film was really hard-hitting and my favourite part. i freaking love road movies and this is definitely one of the best.
reviews.author: 2016moonlight

reviews.text: A nearly perfect coming-of-age film about sexual discovery. Beautifully acted and incredibly well shot, it contains many of the trademarks that would go on to define Cuarón from here. However, there is a major, glaring flaw with the film: the narration. So much of the exposition and character development is achieved by spoonfeeding, it even highlights some of the subtleties that are already clear if you’re paying attention. Some of the added context is interesting, a lot of it is unnecessary. Besides that, I thought this was emotionally reasonant, profound and technically impressive.
reviews.author: Jordyep

reviews.text: I think that the premise was promising but the delivery left a lot to be desired. I guess it was interesting that in some ways the female was immature like the boys were, but she was still well beyond them. Many parts of the movie (narration, final scenes) just felt amateurish. follow me at or facebook IHATEBadMovies
reviews.author: AdamMorgan

summary: In Mexico, two teenage boys and an attractive older woman embark on a road trip and learn a thing or two about life, friendship, sex, and each other.

title: A Knight's Tale

reviews.text: My dad, rest his soul, really liked this and at the time it came out I was a pretentious college student that had forsaken all things fun and couldn't understand what my father could possibly like about it.
reviews.author: GenerationofSwine

reviews.text: This movie is just so goddamn charming. The cast is great. The story is mostly formulaic and the anachronisms amount to basically a gimmick, but you have to be heartless not to be won over by its charm anyway.
reviews.author: madhackrviper

reviews.text: I saw this in theaters 8 years before I met my Wife... We just watched it... Again, wIth our 11 and 8 year old sons for the ump-teeth time, and it holds up.. Love this movie, all the actors, and the soundtrack!

reviews.text: Should have > 90% though ;p Just rewatched it ... again. It has absolutely everything. An amazing setting, a brilliant story filled with dreams, fear, treason, humour, action, romance and adventure. to top it off its realy well produced and starring some amazing acting performances.

reviews.text: I went to see this at the cinema! It was _the_ movie of the summer for the MTV generation. Not having seen it in decades, I can't say I love it. The humor and the romance is corny in a very early 2000s way. People love it for nostalgia reasons, if we're being honest.
reviews.author: The_Argentinian

reviews.text: I saw someone saying that after saying Paul Bettany in this movie, it was impossible to not want Vision to live in Infinity war and now that i've seen this movie, i get it. He's simply awesome.

title: The Crow

reviews.text: First time seeing it in 2024... I assume people who grew up watching this will have liked it, being a product of it's time ans all. I however, did not enjoy it. Felt a bit too try hard emo.

reviews.text: The atmosphere is really dark and gritty. The plot is mediocre but serviceable. It's a sad story what happened to Brandon Lee and he gave a good performance.

reviews.text: I feel like so much more could have been done. I liked the Slasher with his dark and ominous presence but it just wasn't used well.

reviews.text: What a colossal disappointment this turned out to be. The story was absolutely ridiculous and the film didn't know what it wanted to be. Georgina Campbell gave a wooden performance and the only interesting thing in the movie was the [this movie], which they turned into a parody of other iconic movie killers like Jason vorhese, Michael Myers and Freddy Kruger. This movie literally turned into a dark comedy by the end.

reviews.text: Not the greatest [this movie] movie. But not complete trash. I think the main problem is in fact the ending. It feels like an afterthought and they changed it’s finale. Maybe that it has 2 story’s going on and they couldn’t decide how to end it. It’s worth a watch.
reviews.author: nytmare

reviews.text: Like others I really wanted to like this, but the execution was poor. I found it funny that the said the fatal shot was to the head, when he was sit in the shoulder. Guess they want to set up part 2.

summary: Following the brutal murder of her husband, a Kansas highway patrol officer sets out on a journey to track down the perpetrator. As the hunt progresses, she comes to realize the man responsible is a sadistic serial killer, and the depth of his mental depravity and his sinister agenda is more twisted than anyone could have imagined.

title: Miracle in Cell No. 7

reviews.text: So beautiful, moving and pure. Me being adamant about not crying and movies like this coming along and making me bawl my eyes out is the new norm suddenly and W H Y !!!
reviews.author: notyourhijabi

reviews.text: This movie is really a very emotional movie. It was the only movie where I cried from beginning to end. It conveys emotions very well. My advice is to watch it in its original language.
reviews.author: eglibrihen

reviews.text: Absolutely amazing movie that had me in tears throughout. So good! It's not afraid to defy stereotypes, which is another great thing it does. Don't hesitate any further, watch it now, it's unlikely that you'll regret it, especially if you're _already_ a fan of drama movies.
reviews.author: santosic

reviews.text: It shows the good side of humanity through both a dramatic and comedic lens. It is by far one of the best movies to watch, though in my opinion, the South Korean version remains unmatched.
reviews.author: AES-senpai

reviews.text: Like a TV commercial that tries to reach into your heart, _[this movie]_ / _7 Koğuştaki Mucize_ is as subtle as a hammer but occasionally hits you in the feels. It did, however, make me want to see the Korean original.
reviews.author: Saint Pauly

reviews.text: I am speechless this movie is undeniably amazing in every way!! Shook me to my core, very emotional, passionate and moving!! Prepare to cry a lot for this movie!! The tears are well worth this masterpiece!!
reviews.author: Isael Chan

summary: Separated from his daughter, a father with an intellectual disability must prove his innocence when he is jailed for the death of a commander's child.

title: Mama

reviews.text: I thoroughly enjoyed this. Not sure why e'rybody hatin on it. Reminiscent of Poltergeist, some scary parts, some edge of your seat parts, and yes, some predictable parts.
reviews.author: Schenley

reviews.text: Some wicked creature design and good child actors make up for [this movie]'s "unfinished" feeling. Jessica Chastain delivers as usual. Final rating:★★★ - I personally recommend you give it a go.
reviews.author: Gimly

reviews.text: It was creepy and when you don't see [this movie] was scary, but when you see more of her it looks wierd and unsettling. I though the movie was good and is ok to watch for horror.
reviews.author: diegomeste

reviews.text: This movie had all the thrills of a scary movie and the elements fright used in the film had everyone in my theater on the edge of the seat. The movie waist no time getting into the meat of the story.
reviews.author: AlexanderZ

reviews.text: Did I see the same film as everyone else? It was dreadful. The dialogue was awful, Chastain was awful, the movie wasn't quite sure what it wanted to be and was all over the place. Dull, cliched, twitchy, and painful.
reviews.author: izazael

reviews.text: I think the plot is not good but it is interesting. But I really couldn't with the effects to create the phantom. Also I couldn't with the idea of Jessica Chastain in a film like this.
reviews.author: ArielRodriguez

summary: Guillermo del Toro presents Mama, a supernatural thriller that tells the haunting tale of two little girls who disappeared into the woods the day that their parents were killed. When they are rescued years later and begin a new life, they find that someone or something still wants to come tuck them in at night.
